name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Barbara Lee is bold, she is fearless, and she will fight for you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Barbara has spent her whole life working for poor and working families in Oakland.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250220-4783-footer&t=1&akid=4783%2E420207%2EUX27lh)
Hi Peter, it's Pramila Jayapal —
**I’m reaching out to tell you there is only one choice for Mayor of Oakland this April, and that is my dear friend and fellow warrior for justice, Barbara Lee.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250220?refcode=em20250220-4783&amount=3&refcode2=4783_420207_UX27lh&akid=4783%2E420207%2EUX27lh)
**[Watch the video](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250220?amount=3&refcode=em20250220-4783&refcode2=4783_420207_UX27lh&akid=4783%2E420207%2EUX27lh)**
Barbara has spent her whole life working for poor and working families in Oakland.
She’s been absolutely committed to making sure that there is justice in our communities, and she’ll continue that work as mayor by investing in public safety, housing, and education for historically underserved communities.
**Barbara is bold, she is fearless, she will fight for you, and I am proud to support her for mayor. 💪🏾**
[**But she’s counting on our help to get elected, which is why I’m asking members of this grassroots team to donate directly to Barbara’s campaign today:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250220?refcode=em20250220-4783&amount=3&refcode2=4783_420207_UX27lh&akid=4783%2E420207%2EUX27lh)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250220?amount=3&refcode=em20250220-4783&refcode2=4783_420207_UX27lh&akid=4783%2E420207%2EUX27lh)**
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250220-4783-footer&t=2&refcode2=4783_420207_UX27lh&akid=4783%2E420207%2EUX27lh)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=3&akid=4783%2E420207%2EUX27lh)

Hi Peter, it's Pramila Jayapal — I’m reaching out to tell you there is only one choice for Mayor of Oakland this April, and that is my dear friend and fellow warrior for justice, Barbara Lee. Barbara has spent her whole life working for poor and working families in Oakland. She’s been absolutely committed to making sure that there is justice in our communities, and she’ll continue that work as mayor by investing in public safety, housing, and education for historically underserved communities. Barbara is bold, she is fearless, she will fight for you, and I am proud to support her for mayor. 💪🏾 In solidarity, Pramila Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: re: $12.5 million
body:
|
#
Last November, this coalition came together and kept MI-08 blue despite the fact that Donald Trump carried this district by 2%. We did it by connecting with our neighbors and shining a spotlight on the very real struggles people face every day – housing costs, childcare, prescription drugs, and the erosion of our fundamental rights. **But it wasn’t easy.** My opponent and outside GOP groups threw everything they had at us. They spent more than _$12.5 million_ dollars to defeat me. In fact, Elon Musk, the richest guy in the world who is actively taking a wrecking ball to the programs you and your family rely on, spent almost $1 million alone through his super PAC to try and buy this seat for the GOP. And the attacks aren’t stopping now. The same mega-donors who tried (and failed!) to take us down last time are already writing fresh checks to defeat me. Our team can’t waste a moment. We’re hitting the ground running to build our campaign back up and make sure we’re ready for everything they’ll throw our way. **[So, I’m hoping you’ll become a founding donor of my re-election campaign by chipping in $5 today. Anything you invest today will lay the groundwork for a successful fight to keep MI-08 blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102488325/529326828/-1606559029?refcode=em-2.20.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmZjZjNkYS1lNmVmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1YsKX-FtAigerGj4obZBWVdhpIl7rari_YH0BGHXA_4=)** __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102488333/529326835/-1606559029?refcode=em-2.20.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmZjZjNkYS1lNmVmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1YsKX-FtAigerGj4obZBWVdhpIl7rari_YH0BGHXA_4=)**

name: Jamie Long
subject: One month of Trump
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus DFL House Caucus
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-feb25?refcode=022025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-feb25?refcode=022025]
Friend,
T oday marks one month since Donald Trump took office. The damage that he’s already done has affected lives – spreading fear and making everyday life more expensive. We need to come together and fight for an economy and a future where everyone can get ahead, not just the wealthy and powerful.
We’re fighting to limit Donald Trump’s damage in Minnesota, but we need to win here to do that. Can you donate $10, $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can to help us stop Republicans' harmful agenda? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-feb25?refcode=022025]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: David Shadburn, LCV
subject: You’re Invited! How to Fight Back: Strategies to fight the national funding freeze w/ House Appropriations Committee Ranking Member Rep. Rosa DeLauro
body:
Q&A and how to take action!

If you are unable to see the message below, [click here to view](https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTIxNTU1ODgS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjE2MDMwNzA5NwS2&mt=1&rt=0).
| | | |
---
|
* * *
---
| | | | Peter,
---
| | With the current chaos of the Trump Administration raging all around us, many of us are wondering what we can do to help fight back. That’s why I’m inviting you to join me and House Appropriations Committee Ranking Member Rep. Rosa DeLauro this Monday to discuss the Trump Administration’s egregious attacks on climate and democracy via the national funding freeze. This unconstitutional funding freeze is harming everyday people nationwide and it is critical that activists like you and me mobilize to fight back.
---
| | Join us to hear how you can contribute to the fight, and how uplifting real stories of the human consequences of the freeze helps members of Congress to push back. There will be a Q&A with Rep. DeLauro, so submit your questions when you register or come with some prepared!
---
| | **WHEN:** Monday, February 24, at 8PM ET / 5PM PT
**WHERE:**[**ZOOM**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/vNR6fE_wVasL/bXovQzZKcFJTSDJkSnhuckJnTHgzSEs1ajdNZnpIOXhjRjc5MEpuOXlPeEozK1dZYWNZS3kzdVNRSUF4L1ZicTZUa2hrWnFxZURZWWZXR1ZWclpwaUYwUVIzeTAvWThCTVh4SlhaaUVQa009S0/)
[**RSVP NOW**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/9zEZMdP60ycb/bXovQzZKcFJTSDJkSnhuckJnTHgzSEs1ajdNZnpIOXhjRjc5MEpuOXlPeEozK1dZYWNZS3kzdVNRSUF4L1ZicTZUa2hrWnFxZURZWWZXR1ZWclpwaUYwUVIzeTAvWThCTVh4SlhaaUVQa009S0/)
---
| | This fight is going to be long and tough Peter, but by coming together we can work to protect our families, communities, and climate from these unconstitutional and unjust attacks. [**Please, join me Monday night to learn more and stay motivated to keep up the work.**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/x_yzTgWR23M3/bXovQzZKcFJTSDJkSnhuckJnTHgzSEs1ajdNZnpIOXhjRjc5MEpuOXlPeEozK1dZYWNZS3kzdVNRSUF4L1ZicTZUa2hrWnFxZURZWWZXR1ZWclpwaUYwUVIzeTAvWThCTVh4SlhaaUVQa009S0/)
---
| | I hope to see you there,
---
| | David Shadburn
Senior Government Affairs Advocate, Climate Change & Clean Energy
League of Conservation Voters
---
| | |
* * *
---
| | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,[ _update your contact information_](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12155588&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjE2MDMwNzA5NwS2&spReportId=MjE2MDMwNzA5NwS2) _._ [_Click here to unsubscribe_](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12155588&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjE2MDMwNzA5NwS2&spReportId=MjE2MDMwNzA5NwS2) from our supporter list. name: Royce White
subject: RFK Jr. was the first step

body:

Peter,

**We needed Robert F. Kennedy Jr.** He was the first step to reclaim our country. For too long, America has been one of the most unhealthy countries in the world. From our obesity rates to the rise of chronic illnesses, something is wrong with our nation.

RFK Jr. is Making America Healthy Again.

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=081483c9f9df400eb5ad525f62fd3113&_e=qKaDajv3ZwciRkylSnwz9_uP6KT8dXGxtLjkOGGaEP13bl8SPSYRZ_OHWlKSH4BryVLByP0ThVet8Pa3Sy-DNjc513m5kDPXvfQtkLBo5rxN1ZMJw6bo5Qqfcu9e2odYw961xdoCXN26pmQjTu58Y9pSVb_RUf6kbX49oRwjciG4sJsEmI43OAvDSfk6IsaZh2HUVEpdxlG4e6kG3nPnzxFmgv-9ufcSQCq8nMdYXV_yrTvKzdAVWDzn_jkLOz2Woz2kvC83YWZpdtCGL8lgGcvL5tfwng7Fh5lfwJAXp021K673cbL76lVvb4omW9006vaMv3HwphH7PMyMgxY8sw%3D%3D)
[**Now, I’m the next step to Making America Great Again.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=081483c9f9df400eb5ad525f62fd3113&_e=qKaDajv3ZwciRkylSnwz9_uP6KT8dXGxtLjkOGGaEP13bl8SPSYRZ_OHWlKSH4BryVLByP0ThVet8Pa3Sy-DNjc513m5kDPXvfQtkLBo5rxN1ZMJw6bo5Qqfcu9e2odYw961xdoCXN26pmQjTu58Y9pSVb_RUf6kbX49oRwjciG4sJsEmI43OAvDSfk6IsaZ_L7fQeVGevD76FbuNsa9cZMFDZKoLEpYTqXJwZDMwErInL8FOwxgdE1ZZGUuT1Q4B4rv0lhGk8ssUWDyLTA5PddwfyOgoLxmoH2FKoklcE2grSQrCMJwsIV9B0wAAodHS7QA3uM9EqRNF1090Jvedg%3D%3D)

As your next U.S. Senator, I’ll always fight alongside President Trump and RFK Jr. America has shown glimpses into what Minnesota has already become – a Liberal safe haven to push the most Radical Woke propaganda and agenda that we’ve ever seen in this country.

[**Will you stand with me as I fight to take down the Radical Left in Minnesota?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=081483c9f9df400eb5ad525f62fd3113&_e=qKaDajv3ZwciRkylSnwz9_uP6KT8dXGxtLjkOGGaEP13bl8SPSYRZ_OHWlKSH4BryVLByP0ThVet8Pa3Sy-DNjc513m5kDPXvfQtkLBo5rxN1ZMJw6bo5Qqfcu9e2odYw961xdoCXN26pmQjTu58Y9pSVb_RUf6kbX49oRwjciG4sJsEmI43OAvDSfk6IsaZA7o7EpbPzDZ-OUvSkOBFqEUWxUcsotaRW_K8yPpzlG0ty88c7O37xa8y6_r7rNNzgz-0OcIdj7jaW8qRKxvhthboHqN3SNE3SzpyohP6FKLFNZTOOTKtJW2gtxSJfutuVbpJsnfa88qvC7wQSZHcHw%3D%3D)

I played basketball in D1 college and in the NBA, and I still play today in the Big 3 League. I know all too well how important it is to stay active and healthy. Whether it’s to keep in shape and avoid chronic illness or to keep your mind sharp to eloquently dismantle the Radical Left, our health is our most valuable asset.

RFK Jr. understands this, and so does President Trump. Big Pharma has bought out Radical Leftists in Minnesota to mandate vaccines, pump us full of chemicals in our food, and profit off our lack of health.

Minnesota Democrats and Big Pharma are TERRIFIED of my American First Movement. But that must mean I’m doing something right.

[**Can you chip in $15 before midnight to help my campaign?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=081483c9f9df400eb5ad525f62fd3113&_e=qKaDajv3ZwciRkylSnwz9_uP6KT8dXGxtLjkOGGaEP13bl8SPSYRZ_OHWlKSH4BryVLByP0ThVet8Pa3Sy-DNjc513m5kDPXvfQtkLBo5rxN1ZMJw6bo5Qqfcu9e2odYw961xdoCXN26pmQjTu58Y9pSVb_RUf6kbX49oRwjciG4sJsEmI43OAvDSfk6IsaZ4JAh6QL7RUj59m_xbnkTrcySBBk7Upt9srluWC37j6tKiP2risEzDfwOFP-q-TmTrJr47cjkhW2430J9czAX6Q_KpF1rPpZz_Am7jxNENLW-WvLyRt-I1PgJPb1638-JP6mkeTg3CrstixndfQwGTw%3D%3D)

Thank you,
Royce White

| [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=081483c9f9df400eb5ad525f62fd3113&_e=qKaDajv3ZwciRkylSnwz9_uP6KT8dXGxtLjkOGGaEP13bl8SPSYRZ_OHWlKSH4BryVLByP0ThVet8Pa3Sy-DNjc513m5kDPXvfQtkLBo5rxN1ZMJw6bo5Qqfcu9e2odYw961xdoCXN26pmQjTu58Y9pSVb_RUf6kbX49oRwjciG4sJsEmI43OAvDSfk6IsaZGL7CgZp3cv3_IDoYBzOflIsdveC-zCQ4S4FleP2eFRpudLfEmaX3tgITrmUHl3E5WgjJvY0L0QeSHJUCZmqgdb4qOLHLUN5jHyfPpiBHs2PkhOUuL5ahnOVwfYbKMALo8iLWbARGAnTHwLGV7Fem6A%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=081483c9f9df400eb5ad525f62fd3113&_e=qKaDajv3ZwciRkylSnwz9_uP6KT8dXGxtLjkOGGaEP13bl8SPSYRZ_OHWlKSH4BryVLByP0ThVet8Pa3Sy-DNjc513m5kDPXvfQtkLBo5rxN1ZMJw6bo5Qqfcu9e2odYw961xdoCXN26pmQjTu58Y9pSVb_RUf6kbX49oRwjciG4sJsEmI43OAvDSfk6IsaZ6tHKJFfGibgTuldhkMFyQ_NSHTMKoFKkse0PCRupMrGLda9Nleejs98T9MOHT6pmPfSqd9i8GoUcDP803TuF7bAPbvIg8ElAMQrFcsJ_9NhLf2i8pd8X-BeoMdsoPDTlZQdwjXaB5tY15uElnx10rg%3D%3D)

Elon Musk is bankrolling Brad Schimel’s Supreme Court campaign because they know Wisconsin’s highest court can stop their lawless coup. Brad Schimel would be a rubber-stamp for Musk and Trump’s assault on constitutional checks and balances, giving themselves sole power to enrich the ultra-wealthy at the expense of the rest of us.
**This is a watershed moment in this election.** A MAGA Supreme Court in Wisconsin could reverse our progress on fair state legislative maps and lock in power for far-right legislators, and give them the power to overturn elections when they don’t like the results.
**Brad Schimel has cut shady deals for campaign cash his entire career, but now he’s cut the biggest and shadiest deal of his political life.** With only 40 days until Election Day, WisDems needs your support right now to make sure voters learn about the stakes, reject Elon Musk’s hostile takeover of Wisconsin’s Supreme Court, and elect Judge Susan Crawford.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Turn America back to Godly values
body:
Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fc032ff81bb342bc923af766c739a4fe&_e=tDHfRYDKQ6RNRkAPKVUTiMxB6xIncrT19Hh93std5KEXxucCgyuoPWUeWxOFbIvLretk89MlEQRS0hCieX4ziDFZELW5C51C5BOdZP3-CcsdrfStMTnkYvBfoEOgf1bh7hvctHjTUG_nsUgzXrTVAfoo8_mkU97Wp2zHKirgDzd_-DkP_dP9j4fgyXJzCXBo6vDRsWawBKFIIPmbyMFkvsrnZi_QKy8k7N_0LoytO8TjvSN9BvfrNj7FFgGVU6XXdgvRngF2S-54gBQZR4uk-hhwaxrNm_B9bTVKnzsaUY9PuHY_IZSI3fkOnh6yA7A55WVH2SU5-3a47jlCJrwXUJMQEqBzHbMEW5FNBL73RHf_rabvXAEx8BZozKRVv3y82MUkBJhDvj_np_YyTlEtSg%3D%3D)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fc032ff81bb342bc923af766c739a4fe&_e=tDHfRYDKQ6RNRkAPKVUTiMxB6xIncrT19Hh93std5KEXxucCgyuoPWUeWxOFbIvLretk89MlEQRS0hCieX4ziDFZELW5C51C5BOdZP3-CcsdrfStMTnkYvBfoEOgf1bh7hvctHjTUG_nsUgzXrTVAfoo8_mkU97Wp2zHKirgDzd_-DkP_dP9j4fgyXJzCXBo6vDRsWawBKFIIPmbyMFkvsrnZi_QKy8k7N_0LoytO8RqiVbwZd743u-Dv90YBf5rZ4W49u9JoAjPo12F4lP5_V0WGOhqTpU16V9v_-aH0laPA5JSNhsTOpHPYczs6z0IW3v0PD_rS7ZAFZ1115idzNtPiLbNq1H5GZ-QFwpz0ztvmZQOWGMUKGBTLiOROoSnaShClW7IFhZT3474b0Zlbw%3D%3D)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fc032ff81bb342bc923af766c739a4fe&_e=tDHfRYDKQ6RNRkAPKVUTiMxB6xIncrT19Hh93std5KEXxucCgyuoPWUeWxOFbIvLretk89MlEQRS0hCieX4ziDFZELW5C51C5BOdZP3-CcsdrfStMTnkYvBfoEOgf1bh7hvctHjTUG_nsUgzXrTVAfoo8_mkU97Wp2zHKirgDzd_-DkP_dP9j4fgyXJzCXBo6vDRsWawBKFIIPmbyMFkvsrnZi_QKy8k7N_0LoytO8Tbj7M5cVo__NKlSRFwrBVAOk-UKu9RlQWHW8wsJkeMjpT6lEKg5SaV_ZyXGZoiJFXZt-rxOCtZg7wPL9VP2bBfdPfSifwqsBXMqBErBWBtMxAAM42TqnqRPWOSGJfH77NHFkWpTLHQzvl7WmjcOF9QumgvoDbJCY_aAjvnedeNrw%3D%3D) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fc032ff81bb342bc923af766c739a4fe&_e=tDHfRYDKQ6RNRkAPKVUTiMxB6xIncrT19Hh93std5KEXxucCgyuoPWUeWxOFbIvLretk89MlEQRS0hCieX4ziDFZELW5C51C5BOdZP3-CcsdrfStMTnkYvBfoEOgf1bh7hvctHjTUG_nsUgzXrTVAfoo8_mkU97Wp2zHKirgDzd_-DkP_dP9j4fgyXJzCXBo6vDRsWawBKFIIPmbyMFkvsrnZi_QKy8k7N_0LoytO8S4HYXZfZu9IaOt2Rh2Sr6kOfWHHbSsx8VyTHmtMs-d7ajZqu-z5Hvuu4TUEinvU0vndSYxr_d80sA19qhG0JbpkfnqouUpxMCCcGahRbZ2BfW_BLZLpB0UVjntbL1eURuN1tn7ci2BDc0W9BSxDqRioiLKxOCDS1XQqMlFHnrLRw%3D%3D)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fc032ff81bb342bc923af766c739a4fe&_e=tDHfRYDKQ6RNRkAPKVUTiMxB6xIncrT19Hh93std5KEXxucCgyuoPWUeWxOFbIvLretk89MlEQRS0hCieX4ziDFZELW5C51C5BOdZP3-CcsdrfStMTnkYvBfoEOgf1bh7hvctHjTUG_nsUgzXrTVAfoo8_mkU97Wp2zHKirgDzd_-DkP_dP9j4fgyXJzCXBo6vDRsWawBKFIIPmbyMFkvsrnZi_QKy8k7N_0LoytO8Rbpzaasqz0n1xjzVTLc3IPzZuCT-2eRr6tkuRc_LXljDv-95MqDHf6mPhj4KnHmEwcmW80yU1V4i6pCyAJ516l-PJ5HeiWF2lD-krd2BEbG14cgu7BIe-nKKG9AVQtCdH18D4IAhegSE6QjJZ7PrDjuHbhuOQFkZ7h64F4rNl2vw%3D%3D)** There's no time to waste. clean_body: Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. : Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you've seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television. >Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special "Thank You" for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. name: Team Fetterman
subject: John just voted NO on Kash Patel’s nomination for FBI Director.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
John came into this with an open mind, and at the end of the day he’s always willing to work with anyone, where he can, to get wins for PA.
#
Derek, it's Team Fetterman.
Over the past couple of months John’s met with most of Donald Trump’s cabinet nominees, watched their confirmation hearings, and thought carefully about how to vote on their nominations.
He came into this with an open mind, and at the end of the day he’s always willing to work with anyone, where he can, to get wins for PA.
**But after carefully considering all the facts, today John voted NO on Kash Patel’s nomination for FBI Director.**
Pennsylvanians — and all Americans — deserve an FBI Director who will stay focused on keeping us all safe, not elevate conspiracy theories or go after perceived political “enemies.”
John’s working every day to do what’s best for PA, but he’s counting on yinz + youse to help him keep going.
[**If you want to help John keep fighting these fights in the Senate, will you pitch in $5 to our campaign today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250220?refcode=em20250220-9924&refcode2=9924_434096_bbblXZ&akid=9924%2E434096%2EbbblXZ)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250220?amount=5&refcode=em20250220-9924&refcode2=9924_434096_bbblXZ&akid=9924%2E434096%2EbbblXZ)**
—Team Fetterman 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20250220-9924-footer&t=1&refcode2=9924_434096_bbblXZ&akid=9924%2E434096%2EbbblXZ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

| Peter,

Year after year, Emerge continues to be one of the most successful Democratic organizations in the country. Our team is dedicated to recruiting and training women and equipping them with the tools they need to win elections, fight for our values, and deliver real results!

**In an election year where Democrats lost ground, Emerge alums held the line – _flipping and holding onto critical seats across the country._**

With a hostile president set on undoing all of our progress, _we can’t afford to slow down._ This is what Emerge has been building towards over the last 20 years. Together, we can protect and build on the gains Emerge alums have made by securing representation for our next generation of women leaders. The New American Majority of Black, Brown, Indigenous women, women of color, as well as young, LGBTQ+, and unmarried women are our today and tomorrow.

An investment in Emerge is an investment in our country's future. Every donation allows us to identify, recruit, and train even more women to lead our communities during these uncertain times. With a hostile president set on undoing all of our progress, we can’t afford to slow down. This is what Emerge has been building towards over the last 20 years. Together, we can protect and build on the gains Emerge alums have made by securing representation for our next generation of women leaders. The New American Majority of Black, Brown, Indigenous women, women of color, as well as young, LGBTQ+, and unmarried women are our today and tomorrow. An investment in Emerge is an investment in our country's future. # FROM THE DESK OF NEWT GINGRICH
---
| | Dear Reader,I'm pleased to share with you that The New York Sun is now carrying my exclusive weekly column. In it, I'll weigh in on the most pressing matters facing our country - **and there are many.** Our nation has lost its way. Many politicians and major institutions are corrupt. Leading corporations are following their lead.
---
| | [ JOIN THE SUN FOR 1¢ ->](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1c909c4de0724c7c8ac8289b10341044&_e=mH-IwhMaIBbYXQ74FGRxgpQfO-XIWsGeUuwgnJHEk-3FRKMz_xYgm0xgW2-GZXm8CaAPUT1WvB7IUYgkjvS1fqemWUk0usJzUq-mT3jvGK3s4fE4irKDhbye9zj0XjidjjBenqOTWXkLGSU_fb6JckDBTgK1rmv2agmza-I-kCFThhIFdvPAzFMzOqmWYW4GBhRQmc3vPOmu5pVxJ6GupzpDSg3fny2t461TJt8hGFfMY3_pylNM2aXWpdbKer62pXGDhNqs0nw8-fYZbA5e-6BmvDSnRtl74WOiUtNgDNNIZQzh5I3TDvLO-Td9BQMTD22Up_xfhF501PkTPO2KaZS1vaU_iZouHoHkYJ8l24RxAJV_sKBG-7-zgmsgnwfYhLANfxGFppc2VtdVCVFvwFkw1TzlbGaOQbh3pXo17RY%3D)
---
| | But it's the corruption of the media that has me most concerned. In my 70-year career in American politics, I've never seen it so bad. For this reason, **I 've chosen The New York Sun as a partner.** It's a paper that shines like a beacon amid a sea of lies and misinformation. It has done so for nearly 200 years. It's a patriotic paper that lives and breathes American values. It places our Constitution front and center and has long been among its most valiant defenders. It remains our nation's most effective counterweight to The New York Times, which has bizarrely claimed the title of "paper of record" but speaks for so few of our fellow citizens.Now more than ever, the battle for the future of our nation starts with the restoration of real American journalism, and The New York Sun is devoted to that mission. It truly "shines for all." But I know what the Sun is up against. All the cards are stacked against us.**To win, we need you to join us.** To join The New York Sun is to join the movement to save America. Membership starts at just 1 cent per day.
---

name: Ron Wyden
subject: We have to save the CFPB
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102490295/529353679/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmEyNjRkNS1lZGVmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hsD2IKpieXU-WaPSmuPt8dl2GXHDl882BaoBfDeKrmY=&emci=05ad965e-e2ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=2ba264d5-edef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=9818364)
---

| | First, it was USAID. Then, the Department of Education. **Now, Elon Musk and Donald Trump are working to kneecap the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB).** Last week, they ordered the CFPB to cease all operations. I'm sure it's no coincidence that Republicans want to gut the CFPB after it was gearing up to regulate the activities of big tech billionaires like Musk... [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102490296/529353680/302306209?ms=2025-02-20-cfpb&refcode=2025-02-20-cfpb&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmEyNjRkNS1lZGVmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hsD2IKpieXU-WaPSmuPt8dl2GXHDl882BaoBfDeKrmY=&emci=05ad965e-e2ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=2ba264d5-edef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=9818364) The CFPB protects consumers against predatory loans, price-gouging, and predatory banks, and it's saved consumers over $20 billion. It shines a light on corporate greed and corruption. So *of course* Trump and Republicans are abusing their newfound power to immediately and illegally dismantle it. Right now, American families are worried about how to pay their bills. Meanwhile, whether it's dismantling the CFPB or dangerous tariffs, Trump and Republicans are doing everything in their power to make it more expensive for you. In these times of economic uncertainty when families are struggling to pay bills while corporations rake in record profits, the CFPB has _never_ been more essential. So we have to fight to save it. [**I hope you'll join me and sign our petition to protect the CFPB. We need to send the message that Trump and Republicans need to protect consumers, not big business.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102490297/529353681/302306209?ms=2025-02-20-cfpb&refcode=2025-02-20-cfpb&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmEyNjRkNS1lZGVmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hsD2IKpieXU-WaPSmuPt8dl2GXHDl882BaoBfDeKrmY=&emci=05ad965e-e2ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=2ba264d5-edef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=9818364) [Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102490298/529353682/302306209?ms=2025-02-20-cfpb&refcode=2025-02-20-cfpb&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmEyNjRkNS1lZGVmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hsD2IKpieXU-WaPSmuPt8dl2GXHDl882BaoBfDeKrmY=&emci=05ad965e-e2ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=2ba264d5-edef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=9818364) One of the proudest votes in the Senate was to establish the CFPB. I'll be damned if we let a couple of oligarchs illegally dismantle it. clean_body: | | | | First, it was USAID. Then, the Department of Education. Now, Elon Musk and Donald Trump are working to kneecap the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB). Last week, they ordered the CFPB to cease all operations. I'm sure it's no coincidence that Republicans want to gut the CFPB after it was gearing up to regulate the activities of big tech billionaires like Musk... The CFPB protects consumers against predatory loans, price-gouging, and predatory banks, and it's saved consumers over $20 billion. It shines a light on corporate greed and corruption. So of course Trump and Republicans are abusing their newfound power to immediately and illegally dismantle it. Right now, American families are worried about how to pay their bills. Meanwhile, whether it's dismantling the CFPB or dangerous tariffs, Trump and Republicans are doing everything in their power to make it more expensive for you. In these times of economic uncertainty when families are struggling to pay bills while corporations rake in record profits, the CFPB has never been more essential. So we have to fight to save it. One of the proudest votes in the Senate was to establish the CFPB. I'll be damned if we let a couple of oligarchs illegally dismantle it. name: Mark Warner
subject: I’m on my way to the Senate floor to try and stop Republicans from cutting taxes for the ultra-wealthy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102490720/529358777/785955224?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_budget_250220_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTBiMTQzZC1lZmVmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gOLlDvEQrZiY2oRNwzuSkWVa_eOYmbRWg8zyeDFP4-c=) Derek,

I’m headed to the Senate floor to try and stop Republicans’ proposed budget resolution that will enact President Trump’s right-wing agenda.

**The GOP’s #1 goal? Pass a budget that allows them to dramatically slash the federal government so they can pay for their $4.5 trillion tax cut for America's billionaires.**

_**[I’ll be on the floor all night fighting to stop it. Will you rush a $5 donation right now to fuel this important work?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102490723/529358780/785955224?amount=5&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_budget_250220_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTBiMTQzZC1lZmVmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gOLlDvEQrZiY2oRNwzuSkWVa_eOYmbRWg8zyeDFP4-c=)**_

Republicans aren’t slashing the federal government to redeploy it for better means, they’re doing it to give their billionaire buddies a massive tax break. Listen, I have no problem with people being successful, but everybody in our country needs to pay their fair share. It’s appalling that Republicans want to cut services that folks need to survive just to give the richest Americans a tax cut.

All night, my Democratic colleagues and I will be on the floor exposing Republicans’ worst-laid schemes—because unfortunately, tax breaks for the wealthy are just the beginning, Derek.

**Their budget bill also funds Trump’s mass deportations and his border wall.**

This budget has one purpose: give the wealthiest Americans megatrillion dollar tax breaks and make the everyday American pay for it. It’s unacceptable.

[_**I’m doing everything I can in Washington to stop this budget from passing and to protect Virginians and Americans from the GOP’s destruction. Will you pitch in anything you can ahead of our all night vote-a-rama?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102490731/529358783/785955224?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_budget_250220_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTBiMTQzZC1lZmVmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gOLlDvEQrZiY2oRNwzuSkWVa_eOYmbRWg8zyeDFP4-c=)

The fight continues,

Mark Warner

subject: Peter, have you heard what we’ve been working on?
body:
| | | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102491616/529368929/-733982340?am=20&contactdata=loO3zTfvfdBJ424+smIs4nNy+hHU/4aVbFTjBNajTBGDpJ8bVY6hn0SvEN6wVvxvO6GwZKVRvslj/7NdjxgZjYvvHNZ2EotZ37x9NrWg0AeGL76uDI+D1RmjAKId8CIP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM0NWQ4ZTU1LWYxZWYtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=j9B-nF8LwovWLtPJIwr_nxSd4XmraQqW7pwgTPl8sQo=&emci=e4484827-1cef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=345d8e55-f1ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230)

Hi Peter, We’ve been in session for almost a month now, and as a valued member of our organization, I want to make sure you’re up-to-date on all that we’ve been working on and all the heavy weight we’ve been lifting for our climate. [**Will you help us lift the weight of climate action this session? **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102491617/529368930/-733982340?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM0NWQ4ZTU1LWYxZWYtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=j9B-nF8LwovWLtPJIwr_nxSd4XmraQqW7pwgTPl8sQo=&emci=e4484827-1cef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=345d8e55-f1ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230) Going into this session we anticipated having to do a great deal of defense on the climate progress we’ve already made. There have already been 2 Major Threats to our climate and environment: HB 3119 that would delay our clean truck rules and threaten our clean air, and SB 777, a reappeared Major Threat from previous sessions that would multiply up to 7 times the amount already paid for livestock confirmed killed or injured by wolves. Regardless of this defense, we set ambitious legislative goals, because that’s exactly what this moment requires. We’re already working hard to pass a transportation package that centers climate and equity, advance solutions for more affordable clean energy, protect Oregonians from sky-high rate hikes by holding utility companies accountable, andto safeguard our streamflows by protecting Oregon’s water. For more information on our [Priorities for a Healthy Oregon](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102491618/529368931/-932142823?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM0NWQ4ZTU1LWYxZWYtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=j9B-nF8LwovWLtPJIwr_nxSd4XmraQqW7pwgTPl8sQo=&emci=e4484827-1cef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=345d8e55-f1ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230), please visit [this webpage](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102491619/529368932/-932142823?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM0NWQ4ZTU1LWYxZWYtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=j9B-nF8LwovWLtPJIwr_nxSd4XmraQqW7pwgTPl8sQo=&emci=e4484827-1cef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=345d8e55-f1ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230). This isn’t the moment for us to back down on our commitments. Now is the time to stand up and show what Oregonians value and what we won’t stand for, while we continue to lead on climate action across the country. [**The more power we have united, the stronger we are, and therefore the more we can lift and accomplish. Will you help us lift the weight of climate action this session?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102491620/529368933/-733982340?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM0NWQ4ZTU1LWYxZWYtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=j9B-nF8LwovWLtPJIwr_nxSd4XmraQqW7pwgTPl8sQo=&emci=e4484827-1cef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=345d8e55-f1ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230)

But what helped us make that difference? Our members like _you_. clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, We’ve been in session for almost a month now, and as a valued member of our organization, I want to make sure you’re up-to-date on all that we’ve been working on and all the heavy weight we’ve been lifting for our climate. Going into this session we anticipated having to do a great deal of defense on the climate progress we’ve already made. There have already been 2 Major Threats to our climate and environment: HB 3119 that would delay our clean truck rules and threaten our clean air, and SB 777, a reappeared Major Threat from previous sessions that would multiply up to 7 times the amount already paid for livestock confirmed killed or injured by wolves. Regardless of this defense, we set ambitious legislative goals, because that’s exactly what this moment requires. We’re already working hard to pass a transportation package that centers climate and equity, advance solutions for more affordable clean energy, protect Oregonians from sky-high rate hikes by holding utility companies accountable, andto safeguard our streamflows by protecting Oregon’s water. For more information on our , please visit . This isn’t the moment for us to back down on our commitments. Now is the time to stand up and show what Oregonians value and what we won’t stand for, while we continue to lead on climate action across the country. | | | Together, I know we can do this. During Trump’s last presidential term, we didn’t back down. Instead, we made sure that Oregon’s clean air and water standards remained at the level they were before Trump took office. Here at OLCV, we understand the importance of state work. But what helped us make that difference? Our members like you. Our members are the driving force behind all of our work to protect our state’s natural legacy, and to fight for a climate safe future for all of us.** | | | | Here’s how your gift helps us stop these Major Threats and get our Priorities for a Healthy Oregon across the finish line: A gift of $50 is all it takes to recruit a volunteer to write a letter to the editor (LTE); A gift of $60 helps us recruit 5 people to talk to their legislators in person at a lobby day in Salem; And, $120 helps a volunteer testify for one of our priorities. With all of us lifting up these Priorities for a Healthy Oregon, and putting our foot down on these Major Threats, think of what we can accomplish. The fight begins with you. Thank you for your support. Much gratitude, Lindsey Scholten (she/her) OLCV Executive Director | | | | | ---|---|--- Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Daniel Greenfield
subject: These individuals have enormous power and zero accountability
body:
| | | The results? A shocking record of waste and outright betrayal of the American people.
---
| |
---
| | Friend, For decades, the **USAID** has operated as a rogue entity, funneling billions of taxpayer dollars into wasteful, left-wing pet projects and even terrorist organizations—with virtually no oversight or accountability.The results? A shocking record of waste and outright betrayal of the American people. Here are just a few examples of what _Freedom Center Investigates_ ' exclusive investigation found.USAID has been directing YOUR tax dollars to enemy countries:
---
**$2.3B** to Somalia including **$200,000** for global warming prep **$3.7B** for Afghanistan including **$16** million to promote “positive masculinity”**$3.4B** to Yemen including for an “art exhibition” while our countries are at war**$700M** to Iraq including opening the first movie theater in Nineveh**$3.4B** to Syria including almost a million COVID masks**$1.1B** to Lebanon including or promoting “youth activism”
---
Our investigation found that USAID spent over $18 billion on Islamic terror states and $9.3 billion on countries responsible for killing over 3,000 American soldiers.It's outrageous. And that's just the beginning.And how did they get away with it _?_**_Because MASSIVE government unions have been protecting these bureaucrats from accountability..._** Friend, it’s time to take them down. Gutting the agencies is not enough – the unions who have facilitated this madness must go.** ** **[**That is why the results of this NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS will be tabulated and delivered to the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=317766c6e76b4ec7997b5270b488904d&_e=QvOw4V-Yq2h-WJ6F_31zi-Sg71yyJ_XroAOLKVqu_bpFQNvinsRzBgW4ufG3Gn1r8EQkNv9gTQeQw8AHyYi52WW2oIHQF2yo9UW_0B6jPe6TY4KrrErImpMJ9lLE3waenitWUnYUcN7yUMWXL_u3H6coRg9CGnCPfE3fcdZob_hV8Xu1xZTnQCWOlnYOV_10vZQ1uQk_kqcVpml49O_NYLj6GvLKV6P6KOjGuVo89cfjleNoV1Mq7cp9gc46lX5jK6tpr3xwQi1Rc79jGt6s8ywK8za6gV9KDnTGaPKPRWfybcXVV0T5XESe08jpAFc-h8fWcT3sGd17NwOTM5B18cO_00XkpLnOWS6HMw87AUAwR0OprMx1yhJPDoST-_9nZapcZzvBGs1DZrxXG7PPCIuXTaHIU99FgvEc4VnRim4%3D)** Your participation is of the utmost importance.
---
* _Do you believe it’s acceptable that only 6% of federal employees show up in person for a full work week. And if you remove security guards, janitors, facilities and maintenance personnel, the number drops to 1%.__ _
* _Did you know that in addition to 15 cabinet departments, there are over 2,000 federal agencies?_
* _Were you aware that leasing and maintenance costs for federal office buildings costs $15.7 billion per year?_
* _Or that the occupancy of these buildings is 12% on average?_
* _What about the fact that it’s nearly impossible to fire a federal employee?_

---
These are the questions on part one of the **[**NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=317766c6e76b4ec7997b5270b488904d&_e=QvOw4V-Yq2h-WJ6F_31zi-Sg71yyJ_XroAOLKVqu_bpFQNvinsRzBgW4ufG3Gn1r8EQkNv9gTQeQw8AHyYi52WW2oIHQF2yo9UW_0B6jPe6TY4KrrErImpMJ9lLE3waenitWUnYUcN7yUMWXL_u3H6coRg9CGnCPfE3fcdZob_hV8Xu1xZTnQCWOlnYOV_10vZQ1uQk_kqcVpml49O_NYLj6GvLKV6P6KOjGuVo89cfjleNoV1Mq7cp9gc46lX5jK6tpr3xwQi1Rc79jGt6s82QH529jNRNqnCA2okji1EGYAzE2h-Tqb4tPYpNOoAU_7MQKjRWcHieiL1SOwNoHpphMZ2RAmE6nJSBWimaI5-qxG-D9QOpe2iYzncDCVn3M8U-vf4x5xMXy8DVNKR1eJ5B4Yh09S0h9Yf4zqb9lfUA%3D)** And if you think these questions are infuriating, just wait until you hear what makes up part two of the survey. You see, part two is concerned with the actions of those government employees who actually do show up for work, but who spend every hour of the day plotting to undermine the will of duly elected presidents and ignore duly passed legislation.In other words, the radical deep-state. These are the bureaucrats who’ve burrowed deep into the federal government (often they served as political appointees in a leftwing administration, but refuse to leave after that administration ends, becoming, instead, career “civil servants”).CIA. FBI. National Security Council. State Department. Pentagon. Hostile agents at the highest levels of these departments spent four years leaking, lying, and unleashing lawfare against the first Trump Administration.
---
* _Shouldn’t the people we elect to run the government actually run the government?_
* _Shouldn’t members of the executive branch work in good faith to advance the vision and policies of the head of the executive branch?_
* _Shouldn’t any bureaucrat who can’t respect the U.S. Constitution leave government service?_
* _Shouldn’t it be an enormous “red flag” that Kamala Harris won 93% of the vote in Washington DC and the fact that roughly 95% of campaign contributions by government bureaucrats go to Democrats?_

---
You and I both know that the Constitution of the United States grants no power to unelected federal bureaucrats. Yet these individuals have enormous power and zero accountability. It’s bad enough you and I are being ripped off financially (covered in part one of your survey).But what’s worse is the reality that our votes and our constitutional republic are being ripped off and wholly undermined by these unions (part two of you survey). In short, this is an attack on the very foundations of our country. It’s part of the Marxist playbook that is destroying America.Today, I’m asking you to help the Freedom Center in exposing the threat posed by government unions to the mandate delivered by American voters in the 2024 election. **[**Your NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS is the key to reaffirming this mandate by demonstrating the consensus that exists to remove the obstructionist deep-state.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=317766c6e76b4ec7997b5270b488904d&_e=QvOw4V-Yq2h-WJ6F_31zi-Sg71yyJ_XroAOLKVqu_bpFQNvinsRzBgW4ufG3Gn1r8EQkNv9gTQeQw8AHyYi52WW2oIHQF2yo9UW_0B6jPe6TY4KrrErImpMJ9lLE3waenitWUnYUcN7yUMWXL_u3H6coRg9CGnCPfE3fcdZob_hV8Xu1xZTnQCWOlnYOV_10vZQ1uQk_kqcVpml49O_NYLj6GvLKV6P6KOjGuVo89cfjleNoV1Mq7cp9gc46lX5jK6tpr3xwQi1Rc79jGt6s8zWFOWusGgYcp4gvs8Jw68K-GvA1SCEpuAYWPv7OyeqZTB71L2x38VdjDITIoEnw8oonqa-MZAMQiGzYOtlpI0rf0-7aJJMw-x8RN-_26HHzWgSNnEVrSNujEwwwfUtuzTv6LAlgj1EpC1re3MBooYY%3D)** Please complete it as soon as possible. The Freedom Center is spearheading this movement. We’re gaining traction, spreading the word, and getting results.And our investigative journalism is being amplified by huge names like **Elon Musk, Charlie Kirk, Steve Bannon, Mark Levin, Ayaan Hirsi Ali, Larry Elder.** Now is the time to push forward while we have the momentum. It is vitally important that we circulate 1 million of these surveys, so there can be no doubt where our country stands on this issue.Because if the threat of government unions is not broken, banned, and outlawed over the next two years... then it _never_ will. As I mentioned, the results of this survey will be reported to Elon Musk and the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) whose charter expires on July 4, 2026 – on our nation’s 250th birthday. You see, we’ve got a very tight deadline to accomplish this mission. **[That’s why I’m asking you to complete your NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS without delay.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=317766c6e76b4ec7997b5270b488904d&_e=QvOw4V-Yq2h-WJ6F_31zi-Sg71yyJ_XroAOLKVqu_bpFQNvinsRzBgW4ufG3Gn1r8EQkNv9gTQeQw8AHyYi52WW2oIHQF2yo9UW_0B6jPe6TY4KrrErImpMJ9lLE3waenitWUnYUcN7yUMWXL_u3H6coRg9CGnCPfE3fcdZob_hV8Xu1xZTnQCWOlnYOV_10vZQ1uQk_kqcVpml49O_NYLj6GvLKV6P6KOjGuVo89cfjleNoV1Mq7cp9gc46lX5jK6tpr3xwQi1Rc79jGt6s8_X71YK4wf6RHY43fFgfXbWmBTl_HH2FldqKEADjUU8czca5V-MI6FVxh7cPX4PPeJdpfB5xnY4t_yA3IIIantUtzuM5-QBrP1FXkkIOkR2lmiq14ETesVzpgESDstBJ6OrLnH5pv7f0z1b1DPAEHE0%3D)** And that’s why **I’m also asking you to make a generous renewal contribution** when you do. It’s going to take an enormous grassroots effort to circulate, collect, and tabulate the results of these surveys to the Department of Government Efficiency.As a friend of the Freedom Center you know that we will maximize every dollar you contribute. So please hurry. With your renewed support today, I’m confident we can win this fight.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
**Daniel Greenfield,**_Shillman Fellow and Journalist_ David Horowitz Freedom Center

A shocking record of waste and outright betrayal of the American people. | | | | Friend, For decades, the USAID has operated as a rogue entity, funneling billions of taxpayer dollars into wasteful, left-wing pet projects and even terrorist organizations—with virtually no oversight or accountability.The results? A shocking record of waste and outright betrayal of the American people. Here are just a few examples of what Freedom Center Investigates ' exclusive investigation found.USAID has been directing YOUR tax dollars to enemy countries: $2.3B to Somalia including $200,000 for global warming prep $3.7B for Afghanistan including $16 million to promote “positive masculinity”$3.4B to Yemen including for an “art exhibition” while our countries are at war$700M to Iraq including opening the first movie theater in Nineveh$3.4B to Syria including almost a million COVID masks$1.1B to Lebanon including or promoting “youth activism” Our investigation found that USAID spent over $18 billion on Islamic terror states and $9.3 billion on countries responsible for killing over 3,000 American soldiers.It's outrageous. And that's just the beginning.And how did they get away with it ?Because MASSIVE government unions have been protecting these bureaucrats from accountability... Friend, it’s time to take them down. Gutting the agencies is not enough – the unions who have facilitated this madness must go. Your participation is of the utmost importance. Do you believe it’s acceptable that only 6% of federal employees show up in person for a full work week. And if you remove security guards, janitors, facilities and maintenance personnel, the number drops to 1%. Did you know that in addition to 15 cabinet departments, there are over 2,000 federal agencies? Were you aware that leasing and maintenance costs for federal office buildings costs $15.7 billion per year? Or that the occupancy of these buildings is 12% on average? What about the fact that it’s nearly impossible to fire a federal employee? These are the questions on part one of the And if you think these questions are infuriating, just wait until you hear what makes up part two of the survey. You see, part two is concerned with the actions of those government employees who actually do show up for work, but who spend every hour of the day plotting to undermine the will of duly elected presidents and ignore duly passed legislation.In other words, the radical deep-state. These are the bureaucrats who’ve burrowed deep into the federal government (often they served as political appointees in a leftwing administration, but refuse to leave after that administration ends, becoming, instead, career “civil servants”).CIA. FBI. National Security Council. State Department. Pentagon. Hostile agents at the highest levels of these departments spent four years leaking, lying, and unleashing lawfare against the first Trump Administration. Shouldn’t the people we elect to run the government actually run the government? Shouldn’t members of the executive branch work in good faith to advance the vision and policies of the head of the executive branch? Shouldn’t any bureaucrat who can’t respect the U.S. Constitution leave government service? Shouldn’t it be an enormous “red flag” that Kamala Harris won 93% of the vote in Washington DC and the fact that roughly 95% of campaign contributions by government bureaucrats go to Democrats? You and I both know that the Constitution of the United States grants no power to unelected federal bureaucrats. Yet these individuals have enormous power and zero accountability. It’s bad enough you and I are being ripped off financially (covered in part one of your survey).But what’s worse is the reality that our votes and our constitutional republic are being ripped off and wholly undermined by these unions (part two of you survey). In short, this is an attack on the very foundations of our country. It’s part of the Marxist playbook that is destroying America.Today, I’m asking you to help the Freedom Center in exposing the threat posed by government unions to the mandate delivered by American voters in the 2024 election. Please complete it as soon as possible. The Freedom Center is spearheading this movement. We’re gaining traction, spreading the word, and getting results.And our investigative journalism is being amplified by huge names like Elon Musk, Charlie Kirk, Steve Bannon, Mark Levin, Ayaan Hirsi Ali, Larry Elder. Now is the time to push forward while we have the momentum. It is vitally important that we circulate 1 million of these surveys, so there can be no doubt where our country stands on this issue.Because if the threat of government unions is not broken, banned, and outlawed over the next two years... then it never will. As I mentioned, the results of this survey will be reported to Elon Musk and the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) whose charter expires on July 4, 2026 – on our nation’s 250th birthday. You see, we’ve got a very tight deadline to accomplish this mission. And that’s why I’m also asking you to make a generous renewal contribution when you do. It’s going to take an enormous grassroots effort to circulate, collect, and tabulate the results of these surveys to the Department of Government Efficiency.As a friend of the Freedom Center you know that we will maximize every dollar you contribute. So please hurry. With your renewed support today, I’m confident we can win this fight. | | Sincerely, Daniel Greenfield,Shillman Fellow and Journalist David Horowitz Freedom Center | | | P.S. Government unions are fighting to keep frivolous and wasteful bureaucracies in power. ** | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization.All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. © David Horowitz Freedom Center | P.O. Box 55089, Sherman Oaks, CA 91499 | | ---|---

# [Trump's Plan to Abolish the IRS: What's Really Going On?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=157527146&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU3NTI3MTQ2LCJpYXQiOjE3NDAxMDMxMzcsImV4cCI6MTc0MjY5NTEzNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.A5kG7KBQPKypNB9KKeh0a8_F7YSTES-B5t8FP7XZWB4)
### "Simplifying the tax code" would really mean letting the ultra-rich off the hook at the expense of everyone else.
| | [Melissa Chaudhry](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---
| Feb 21
---
| [](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=157527146&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU3NTI3MTQ2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0MDEwMzEzNywiZXhwIjoxNzQyNjk1MTM3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzI2MDExMSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Pcs63hJp8CUmDhI2worrzxALU9nq6zlraJFJmZToR7Y&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/melissa4congress/p/trumps-plan-to-abolish-the-irs-whats?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

President Trump and his allies are floating one of the most radical policy proposals in modern U.S. history: **abolishing the IRS** and replacing income taxes with tariffs and a national sales tax. This would be a fundamental transformation of the country's economic structure--if it were remotely possible.
Let's break it down and separate reality from rhetoric.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c9b53f4c-02fa-4b99-85a5-da6039e6dff4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **What 's Being Proposed?**
Trump's plan, as outlined by Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick, includes:
* **Eliminating income taxes** on tips, overtime, and Social Security benefits.
* **Abolishing the IRS** and replacing it with an "External Revenue Service" that collects revenue from tariffs and foreign sources.
* **Shifting the tax burden away from Americans** and onto foreign entities through tariffs.
* **Implementing a national sales tax** (through the Fair Tax Act of 2025) to replace income, corporate, payroll, and estate taxes.
* **Cutting IRS funding and freezing federal hiring** , which would gut tax enforcement and disrupt government functions.

[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=157527146&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU3NTI3MTQ2LCJpYXQiOjE3NDAxMDMxMzcsImV4cCI6MTc0MjY5NTEzNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.A5kG7KBQPKypNB9KKeh0a8_F7YSTES-B5t8FP7XZWB4)
### **The Problems With This Plan**
On the surface, this might sound appealing to some: fewer taxes, less government intrusion, and making "outsiders" pay for America's expenses. But in reality, **this plan is economically unworkable, politically unrealistic, and strategically misleading.**
#### **1\. The Math Doesn 't Add Up**
The U.S. government collects **trillions** from income taxes each year. Tariffs and a national sales tax would not generate nearly enough revenue to replace that. In fact, tariffs currently make up only **1-2%** of federal revenue. Even if raised dramatically, they wouldn't come close to replacing income taxes.
#### **2\. Tariffs Are Taxes on Americans**
Tariffs are not paid by foreign governments. They are paid by **importers --meaning American businesses and, ultimately, consumers**. Higher tariffs would mean:
* Higher prices on everything from cars to food to electronics.
* Trade wars, as other countries retaliate with their own tariffs on American goods.
* Economic instability, with increased costs being passed down to workers and families.

#### **3\. A National Sales Tax Hurts Working People the Most**
A national sales tax (or "consumption tax") is a **regressive tax model** --meaning it disproportionately impacts lower-income Americans. The wealthiest spend a smaller portion of their income on goods and services, while working-class and middle-class families would see their everyday costs skyrocket.
* **Example:** If a 30% national sales tax replaced income taxes, a family making $50,000 a year would pay much more in taxes than a billionaire who primarily invests their wealth.
* The burden of taxation would shift **away from corporations and the wealthy** and onto regular people buying groceries, gas, and medicine.

#### **4\. Gutting the IRS Benefits the Ultra-Rich**
Defunding and abolishing the IRS isn't just about "small government." It's about reducing tax enforcement **on corporations and the wealthy**. Less enforcement means:
* Billionaires and corporations can more easily evade taxes.
* The working and middle class will still be taxed (through sales tax), but enforcement of corporate and high-income taxes will disappear.
* The government loses billions in revenue that it currently collects from auditing tax cheats.

[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=157527146&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU3NTI3MTQ2LCJpYXQiOjE3NDAxMDMxMzcsImV4cCI6MTc0MjY5NTEzNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.A5kG7KBQPKypNB9KKeh0a8_F7YSTES-B5t8FP7XZWB4)
### **What 's the Real Goal?**
While it's unlikely this plan will be fully implemented, it signals **where the GOP is heading on tax policy**. The goal isn't to eliminate taxation--it's to **shift the tax burden downward** while allowing the wealthiest Americans and corporations to hoard more wealth.
This fits into a broader conservative strategy of dismantling government functions, from Social Security to regulatory agencies, under the guise of "freedom." But in reality, it would:
* Make the rich richer while making life more expensive for everyone else.
* Create massive government deficits that would likely be used as justification to **cut social programs** like Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security.
* Increase economic inequality while making the economy less stable.

[Give a gift subscription](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tZWxpc3NhNGNvbmdyZXNzLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.Z73apj97VQ3d99OgKviQ8V5gF03p5i3kw6kE5fAfFws?&gift=true)
### **Talking Points for Discussing This Issue**
* **" Tariffs are taxes on Americans."** Any increase in tariffs means higher prices for American consumers, not foreign governments footing the bill.
* **" A national sales tax is a tax hike on working people."** The rich spend a smaller percentage of their wealth, while the middle and working class will pay more on necessities.
* **" Abolishing the IRS lets the ultra-rich off the hook."** Tax enforcement is already weak--eliminating the IRS ensures the wealthiest Americans pay even less.
* **" There's no way tariffs alone can fund the government."** The U.S. relies overwhelmingly on income and corporate taxes. Eliminating them would create massive deficits.
* **" This is about shifting wealth, not eliminating taxes."** The goal is not to reduce taxation but to move the burden from the rich onto everyday Americans.

This proposal is part of a larger effort to **reshape the American economy in favor of the ultra-wealthy** while selling it as a populist win for everyday people. It's an economic shell game--one that, if taken seriously, could devastate working families, destabilize the economy, and dramatically widen the wealth gap.
The next time you hear someone touting the idea of eliminating the IRS and replacing income tax with tariffs or sales tax, ask them one simple question: **" Who actually benefits?"**
The answer isn't the average American--it's the billionaire class and multinational corporations. And that's exactly the point.

This work takes time and effort (away from my two little children), and draws on over fifteen years' experience (well - fifty, if you include my husband) - including university studies I still carry student loans from._

body:
These seats are the key to maintaining our America First agenda, and Democrats are already mobilizing to take them from us.
Critical reinforcements are needed >>

body:
But every word is God's honest truth.
| [](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/YdMkX7mH_IPJ7jFglIszaZUuFuBAkb_DJN7R0dvt3P0X4y2l1F__yF-SFNo4ZAJXWVqGPDEbjv324PzySUrQEHsplPfePocZ-xbr7dx1TJrUU6q9ZxroTOTZm629hqIJg3ujnBK1cIDDE0eSFBUwb0D9YVQUOj5LvFrEelLTHYs6tlZrl37mE7VSPzQHUoTY5tJolmvtxnhoRnWClbbvasimqgic6fELgBg1FxVn4FoSXLpMDivgZ5NV86yOTcHa2fT3kXdls1bouIpsoIIfiMjbwPHFtJSGoqIp6HNmi87ucc1k1kAaLLX7Pd3jj-RXnrBzSwI4hnbT9FbaSBmByScb3cIbSkbRtMV76gdrC1ZvjnnO2Vn2OUKuIrvhGzX3OJKzWtkCHejeRZx_SGnnI34YM3UCcM7FGXvExC991MvZNph8CGQneTNMrAEebwTkRp-zfFNGRvxpudfQqXUK9lfKGgBUuuFhmPA2jd4sdMahbbZSnn1lemFtszz1fA/ozBEYUF1aAc994ii9BY_DJibiC6CKqqA/6)
---
Peter,
---
At President Trump’s inauguration, he expressed that _“our nation has suffered greatly,”_ but _“after all we have been through together, we stand on the verge of the four greatest years in American history.”_
---
Those inspiring words – and President Trump’s historic leadership – have already begun to right the ship for our country in just a few weeks’ time.
---
_But today, sadly, I have to write to you for a far more somber reason._
---
I say this with a heavy heart, but every word is God's honest truth...
---
**While our beautiful country may have emerged from four long years of darkness, tyranny, and the Left’s weaponized justice system, my journey out of that darkness is __not__ yet finished.**
---
**If the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona gets her way, I’ll be in a jail cell until I’m 100 years old!**
---
And worst of all, these Deep State goons truly believe I’m finished, just like the media says, all because this case that’s already set to go to trial was brought on bogus _state-level_ charges that PREVENT President Trump from saving me with a federal pardon.
---
But, you see, even though the Democrats labeled me a **“ _DEAD_ _MAN_ _WALKING_ ,”** **RAIDED** my home, **ARRESTED** me, took a **MUGSHOT** of me, and forced me into **BANKRUPTCY** , the _TRUTH_ remains...
---
**_...No one can ever tell me I’m not a fighter._**
---
Which is why, at 80 years old, I’m __still__ FIGHTING BACK.
---
When these leftist crooks first had me booked, they filed my mugshot under **booking # 2313757** ...
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/AC9m8B-yE6sNkg-V5b3J02YjTzzphYtU2UR-im9DXtz_zxz1lPFqcqgz6e7XImAOF6bT2szMnRyNgJN0KMN517dL57-bF2DXWJv2TYaQ7gwfL_ECipr0mJCSxgqS7eahDNWekYgldDzlz5ZsC-WB4fQjh57lEB9b6YdR2TjOKuOBlJxbgvRN7iBM-qPcF38fIcU8jCUZjGS8bD9rlz1zmCjhVtkhupNhfb7biWk4BoCg7MMPRaYSoDJXfHNzYWVvdSF9mZr3P5Fr2-52uN7l98zCpJ1t6gy0izI02BigTpkSccSqYkfjFKMupLzgtzKHKwS8ZnU2MeYQQsdchbT2DYQaJYkKZSE9gCnFagi4-iCKF9srKC2YeA9M-_FfTR3eeTUDyVrI2Tim8KTapx8JSp1WGWvo27iyChlm607TfweFHvEcn53Yz-Ye2ggIm6JSwbYZVcN63YZdyBwX9eO8tXptoovmUheoc2dQY_SHvqPVP8IhdAKTrEkz-0iRxw/I4ssYhjoCv5QgZMc911PkLXElG4AKUYT/6)
__
---
And today, to show them that good and honest Americans like _YOU_ are also fighters who refuse to stand by as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man all for defending our 45th and 47th President, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise **$231,375.70** for my Legal Defense Trust to WIN the trial of my life and the fight for my freedom and justice.
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – to help me fight for my freedom, justice, and ultimate vindication as the Democrats try to JAIL me for the rest of my life.**](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/N05E98s09BppLzSAPhHSw3zSBmf1FzaW6T1aDts7wJPZnmXWwZdaY8vqpTezOzHNt5cDDd6nKrgOCn6Qg6NYNpIbXNG-Ww0KONgMRfojGVrlosdGdKZG1_iNE9tsCHzZMmpPRJbHl0Z9ZoEFZ9VngFe0Agv-8ZOs5TPzqqr5FzPyQTYzjkVTtPUC9qi4gUha_iJIyIxxUT9p-7wBzYxhU1EKWfwmtLUbzWJU9mFsiMdkrzdlaXh2ssm_XibJbjjGR4CJn_umm6-7wQchv9nJX_cUsEOm7QxOd_zyWt7vRnLlo-KrHQ99Co7o60TcVAcIOJKNvqwhWs6JeTw96U_jp3xz3gxBJ9N3IIkQ2g4nFbW1RqNSncIzZQFZa8rby8FP5SMbwZ0S_59qlHSgCKLrpOOBQeBwnT8e0Kfts1WAhx9FruVwd6p8OdTbPh5CyJLv58TAgJ7Z8EmX1-6qlFo-lsrVRXFtfKM71vdErr9tUuEGKBXX7FedsVtNXv7bcA/CQCQRw7ADvLkBRx7gCOwQzXAQBnZukZt/6)

clean_body: But every word is God's honest truth. | Peter, At President Trump’s inauguration, he expressed that “our nation has suffered greatly,” but “after all we have been through together, we stand on the verge of the four greatest years in American history.” Those inspiring words – and President Trump’s historic leadership – have already begun to right the ship for our country in just a few weeks’ time. But today, sadly, I have to write to you for a far more somber reason. I say this with a heavy heart, but every word is God's honest truth... While our beautiful country may have emerged from four long years of darkness, tyranny, and the Left’s weaponized justice system, my journey out of that darkness is not yet finished. If the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona gets her way, I’ll be in a jail cell until I’m 100 years old! And worst of all, these Deep State goons truly believe I’m finished, just like the media says, all because this case that’s already set to go to trial was brought on bogus state-level charges that PREVENT President Trump from saving me with a federal pardon. But, you see, even though the Democrats labeled me a “ DEAD MAN WALKING ,” RAIDED my home, ARRESTED me, took a MUGSHOT of me, and forced me into BANKRUPTCY , the TRUTH remains... ...No one can ever tell me I’m not a fighter. Which is why, at 80 years old, I’m still FIGHTING BACK. When these leftist crooks first had me booked, they filed my mugshot under booking # 2313757 ... And today, to show them that good and honest Americans like YOU are also fighters who refuse to stand by as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man all for defending our 45th and 47th President, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise $231,375.70 for my Legal Defense Trust to WIN the trial of my life and the fight for my freedom and justice. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust |
