name: Gabby Giffords
subject: What Mark is up to on his birthday this year
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
President Trump and extreme Republicans in Washington are pushing through a budget that will cut taxes for billionaires and make working families and the middle class foot the bill. In the Senate, they’re starting an overnight “vote-a-rama” on one of the resolutions tonight — and Mark is going to do everything he can to fight it.
#

Hi, friend, it’s Gabby Giffords.
Mark is my husband, my best friend, and my rock.
It’s his birthday tomorrow, he’s got a bit of a cold, and I wanted to reach out about him.
We’d normally have something fun planned, but this year is a little different. President Trump and extreme Republicans in Washington are pushing through a budget that will cut taxes for billionaires and make working families and the middle class foot the bill. In the Senate, they’re starting an overnight “vote-a-rama” on one of the resolutions tonight — and Mark is going to do everything he can to fight it.
What that means is, we’re not going to be able to spend his birthday together. He wouldn’t have it any other way, though. Mark is a fighter, and if there is any chance that he can to make a difference, he is going to take it.
There will be other birthdays, but today, this is more important.
I know that it would mean a lot to him, and to me, if you could show that you have his back. This work takes a big team, and you’re an important part of it.
[**So, please. If you’re grateful Mark is fighting for us, chip in $3 or anything you can and help him keep going.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-feb25/.w4QhX4&refcode=em250220-1-f&t=1&akid=5973%2E6688874%2E7-5M-m)

name: Sarah McBride
subject: I refuse to be a pawn.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
They want the focus to be on their theatrics so that it won’t be on the issues I laid out in my speech.
Hi Peter, it’s Congresswoman Sarah McBride — Heartland Patriots said I could reach out to you about something important.
You may have heard that I recently gave my first speech as Delaware’s Congresswoman on the floor of the House of Representatives. And you may have also heard that the Republican who recognized me when I came to the podium used the moment to refer to me as the “Gentleman” from Delaware, “Mr. McBride.” A thoroughly unoriginal schoolyard taunt against trans people.
In truth, they want the focus to be on their theatrics so that it _won’t_ be on the issues I laid out in my speech: the MAGA effort to gut our government at the expense of working people and my focus on bringing down costs and building a government that respects everyone.
Really, their attacks are about more than just me. The truth is they are using trans people as a pawn in their scheme to gut the federal government and line the pockets of Donald Trump’s best friends.
**But I refuse to be a pawn. I refuse to give them that power. And I refuse to let them get away with it.**
That’s why I’m going to spend every day fighting _against_ their attempts to dismantle the federal government, and fighting _for_ the things Delawareans elected me for — regardless of what kind of personal insults Republicans want to throw my way.
Republicans know what they’re doing right now is unpopular, and that’s why they’re desperate to change the conversation. It’s up to us to make sure they don’t get away with it.
**[Peter, if you’re with me, Heartland Patriots and I could really use your support at this moment. Will you split a donation between our campaigns today and help us keep up the fight, no matter what gets thrown our way?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85908?refcode=em20250220-8779&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8779%2E614464%2E_Z70E4)**

clean_body: They want the focus to be on their theatrics so that it won’t be on the issues I laid out in my speech. Hi Peter, it’s Congresswoman Sarah McBride — Heartland Patriots said I could reach out to you about something important. You may have heard that I recently gave my first speech as Delaware’s Congresswoman on the floor of the House of Representatives. And you may have also heard that the Republican who recognized me when I came to the podium used the moment to refer to me as the “Gentleman” from Delaware, “Mr. McBride.” A thoroughly unoriginal schoolyard taunt against trans people. In truth, they want the focus to be on their theatrics so that it won’t be on the issues I laid out in my speech: the MAGA effort to gut our government at the expense of working people and my focus on bringing down costs and building a government that respects everyone. Really, their attacks are about more than just me. The truth is they are using trans people as a pawn in their scheme to gut the federal government and line the pockets of Donald Trump’s best friends. But I refuse to be a pawn. I refuse to give them that power. And I refuse to let them get away with it. That’s why I’m going to spend every day fighting against their attempts to dismantle the federal government, and fighting for the things Delawareans elected me for — regardless of what kind of personal insults Republicans want to throw my way. Republicans know what they’re doing right now is unpopular, and that’s why they’re desperate to change the conversation. It’s up to us to make sure they don’t get away with it. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thank you again to Heartland Patriots for letting me reach out. And thank you for all of the support, Sarah McBride | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

name: Phil Izon
subject: I have new petitions coming soon. Filming Frozen Odds.
body:
Please send to your friends and family | | | | [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=67b7fda3d7f07f51789608af&u=https%3A%2F%2F907honest.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D67b7fcba338b5722c80903a3%26ss_email_id%3D67b7fda3d7f07f51789608af%26ss_campaign_name%3DI%2Bhave%2Bnew%2Bpetitions%2Bcoming%2Bsoon.%2BFilming%2BFrozen%2BOdds.%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-02-21T04%253A14%253A40Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_67b7fcba338b5722c80903a3&l=en-US&s=_w7XGGuOO4uSwu_LvKS9wNvdroo%3D) |
---|---
|
#### **I have three petitions coming soon.**
#### **My competition spends millions to do a project that costs me 0.1% what they spend. Of course I’m going to continue.**
#### **1\. Voter ID / US Citizenship requirements / Election Integrity**
#### **2\. Ban foreign funding of ballot initiatives**
#### **3\. Remove voting machines for State and Federal elections in Alaska**
---
|
---
---
|
---
**Starting a film project for Amazon Prime, YouTube, etc. – Frozen Odds How do you take on $15 million with nothing but determination, grassroots organizing, and a clipboard? Frozen Odds is a gripping documentary that uncovers the raw power of citizen-led initiatives in Alaska. Following the journey of a small but determined movement, this film reveals how everyday people—outspent 100 to 1 by out-of-state interests—rallied together to challenge the system. Led by an Alaskans for Alaskans who helped write the law and push it to the ballot, this battle wasn’t just about policy—it was about democracy in its purest form. With 400+ volunteers braving the cold, gathering 42,000 signatures when only 26,000 were needed, they proved that people—not money—should shape the laws that govern them. Through intimate interviews, on-the-ground footage, and stunning Alaskan landscapes, Frozen Odds captures the high-stakes struggle against political elites (aka Lisa Murkowski and George Soros, etc.) and the enduring spirit of grassroots activism. Though the campaign fell just 700 votes short out of 320,000, it laid the groundwork for a new wave of initiatives—this time, with three fresh petitions ready to take the fight forward. In a world where billionaires and lobbyists try to control the political process, Frozen Odds asks a bold question: What happens when ordinary citizens refuse to back down?**
---
---

---
|

name: Lila Rose
subject: CVS providing chemical abortions
body:
Walgreens and CVS will begin selling the lethal abortion pill with a prescription this month.

| [ ](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zi74n8icum9384nlgbe494kdr79vbjmnjvngj8ko_rp22sh2s8i6eob0chj6aor1cjh2bs)
---
#
Friend of Life, it's Lila Rose - Founder and President of Live Action. I have an urgent request.

Walgreens and CVS will begin selling the lethal abortion pill with a prescription this month.

This means that in pro-abortion states like California, Illinois, and Connecticut, a teen with a doctor's note can receive the deadly abortion pill in her local pharmacy, all without her parent's knowledge. Expansion of the abortion pill into local pharmacies has already killed tens of thousands of preborn children.

The U.S. Supreme Court will soon hear the most important pro-life case since overturning Roe v. Wade. The Court will decide whether dangerous telemedicine abortions and the distribution of abortion pills by mail and pharmacies can continue nationwide.

We need to raise our voices now while there is still time. I'm looking for 100 people to give before midnight. Can you be one of them?

You will mobilize parents, grandparents, and pro-life people with the truth by donating right now. No other pro-life organization has the online reach we do. That's why your gift of $50 before midnight will alert more than 1700 people about this agenda of death. Give now using this secure link:
[****https://give.liveaction.org/expansion-abortion-pill/****](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zuj87jlfj1mj211gf3r59rqchldnk9tc36dp26ng_rp22sh2s8i6eob0chj6aor1cjh2bs)

If you don't speak out right now against the abortion pill in your local pharmacy, you may never get the chance to again.

Thank you for standing with us against this agenda of death before it comes to your local pharmacy!

For Life,

Lila Rose
**President and Founder**

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfb1sb91mgb9i8ej3so759q0ooodmu63detkje0o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0chj6aor1cjh2bs)

clean_body: Walgreens and CVS will begin selling the lethal abortion pill with a prescription this month. | Friend of Life, it's Lila Rose - Founder and President of Live Action. I have an urgent request. Walgreens and CVS will begin selling the lethal abortion pill with a prescription this month. This means that in pro-abortion states like California, Illinois, and Connecticut, a teen with a doctor's note can receive the deadly abortion pill in her local pharmacy, all without her parent's knowledge. Expansion of the abortion pill into local pharmacies has already killed tens of thousands of preborn children. The U.S. Supreme Court will soon hear the most important pro-life case since overturning Roe v. Wade. The Court will decide whether dangerous telemedicine abortions and the distribution of abortion pills by mail and pharmacies can continue nationwide. We need to raise our voices now while there is still time. I'm looking for 100 people to give before midnight. Can you be one of them? You will mobilize parents, grandparents, and pro-life people with the truth by donating right now. No other pro-life organization has the online reach we do. That's why your gift of $50 before midnight will alert more than 1700 people about this agenda of death. Give now using this secure link: If you don't speak out right now against the abortion pill in your local pharmacy, you may never get the chance to again. Thank you for standing with us against this agenda of death before it comes to your local pharmacy! For Life, Lila Rose President and Founder 2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201 American Briefing PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Jason Smith =?UTF-8?Q?=E2=80=93?= Architect of the Trump Tax Cuts
subject: JD’s a hillbilly from Appalachia, I’m one from the Ozarks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
It warms my heart that our Vice President says he’s a hillbilly from Appalachia – I grew up calling myself a hillbilly from the Ozarks.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8lc2j2tnve46pvhlm4gp3su5ahgdqqlgdvnnlfo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0chj6aor0shh2bs "Jason Smith")
---

It warms my heart that our Vice President says he's a hillbilly from Appalachia - I grew up calling myself a hillbilly from the Ozarks.

My name's Jason Smith. My dad was a preacher and my mom was a factory worker. They raised me in a single-wide trailer and we didn't even have running water until I drilled the well myself.

**I come from humble beginnings. Fast-forward to today, I 'm now the architect in Congress for President Trump's plan to slash your taxes.**

That can only happen here in America.

Unfortunately, the Democrat Party of today wants to take a sledgehammer to everything folks like you and I believe in. Hard work, our God-given rights, the government staying out of our business, merit over victimhood, never weaponizing the government against political opponents...

**_[All of it comes CRASHING DOWN unless we stop the Democrats from barging back into power.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zi63urpn5m709ug196u67c77sc2otq5dtfoichm8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0chj6aor0shh2bs "All of it comes CRASHING DOWN unless we stop the Democrats from bargain back into power.")_**

That's why I'm giving everything I've got to make these next four years under President Trump worth it. That's __also__ why I'm sending you this email. The Democrat Party is just a couple of seats away from taking back power in the House of Representatives.

We unloaded every dollar we had to hold the line and contact voters in enough swing districts to win in November. _And now we 're tapped out. Completely._

**So I 'm launching a major rebuilding effort with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to 1) refill our warchest, 2) get ahead of the 8-ball in battleground districts, and 3) keep our Republican Majority in control for ALL FOUR YEARS of Trump's term.**

**_[Is there ANYTHING I can say to convince you to kick in a few bucks today?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zagr5cnjhq9ij0qbh9fmg6r6s2pgvl29a9hhao9g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0chj6aor0shh2bs "Is there ANYTHING I can say to convince you to kick in a few bucks today?")_**
| | [Yes, I'll kick in ten bucks](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrdqo7baaoivvkvo57fgaiurnmad0j19n41v9300_rp22sh2s8i6eob0chj6aor0shh2bs "Yes, I’ll kick in ten bucks")
---

| [Yes, I'll kick in twenty bucks](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2pvuv7opi8ka1ltdajgbjkhjgb5ojsp9d5s91n0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0chj6aor0shh2bs "Yes, I’ll kick in twenty bucks")
---

| [Yes, I'll kick in fifty bucks](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6sn6vtm8i1nlultfk1sgtimaakhh089ahsj7b38_rp22sh2s8i6eob0chj6aor0shh2bs "Yes, I’ll kick in fifty bucks")
---

| [Yes, and I'll kick in even more](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0qdlkmcrisflv0d5kel79la9nk6vk330v3tu2e0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0chj6aor0shh2bs "Yes, and I’ll kick in even more")
---

I know it's early.

But last cycle, we won the House by about 7,000 votes. The Democrats outraised us by $80M and outspent us by $70M. And they almost won. Now President Trump's entire legislative agenda hangs in the balance.

**That includes his historic tax cuts that I 'm working on RIGHT NOW. **

It's going to take a fortune to save President Trump's House Majority. We don't have an army of Liberal billionaires at our beck and call. The Democrat Party obviously does.

_**[That's why everyday folks like you and even hillbillies like me - who kick in a few bucks here and there - are our best hope right now.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl1mqkjm625h5f02ddcdb2791rtf2td751vu1asg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0chj6aor0shh2bs "That’s why everyday folks like you and even hillbillies like me – who kick in a few bucks here and there – are our best hope right now. ")**_

The amount doesn't matter _nearly_ as much as the number of people who step up.

The fate of our House Majority (and of Trump's MAGA agenda) is in your hands. I can only hope you'll have the heart to save it.

Thank you,
_- Jason_

**CHAIRMAN JASON SMITH**
Architect of the Trump Tax Cuts

| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6omfurmolpn8vtg0o4llrhs38jimfe2fu38chig_rp22sh2s8i6eob0chj6aor0shh2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhkd9ts0c16gjeqqbjbbg1mdgu95fs695umjm2m8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0chj6aor0shh2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---

name: Mike Lee
subject: A revolution in education is brewing
body:
I am making a BIG announcement

|
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zgi21taajlm959fcfv9apmuaa9rr2i378osei16o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0chj6aor6c1h2bs)
Friend,

There is a _**REVOLUTION**_ brewing in the United States that has the potential to dismantle the Establishment’s control of our education system.

And my friend, Victor Riches, President of the Goldwater Institute, started it in Arizona.

If you and I successfully implement the Goldwater Institute’s School Choice revolution across the country, we can eliminate Critical Race Theory propaganda, remove radical Leftist teachers from classrooms, and give children a REAL education about American history.

**I am making a BIG announcement:**

[I promised Victor I would email you and all my supporters to help the Goldwater Institute raise an EMERGENCY $25,000 for their School Choice battle. Please make an urgent donation of $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount by clicking here or one of the links below >>>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zgqq3irjqvi830puvbprlemp3rqmlstin9p8l4l8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0chj6aor6c1h2bs)

Let me tell you the FULL story of how the Goldwater Institute launched the School Choice _**REVOLUTION**_ unfolding in our country.
**FIRST:** The Goldwater Institute _transformed Arizona into the most pro-school choice state in the country_. In fact, they created Education Savings Accounts, which ensures parents can use their tax dollars to make the right educational choices for their families.

As an added bonus, woke radicals in education and Critical Race Theory propagandists are losing power and influence over our children.

**THEN:** Since enacting this legislation, **40,000** families have been able to provide their children with a first-class education. Victor Riches, President of the Goldwater Institute, has decided to make the Goldwater Institute’s vision for Education Freedom a nationwide effort.

🚨**NOW:** Goldwater is applying this formula across the country, and so far, 22 states have enacted school choice legislation. 🚨 You and I must help the Goldwater Institute enact School Choice in all 50 states. Please join me by making a donation of any amount below:
[Donate $10 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zrkubut3vfh46k931rudd79aprtupfpib068h5ho_rp22sh2s8i6eob0chj6aor6c1h2bs)
[Donate $35 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zl4na3mvo1ogv9qk5ba87h8uvcofu0elfsve1vj8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0chj6aor6c1h2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: A tough question
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6c9he2v6kfgijib6fgu0cakejkka10utgd0524o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0chj6eob1cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

There's a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

Here it is...What is true about the world?

Tough, right?

It's a question mankind has asked since ancient times--since creation itself. So, if you don't know the answer, that's fine (if you do, email me because I would love to know more!).

This question is especially pressing today because of the growing power modern humans have to change and manipulate the material world.

That's one of the reasons we released our free online course, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Why chemistry?

For one, this course brings a core subject studied at Hillsdale College to millions of Americans, including you.

More fundamentally, we study chemistry as part of our liberal arts education at Hillsdale because the sciences help us understand important aspects of reality. It helps us think about our role as humans in the world around us and reveals the framework, implications, and potential for human life.

Like all our courses, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry"** contains stunning visuals, study guides, quizzes, and in this case, hands-on experiments. This content is especially well-suited for science teachers, homeschool parents, or lifelong learners.

And our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

**For any donation of $100 or more, you will receive a beautiful DVD box set for "The Great Principles of Chemistry," by clicking the link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/principles-of-chemistry](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhllgl46a2bthfdr85mgikpi6g713o7f18o787jg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0chj6eob1cdh2bs)

The proper study of chemistry helps us understand the world and inspires wonder and awe at the beauty of creation and its Creator.

For these reasons, please join us in helping others gain a greater appreciation for the world around us with **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Let's promote what's true about our world together.

Warm Regards,

Bill Gray, ‘01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: A tough question
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z77en2s2api5v7kaaggd5reo9r0lrbv47tfi1g4g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0chj61pj4c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

There's a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

Here it is...What is true about the world?

Tough, right?

It's a question mankind has asked since ancient times--since creation itself. So, if you don't know the answer, that's fine (if you do, email me because I would love to know more!).

This question is especially pressing today because of the growing power modern humans have to change and manipulate the material world.

That's one of the reasons we released our free online course, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Why chemistry?

For one, this course brings a core subject studied at Hillsdale College to millions of Americans, including you.

More fundamentally, we study chemistry as part of our liberal arts education at Hillsdale because the sciences help us understand important aspects of reality. It helps us think about our role as humans in the world around us and reveals the framework, implications, and potential for human life.

Like all our courses, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry"** contains stunning visuals, study guides, quizzes, and in this case, hands-on experiments. This content is especially well-suited for science teachers, homeschool parents, or lifelong learners.

And our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

**For any donation of $100 or more, you will receive a beautiful DVD box set for "The Great Principles of Chemistry," by clicking the link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/principles-of-chemistry](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zn68po83n9cfrve934688ab9oo6lc9nptkta3ci0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0chj61pj4c9h2bs)

The proper study of chemistry helps us understand the world and inspires wonder and awe at the beauty of creation and its Creator.

For these reasons, please join us in helping others gain a greater appreciation for the world around us with **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Let's promote what's true about our world together.

Warm Regards,

Bill Gray, ‘01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Updates for Great Americans

# **[Disney Would Ruin Warm 'Malcolm In The Middle' Reboot Vibes With 'Nonbinary' Kid](http://trk.libertyledger._A)**

Our WiFi Spy Cam is designed to fit snugly in your pocket. It's WiFi-enabled and crafted for discretion, ensuring that you have the power of surveillance right at your fingertips, anytime, anywhere. **Crystal-Clear, Day & Night**: With full HD imaging, an expansive 170° field of view, and night vision capabilities, you can trust the Spy Cam to capture every detail with unmatched precision. Whether it's daytime or nighttime, you'll never miss a moment. Stay connected to your home from anywhere with the WiFi-enabled Spy Cam. Designed for seamless remote monitoring, this compact device lets you keep an eye on what matters most in real time. Whether you’re at work, on vacation, or just in another room, its WiFi capabilities ensure you’re always in control. **Special Launch Offer!** : Because we appreciate you, we're giving our loyal customers an exclusive opportunity to be among the first to own the Spy Cam. | [ACTIVATE YOUR 2025 MEMBERSHIP IN THE REPUBLICAN PARTY](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NdPdTZ-TTKqtRIGt1hFeL2dqmeETDmthiiisN11trsqYMf2yN1f_gNnjXIcckWcQmtdZx12qN0riJJ7T_n6caziChLyLc3BVwyfOFKPJ3dAaFu7cEcgX8T2eslN4uVbKW-kJ2Px2dk6e7cB3CqTJblmM7OXlW5J4OIcdFvV5ib_z2Cyw_uVep3osv6J6-UKyruUcDQLcOrI=&c=K7EjK0LB7qAGyLeSBUVadfekV_kAuPdpMfV9VyJYBa8xak1ojnVY8Q==&ch=ewZ4x2ErurF_mEOm5R6EcisCKDmqAx-IBQc5Q4wWXoqW-Tg5vFkKCA==)
Don't you feel it in your conversations with your friends, family & neighbors? It's clear that the citizens of our Commonwealth are embracing our commonsense Republican ideals, and a truly viable two-party system in Massachusetts is no longer a pipe dream.
Here at the MassGOP, we're looking ahead to the next election when a critically important and undeniably winnable governor's race tops the ballot. History has shown that our citizens want a check on this legislature - they like to have a Republican in the Governor's Office. And it's up to us to make it happen.
---
| | [ACTIVATE YOUR 2025 REPUBLICAN MEMBERSHIP](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NdPdTZ-TTKqtRIGt1hFeL2dqmeETDmthiiisN11trsqYMf2yN1f_gNnjXIcckWcQmtdZx12qN0riJJ7T_n6caziChLyLc3BVwyfOFKPJ3dAaFu7cEcgX8T2eslN4uVbKW-kJ2Px2dk6e7cB3CqTJblmM7OXlW5J4OIcdFvV5ib_z2Cyw_uVep3osv6J6-UKyruUcDQLcOrI=&c=K7EjK0LB7qAGyLeSBUVadfekV_kAuPdpMfV9VyJYBa8xak1ojnVY8Q==&ch=ewZ4x2ErurF_mEOm5R6EcisCKDmqAx-IBQc5Q4wWXoqW-Tg5vFkKCA==)
---
We need YOU to help us continue holding the Democrats and their supermajority accountable for their staggering failures.
❌ Like their complete failure to address the migrant crisis that has left taxpayers with a staggering burden, exceeding $1 billion in spending this fiscal year alone. ❌ Or, the "MASS" exodus of businesses and families due to the Democrats' high taxes and burdensome regulations. ❌ Add in a profound lack of transparency and a maddening arrogance on Beacon Hill and it's no wonder so many voters voted red this year.
✅ We must continue elect commonsense Republicans at all levels of government to fight back against this insanity; and ✅ Show voters that Republican fiscal policies will attract people and businesses to our state -- not force them out; because ✅ Republicans are committed to real solutions, transparency, and putting Massachusetts families first.
[Will you please continue to stand strong with Republicans running for office across MA?](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NdPdTZ-TTKqtRIGt1hFeL2dqmeETDmthiiisN11trsqYMf2yN1f_gNnjXIcckWcQmtdZx12qN0riJJ7T_n6caziChLyLc3BVwyfOFKPJ3dAaFu7cEcgX8T2eslN4uVbKW-kJ2Px2dk6e7cB3CqTJblmM7OXlW5J4OIcdFvV5ib_z2Cyw_uVep3osv6J6-UKyruUcDQLcOrI=&c=K7EjK0LB7qAGyLeSBUVadfekV_kAuPdpMfV9VyJYBa8xak1ojnVY8Q==&ch=ewZ4x2ErurF_mEOm5R6EcisCKDmqAx-IBQc5Q4wWXoqW-Tg5vFkKCA==)
Together, we will continue to grow our party, expand our voter base, and elect even more Republicans in the years to come.
The work for the next election begins right now. Don't you want to be a part of it?
---
| [ACTIVATE YOUR 2025 GOP MEMBERSHIP](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NdPdTZ-TTKqtRIGt1hFeL2dqmeETDmthiiisN11trsqYMf2yN1f_gNnjXIcckWcQmtdZx12qN0riJJ7T_n6caziChLyLc3BVwyfOFKPJ3dAaFu7cEcgX8T2eslN4uVbKW-kJ2Px2dk6e7cB3CqTJblmM7OXlW5J4OIcdFvV5ib_z2Cyw_uVep3osv6J6-UKyruUcDQLcOrI=&c=K7EjK0LB7qAGyLeSBUVadfekV_kAuPdpMfV9VyJYBa8xak1ojnVY8Q==&ch=ewZ4x2ErurF_mEOm5R6EcisCKDmqAx-IBQc5Q4wWXoqW-Tg5vFkKCA==)

| P.S. -- With your support today, we are going to expand our commonsense Republican values in Massachusetts. The future is bright! | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4d68f32c-9bbe-41ee-947c-5ae2c061b5fa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Why chemistry?
body:
There's a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=eb73c37d38344c5aa3081f2b35d0f570&_e=2X6FxNacMysZammJp7MAIrzLYpMgwqO4kZTlxYRRxPr5Dy9MfJf0M_djTkfAtej-_Grq_EatvJH89s6Ihp4wAnHHK_5nyERNo6PgUmUfh7EpCskyipr83dc99ttqwzDBY-M8u6O3kXRbKe3ybVOrLuJLByjZg7FmtGDRSJmkkGN8FXupOh5z1lqf4EzUhI0bheHiwWMFEHSjDQ7TynrcBSQHOARFIFd6Ja6eDL76QCN9ucKZufaJnZoZyEPTV8ccELtyjheNXs1gulWBGLBHYvETQPJJ33crKkzUN6CRojzRzKL1zknbCC3SR6-LMcy7zmso_yXtRoM8ec29L0fZJiw5MoB-O057PgMKcNjRXYeTMBzauT0GdBFGEM58jczv263il7yokn59Cv6MggG8-Phj8gASWoNBqv7t0CQGs2k%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

There's a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

Here it is...What is true about the world?

Tough, right?

It's a question mankind has asked since ancient times--since creation itself. So, if you don't know the answer, that's fine (if you do, email me because I would love to know more!).

This question is especially pressing today because of the growing power modern humans have to change and manipulate the material world.

That's one of the reasons we released our free online course, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Why chemistry?

For one, this course brings a core subject studied at Hillsdale College to millions of Americans, including you.

More fundamentally, we study chemistry as part of our liberal arts education at Hillsdale because the sciences help us understand important aspects of reality. It helps us think about our role as humans in the world around us and reveals the framework, implications, and potential for human life.

Like all our courses, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry"** contains stunning visuals, study guides, quizzes, and in this case, hands-on experiments. This content is especially well-suited for science teachers, homeschool parents, or lifelong learners.

And our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

**For any donation of $100 or more, you will receive a beautiful DVD box set for "The Great Principles of Chemistry," by clicking the link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/principles-of-chemistry](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=eb73c37d38344c5aa3081f2b35d0f570&_e=2X6FxNacMysZammJp7MAIrzLYpMgwqO4kZTlxYRRxPr5Dy9MfJf0M_djTkfAtej-_Grq_EatvJH89s6Ihp4wAnHHK_5nyERNo6PgUmUfh7EpCskyipr83dc99ttqwzDBY-M8u6O3kXRbKe3ybVOrLuJLByjZg7FmtGDRSJmkkGN8FXupOh5z1lqf4EzUhI0bheHiwWMFEHSjDQ7TynrcBSQHOARFIFd6Ja6eDL76QCN9ucKZufaJnZoZyEPTV8cc5la1PmF3AbgZCLiW_jS-AIsl8w7sJb6LeuIp7f9QKC-D19JBGN_OU_n0dZQ44BlOgzhdg5gVfKJHAHNW5Y6O1pWzJrX5vBdEzqrp4X0YPAVpdwwVzmlo3riYkeOim0VUQH-WgqpJNGaORUUK625xFhA-2jbeEyTtCsL3dKRJBKI%3D)

The proper study of chemistry helps us understand the world and inspires wonder and awe at the beauty of creation and its Creator.

For these reasons, please join us in helping others gain a greater appreciation for the world around us with **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Let's promote what's true about our world together.

Warm Regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[**unsubscribe**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_s=eb73c37d38344c5aa3081f2b35d0f570&_t=9AdINUI2820eJRpt959opm7HjS3BJKfK9MgithzR0Eqjx5cbGwJIVxgnv0jzMltwA1HLncU1Dw7ApIAzRo3Q7SPz8yhHBgXNnPQpDoPQ4t1F3HrxSe3d3LyGciHv_9Ba)

subject: JD’s a hillbilly from Appalachia, I’m one from the Ozarks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
It warms my heart that our Vice President says he’s a hillbilly from Appalachia – I grew up calling myself a hillbilly from the Ozarks.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/bz-36GDV940dwknyAgZ4vP4mldJ5HI8DTTTqTPqcOvuvqdrwPCveQqHAlRTMunV-z4xBfvI8SXSM1Se-SbojL7RKJ7xf_ssPzi3sOIvA3MDO9Nbs3BEEH7PUIxWYGkr8XRQMSS7ffVQmhcgpixo7CvkE7NYDKk3zFASbNU_jdmt8W8BvmNBtfEGbsErIr2g_y-3W7S3CFtbqMt9o46O8o88wOVCDn3BkbGWj011M39v-D6_nkrMTf416SEalAaFVBp_UBpQo9elOd6jddp8G0sPo6156HAfwxas1NvCX70zXWuXmRkhRPZ_GX9msNjTxyHg6mVJxxvnL3T3fURVQJCwOdB3tJ6bKM3zscJXuLbNFr1_PSTNPSlpNq2PtZfdYRtTbx6ngfVALEoNjQ_78W4NEvsAkTMaHyMGkYrMk6bNOQG4R7b-pLmWvGZpwTcloMwkBPsiLBD_gr0lsispjmXO5x1pcpBAHJ0QBMgty5I45Vxi8MYzGUzm9AJwfdG7e54-BkuK5JzhS-w/qc-kmwsVSohnGFC1wuic9HDqNHyTa-Db/6 "Jason Smith")
---

It warms my heart that our Vice President says he's a hillbilly from Appalachia - I grew up calling myself a hillbilly from the Ozarks.

My name's Jason Smith. My dad was a preacher and my mom was a factory worker. They raised me in a single-wide trailer and we didn't even have running water until I drilled the well myself.

**I come from humble beginnings. Fast-forward to today, I 'm now the architect in Congress for President Trump's plan to slash your taxes.**

That can only happen here in America.

Unfortunately, the Democrat Party of today wants to take a sledgehammer to everything folks like you and I believe in. Hard work, our God-given rights, the government staying out of our business, merit over victimhood, never weaponizing the government against political opponents...

**_[All of it comes CRASHING DOWN unless we stop the Democrats from barging back into power.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/Ye20tBo9Szasfj7LeNA80AzO1x-1vrk3iHGXXDtfnDRKikV2CpzX_87tAf3xqTtl3dbEc7Ocf4u1x8FlMMP5QhuHVmdK8vYX_sHYEBHP1P3LdcnLZ4YMn9Gnuz_1ZuGjoquZTZPnvh3DkSyloVpzJnQFE6GHPcy5h0Z0_i8fWKX93t8ThAd11Nzxj8fZfCRxbb9xxxhvn-DgbPrVMN0cioqSBLXk7vNx6osJEH3Un_1rtX8Ae9gxHl5DcqY7djXU4kvKRb2yQ35ftgC2ou44lytWjYO2g2LdToq-g78vcLmEYex5tcRaj3DTOeRQzgjLh5z5hl6kDYybtaJQl2zjQGW0kWOAkQocIA87FZvuMRJi4Tb7JymDaxUaIPoaIZez4ApfdOViuX9MMpfOch2lVBB7KzyrMmHxiIyT5qLR5TvjyJq8whEPHpiNqhn8sHKPBv30KpPJ4G4iTZObC2vsgm14HHncqpPtlU2PyXfv-UJdxfSVn2eGj7vdisqX0IIMVJ-ft1uxBApFTA/jRgmO3e7_xZd-LB8rY3S7R8FqqsvcaaW/6 "All of it comes CRASHING DOWN unless we stop the Democrats from bargain back into power. ")_**

That's why I'm giving everything I've got to make these next four years under President Trump worth it. That's __also__ why I'm sending you this email. The Democrat Party is just a couple of seats away from taking back power in the House of Representatives.

We unloaded every dollar we had to hold the line and contact voters in enough swing districts to win in November. _And now we 're tapped out. Completely._

**So I 'm launching a major rebuilding effort with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to 1) refill our warchest, 2) get ahead of the 8-ball in battleground districts, and 3) keep our Republican Majority in control for ALL FOUR YEARS of Trump's term.**

I know it's early.

But last cycle, we won the House by about 7,000 votes. The Democrats outraised us by $80M and outspent us by $70M. And they almost won. Now President Trump's entire legislative agenda hangs in the balance.

**That includes his historic tax cuts that I 'm working on RIGHT NOW. **

It's going to take a fortune to save President Trump's House Majority. We don't have an army of Liberal billionaires at our beck and call. The Democrat Party obviously does.

_**[That's why everyday folks like you and even hillbillies like me - who kick in a few bucks here and there - are our best hope right now.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/CduHaAcJUtLax0amFvrW-VcpKO7m8zKKRRFJimreO_uyEkJ9nDllNdvXqgCx6-QZ9IgcPmnumXsZQ-Gh2iaX1nuKe83rdOv2IfvMMs9SM8ZyuUsf-Vy9cujRprr19R3YaeZf2gUpaxEKSM3Kl5Gw2_LgG2_ysAlp6HRlLXZQBpu8PCrMyvQN44XDMfiiltce7x6py8JAfhjotcrmghVFp6tKBHa2pR8rPhlDzFtSz-S6mciaHOvfn68PYq9vPYmLe3sDJtIcwqOF3EFUlDYx-DOgnWKdYsrlozncWyPD1d4kPlNC6ht6kyjW3Ak03disbrAlskivXGf66GVg7-lCZhL-6p9WBA1JM_pSx_niNJuNgdGKeuCGbH-FhC9YebhcXiYZb-ua7g9a1-7qM904L_iqMvQxRPu9pNOlBIBON1Tsqwe7SL3L7se0preE98ofqYAJd_fzrrlMqJQxfww4ZeTHJK1Bb1UMH4ip_aLT2lEQROOXAzfyYkaaSPsgCBRwg4Nxd1Ym6Yy_2A/4jftEMQihaulj_HGFyEmlBrzNBpH8p9F/6 "That’s why everyday folks like you and even hillbillies like me – who kick in a few bucks here and there – are our best hope right now. ")**_

The amount doesn't matter _nearly_ as much as the number of people who step up.

The fate of our House Majority (and of Trump's MAGA agenda) is in your hands. I can only hope you'll have the heart to save it.

Thank you,
_- Jason_

body:
How would you like to work together?

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a33s/?__vbtrk=Mjc2NjAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc2NjAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend, **YOU’RE HIRED!**
I’m looking for a leader – _not a follower_ – to join my team as the first **TRUMP APPRENTICE.**
**_[And since I only work with WINNERS like you, I’d like to make you a BIG offer for the position.>>](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a33s/?__vbtrk=Mjc2NjAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc2NjAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**

I’ve heard enough to know that you’re the only one in your state who has what it takes.
That’s why I’m going to give you a shot to join my team – but please don’t blow this opportunity!

[JOIN TEAM TRUMP](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a33s/?__vbtrk=Mjc2NjAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc2NjAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
As my apprentice, you’ll have a direct line of communication to share ANYTHING you want with me through exclusive surveys, petitions, polls, and a WHOLE LOT MORE.
I’ll also share confidential Trump updates with you personally. _PLEASE don’t tell anyone!_
**_[But I have to finalize my decision before the day ends, so if you think you can take the heat, hurry and accept your position as the NEW TRUMP APPRENTICE>>](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a33s/?__vbtrk=Mjc2NjAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc2NjAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**
Thank you and may God bless you,

name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: Law and Disorder: Trump’s Dangerous Jan. 6 Pardons
body:
Trump is abusing his power to disrupt our justice system. This time he is using it to free dangerous criminals who were at the January 6th insurrection.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2witj4-v4lqot-kyd76rh1/)
---
# **Law and Disorder: Trump’s Dangerous Jan. 6 Pardons**
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2witj4-v4lqou-kyd76rh2/)
---
| | | | Dear friend, Donald Trump’s reckless pardons for January 6th rioters were bad enough. Now, it’s even worse. This week, the Department of Justice widened the scope of Trump’s pardons—not just for those who stormed the Capitol, but for criminals with **separate gun and drug charges** uncovered during the investigation. Let’s be clear: **Trump is letting violent offenders walk free:** **Elias Costianes** —a rioter caught inside the Capitol—was also convicted of illegal gun possession and drug trafficking. Trump’s pardon just set him loose. **Daniel Ball** —who threw an explosive device at officers and has a long history of domestic violence—was still facing gun charges. Now, thanks to Trump, those charges are gone, too. **This isn’t law and order—it’s lawlessness.** Trump is proving, once again, that he will always side with violent criminals if they serve his political agenda. [**_Americans deserve safety, accountability, and a leader who upholds justice—not a president who lets criminals off the hook. Our job is to use our microphone to demand accountability. Every dollar raised goes toward fighting back against this dangerous agenda and ensuring we elect leaders who stand for real justice. Chip in now to stop Trump’s lawlessness and support real leaders in the 2026 midterms._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2witj4-v4lqov-kyd76rh3/) In Solidarity, The No Dem Left Behind Team

Thank you for your support in this pivotal time.

name: The Flyover
subject: IRS Staff Cuts, Fort Knox Audit, and Golden-Tipped Pyramids
body:
The IRS began terminating [approximately 6,700 probationary employees ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1urDAUhJ_GdEbHB_9t4eI2dHvblMiLD7tODEbYWoe3j0if7pNGMyN9H_fp7mOK2_O_X8nVJU8IqDggRzEFH9M5yS64hQhp6MgJI0EM2hrVvRxYacwcDKGURnlxk1rqBYabskbfpOqiu9YAUQiBoGxvBFlFoL0BCGQDk0Ah1nz0nzlu9UVLOvObjn7Oa5fcq9a9sOEfw5Hh2Frr50fZqJUrZzheyHC8GnxQADwehdO6p3wSFU7fO82VAq90rHHzFz5OTlvgeeGN6Ivh2B0u7C2mFIs2TMJz9TH9_te_fLwd_gQAAP__hyVhjw)on Thursday as the Trump administration pursues broader plans to abolish the agency.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kU_LnDAQxj9NvCnJRI0ecnjBSkvZl9JLjxLNRFPyZ4lxy377YteWQukcfzzzzDMz327TTVlnw_quPMps4gQUmpJCCWzSyrrnVBdaGkRAXqBkoqaMt51oik3WyrCZ9XOLLVCcsWd904mmE73qDMy6sPJ0owCMMaBNVwmGXYO0VYJSjZ0mNUVtc0zV92hD3tC4Z3xgqpboCye3nO874W8ERgJjNAbTXimPyS4qbCplE5Neo9OnnsCIXln3W0lgNAmxXA-rkcA4xzLhgvtuYzgN-ehQ6T0eaUHChw-v3vbIfvoD8S_oUdvDEz5cGS8clMd_YMZ0Ks_NobnYEkPGkAkfZutcnBIu05XtNdQsyt-VXQPhg6Ds_UHP-nz7-HX79PalSFLff1jn7N4KUtP1jPbrTvl_f3tI-BkAAP__-M2cRQ) | |
# Friday, February 21, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1995, [Steve Fossett](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAQxvGngS3WcYChA0OlKuqSrulmnc05psIhcogtv33l7l2_T_pJ_-ulu1DK6X77oplDHUuHgPYEeELVRUp574yMYWRG1pKDcgaUbr2zcgqDNxQ9KRP9QK1BUm7ENxgJrLUarUzh0ABRKYVgfeMUe8vQkgOI7KMwwDHVsjQ_Jd3rxGPey8pLM5RZ5jDV-ngK_S7wLPC8bVuzl1d99Xz8x0J1mIQ-r0J_fPcnJMvXz77IJcTHlnJOz9YJA7eZUv4j63-Ja8DfAAAA___tbFGn) landed in Leader, Saskatchewan, Canada, after taking off from South Korea, becoming the first person to make a solo flight across the Pacific Ocean in a balloon. Sporadic sightings of a Scottish Highland bull have been reported in Connecticut. The bull resembles an adorable bigfoot as it evades capture. [See the bull and his story below](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb_G7oiGAdukoHhNurx2S2uAIZ4VMZFNEuXvV95-y6srHR2dr-t8JSmy3v7TnX3LdUbAQQEq1HMiKZ_Z9slnZmTTs9eTBW1GNw394s8UTTpnhzE5a61jcHmkMETAEDKEXvxBA0StNcLgTpNmNzCMNAEkdqmzwEla3U7fVda2cC6f-uLtFOu9L35p7bF35l-Hlw4v9Fj5vR_XMbYmsXCHl_AsRZVad1axrivHJvHZ1B5ra7IvapHbUmhNypoxOGIcNJic0GkicFNkmyEQB9NvPj3eUors49RZuN1Jyq9J-6vMy-NPAAAA___vhGWj). We're sponsored today by [American Hartford Gold](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kU_LnDAQxj9NvCnJRI0ecnjBSkvZl9JLjxLNRFPyZ4lxy377YteWQukcfzzzzDMz327TTVlnw_quPMps4gQUmpJCCWzSyrrnVBdaGkRAXqBkoqaMt51oik3WyrCZ9XOLLVCcsWd904mmE73qDMy6sPJ0owCMMaBNVwmGXYO0VYJSjZ0mNUVtc0zV92hD3tC4Z3xgqpboCye3nO874W8ERgJjNAbTXimPyS4qbCplE5Neo9OnnsCIXln3W0lgNAmxXA-rkcA4xzLhgvtuYzgN-ehQ6T0eaUHChw-v3vbIfvoD8S_oUdvDEz5cGS8clMd_YMZ0Ks_NobnYEkPGkAkfZutcnBIu05XtNdQsyt-VXQPhg6Ds_UHP-nz7-HX79PalSFLff1jn7N4KUtP1jPbrTvl_f3tI-BkAAP__-M2cRQ), offering free financial advice on how to protect your savings during a recession.
|
---
## IRS Cuts 6,700 Workers as Trump Eyes Overhaul
The IRS began terminating [approximately 6,700 probationary employees ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1urDAUhJ_GdEbHB_9t4eI2dHvblMiLD7tODEbYWoe3j0if7pNGMyN9H_fp7mOK2_O_X8nVJU8IqDggRzEFH9M5yS64hQhp6MgJI0EM2hrVvRxYacwcDKGURnlxk1rqBYabskbfpOqiu9YAUQiBoGxvBFlFoL0BCGQDk0Ah1nz0nzlu9UVLOvObjn7Oa5fcq9a9sOEfw5Hh2Frr50fZqJUrZzheyHC8GnxQADwehdO6p3wSFU7fO82VAq90rHHzFz5OTlvgeeGN6Ivh2B0u7C2mFIs2TMJz9TH9_te_fLwd_gQAAP__hyVhjw)on Thursday as the Trump administration pursues broader plans to abolish the agency. Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick said Wednesday that President Trump’s [ultimate goal is to "abolish" the IRS](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwyAQQL8Gb1jHxQYyMHTxlq4dLWzO8VUQIiBx8_dVund_ek96X5f54jny7frpE7m25RkBRwkoUc3Bc3zNQxfcRoR06sgpM4A6aWvGbneLhUWpMJptWNGM57OFVW9kNZD2WpuO3dsGiEophNH2RpEdCbQ3AIFsEANQ4JZL_5351nba4is_qfRrTl10e2v3Kk4fAieB03Ec_ZZ_lkflG9X6ZgROiQJ7gdOaU6Kykqy0Fmq-vGTdfaEqW3mke5XX7KP0S45cd8mldsWF-8ExctVGDHBNnuNfuP034unwNwAA__87CWHA) and replace it with an "External Revenue Service" funded primarily through tariffs. Unions have raised concerns that the cuts [could disrupt taxpayer services](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O5CAQhJ8GZ1jQ_oELCCZxNhdccrrIYqCx-4RhZJjxep9-5c03q1JJpU_f3_t8txQpLb_thqaGPIOAgQvgIGdvKZ5z33gTEAG7Bo1UvZDdqNXQrEYPalTe6dH_ErLTwWkZpPWPTg0jgOsaMtebAJBSghh0qyTqAcVolRAetWe9QE817-3_TKmuGOKZ37i3Lm9NNGutz8K6G4OJwXQcR7uVdG0MJkz8VRhMW054Xt3llLcr0V74AxdKhUd75hAKt4X7vCB3r1q4yzGSR35QXXm1H7ygLTkxmOzObzf5Wf7c_zW78c-DYqQyKtaLZbMUv7HqT5reBr4CAAD__6rJaog) and delay the processing of returns. The IRS workforce had grown to [over 100,000 employees](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL9ytCAUxZ8GO5zLVUQLiq-x269N6bBwURIUB8m6vn3G9GnPmfNnfh-P6WFCDNv836yki08TAkoOyFFMzoR4TW3ltCdCairSQrUgmq5Xslq0GBoxoGyl9YM0aEw7WPUE6zr0JAGqoO82QBRCIMi-VoJ6SdAZBeCod6wFcqGkXH-msJWFfLzSi3Jt01pFvZSyH6z5x3BkOJ7nWc_pRW-yt38rKX_5lC0xHO8lhiMgwzHkg9N7J1vIcR8y8U4BcFr3mC6igz9pDtsWtpmX5TsfzlwMxxYagXe8ytrtZ4gxHJ1iLcyrCfH3UvkL0UvjTwAAAP__JIxmlg) in fiscal 2024, up from 80,000 at the start of the Biden administration, following efforts to improve operations and customer service.
## Sen. Mitch McConnell to Retire
Sen. Mitch McConnell, the longest-serving party leader in Senate history, announced [his retirement Thursday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwyAURb8Gb1jwwMYZGCpV3lJ162gReMSvxRABSpS_r9K989U9Ojpf5-3sKFG-frgDbY9lAwETF8BBbsFRem56CDYiAqoBrTRaSDUvZhp2qzz6OE9Rop6XaBRc8HRZvDPodNBqGsi-aAJASgliWkYjcZlQzM4IEXAJTAsM1EsdvwvlvmNMz3LHOvpyDMnuvd8aU28MVgaru_iMjzZey2tmsH6WRJ18Y7Ae1P3OD-9LzpgSr4gJfaeS-aPkzhviD4-plMpdCBXb69R6qU-mVgpMvUt5EuKkpBqqDbcHpURtNkyL6-Eo_Qn1_wLdLfwGAAD__xozaI0) on his 83rd birthday, stating he will not seek reelection in 2026. First elected in 1985, McConnell has [served seven terms](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFu8yAURp8GNqzLjTFkYPgXb_nXjhaB65gKQ4RpaN6-cvdun_RJ50jn47bcXEwxP_67nWxby4KASgAKlEtwMb2XkQe7EiFdOFmpR5CXyWjFN-sB0YA07rpq50Y1hSCNv6srGWM8SR7tSQNEKSWCMoOWZBTB5DRAIBPYCBRiK3X4LDG3jdb0Li-qgy87T3Zr7Xmwyz-GM8O59z74-5GpH-fPcD4nw3mPzW9i977kTCmJXnIT9SuLtVRRiRL5FksWmb6beJOrDGdebXj2mFI8Js1GeOwupl9t-yvDy-JPAAAA__93-mCG) as the U.S. senator from Kentucky and has recently dealt with several health issues, including freezing episodes and falls that have resulted in his need to use a wheelchair. Although he supported much of Donald Trump's agenda during his first term, McConnell has since become [a more vocal critic](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOhCAQxvGngW7NMIJgQXGN3V57pWFhXOeCYpSs2Xv6i9df9yVf8kv-X_fxHjjz-vwMC_k6lREBzQ3whmpMgfN71DL5iQipleSV1aDazlkjZ4-9w-h0n6K2KUAH2OOklQtk-sl0WrK_NEBUSiEY11hFzhB0wQIkcklooMS17M134bXONOV3edHexLLI7Odat0O0HwIHgcN5ns3jEa9P4LDSeQgcwl45Zrpm3Fwm3FrT_hS5-7SdnDMfnRUankvg_KfW_ypfHn8DAAD__6fyUoE), voting against cabinet nominees Pete Hegseth, Tulsi Gabbard, and Robert F. Kennedy Jr. Four [potential contenders](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO8yAQhJ8Gd1iw2MEUFH_jLn97pbWBTczdGiyMYuXtTznpyqumGM3o0_dxXa6YOOXHf9zIt3tZQMEoFUjQS8TEr2Xoor8TAZmOvLaD0uYy2bFbPaIarbbGuFucrB7cGMBhcEajizHYLvn3mwLQWoMap95qmkZSF7RKRZqiGBTF1ErtP0vKbaU7v8qTah_K1rFfW9sPYf4JmAXM53n2-RYynce7FzDvhVNL4RAwVwwkK-38zi21sMothJIzMUvkShhfsmT5O5GRji9ZQ0btjJqgqz7uZ2JOx8WKQT02TPyD0f7S8vTwHQAA__-S1GWq) have surfaced for McConnell's seat: Rep. James Comer, businessman Nate Morris, Rep. Andy Barr, and former Kentucky Attorney General Daniel Cameron, who announced his candidacy less than an hour after the news of McConnell's retirement broke.
## SS United States Takes Final Voyage
The historic [SS United States](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L1u7CAUBOCngQ4LDthwC4rbuNu0KS0wx-uT4B8ZYmvfPnLKSKk_zWg074_hESjT-nwLC_o6bQNIaIUEAWpIgfJrMDz5CRFQc_TKGql052zLZ__PaGmjBp2MxU4DRrARbZwcODvFlpO_2ySAUgpk6xqr0LUou2ClTOgSMxIT1e1oPjZa64xTfm0nHs24LTz7uda9MP2fQc-gv66rGWNZ8Sq3M-j3mXJImPeZAoP-FgZ9KeJrpYpJlBoqFlGPMH7iITKGE4v4leKHT_tFOVPpLDPyuQTKPwPqX4ecHr4DAAD__z2IZAY) ocean liner began its final voyage, departing Philadelphia on a two-week journey to the Gulf of America, where it will become the world’s largest artificial reef. The 1,000-foot vessel set [the transatlantic speed record](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFu8zAMhJ_G3hRQlCwrg4Z_yZZ_7WiwEhmzUGLDVhPk7Qt373h3wOHD93GdrqRVH7f_dOfUZJkQcDCABu1USOt78n1Jwozsek529GBdiOPQzykXC8SWUXI-S_COXQg4AA8UBGLoNR1vgGitRRjiabQcB4ZAI0DhWDoPXLQt2-lr0UebWep7efJ2ysu9r2lubd0796_DS4cXWh_82o_pCFvTXLnDy6x7WzbNZp91NUcvmpWq2ZjFrLNWKlzXWclIXTYtZG7fVUy0MXtfRnEwxuxFyH1GIncW5_DMpd9SWV9aq-5h7Dzc7qT1F6z9JeqZ8CcAAP__BANqsQ) on its maiden voyage in 1952, crossing the Atlantic in three days, 10 hours, and 40 minutes—10 hours faster than the RMS Queen Mary. It still holds the record for the fastest ocean liner crossing. From 1952 to 1969, [many of America’s rich and famous](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHO4yAQhJ8Gd1jLYgdSUFxDl2uvtDZhcThhExkSy2__y-n_aqb4NDOaf7fpRimndf5LC7sWy4SAowSUqKZAKR_T0AUXmZF1x06ZAZS-WDN2TxftPUYATVGNRnO443A1492i4RhG4i65Mw0QlVIIo-2NYjsyXMgABLZBDMAhtbL1_0ta25NjPsqHt_5Rli67Z2uvKvQfgV6g3_e9f1dqJdBxAgJ9bWU7BPqV93oKtVRWgf6sFegBv_4Eq3yvqXGQtVHjKmNaKctPOWhmOb9zlCVKWnhLDxLozVWD1mABjEDfbS689pRzqhcjBpgXSvm7sf322cfhTwAAAP__zQpr5g), including presidents and movie stars, sailed to Europe on the ocean liner. Notable passengers included Marilyn Monroe, Marlon Brando, Sean Connery, and Walt Disney. The SS _United States_ will dock in Alabama for final preparations before reaching its resting place off the coast of Destin, Florida, where it will serve as an artificial reef to support marine life and attract divers and anglers. [Track the journey here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FqwzAQgOGnkbaY01mK1EFDoDF0SBa7dDSKdbKvyHawRUrevqR7958P_q9LfwmceRmvYSZf0tojoDkAHlD1MXB-9lpGn4iQakleWQ2qPjpr5OTJpiEFPURVo3EpaTUk7d7qGxkYUrpJ9i8NEJVSCMZVVpEzBMdgASK5KDRQ5LJu1ffKS5ko5ef6oK0a1llmP5Vy30V9EtgIbPYpbFSNYZt5eQUCm7b9vH505_e2O3XnVm4-3n84Z96PVmgY58D5jyr_rT08_gYAAP__HcFP7w).

On this day in 1995, landed in Leader, Saskatchewan, Canada, after taking off from South Korea, becoming the first person to make a solo flight across the Pacific Ocean in a balloon. Sporadic sightings of a Scottish Highland bull have been reported in Connecticut. The bull resembles an adorable bigfoot as it evades capture. . We're sponsored today by , offering free financial advice on how to protect your savings during a recession. | IRS Cuts 6,700 Workers as Trump Eyes Overhaul The IRS began terminating Thursday as the Trump administration pursues broader plans to abolish the agency. Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick said Wednesday that President Trump’s and replace it with an "External Revenue Service" funded primarily through tariffs. Unions have raised concerns that the cuts and delay the processing of returns. The IRS workforce had grown to in fiscal 2024, up from 80,000 at the start of the Biden administration, following efforts to improve operations and customer service. Sen. Mitch McConnell to Retire Sen. Mitch McConnell, the longest-serving party leader in Senate history, announced on his 83rd birthday, stating he will not seek reelection in 2026. First elected in 1985, McConnell has as the U.S. senator from Kentucky and has recently dealt with several health issues, including freezing episodes and falls that have resulted in his need to use a wheelchair. Although he supported much of Donald Trump's agenda during his first term, McConnell has since become , voting against cabinet nominees Pete Hegseth, Tulsi Gabbard, and Robert F. Kennedy Jr. Four have surfaced for McConnell's seat: Rep. James Comer, businessman Nate Morris, Rep. Andy Barr, and former Kentucky Attorney General Daniel Cameron, who announced his candidacy less than an hour after the news of McConnell's retirement broke. SS United States Takes Final Voyage The historic ocean liner began its final voyage, departing Philadelphia on a two-week journey to the Gulf of America, where it will become the world’s largest artificial reef. The 1,000-foot vessel set on its maiden voyage in 1952, crossing the Atlantic in three days, 10 hours, and 40 minutes—10 hours faster than the RMS Queen Mary. It still holds the record for the fastest ocean liner crossing. From 1952 to 1969, , including presidents and movie stars, sailed to Europe on the ocean liner. Notable passengers included Marilyn Monroe, Marlon Brando, Sean Connery, and Walt Disney. The SS United States will dock in Alabama for final preparations before reaching its resting place off the coast of Destin, Florida, where it will serve as an artificial reef to support marine life and attract divers and anglers. . name: Lila Rose
subject: CVS providing chemical abortions
body:
in pro-abortion states like California, Illinois, and Connecticut, a teen with a doctor's note can receive the deadly abortion pill in her local pharmacy

| [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=45317cf6cbb6429aaa5cb4bbb583bc1f&_e=Nr0AuvhqeFRyKTzOat62b4_WpBEyeNotCE-assC-pF0ZzVHUSU5X9UAcer3D2v36q2B6OYfSkdGwbmeLuE_Rrt1As1uiKL4dKe1CPd-tEZV317WZN3xEH6FbivEbeNebT-2iOndOLY5lFE89qMN81bq6H34n2ocQihavza5rgRoa4AKmam6SPU-bl2pZBnvdTVYloEk06tfrWelPiZKra4cFN1koEaXxXnkFaF0yuN9nhbZsQNLMiD8zC60kfJtCKs-lm5bz3fSzmF-FY-dxPA1J-uA3G6vkriit0-yb2jgcI9F5N1A8wdSqMV7hk96oBcoeXrFUMU9T13OYnBPufYJDxRYVKkwMHV_LEu9UsmLJqZo_JnSLbcI6zMX8kJsV_JeUMgHn46Bx_gthI54m1g%3D%3D)

#
Friend of Life, it's Lila Rose - Founder and President of Live Action. I have an urgent request.

Walgreens and CVS will begin selling the lethal abortion pill with a prescription this month.

This means that in pro-abortion states like California, Illinois, and Connecticut, a teen with a doctor's note can receive the deadly abortion pill in her local pharmacy, all without her parent's knowledge. Expansion of the abortion pill into local pharmacies has already killed tens of thousands of preborn children.

The U.S. Supreme Court will soon hear the most important pro-life case since overturning Roe v. Wade. The Court will decide whether dangerous telemedicine abortions and the distribution of abortion pills by mail and pharmacies can continue nationwide.

We need to raise our voices now while there is still time. I'm looking for 100 people to give before midnight. Can you be one of them?

You will mobilize parents, grandparents, and pro-life people with the truth by donating right now. No other pro-life organization has the online reach we do. That's why your gift of $50 before midnight will alert more than 1700 people about this agenda of death. Give now using this secure link:
[****https://give.liveaction.org/expansion-abortion-pill/****](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=45317cf6cbb6429aaa5cb4bbb583bc1f&_e=Nr0AuvhqeFRyKTzOat62b4_WpBEyeNotCE-assC-pF0ZzVHUSU5X9UAcer3D2v36q2B6OYfSkdGwbmeLuE_Rrt1As1uiKL4dKe1CPd-tEZV317WZN3xEH6FbivEbeNebT-2iOndOLY5lFE89qMN81bq6H34n2ocQihavza5rgRoa4AKmam6SPU-bl2pZBnvdTVYloEk06tfrWelPiZKra4cFN1koEaXxXnkFaF0yuN-vobfQD8U9FDk7mNziG5hc0GgwCzliDRno9X3_dENIFkz6dFF8QjsQHClxxXTRvgp5q7FEBqIlSjso4FaQkFE8h53RGgLoTwV19CGWFTzlBdVFcitzbL6STJaAwyU8WCQTVP-aR4eqPr_rTEFp_Jb5a5LZjX6QWNRY1wF1rthMLw%3D%3D)

If you don't speak out right now against the abortion pill in your local pharmacy, you may never get the chance to again.

Thank you for standing with us against this agenda of death before it comes to your local pharmacy!

For Life,

Lila Rose

name: History Facts
subject: Why France built a fake Paris
body:
Just after noon on August 30, 1914, about a month into World War I, a biplane marked with the German iron cross under its wings flew 6,000 feet above France’s capital city.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68dp6bdizmmxzqlc63enzx8mkvqrtxsdi4jn576fyjfh1jbzi30pq8vreb95up5zmeb9dd573ab2p7c7d07t5q62rv79pjcstrgu4k0jgjfugthirnitkqo9e0brnzt64kss05tjrq0enub9y&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss189t&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [In WWI, France started to build a fake Paris to confuse German bombers.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss189t&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss189t&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss189t&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| J ust after noon on August 30, 1914, about a month into World War I, a biplane marked with the German iron cross under its wings flew 6,000 feet above France’s capital city. Soon, to the surprise of Parisians below, four explosions rocked the city as the German pilot dropped bombs, by hand, in the world’s first aerial raid on a national capital. As an increasing number of attacks came from German planes (as well as the first wartime Zeppelins), Parisians decided to take drastic action. In late 1917, engineers commissioned by the French government [began creating a fake Paris](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss189t&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) just outside the capital in an effort to fool the German air force.
---
The project was led by Fernand Jacopozzi, who famously illuminated the Eiffel Tower and Champs-Élysées years later. One of the first re-creations was the Gare de l’Est railway station, which was a victim of Germany’s first bombing raid four years prior. Jacopozzi used creative electrical lighting and wooden boards on a conveyor belt to even simulate moving trains. He also crafted factory rooftops, fabricated from painted canvas, to simulate the manufacturing center of France’s war effort. However, by November 1918, the war was over, and the faux city was never completed, nor did it ever divert any German ordnance. Still, the idea proved to be a good one: Decades later during the Second World War, the U.S. employed Hollywood set designers to create fake West Coast neighborhoods to camouflage military factories from Japanese air raids.

## Mapmakers sometimes insert fake streets to catch plagiarists.
Cartography is a meticulous and time-consuming process, so it’s only reasonable that mapmakers would want to leave behind a hidden watermark of sorts to protect their work. Many cartographers have included fictitious streets (and sometimes entire towns) in their maps as a way to trick copycats. These are known broadly as “[trap streets](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss189t&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)” — the idea being, if another map copies your fake street, you’ve “trapped” them with copyright infringement. One of the first known instances of trap streets occurred in the 1980s when the publisher of a Los Angeles guidebook admitted to sprinkling in nonexistent streets in its maps. As recently as 2009, Google Maps even displayed an entirely fictitious English town called “Argleton” in West Lancashire, which is actually just an empty field.

clean_body: Just after noon on August 30, 1914, about a month into World War I, a biplane marked with the German iron cross under its wings flew 6,000 feet above France’s capital city. | J ust after noon on August 30, 1914, about a month into World War I, a biplane marked with the German iron cross under its wings flew 6,000 feet above France’s capital city. Soon, to the surprise of Parisians below, four explosions rocked the city as the German pilot dropped bombs, by hand, in the world’s first aerial raid on a national capital. As an increasing number of attacks came from German planes (as well as the first wartime Zeppelins), Parisians decided to take drastic action. In late 1917, engineers commissioned by the French government just outside the capital in an effort to fool the German air force. The project was led by Fernand Jacopozzi, who famously illuminated the Eiffel Tower and Champs-Élysées years later. One of the first re-creations was the Gare de l’Est railway station, which was a victim of Germany’s first bombing raid four years prior. Jacopozzi used creative electrical lighting and wooden boards on a conveyor belt to even simulate moving trains. He also crafted factory rooftops, fabricated from painted canvas, to simulate the manufacturing center of France’s war effort. However, by November 1918, the war was over, and the faux city was never completed, nor did it ever divert any German ordnance. One of the first known instances of trap streets occurred in the 1980s when the publisher of a Los Angeles guidebook admitted to sprinkling in nonexistent streets in its maps. Friend,

At President Trump’s inauguration, he expressed that _“our nation has suffered greatly,”_ but _“after all we have been through together, we stand on the verge of the four greatest years in American history.”_
---
Those inspiring words – and President Trump’s historic leadership – have already begun to right the ship for our country in just a few weeks’ time.
---
_But today, sadly, I have to write to you for a far more somber reason._

I say this with a heavy heart, but every word is God's honest truth...
---
**While our beautiful country may have emerged from four long years of darkness, tyranny, and the Left’s weaponized justice system, my journey out of that darkness is __not__ yet finished.**
---
**If the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona gets her way, I’ll be in a jail cell until I’m 100 years old!**

And worst of all, these Deep State goons truly believe I’m finished, just like the media says, all because this case that’s already set to go to trial was brought on bogus _state-level_ charges that PREVENT President Trump from saving me with a federal pardon.

---

---
Which is why, at 80 years old, I’m __still__ FIGHTING BACK.
---
When these leftist crooks first had me booked, they filed my mugshot under **booking # 2313757** ...

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Flying Dogs, Wemby Out, and the Best State Capital
body:
Dog-friendly airline RetrievAir, founded by Keller High School and Baylor University grad Benton Miller, previewed its service earlier this month during an inaugural flight from Arlington Municipal Airport to Denver.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb8Gd7ZmwGBcUDwpSpfXbmlNAMdIYCNDssnfr5xdbbftvVczR-fjMl0oxLDe_lPypj7nbeLAZQu85Tg5CvE19Y0zV3AjNt7g0AP2iKNoFgOWpO0FcUlydkrrK6h5UB4RpRgFNcEcx4BzRM416M4q1FLN5JS0pOeB9eBdqNve1cVX_6Qyx9f28Htnt9REs9SaCxP_GD8zfg7rw5faZbJUtmNxxOJ8r2kq2323nomTTxQi4-oIk3fhnpg4ZQquzbTX1e9lCfmnt5Qyhdv6XvyWqKHtYZi-FSAMUgsBGsZmNy5_hhhDUQf57Xj1Bq1_mnsY_hUAAP__Jtlvdg) | |
# Friday, February 21, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1896, Pecos County justice of the peace Roy Bean [staged a heavyweight championship fight](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GSqyAUgOGngS4OHI1iQXEbu9x2S-fgOSizCBlkYnz7nWy_L_D983895geGGNL6H3e29e3zDAruNwU30DNhiNfcSbJO0aglWz10Sndaj63cLBlqF8BWD947JmTo3WiYFkZUrXEy2A-mALQGMMo0S6_NvfdI_X1B4wfRKaZQc2nqxpXfePh45ReXZsm7jHar9XmI9p-AScB0nmdTjw1ziiFxk8sqYNowkcv5W8DEqZbAh4DJMaZbyZcslp5niDEc_Se27hjir13_nH1Z-AkAAP__PUdYpg) on the southern bank of the Rio Grande, knowing the illegal contest would not be stopped by U.S. or Mexican authorities at the remote site. An East Texas city was left with one police officer after the mayor fired every one of his colleagues. Check out [the story](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGymzAQRb8GumWkRWBcqEhD99Km9KykldFkjRhJMc9_nyF92lPcO-f8-np8UZK0P3_Si237jvmBCidQCKgfgZJ8HqYP1qlw1z1bfTNKG63vY79Z45yKNOl5UfdJBT2Os3fobyr4yDGqPtlrTCFqjbioZfCzXqY5UpgnT0u8dUZxSC2XoW3c-JtqlE9-cxl8fvVit9aO2o0_Olw7XM_zHLyr-j60d4crlZa8cIfrzmftcJXsSTpcNzp_p73CkSV5hsAHlfbivYHkyhVIBPLOkGNMngvELJLPtD8h1frn4nCUfHCBLZULHyV7rtfFpDR4R0w4GhgnDGCcHsEtZgavybtb1NNsVF9sOM4kkup8WT5flOSfVPtv5bfFvwEAAP__KEV_uQ) in today's _Roundup_ section! Our sponsor today is [Pacaso](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb8Gd7ZmwGBcUDwpSpfXbmlNAMdIYCNDssnfr5xdbbftvVczR-fjMl0oxLDe_lPypj7nbeLAZQu85Tg5CvE19Y0zV3AjNt7g0AP2iKNoFgOWpO0FcUlydkrrK6h5UB4RpRgFNcEcx4BzRM416M4q1FLN5JS0pOeB9eBdqNve1cVX_6Qyx9f28Htnt9REs9SaCxP_GD8zfg7rw5faZbJUtmNxxOJ8r2kq2323nomTTxQi4-oIk3fhnpg4ZQquzbTX1e9lCfmnt5Qyhdv6XvyWqKHtYZi-FSAMUgsBGsZmNy5_hhhDUQf57Xj1Bq1_mnsY_hUAAP__Jtlvdg), offering a new type of investment opportunity in the real estate industry.

## Bullied Girl Takes Her Life
Jocelyn Rojo Carranza, an 11-year-old girl from Gainesville, [died by suicide](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL-SgyAQh59GOxx2FcWC4pp0ufZKB2HVncOQERKSt78x_fW_P998P9fpajnwbf22O5n8WuKEEpWQKBAmbzm8p672ZpZ-hJoMDJ2EDmBs683oWS-qV2ilnTW0mgYlR-dH78EOs4KazTkmEQEQtdSN60GrfrG-V87qZag6SZ5zPJq8UaaXTUt4xycdjYt7HcyW8z1V7VeFlwovpZTmRiUVot8zUOHl0xHJbTGGlY8g0oMdexLzIwQmL9iR4H3n9bCZ402gbFvZtfVh_L1wCJz6k2LdLYfPaf7XwtPgXwAAAP__i_pgUw) earlier this month after she was allegedly bullied by classmates over her family’s immigration status. The girl’s classmates “would tell her ICE was going to come and get her parents and she was going to be here alone,” said Marbella Carranza, Jocelyn’s mother. Carranza [found her daughter unresponsive](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuOszAQhZ_GdBPZwyVQuPgbd_nbLZHBYzKSwcg2SXj7Fem3PDrSdy4_j_FhOfC2_Lcr6fLxcUSJLUgEVKOzHM6xqZyepBtURVrdG6kapYa6emqkWg2eat81bd2i7ea57RWha_0dUQ0V6wsmEZVC7GV_mzvVt523rmtn2_u7aCQ5LjHdypMKfWz24YwvSrc5rlXQz1L2LOp_Ao1As517zOWyBJqLLNBIFGjUINAcGTZ650sqOMkmiMHBFwoLpwCOKcN0Qj54ZkdgfaEEE_G2wHSEwOTgygZvVw5nBl5XXpItHDfIxZYjQ6I9piLQVEm7_c0hcO6uGctqOXxblz9vfGn8DQAA__9G0HV1) at their home on Feb. 3, and the girl died five days later. Jocelyn had reportedly seen her school counselor several times before taking her life, but her mother claims administrators [never informed her about the situation](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGuozAQheGnMd1E9sTGTuFiG7q77ZbRYA9hJANX2LmEt1-x_dZH-qXv_Pl6fpEUWV-_aeHYPtP2RI0ONAKaZyYp59N2OY46P0zH0XirjTXmce_myIl7zJbY42OyxKw5EKJ1Wds-ub6TeMU0ojGIQYdb6k1w_US5d4nC5JXVnKVt-63N3PhDdSrn9sP7LW1LV-Lc2ndV918KB4XDcRy3YyK6RoUD7U1SYYXDykdVOJQtUVE4TLRIOWEstHCF8V3KKesLZFnktVOTbYXaqL0rGAMn0w5byRUyU5uhviVJvqoYPKDz-W5HD2MYCaxhA8FpC94gstfaGu26PebvQ0qR2l-i10JS_gHafx_9ifg3AAD__5kbdso). In a statement to local media, Gainesville ISD said they “have been, and will continue to be proactive in our efforts to make sure our schools are safe, secure, and free from harassment.“ Hundreds of people attended the girl’s funeral at St. Mary’s Catholic Church in Gainesville on Wednesday. “I want justice for my child. I want this not to go unhandled,” [Carranza said](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGuqzAMQL8GtqDYJBSGDG9h61vviAwxxVJoKpKW8vdXsN_J0rF8dOSf-3AnCfJ8_KeVXf7OcUCNVmlUCIMnCcdgSu9G7Tso2cHNaDAAXV0urkZi23Uz1XrUbKz12jY41WhG8AbGUtwp04gAiK1uq6mB1jYz-cZO1M63wmj2kuNW5YUzfynN4Ygf3qoprmVwS86vVNT_CuwL7Pd9r6YxPXlP577A_jopsD_ROeKWF3VBBaAOpk3F4NX4DkHYq_SWSTyrmVYJR1KyrvLYKEt8qpQpv09JuTn_2iUESc0Z-FhJwtWT_3zQx-FvAAAA__8X9Wom).
## City Has One Police Officer after Firings
Hawkins Mayor Deb Rushing fired three police officers Tuesday because they were "not hired appropriately,” [leaving the city with just one officer](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOgzAQRL_GdEb2YgwpXFxDl2uvRA5ehxUGI7MKyd-fuP7KmZFGT-_nPt49Jdqe335Fx--YR1DQSgUS9Bg8pc9oquAeKtx0hU53Rmmj9a2pZtdBox-dUbZR2FvsWts2aCC0nTZGqVtF7jpTAFoD9KqvJ6v71kYfbDv5PnbCKAzEudQ8I-PbHzF98gtLPeW1Sm5m3g_RfAkYBAznedYL8nKNAoYNz0PAwHmXB-dCeKW8oZz9udB2yD0nmlDmGGnCIguu_qp5Logy84xFRioYBAxVcWE_KSU67EX1XD2lPwj-18rLwW8AAAD__455ZQI). Last month, Rushing advocated for disbanding the police department after the former chief resigned, but the city council voted 4-1 to keep it. Rushing explained that the terminated officers were not approved by the council as required by city ordinance, meaning their official actions would be [subject to legal challenge](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGuqzAQRL_GdEbeBRsoXLzGXV57S-TY67CKEyOwQvL3V6S_3UgjnRmdn8t88Zz5efvvH2TrO5UZFWqpUCLM0XP-zH0T7VXFCRqyMPQKeoCpaxYLylMHV6VNmIInDQOOQZuhMxojDlPD9oQpRADEUY1tMDBqk3w0OvgxDaJXFLmWra0LVXr7PeVPedHWhvJosl1qXXfR_RPoBLrjONp7rq-zFOhOtkCn8JsFusUfd37uMpdy5-dNbrRmH0h2ci2ZA8mSEgfadoGu2WxcD86Zd3PeuD085-9q_VPDy-JvAAAA__8g7l1b). She admitted she erred in giving former police chief Paul Holland the authority to hire officers without council approval. “ _I was already swamped in my work before this. We already didn’t have enough officers. This is just a real shame_ ,” said Lt. Eric Tuma, the sole remaining officer. Tuma said he believes his former colleagues were [unlawfully terminated](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGymzAQRb8GumWkRWBcqEhD99Km9KykldFkjRhJMc9_nyF92lPcO-f8-np8UZK0P3_Si237jvmBCidQCKgfgZJ8HqYP1qlw1z1bfTNKG63vY79Z45yKNOl5UfdJBT2Os3fobyr4yDGqPtlrTCFqjbioZfCzXqY5UpgnT0u8dUZxSC2XoW3c-JtqlE9-cxl8fvVit9aO2o0_Olw7XM_zHLyr-j60d4crlZa8cIfrzmftcJXsSTpcNzp_p73CkSV5hsAHlfbivYHkyhVIBPLOkGNMngvELJLPtD8h1frn4nCUfHCBLZULHyV7rtfFpDR4R0w4GhgnDGCcHsEtZgavybtb1NNsVF9sOM4kkup8WT5flOSfVPtv5bfFvwEAAP__KEV_uQ), and he’s discussed the situation with a police advocacy group. Rushing said the fired officers are welcome to reapply for their old positions. The Wood County Sheriff’s Office is providing assistance to the Hawkins Police Department until it can hire more officers.
## Texas Native Debuts Dog-Friendly Airline
Dog-friendly airline RetrievAir, founded by Keller High School and Baylor University grad Benton Miller, [previewed its service](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvgzAQhX8NbEb2xRgyeMjClq6VuqCrfSaWDkhtJ4T--opuHbo96ek9ffrer-MVI8dlesOZbHmFdQQJrZAgQI0eI--jrr39lP6sarKq01Jppc6n-mYNOOrOLmiU1BotSfeGqJNgUHtCV0d7nEkApQB62TfOqL41Ab1pHfahq7QkH8uamnKjQi_Mgff1Salx61yzvZVyz9XpUsFQwbBtWzPn5egqGGgRj1zBMNFCCflPQrHQJjKlZ3QkmEoWfp2yCLyL8EgiF-EY8zHHJC4X9f31obhO1t-3yByzOdCmGSP_kpR_1Twt_AQAAP__lrJm4g) earlier this month during an inaugural flight from Arlington Municipal Airport to Denver. The new carrier gives dog owners the chance to fly to select destinations with their best friends without stuffing them into crates. One-way tickets on its 30-seat regional jet—for humans and dogs—are projected to [cost about $750](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GO6yAQheGngc4WTLADBcVt3OW2W1qEGeLREjvCyCRvv_L2Wx_pO_q_bvMtcOb18T88ydd32mZQMHQKOtAzBs6f2Uj0d4VOS_L6apQ2WruLXDxpB9o5GwHTRaG7m2gwIo3OYrBDkuxPTAFoDWCV7eOo7TCmgOMQg01XYRQh1630daFK77Cn_NkOKn3cnjL7pdbXLi7_BEwCptZa_83rvvDr3AVMK7VdwFSoFqYjcOlWah1ujy5wybySLB5fjXPmfTzfHs_A-Revf9YeHn4CAAD___cSWHg). The company plans to begin [operating full-time in May](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO8yAQhJ8Gd0SwIYQUFH_jLn97pUW8i70SCRHei-23P_n6a6YZaebT93Uf7okLv6b_6UlRtlwHMHDRBjTYAROXfXAdxofBm-0o2qsz1ll7O3dzNC54TAgEJvsxufHh4OzNSAYDBoCO4zFmAKwFCCacRm_DxeeE_jKmkK_KGUKW2k4yk9CWllz2-qF2GuuzK3EWeS_q_E9Br6DPq2xHoaB_0boo6BtJY_okbjrpB4lQ02vatVSdy65Xllnv9bvpfEShaSLUuTG9UEHftYjvlUvhxR8o0zNx-X2WP1V8IvwEAAD__3tRYl4), providing service from municipal and executive airports so travelers don’t have to deal with the ever-present crowds at larger airports. “ _Dogs can see the beach for the first time, dogs can see the mountains for the first time. You can create those memories, and they don’t have to be left behind_ ,” said Miller.
| Flying together with our sponsor [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j71ugzAURp_G3oLs6x_M4CFqRZdQqerQERn7Olg1BYEbkrev6J75O_qOzlfXdy7l9HN9dxPaco9zDwzUicEJeB9cyo9e0mAHFhpO0fJaMi45bwQdrRBmkEqhF2yIgKLRDpU0jcfamKgHmuxxxgA4BzDMVF5zo3R0QSvvTKyJZBhSmdeqjFjw7raYH_MN18rPE812LGXZiDgTaAm0-75XbsjAyvp9AARauHy8iGO7qLeuEwcn2m3-XT32KRDxWsaYCwYMgn3iAvJMVxuWPeWcNn34r5NL-V9XnvbfLPwFAAD__-F8WrU) **Zillow’s Co-Founder Has a Big New Idea** Spencer Rascoff co-founded Zillow, scaling it into a $16B real estate giant. But everyday investors couldn’t invest until after the IPO, missing early gains. "I wish we had done a round accessible to retail investors prior to Zillow's IPO," Spencer later said. Now he’s doing just that. Spencer has teamed up with another Zillow exec to launch [Pacaso](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb8Gd7ZmwGBcUDwpSpfXbmlNAMdIYCNDssnfr5xdbbftvVczR-fjMl0oxLDe_lPypj7nbeLAZQu85Tg5CvE19Y0zV3AjNt7g0AP2iKNoFgOWpO0FcUlydkrrK6h5UB4RpRgFNcEcx4BzRM416M4q1FLN5JS0pOeB9eBdqNve1cVX_6Qyx9f28Htnt9REs9SaCxP_GD8zfg7rw5faZbJUtmNxxOJ8r2kq2323nomTTxQi4-oIk3fhnpg4ZQquzbTX1e9lCfmnt5Qyhdv6XvyWqKHtYZi-FSAMUgsBGsZmNy5_hhhDUQf57Xj1Bq1_mnsY_hUAAP__Jtlvdg). Pacaso’s co-ownership marketplace is disrupting the $1.3T vacation home market. And unlike Zillow, you can invest in Pacaso as a private company. With $100M+ in gross profits and rapid international expansion, Pacaso is scaling fast. [Investors like Softbank, Maveron, and others are already on board](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb8Gd7ZmwGBcUDwpSpfXbmlNAMdIYCNDssnfr5xdbbftvVczR-fjMl0oxLDe_lPypj7nbeLAZQu85Tg5CvE19Y0zV3AjNt7g0AP2iKNoFgOWpO0FcUlydkrrK6h5UB4RpRgFNcEcx4BzRM416M4q1FLN5JS0pOeB9eBdqNve1cVX_6Qyx9f28Htnt9REs9SaCxP_GD8zfg7rw5faZbJUtmNxxOJ8r2kq2323nomTTxQi4-oIk3fhnpg4ZQquzbTX1e9lCfmnt5Qyhdv6XvyWqKHtYZi-FSAMUgsBGsZmNy5_hhhDUQf57Xj1Bq1_mnsY_hUAAP__Jtlvdg). Even better, the company’s now turning its focus to international markets, giving this disruptive model even more upside than before. [Join them as a Pacaso shareholder and lock in the $2.70 share price by 2/27](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb8Gd7ZmwGBcUDwpSpfXbmlNAMdIYCNDssnfr5xdbbftvVczR-fjMl0oxLDe_lPypj7nbeLAZQu85Tg5CvE19Y0zV3AjNt7g0AP2iKNoFgOWpO0FcUlydkrrK6h5UB4RpRgFNcEcx4BzRM416M4q1FLN5JS0pOeB9eBdqNve1cVX_6Qyx9f28Htnt9REs9SaCxP_GD8zfg7rw5faZbJUtmNxxOJ8r2kq2323nomTTxQi4-oIk3fhnpg4ZQquzbTX1e9lCfmnt5Qyhdv6XvyWqKHtYZi-FSAMUgsBGsZmNy5_hhhDUQf57Xj1Bq1_mnsY_hUAAP__Jtlvdg).
