clean_body: Dog-friendly airline RetrievAir, founded by Keller High School and Baylor University grad Benton Miller, previewed its service earlier this month during an inaugural flight from Arlington Municipal Airport to Denver. | | | | | | Friday, February 21, 2025 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1896, Pecos County justice of the peace Roy Bean on the southern bank of the Rio Grande, knowing the illegal contest would not be stopped by U.S. or Mexican authorities at the remote site. An East Texas city was left with one police officer after the mayor fired every one of his colleagues. Check out in today's Roundup section! Our sponsor today is , offering a new type of investment opportunity in the real estate industry. Abilene ☁️ 40/15° | Amarillo 🌤️ 38/5° | Austin ☁️ 35/27° | Brownsville 🌧️ 47/39° | Corpus Christi 🌧️ 46/38° | DFW ☁️ 38/22° | El Paso 🌤️ 66/33° | Houston ☁️ 40/31° | Laredo 🌧️ 40/35° | Lubbock ⛅ 39/10° | Midland ⛅ 43/14° | San Antonio ☁️ 36/30° | Tyler ☁️ 38/23° | Waco ☁️ 37/22° | Bullied Girl Takes Her Life Jocelyn Rojo Carranza, an 11-year-old girl from Gainesville, earlier this month after she was allegedly bullied by classmates over her family’s immigration status. The girl’s classmates “would tell her ICE was going to come and get her parents and she was going to be here alone,” said Marbella Carranza, Jocelyn’s mother. Carranza at their home on Feb. 3, and the girl died five days later. Jocelyn had reportedly seen her school counselor several times before taking her life, but her mother claims administrators . In a statement to local media, Gainesville ISD said they “have been, and will continue to be proactive in our efforts to make sure our schools are safe, secure, and free from harassment.“ Hundreds of people attended the girl’s funeral at St. Mary’s Catholic Church in Gainesville on Wednesday. “I want justice for my child. I want this not to go unhandled,” . City Has One Police Officer after Firings Hawkins Mayor Deb Rushing fired three police officers Tuesday because they were "not hired appropriately,” . Last month, Rushing advocated for disbanding the police department after the former chief resigned, but the city council voted 4-1 to keep it. Rushing explained that the terminated officers were not approved by the council as required by city ordinance, meaning their official actions would be . She admitted she erred in giving former police chief Paul Holland the authority to hire officers without council approval. “ I was already swamped in my work before this. We already didn’t have enough officers. This is just a real shame ,” said Lt. Eric Tuma, the sole remaining officer. Tuma said he believes his former colleagues were , and he’s discussed the situation with a police advocacy group. Rushing said the fired officers are welcome to reapply for their old positions. The Wood County Sheriff’s Office is providing assistance to the Hawkins Police Department until it can hire more officers. Texas Native Debuts Dog-Friendly Airline Dog-friendly airline RetrievAir, founded by Keller High School and Baylor University grad Benton Miller, earlier this month during an inaugural flight from Arlington Municipal Airport to Denver. The new carrier gives dog owners the chance to fly to select destinations with their best friends without stuffing them into crates. One-way tickets on its 30-seat regional jet—for humans and dogs—are projected to . The company plans to begin , providing service from municipal and executive airports so travelers don’t have to deal with the ever-present crowds at larger airports. “ Dogs can see the beach for the first time, dogs can see the mountains for the first time. You can create those memories, and they don’t have to be left behind ,” said Miller. | Flying together with our sponsor Zillow’s Co-Founder Has a Big New Idea Spencer Rascoff co-founded Zillow, scaling it into a $16B real estate giant. But everyday investors couldn’t invest until after the IPO, missing early gains. "I wish we had done a round accessible to retail investors prior to Zillow's IPO," Spencer later said. Now he’s doing just that. Spencer has teamed up with another Zillow exec to launch . Pacaso’s co-ownership marketplace is disrupting the $1.3T vacation home market. And unlike Zillow, you can invest in Pacaso as a private company. With $100M+ in gross profits and rapid international expansion, Pacaso is scaling fast. . Even better, the company’s now turning its focus to international markets, giving this disruptive model even more upside than before. . | ➤ Waco: Nevaeh Norwood, a teenage girl from Temple, was found by police in Waco after she ran away from home almost a month ago. A statewide Athena Alert was issued for Norwood on Tuesday. () ➤ Austin: The Texas Senate passed a bipartisan bail reform package on Wednesday. Among other provisions, it would disallow personal bonds for certain offenses and prohibit bail for illegal immigrants charged with a felony. () ➤ Houston: Two girls, ages 15 and 16, have been arrested for allegedly plotting an attack at Memorial High School. According to authorities, the teens planned to place pipe bombs around the school and shoot specific students. () ➤ Fort Worth: The ACLU has criticized the Fort Worth Police Department for confiscating several photographs of nude children from an exhibit at the Modern Art Museum last month. In a Wednesday letter, the organization demanded the department “end its unconstitutional censorship and seizure” of the photographs. () ➤ El Paso: Socorro ISD is cutting hundreds of teachers to address a $38 million budget shortfall. The layoffs will increase class sizes and eliminate most of the district’s elementary fine arts programs. () ➤ Houston: Authorities arrested Eric Latroy Brown, 40, on Tuesday for an alleged sexual assault at the University of Houston earlier this month. Brown was apprehended with the assistance of the U.S. Marshals after a 10-day manhunt. His bond has been set at $15 million. () ➤ Austin: James Davis was named the interim president of the University of Texas at Austin during a board meeting on Wednesday. Davis is a graduate of UT Austin and Harvard Law School and previously worked in the Texas Attorney General’s office before assuming his current role as the university’s senior vice president and chief operating officer. The team expects the reigning Rookie of the Year to be available for the 2025-26 season. () ➤ Dallas Cowboys legend Zack Martin has retired from the NFL after 11 seasons. Martin ends his career tied for the most first-team All-Pro selections in team history. () ➤ The Texas Longhorns are eliminating their annual spring football game and replacing it with an NFL-style ramp-up for the season during the summer. () ➤ Houston Rockets forward Jabari Smith Jr. has been cleared to return to action after breaking his left hand during a Jan. 3 shootaround. The team plays the Minnesota Timberwolves at home tonight. The cuts represent a workforce reduction of more than 15%. ---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi folks,
Here is a summary of today's top stories: ****
**🏛️ Colorado Legislative Session Updates...** HB 1040, which adds nuclear power to Colorado’s clean energy definitions, is gaining traction as lawmakers seek [more reliable energy alternatives.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Meanwhile, a new bill - supported by Jared Polis - aims to boost Colorado's affordable condo market by requiring [third-party inspections](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) during construction. Lawmakers are also considering allowing voters to revisit the controversial [wolf reintroduction program](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in 2026, following concerns from ranchers and rural communities.
**🏔️ Here in Colorado...** Jeffco Kids First uncovered a school district cover-up, reigniting debates on [education transparency](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Mesa County energy leaders warned that state regulations could [cripple local production](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and drive businesses out. Meanwhile, new highway signs [honor Kendrick Castillo](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), who gave his life to stop the 2019 STEM School shooting.
🇺🇸**On the National Stage...** The Senate [confirmed Kash Patel](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) as FBI director, McConnell announced he [won’t run in 2026](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), and Trump ordered an [end to migrant aid](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), shifting funds to border security.
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** A new column highlights how Rep. Lauren Boebert has [built voter trust](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) through her stance against government overreach and advocacy for rural Coloradans.
This is the Mountain Minute for Friday, February 21, 2025.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[How Jeffco Kids First exposed a school cover-up that made international headlines](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
A Jefferson County teacher lost her license after an alleged grooming scandal involving a student at Columbine High School.
The more disturbing revelation? School officials allegedly not only failed to stop it, but facilitated a fraudulent federal declaration to help the student move in with another teacher — all without notifying her parents.
Leann Kearney, a social studies teacher at Columbine, allegedly engaged in an inappropriate relationship with a 17-year-old student, according to state investigators. The student’s mother discovered thousands of alleged calls and text messages between the two, including a letter detailing a kiss.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[HB 1040, adding nuclear to state’s clean energy definitions, gains bipartisan support](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* HB 1040, co-sponsored by Democrat Rep. Alex Valdez and Republican Rep. Ty Winter, would classify nuclear power as a clean energy source, enabling financing and development.
* Supporters argue nuclear energy is essential to meeting climate goals and ensuring a stable energy supply, as wind and solar alone are insufficient.
* Some Democrats, including Rep. Meg Froelich, criticized the bill, calling the classification of nuclear as clean energy misleading, though the measure passed its second reading in the House.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Laramie Energy gives Mesa County a bleak outlook on future under present regulation](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Laramie Energy warned county officials that increasing state regulations are making Colorado the second most difficult state for oil and gas operations, driving companies out of business.
* The decline in energy production is projected to slash tax revenue for Mesa County by 14.4% over the next decade, affecting funding for schools, hospitals, and infrastructure.
* New fees and mandates, including a 1% enterprise fee and high bonding costs for wells, are forcing operators to either shut down or relocate, raising concerns about rural economic decline.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Garbo: How Lauren Boebert earned my vote and my respect](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_When Lauren Boebert announced her decision to leave Colorado’s 3rd Congressional District and run for office in the 4th, I’ll admit, I was hesitant._
_Like many others, I questioned her motives. Was this about finding an easier path to victory? Was it a calculated move driven by self-interest, rather than a genuine desire to serve? These doubts lingered as the primary approached, and, while I ultimately cast my vote for her, it was with reluctance, not enthusiasm._

_But now, mere months after her election, I can confidently say: I was wrong._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[In killing Rep. Woog’s delivery fee repeal bill, Democrats again voted against relief for Coloradans](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY BRIAN PORTER | STATE | FEBRUARY 19** _Another Republican measure, which could have made everyday life more affordable for Coloradans trying to get by, has been killed by House Democrats._ __
**[The transparency fight for public records despite private agendas in Durango 9-R](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN****| LOCAL | FEBRUARY 19** _Access to public, governmental records ensures transparency, but in Durango School District 9-R, accessing them can come with hurdles. Parents say their Colorado Open Records Act (CORA) requests have been met with delayed responses and roadblocks._ __

**[HB 1135, requiring schools adopt student cell phone usage policy, advances out of committee](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY BRIAN PORTER****| LOCAL | FEBRUARY 19** _State lawmakers Wednesday advanced House Bill 25-1135, by Steamboat Springs Democrat Rep. Meghan Lukens and El Paso County Republican Rep. Mary Bradfield, a measure requiring schools adopt and implement a student communication device policy._

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [brian@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🦷 DID YOU KNOW?** Many have heard the myth that George Washington had wooden teeth, but this isn’t true. Forensic research reveals that his dentures were made from a **mix of donkey, horse, and human teeth**.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "Opportunity is missed by most people because it is dressed in overalls and looks like work." —Thomas Edison

| [ ](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/MVZsd7JbNm8W92vNfF4lP1QPW2H1VMy5sjYrlN3V8l8K3m2ndW69sMD-6lZ3p1W8QbLb-6mq4V6W28mSFB5Q3mw5W9fMt_48M56SfN9fB9yN3-SkSW4pR8KR1YXqFDN7QWL2p6L-xTW3NCs8b5h62JCN1lb3Xq8KkNHW5n7V593WjF89W8NZ4Kp8w7W6vW43mylZ3pQg8NW1TVfGK9j6FFnW6GFKJq31xT3XW3BN3Vj2_2NQZW2b0N4n6nbhhQW7cVT0c3MjQpmW52l--Q3TYrDmW6mM_jN3hb5rCW1svNYN1JrQ-_W3twCBY94kjmrf2KtpRd04)
---
**The Church is Under Attack—Help your Pastor to Lead BOLDLY!!**
---
Churches are under attack as cultural pressures challenge core biblical truths, threaten religious freedom, and weaken the foundations of our Christian faith. If pastors aren’t equipped to lead with wisdom and conviction, entire congregations will be led astray. The Faith Forward Pastors Summit is a powerful conference designed to provide pastors with the tools, strategies, and biblical boldness needed to strengthen America’s churches and congregations in today’s shifting culture!
---
[ ](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/MVZsd7JbNm8W92vNfF4lP1QPW2H1VMy5sjYrlN3V8l903m2ndW6N1vHY6lZ3pMW40BJTV7pfQ-MW3R7fzq4PbCTBW7TXXKW4Y85WHW72z4QN41-PgpV93g3v8v3brrW3RqNlS80b0rfW4jcGKT4nGNrgN8wRwYZ39qG1W84-4fb8CYVNRW766C1c5fV6N6W3Wjfd322tmJ8W2qtzj_4nr8FDW2wHKZp4FC5DTW7xBXyp7WZYj6N19gBkBqFn7dW10GvDb8jW49bW1-j-FC7fFVfsW4cSthx4c-8wCW1SCfr26-qQPkW5MDgHh85DxPdW3c1svf5SDMC4F8NT6JjQlvkf5GLfF804)
---
We’re arming pastors with practical strategies, opportunities to engage in dynamic discussions, and inspiration to take action! Your pastor will be ready to:
1. Equip your congregation to stand firm against radical gender ideology and secular influences
2. Protect your church from government overreach and cultural attacks on biblical values
3. Lead with confidence in addressing the tough issues facing Christians today—without fear of cancel culture.

We want pastors to boldly stand alongside leaders who are actively defending Biblical truth and reclaiming the American pulpit, such as Charlie Kirk, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, Pastor Lucas Miles, and so many more!
---
[ ](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/MVZsd7JbNm8W92vNfF4lP1QPW2H1VMy5sjYrlN3V8l8K3m2ndW69sMD-6lZ3kJW5L8bRt1rD1RYN46BDK9nCZ1rW2S1C7w3S-B9bVXJ1g72cqRWYW3PxSnf4nLZ1gW95l53l4LwhSWW6fGTP7148dJ_W2hBWtF4KSLFsW7F22lL92mGqkW8xHLVy55T2_lW7B3PQt63ZNLSW410pB23Q491yW3FVswS8dSL3BN2gq005CFXhBW211jst7YDxy9W5tJNG_2DchthW2Rjll66mRFfyW1ZHZYf7mxKmKW6_ggH44rTqxHW5QXvxB6wN664f8jYYTn04)
---
Your pastor will engage in powerful, eye-opening sessions and connect with fellow like-minded pastors from across the country who share the same passion for faith, freedom, and transforming communities. Call your pastor, send them this message, and encourage them to **Register NOW!** A strong, courageous leader will ensure your church stands firm in truth, grows in faith, and makes a lasting impact for God’s Kingdom!
---

body:
this is HUGE, folks!
| **_Team, this is H-U-G-E!!!!_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86971?t=6&akid=18978%2E878179%2E8_q3GC) [**DC Statehood would give Democrats 2 more Senators and SAVE our Democracy... But unless we have the support of top Democrats like you, friend, we’ll never have the fuel we need to win this fight! Quick: Rush $7 towards our midnight goal to support Dems in the fight for DC Statehood »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86971?t=7&akid=18978%2E878179%2E8_q3GC) | [**1,000 DC STATEHOOD SUPPORTER GOAL: CONFIRM YOUR SUPPORT ASAP »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86971?t=8&akid=18978%2E878179%2E8_q3GC)
---
**DC Statehood would change EVERYTHING for our Democracy...**

It would practically guarantee Democrats 2 more Senators! ✅
It would give the people of DC the representation they deserve! ✅
It would COMPLETELY SHIFT the power dynamic in the fight for the Senate! ✅

[**But it will take all of us, friend: Do your part to help DC become our 51st state! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86971?t=9&akid=18978%2E878179%2E8_q3GC)

---
We can’t do this without you,

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18978%2E878179%2E8_q3GC). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18978%2E878179%2E8_q3GC).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18978%2E878179%2E8_q3GC) to request fewer emails. name: SPECIAL ELECTION WAR CHEST
subject: Republicans in NY-21, FL-1, and FL-6 need YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Critical reinforcements are needed >>

|
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbpikm2irt0d66gr6ucipguqo73h6b36eus7csbg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0chhm4or1c5h2bs)

Friend,

Three crucial House seats are headed to special elections, and we need your immediate support to defend our majority. _**These seats are the key to maintaining our America First agenda, and Democrats are already mobilizing to take them from us.**_

| | | [- 2X SPECIAL ELECTION MATCH -](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcvoe1crkackeeashirrh7jm3tqlof6ben7pmj8o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0chhm4or1c5h2bs "Generic Button")

_Active for 30 minutes_

House Republican leaders are launching an emergency fundraising drive to fuel our efforts and keep these seats in Republican hands - NY-21, FL-1, and FL-6. **[And for the next 30 minutes, every dollar you give will be DOUBLED by House Republicans, so your impact will be twice as strong.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zb7em8gk2c4knfu3pvucej4fboa1toevnrk528c8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0chhm4or1c5h2bs "And for the next 30 minutes, every dollar you give will be DOUBLED by House Republicans, so your impact will be twice as strong.")**

_Will you step up and help us defend our Majority?_

name: Congressman Troy Downing
subject: Law and Order is BACK
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
We won’t stop until the border is secure

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
|
---
Did you see the news? The Trump administration announced that 969 illegal immigrants were arrested in just ONE DAY. We’ve been asking for this for the last 4 years, and it's good to see law and order is back on the menu.

I also made border security a pillar of my campaign and will support this administration's moves at every step. But we still need to finish the job and secure our border once and for all.

With all the recent pushback from Democrats, we’re going to need the support of the American people to secure our border finally. **[**Will you spare a minute to sign your name and chip in to support finishing the border wall?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._ulR95xwtVw)**
---
[ FINISH THE WALL](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-GJYFzYA)
---
[ SIGN NOW](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Thank you for taking border security seriously and signing your name.

Congressman Troy Downing

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Help Protect Border Patrol: Read This Email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
Read more about the Agent Raul Gonzalez Officer Safety Act >>>

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9DcnV6LURlbGl2ZXJzLVN0cm9uZy1Cb3JkZXItV2FybmluZ18yMDI1MDIyMSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNydXotRGVsaXZlcnMtU3Ryb25nLUJvcmRlci1XYXJuaW5nJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTc1JnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlIn0/6p7sWVsVV906A_qETCyb9w)

| | Fellow Conservative, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are responsible for the most chaotic and disastrous border crisis in American history. The numbers were staggering and countless lives were lost.

_One of those who lost their life was Border Patrol Agent Raul Gonzalez_ , who was killed in the line of duty in 2022 while engaged in a high-speed chase in pursuit of subjects illegally crossing the border near Mission, Texas.

I'm delivering a strong warning to any and all border jumpers...

**There will be SERIOUS CONSEQUENCES for anyone who endangers American lives!**

Last week, I reintroduced the **Agent Raul Gonzalez Officer Safety Act** in the Senate. It would make the failure to yield to a Border Patrol agent a felony punishable by up to two years in prison. If an agent sustains injuries during a pursuit, the offender may receive a sentence of five to twenty years hard time. And in the gravest situation where a border patrol agent is killed, the criminal offender could face life in prison.

**Now, I need your help to rally public support for this bill and get it passed into law.**

**[Will you make a special contribution today to fuel our fight?](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9DcnV6LURlbGl2ZXJzLVN0cm9uZy1Cb3JkZXItV2FybmluZ18yMDI1MDIyMSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNydXotRGVsaXZlcnMtU3Ryb25nLUJvcmRlci1XYXJuaW5nJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTc1JnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlIn0/ERMC2UKGuz81NZzhEldppg) ** **_[We can't let up--we need to get as much done as possible while we have the power!](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9DcnV6LURlbGl2ZXJzLVN0cm9uZy1Cb3JkZXItV2FybmluZ18yMDI1MDIyMSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNydXotRGVsaXZlcnMtU3Ryb25nLUJvcmRlci1XYXJuaW5nJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTc1JnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlIn0/4pqLBErS7hSVRtmZI6_c-g) _** This bill is a critical step toward protecting our communities, in Texas and across America. We must ensure criminal illegal immigrants can no longer escape justice.

Thank you in advance for any help you can send - _every donation makes a difference_.
For Liberty,

Ted Cruz

body:
...But I sincerely hope every woman candidate will take advantage of what HBM can offer. | | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102502565/529389755/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250221nightmare_N_SG_90DO_13_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJhMTE2ODJlLTVjZjAtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DHPyEYVrahKL3GUGSAbtsneNyKGxHnLgnfnbzvQTfqY=)
---
Hi Peter,

If we haven’t met, my name is Susanna Gibson. I am one of the countless women in America lucky enough to have crossed paths with Her Bold Move. But I want to make sure you know my story...

Her Bold Move first endorsed me while I was running for a State Delegate seat in Virginia. Polls showed I was on track to win in my Republican-leaning district, and I had earned support from every major institutional endorsement organization... until my campaign was derailed by a uniquely sexist and horrifying attack.

[**Her Bold Move is a deeply needed organization for women across our country. Before I explain, will you join me in uplifting this extraordinary organization by pitching in $20.25 or more today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102502567/529389764/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250221nightmare_N_SG_90DO_13_NG_N_L1&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJhMTE2ODJlLTVjZjAtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DHPyEYVrahKL3GUGSAbtsneNyKGxHnLgnfnbzvQTfqY=)

Here is what happened:

In the final weeks of my run for office, I found out I had been the target of nonconsensual pornography, nonconsensual distribution of intimate images, and severe image-based sexual abuse both online and in person.

In fact, the Republican Party of Virginia – yes, the _official state Republican party_ – sent out _explicit photos_ of me to thousands of homes in my district. My neighbors’ homes.

**Here is a look at what I went through in the wake of these attacks:**

❌ I received hundreds of phone calls and social media messages that included threats of rape and death.
❌ My children had to have security stay with them at school for weeks.
❌ I was forced to leave my job as a nurse practitioner.
❌ My nightmare became gossip fodder for national and international publications.
❌ I had to leave the state to escape reporters and threatening strangers showing up at my house.
❌ I was unable to meet with voters for three weeks during the height of election season.

[**Male candidates do not experience this type of sexual harassment or abuse when they run for office. But here’s the thing: we need women to run for office now more than ever before. Stories like mine are the reason many women don’t. Women candidates need more support. Help me make sure they get it by donating to Her Bold Move today. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102502568/529389770/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250221nightmare_N_SG_90DO_13_NG_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJhMTE2ODJlLTVjZjAtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DHPyEYVrahKL3GUGSAbtsneNyKGxHnLgnfnbzvQTfqY=)

Her Bold Move is an amazing resource. They understood that their role in my campaign had become more important than ever – that I was the victim of a sexist attack reserved for women candidates. They renewed their support for me and encouraged other endorsers to follow their lead, they checked in on me constantly, and they helped me fundraise when institutions were actually pulling funding from my campaign. At one of the loneliest times of my life, the HBM team made me feel less alone. I hope every woman candidate will take advantage of what HBM can offer.

**Despite everything I outlined above – I was only 715 votes shy of winning that seat in the Virginia House of Delegates. It’s frustrating to imagine how the outcome might have been different if more orgs had followed Her Bold Move’s lead. We could have avoided electing one more anti-choice legislator in my state – a state with razor-thin margins for Democrats.**

Running for office as a woman can be dangerous and scary. The political landscape is a safer and more supportive place for women with Her Bold Move at the forefront.

[**I am so grateful for the work that Her Bold Move is doing to defend and empower women like me – and I want to make sure they can continue to do so as more women run for office and desperately need HBM’s critical resources. Join me in supporting this important organization by pitching in $20.25 or more today!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-pac/?refcode=EM_F_250221nightmare_N_SG_90DO_13_NG_N_L3&amount=20.25) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$20.25 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102502570/529389771/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250221nightmare_N_SG_90DO_13_NG_N_EB20.25&express_lane=true&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJhMTE2ODJlLTVjZjAtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DHPyEYVrahKL3GUGSAbtsneNyKGxHnLgnfnbzvQTfqY=)

name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: On what would be John Lewis’s 85th birthday
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
This Black History Month, I ask you to recommit yourself to helping our country move forward on this long road toward justice and equality.
|
---

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102504455/529396202/508201740?refcode=awar_aotl_tier1_email_AGforJL_email_20250221-AOTL-Tier1-AGforJL-EHH_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=awar&utm_content=20250221-AOTL-Tier1-AGforJL-EHH_&utm_campaign=AGforJL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIzN2E2NzM0LTVjZjAtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2Dk3DV1971aHw6ihXhaUDRoANOuaaKN4y8dZiSsc-Mk=)
_Photo: Nikki Kahn via Getty Images_
---
Attorney General Eric H. Holder, Jr., Congressman John Lewis, and Dr. Sharon Malone (the wife of A.G. Holder) in the A.G.’s office. (April 2015)
Peter,
More than half a century ago, during one of the most painful, and most shameful, chapters in our nation’s history, John Lewis’s courage and restraint in the face of life-threatening violence brought out the best in a generation.
And on the day that Dr. King led hundreds of thousands of Americans in a march on Washington and shared his dream with the world, Lewis’s words established the creed that guided those devoted to the cause of justice and the promise of equality — the creed that sustains us to this day: _**"Our minds, souls, and hearts cannot rest until freedom and justice exist for all."**_
**Those words were true in 1963. They remain true today, on what would be John Lewis’s 85th birthday.**
John Lewis was a revolutionary, an opponent of the status quo. He wasn’t consumed with the acquisition of power, but committed to its use for good. He helped to destroy a system of American apartheid and raise a better nation from its rubble.
He was among the Founding Fathers and Mothers of a more just America — men and women who braved guns, billy clubs, and bare fists to awaken the conscience of a country. He spoke out against bigotry, police brutality, abuse of power, and violations of the right to protest.
**But nowhere was his dedication clearer than in his determination to secure the still-unmet promise of our nation:_the right to vote._**
That promise is what led him to the steps of the Lincoln Memorial as the youngest speaker to address the March on Washington.
It is the hope that he carried across a bridge in Selma, Alabama, named for a Confederate general who was a leader in the Ku Klux Klan.
It is the pledge that he brought with him to the Capitol, where he stood alongside President Lyndon B. Johnson at the signing of the Voting Rights Act of 1965, which he helped usher into law.
It is the commitment that animated him every day of his service as a representative for the oppressed in this nation and as a guiding light for his country, including more than three decades of service as a member of Congress.
**That promise was his life’s work. But to this day, it is not yet truly fulfilled.**
Ever since the Voting Rights Act was enacted, anti-democracy forces have sought to weaken it — in a continued, concerted effort to achieve unearned, illegitimate power at the expense of communities of color. The fight for equal representation is part of our present, not just our past, and our country remains too far from the Promised Land envisioned by all those who sacrificed their lives for civil and voting rights.
Our movement will continue working to uphold the Voting Rights Act — as our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, did in supporting a tenacious group of Black Alabama voters who took their fight for fair representation all the way to the U.S. Supreme Court and won. That ruling paved the way for fair maps in Alabama and Louisiana last November, which gave Black voters historic, hard-won opportunities to elect the candidates of their choosing.
Although our progress may still seem slow and halting at times, each of us has the power, and obligation, to make sure that our journey continues. Together, we can build a more inclusive, more just, and more perfect union. _And we must._ So this Black History Month, and in honor of my friend John Lewis, I ask you to recommit yourself to helping our country move forward on this long road toward justice and equality.
Thank you,
Eric H. Holder, Jr.
82nd Attorney General of the United States

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: I’m making a special announcement:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
Hi there, it’s been a while! I hope you are well. I have a big update for you.

Hi there, it’s been a while! I hope you are well. I have a big update for you.
Hi there, it's been a while! I hope you are well. I have a big update for you.
| |
---
| | | | [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---
It's been a while. I hope you are well.

The last few months have been a whirlwind. I campaigned across the country for President Trump, barnstormed universities to turn out young voters for the GOP, attended the Inauguration Day ceremony, and our family spent some much-needed time back home in Columbus, Ohio.

I am still over the moon about the election outcome. All our work paid off. You're a big part of the victory.

_Now that President Trump and Vice President JD Vance are in control, I 've spent a lot of time thinking through what comes next._ This was a historic turning point for our country and the Trump Administration is off to a better start than anyone could have imagined.

But the fight for the future of America is not yet won. The Democrats are already making strategic investments into battleground states, their propaganda machine is making up lies about the Trump Administration out of whole cloth, and state-level AGs are filing lawsuit after lawsuit to stop us.

The honest truth is that President Trump needs strategic partners across the country to fight back.

**So - with all that being said - I'm making some big decisions about how I can best partner with President Trump to Make America Great Again. [I'll be making a special announcement soon and after everything we've been through together, I want you to be the first to hear.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews. "I’ll be making a special announcement soon and after everything we’ve been through together, I want you to be the first to hear.")**

Add your name here to get notified as soon as I make my announcement:

---
| | [FIND OUT FIRST](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---

Thanks for taking the time to read this email. It's good catching up with you.

More soon,
Vivek Ramaswamy

---
|
---
| | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
---

Columbus, OH 43201

New York Republicans JUST AXED Liberals’ bill – a Special Election will now take place within 90 days

| | | Sorry to interrupt your day but this is urgent:

**FIRST: New York Liberals introduced a bill to DELAY the Special Election to replace Elise Stefanik - _denying representation to 700K+ New Yorkers_

THEN: We urgently called on 10,000 Patriots to help save our House Majority - _and we were blown away by your support_

NOW: New York Republicans SUCCESSFULLY blocked the bill - _now the Democrat Governor will be forced to call a Special Election within 90 days_**
---

Because immediately after Elise Stefanik's confirmation, our Conservative House Majority will shrink by ONE MORE SEAT. We already hold the Majority by the smallest margin in a CENTURY and there are two more Special Elections happening just weeks from right now.

| | The corrupt elites in Washington D.C. thought they could silence the truth, but we're about to prove them WRONG. Every day, fearless patriots inside the federal government are risking their lives to expose the corruption running rampant in our nation's capital. _**And that's where _YOU_ come in**_. We've seen firsthand the toll these whistleblowers take -- targeted, smeared, and often financially ruined for simply telling the truth about what is happening in our government. But with your help, we can CHANGE that. That's why I'm creating the **Citizens Journalism Foundation.** CJF is a non-profit**** dedicated to empowering and financially supporting whistleblowers who expose corruption at the highest levels of our government. I've been exposing government corruption for years. But this year -- 2025 -- is our chance to take things to the NEXT LEVEL. Make no mistake, there are hundreds (if not thousands) of potential whistleblowers who are thinking about coming forward with earth-shattering evidence of the obstruction and corruption. Individuals serving in the department of Justice, CIA, Pentagon, and so forth. Our fight is just beginning, and we need your support now more than ever. The so-called "deep state" is doing everything they can to keep their dirty secrets buried -- but with your donation, we'll continue to give whistleblowers the resources they need to _bring the truth to light_ and take down the rot from the inside. _**[_**Will you chip in $25 today to make sure the voices of whistleblowers are heard?**_](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8tu6yAURb8Gz2zB4WE88CCp7Uj30UFSVerIogYaKmO7GCdqv_6K3CgTJBaLs89Wfhmd_a5RuUcAZ6dXBIDoDgF8vV192D7970NuTDPmX-LZ8_QKT3f1Ag95GlTr5ekP2b1M68_x7WTaw_OFPPT4vZiHfA8tjFduTLRsMl1TqzHLTE1KhgkrJWXZuQZrDeGYY1NWVlVcCPpeghAl5bqi0mauBgwcAxDCgHJWMA1EMCkIx4QzPCCGbzmF8ia4QZE1XlUI8-yLYfbZWJ9jXNbbYh2CTs-TiqYYXHQ_ZvqctzCp0a3eztukVXTzlL4h6JiQIDEvcyJIlTMJIpdK2nzAUkrOBH23OI2k3RZ9v85bGAyizb455Mf2FYFI2BvtNo9o0_69k2hCul8DuYNB-UW5jwnR5n9TUvX75tA__er6BPpj-9qfXnbHPB1ZqPVydePoVlEihj9u1VPRSw3_AgAA__9nXJJ0)**_ Already a generous supporter has pledged a $100,000 matching gift, doubling every donation. __[_**That means your $25 donation will double to $50**_. ](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8tu6yAURb8Gz2zB4WE88CCp7Uj30UFSVerIogYaKmO7GCdqv_6K3CgTJBaLs89Wfhmd_a5RuUcAZ6dXBIDoDgF8vV192D7970NuTDPmX-LZ8_QKT3f1Ag95GlTr5ekP2b1M68_x7WTaw_OFPPT4vZiHfA8tjFduTLRsMl1TqzHLTE1KhgkrJWXZuQZrDeGYY1NWVlVcCPpeghAl5bqi0mauBgwcAxDCgHJWMA1EMCkIx4QzPCCGbzmF8ia4QZE1XlUI8-yLYfbZWJ9jXNbbYh2CTs-TiqYYXHQ_ZvqctzCp0a3eztukVXTzlL4h6JiQIDEvcyJIlTMJIpdK2nzAUkrOBH23OI2k3RZ9v85bGAyizb455Mf2FYFI2BvtNo9o0_69k2hCul8DuYNB-UW5jwnR5n9TUvX75tA__er6BPpj-9qfXnbHPB1ZqPVydePoVlEihj9u1VPRSw3_AgAA__9nXJJ0) _We're counting on you._

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Misunderstanding American citizenship
body:
Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkq7c1531hd8i5a94dni64b8bl3t1olf448pn0i8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0chhm6oj2clh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

Did you know that America's Founders rejected birthright citizenship--the idea that someone who is born within our country's borders is automatically a citizen?

This idea--which is a misunderstanding of the meaning of citizenship--is the subject of an ongoing national debate that will have long-lasting implications for our nation.

I'm writing today to offer you a FREE issue of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale College's digest of liberty, that explains the facts about birthright citizenship.

**In this FREE issue, "Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny," you'll learn:**

* Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace
* How the 14th Amendment has been misinterpreted over the years
* What reforms are needed to restore the true meaning of citizenship

Since you're a concerned citizen and an intelligent patriot, I know you'll find this issue interesting and informative. It will help equip you to engage in this critical debate.

And, if your friends and family have questions about this topic, you may want to share this _Imprimis_ issue with them.

You can receive your FREE copy of **" Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny"** at this secure link:

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/birthright-citizenship-imprimis](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhgin88adg9345v24irtktua3onktvlv9k15vejg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0chhm6oj2clh2bs)

Please don't delay! Get your free copy right away.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

subject: Honoring John Lewis’ legacy

body:

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T976c443a-babc-4822-9d0f-e5b26b0ffc7a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Today is the birthday of civil rights hero Rep. John Lewis, Peter. Throughout his incredible life, Rep. Lewis was a tireless advocate for racial justice and voting rights. He was an original member of the Freedom Riders, where he was arrested – and even beaten – for standing against segregation. And he marched with Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. in Alabama to defend voting rights. While voting rights expanded significantly during Rep. Lewis' lifetime, he was dismayed that many states still had laws on the books that discriminated against African-American voters. The right to vote is fundamental, Peter. It is a pillar of our democracy and the key way Americans can express their opinions on the issues that matter most to them. We must do everything we can to protect the freedom to vote. [To honor John Lewis’ birthday, will you sign our petition calling on Congress to finally pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc146d843-6fa2-4bb1-8ff2-199bb47481d1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0ca9d048-11d3-4e3b-b145-22c1f7cd85c6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Rushern Baker III
subject: I’m stepping up—will you stand with me?
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93538/images/Yard%20Signs%20%28March%202022%29%20%2815%29.png]
https://www.rushernbaker.com/links [https://www.rushernbaker.com/links]
Friends and Neighbors,
I’ve spent my life fighting for Prince George’s County—because I believe in the power of our community to create real change. Now, I’m stepping up once again to run for County Executive.
This campaign isn’t about me. It’s about all of us—our families, our neighborhoods, our future. We need a government that works for the people, that prioritizes public safety, invests in education, and builds an economy that lifts everyone up.
But I can’t do this alone. Running a campaign takes resources, and the first fundraising deadline is fast approaching. Your early support will help us build a campaign that reaches every voter in Prince George’s County.
Can I count on you to chip in today? Every dollar brings us closer to victory. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rushern-baker-iii-2]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rushern-baker-iii-2]
Together, we can move Prince George’s County forward.
With gratitude,
Rushern L. Baker III
Candidate for County Executive
P.S. Your support today will help us reach more voters and build the momentum we need to win. Please consider donating whatever you can. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rushern-baker-iii-2]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rushern-baker-iii-2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rushern-baker-iii-2]

name: Team NPPEF
subject: We need a PA Voting Rights Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New PA Project Education Fund
body:
The right to vote has been undercut across the country and remains at risk. | | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102511373/529417127/-507358213?refcode=EM_F_2502021act_N_NPPEF_90DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk5NzM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5OWViZjkyLTY0ZjAtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8cvm6TV5zmlUSqIG-qFXL9NYcpI42-tFrQxQf2PR9ts=)
---
| | Friend,

The right to vote has been undercut across the country and remains at risk – especially for Black voters and other voters of color. Instead of strengthening these protections by enacting the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act or the For the People Act, leadership in Congress is pushing anti-voter legislation that will add more barriers to the ballot box.

As Black voters and other voters of color across the country face the greatest assault on their voting rights since the Jim Crow era, a growing number of states are acting to protect the right to vote and safeguard our democracy. **That is why we are determined to pass a PA Voting Rights Act (VRA).**

With the passage of State Voting Rights Acts, states can provide key protections to their constituents that prevent and guard against discriminatory voting practices and policies. Currently, eight states across the country have passed VRAs that positively impact voters. Passing a Pennsylvania Voting Rights Act is urgent to make sure Pennsylvania’s government is accountable to the needs and interests of our communities, by protecting the right to vote. It has never been more important that we get this done.

[**There will be a lot of obstacles ahead, but together, we can continue to move the Commonwealth forward. Help us prepare to defend democracy and expand voting rights in PA by donating $5 today →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102511375/529417128/-507358213?refcode=EM_F_2502021act_N_NPPEF_90DO_5_NG_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk5NzM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5OWViZjkyLTY0ZjAtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8cvm6TV5zmlUSqIG-qFXL9NYcpI42-tFrQxQf2PR9ts=)

Together,

Team NPPEF

| | | | _The New PA Project Education Fund (NPPEF) is a non-partisan organization led by community leaders across the Commonwealth dedicated to centering underrepresented and underserved communities to embrace their power. NPPEF ensures full participation in the democratic process through civic education and year-round engagement by centering Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth - with intention - as they are the least represented and most impacted by decisions our government is making._

When it comes to gear, only the strongest should make the cut.

That's why we're excited to introduce the [**Skull Crusher – the ultimate hand held sword** – the ultimate hand held sword](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20402/6374453/e834d9f1e7d85120f5bc0e61eaae1584b2302289/46e2ed4f16adc079389025863d9436c44761c2d2) designed for those who demand power, precision, and performance. Crafted for those who understand the value of reliability and strength, the Skull Crusher is more than just a tool – it’s your go-to companion for whatever life throws at you.

You don’t settle for mediocrity, and neither should your gear. With the Skull Crusher, you get a tool that’s just as rugged and reliable as you are. **Ready to take your gear to the next level?

[Get the Skull Crusher today and experience the strength and durability that sets it apart.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20402/6374453/e834d9f1e7d85120f5bc0e61eaae1584b2302289/46e2ed4f16adc079389025863d9436c44761c2d2)**

name: Office of U.S. Senator Angela Alsobrooks
subject: Senator Alsobrooks Newsletter -- February 21
body:
|
---
Friends and neighbors: I write to you today after a marathon night of voting. Let me break down what happened. **Vote-A-Rama: A procedure in the United States Senate that allows senators to propose an unlimited number of amendments to budget-related measures.** Last night, in the dead of night, Republicans tried to jam a budget resolution through the Senate. It's known as a vote-a-rama. But make no mistake. This is a scam of a resolution that will pave the way for massive tax cuts to billionaires. And how are they planning to pay for these tax cuts? Gutting Medicaid. Gutting Medicare. Firing countless civil servants. We pushed back at every turn. We filed amendments that would: • Protect Medicaid and Medicare
• Defend our civil servants, the patriotic Americans working to make sure our food is safe, to provide our seniors and veterans with their hard earned benefits, to research cures for childhood cancer, and more
• Prevent tax cuts for billionaires and focus on tax cuts for working class families Republicans said no to all of them. We kept them on the Floor until 4:30 in the morning, and they wouldn't budge. It's becoming clearer and clearer that the billionaires who backed this President, the ones who sat with him onstage at inauguration, are getting exactly what they paid for. We will continue to force votes that defend working class Americans -- not billionaires.
**Let 's take a moment and go through what else our office was up to this week in Washington:** As I've promised to do, I continue to demand answers from the Trump Administration and DOGE as Elon Musk brags about taking his chainsaw to government resources and civil servants, hurting the American people and services they rely on. I led the effort in demanding answers from Secretary Turner about the Department of Housing and Urban Development's plan to fire half of its workforce, cancel a program that serves seniors and individuals with disabilities, and exacerbate the housing crisis we're already experiencing in this country. We have already seen the chaos DOGE's sweeping cuts have resulted in; critical civil servants who are responsible for nuclear weapons and keeping bird flu at bay who have been "mistakenly" laid off and cannot be located. If there is actually fraud and wasteful spending, my colleagues and I would be happy to work with the Administration to wipe it out. However, all of the actions the past month have lacked transparency and we will continue to demand answers. You can read the letter [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14309.5594394.5076319.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.alsobrooks.senate.gov%2fwp-content%2fuploads%2f2025%2f02%2f02.20.25-Letter-to-HUD-re-DOGE.pdf&redir_log=581951514128605).
**Confirmation Hearing** On Wednesday I questioned the nominee for [Secretary of Labor, Lori Chavez-DeRemer](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14309.5594394.5076319.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fx.com%2fSen_Alsobrooks%2fstatus%2f1892361091079897595&redir_log=521299768614334). President Trump is attacking collective bargaining agreements, so I asked Ms. Chavez-DeRemer if, unlike her boss, she would enforce collective bargaining agreements as required by law. Donald Trump and Elon Musk have made clear that our civil servants are in their crosshairs. It's a grave mistake on their part. We can have a serious conversation about government efficiency, but this witch hunt is as callous as it is unproductive. These civil servants are patriotic Americans, many of them Marylanders, who show up to work hard every day on behalf of the American people. They are the workers who make sure our seniors get their social security checks, our veterans get the benefits they deserve after fighting for our country, and that our domestic travel is secure. Firing them only serves to harm the people they serve -- the AMERICAN PEOPLE. This Administration wants to strip those who serve the American people of their rights, and I cannot vote for a Labor Secretary who will rubber stamp the President's desire to adversely impact the lives of these workers and the people they serve. **In the Community** I had a wonderful day joining Baltimore Mayor Brandon Scott, Congressman Kweisi Mfume, Congressman Johnny Olszewski, and so many Baltimoreans to celebrate Black History Month during Baltimore's first ever Black History Month Parade. Even during challenging times, we come together, united in love for our country and the promise it represents. I had the opportunity to meet with Open Works Baltimore, a community hub that provides heat, Wi-Fi, fresh water and other resources to Maryland. The program serves critical needs in Baltimore and I am grateful to the District 45 leaders for their steadfast work to uplift Baltimore. Wonderful to meet with Maryland Comptroller Brooke Lierman on Capitol Hill this week. Together we are laser-focused on delivering for Marylanders and are working to develop opportunities for those going through hard times. **Maryland Federal Workers** This has undoubtedly been a difficult time for Marylanders, especially our civil servants, many of whom have lost employment in the wake of actions from the Trump/Musk Administration. If you've lost employment and are seeking resources, the State of Maryland has a [resource page](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14309.5594394.5076319.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2flabor.maryland.gov%2ffederalworkers%2f&redir_log=592222860687299) that you may visit for information on unemployment insurance and support finding new employment. You may also find resources for federal workers in Prince George's County [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14309.5594394.5076319.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fpgccouncil.us%2f1023%2fResources-for-Federal-Workers&redir_log=348034717058387), resources for Montgomery County [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14309.5594394.5076319.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.montgomerycountymd.gov%2fOPI%2ffed-worker-resources.html&redir_log=86616970137453), and resources for Fredrick County[ here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14309.5594394.5076319.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ffrederickcountymd.gov%2f7815%2fAssistance-for-Federal-Employees&redir_log=286470896611465). Additionally, you can reach out to [hocohelp@howardcountymd.gov](mailto:hocohelp@howardcountymd.gov) for available programs in Howard County, and access free information and resources for childcare and support through the Howard County Care Line. You can call 410-313-2273 or email [children@howardcountymd.gov](mailto:children@howardcountymd.gov). All of these resources can be found on our website: [https://www.alsobrooks.senate.gov/resources-for-federal-workers/](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14309.5594394.5076319.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.alsobrooks.senate.gov%2fresources-for-federal-workers%2f&redir_log=042492487615453). I know these are difficult times, but please know that I will continue fighting for you every step of the way. We will not give up. We will not give in to this administration, and I ask that you continue to fight alongside us. Please continue to reach out to us. Tell us your story. You can call the office or connect with us at alsobrooks.senate.gov. Many of you were asking if we would be on BlueSky, and I'm happy to share that you can now follow us on [BluSky](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14309.5594394.5076319.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fweb-cdn.bsky.app%2fprofile%2falsobrooks.senate.gov&redir_log=255136950764383), Instagram, Facebook Threads, YouTube and Twitter. Sincerely, Angela Alsobrooks
United States Senator
[Click here to Unsubscribe.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/EForm.aspx?__cid=SenAlsobrooks&__fid=100022&__crop=14309.5594394.5076319.7190525)

The challenge may seem overwhelming, but change starts with small steps. By making a positive impact in our own communities, we can begin to bridge divides and build a more hopeful future.

Thank you for all that you're doing to make a positive difference! -John

HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

Make no mistake: DeSantis and his allies are trying to fast-track these elections to catch Democrats off guard.

We CANNOT let them get away with it!
Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

Arizona Rep. and former Navy SEAL Eli Crane **[SNAPPED AT ex-Biden officials during a congressional hearing](https://substack.com/redirect/65e41cf7-9646-4f70-8693-7874a4d494f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for refusing to take responsibility for the complete disaster that was the former administration.
_" Take some ownership!!"_
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/65e41cf7-9646-4f70-8693-7874a4d494f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/65e41cf7-9646-4f70-8693-7874a4d494f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"I want to give some of the members on this panel the opportunity to take some ownership of some of the failures that have allowed the Chinese and others to hack into some of our critical infrastructure. Does anybody want to take any ownership since you guys have been doing this for a very long time?"
Kemba Walden, the former National Cyber Security Director under Joe Biden, stated "We made movements to make sure that we are all singing off the same sheet of music, playing the same soccer game, whatever analogy you want. But I think the failure was a lack of coordination for some time-"
**[Crane, fed up at this point, interrupted her word salad answer,](https://substack.com/redirect/65e41cf7-9646-4f70-8693-7874a4d494f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "Do you take any ownership in that Ms. Walden?!"
Struggling for an answer Walden responded, "I will own that I worked to make sure that we had better coordination-"
Crane cut her off again, "So none, ok, thank you."
Watch Eli Crane SOUND OFF on these failed Biden officials here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/65e41cf7-9646-4f70-8693-7874a4d494f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# Justin Trudeau takes jab at Trump after Canada defeats Team USA in 4 Nations championship game
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/afd39063-c1c6-48b0-88c5-29598cc60402?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau took a victory lap after Canada defeated the USA in the 4 Nations championship game, Thursday.
"You can't take our country -- and you can't take our game," **[Trudeau posted on X](https://substack.com/redirect/40f8d924-09d9-4395-858f-c384a485431f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , responding to President Donald Trump's claims he intends to turn Canada into the 51st U.S. state.
The disappointing game ended in overtime, with Canada up 3-2. This following Team USA's victory in the prior game which saw several savage fist fights amid high international tensions between the U.S. and Canada.
Trudeau was previously caught on a hot mic admitting that Trump's plan to turn Canada into an American state was indeed a real possibility.
"I suggest that not only does the Trump administration know how many critical minerals we have, but that may be even why they keep talking about absorbing us and making us the 51st state," Trudeau **[reportedly said in private.](https://substack.com/redirect/a402c4ff-da4f-4964-adc2-792bb1b541a2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "They're very aware of our resources, of what we have, and they very much want to be able to benefit from those. But Mr. Trump has it in mind that one of the easiest ways of doing that is absorbing our country. And it is a real thing."
White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt said yesterday during a press hearing that Canada is "our soon-to-be 51st state" after wishing Team USA luck in the hockey game.
Some speculate that Trump's 51st state agenda is merely a negotiating tactic with Canada, from which Trump can pose a high stakes proposition as a tool to make Canada accept a less threatening result later in negotiations.
* * *

Struggling for an answer Walden responded, "I will own that I worked to make sure that we had better coordination-" Crane cut her off again, "So none, ok, thank you." Watch Eli Crane SOUND OFF on these failed Biden officials here: Recent Tech Boom Could Send "EarnPhone" Soaring | | ---|---|--- While the media obsesses over Trump's return, smart money is quietly positioning for what could be one of the biggest tech booms in history. And Mode Mobile is perfectly positioned, riding and gearing up for a possible Nasdaq listing (stock ticker: MODE). But - before they hit the big stage. Their innovation has led to over $325M in earnings for 45M+ users worldwide. And with their EarnPhone recently launching in BestBuy and Walmart, we could be looking at the next household name. An intent to IPO is no guarantee that an actual IPO will occur. 2 The rankings are based on submitted applications and public company database research, with winners selected based on their fiscal-year revenue growth percentage over a three-year period. 3 A minimum investment of $1,950 is required to receive bonus shares. 100% bonus shares are offered on investments of $9,950+. This is a paid advertisement for Mode Mobile Reg A offering. Please read the offering statement at . Rainmaker Ad Ventures is paid by Mode Mobile for promoting their securities offering. Payment is in cash and billed monthly. As of the end of December, Rainmaker has received $156,897. Additional fees may have accrued since then. Justin Trudeau takes jab at Trump after Canada defeats Team USA in 4 Nations championship game | | ---|---|--- Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau took a victory lap after Canada defeated the USA in the 4 Nations championship game, Thursday. "You can't take our country -- and you can't take our game," , responding to President Donald Trump's claims he intends to turn Canada into the 51st U.S. state. The disappointing game ended in overtime, with Canada up 3-2. This following Team USA's victory in the prior game which saw several savage fist fights amid high international tensions between the U.S. and Canada. Trudeau was previously caught on a hot mic admitting that Trump's plan to turn Canada into an American state was indeed a real possibility. "I suggest that not only does the Trump administration know how many critical minerals we have, but that may be even why they keep talking about absorbing us and making us the 51st state," Trudeau "They're very aware of our resources, of what we have, and they very much want to be able to benefit from those. But Mr. Trump has it in mind that one of the easiest ways of doing that is absorbing our country. And it is a real thing." White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt said yesterday during a press hearing that Canada is "our soon-to-be 51st state" after wishing Team USA luck in the hockey game. Some speculate that Trump's 51st state agenda is merely a negotiating tactic with Canada, from which Trump can pose a high stakes proposition as a tool to make Canada accept a less threatening result later in negotiations. name: Chrissy
subject: What you told us about the election results
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102515290/529427083/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjZhYzljNi02OGYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zgO_dtyDSCxNHIe_BZDAcHLgc79unJzp1hQxRLW-ZBw=&emci=25ba705e-efee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=0f6ac9c6-68f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=21278485)
---
Thank you to those who responded to my survey asking your thoughts on the November election results. Now that my team and I have had the chance to review those responses, we want to share them with you:

**Why did Donald Trump win?** The most common responses, according to over 60% of you, were:
• He successfully blamed Democrats for inflation
• He focused on immigration and border security
• He connected with men who are feeling anxious about their place in society
**What did Democrats do wrong?** Answers here were more dispersed, but the most common responses, according to over 50% of you, were:
• We dismissed voters' worries about inflation and the economy
• There wasn't enough time to sell voters on the Harris-Walz team
**Who would you most like to see lead our party in the future?** This was no contest. Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro, with Pete Buttigieg and Gretchen Whitmer a distant second and third.
If you didn’t complete the survey but still want to, you can do so [**HERE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102515293/529427085/-1425369734?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&code=jtk1093-su-nd&sustainers=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjZhYzljNi02OGYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zgO_dtyDSCxNHIe_BZDAcHLgc79unJzp1hQxRLW-ZBw=&emci=25ba705e-efee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=0f6ac9c6-68f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=21278485). We’ll leave it open for a few more days.
My team and I hear you. While we can't go back and change the outcome of the election, we are taking what we learned to chart a new path forward that resonates with more voters. And in the meantime, we are doing everything we can to stop the reckless and dangerous actions of President Trump, Elon Musk, and Congressional Republicans who stand silently by.
**We can’t do this without you. Will you support our work with a contribution today? Your financial support at this point in the campaign does two things:** 1) it helps us to build our war chest for next year because campaigns are, sadly, crazy expensive and it’s not possible for us to raise what we need to win in the few months before the election and 2) it helps to cover the year-round, operations expenses that are kind of boring, honestly, but needed to run a campaign (think storage unit for yard signs, our compliance firm to keep us in good standing with the Federal Election Commission, the software to manage expenses and contributions, and so on).
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102515297/529427087/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1093-su-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjZhYzljNi02OGYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zgO_dtyDSCxNHIe_BZDAcHLgc79unJzp1hQxRLW-ZBw=)
---
Thank you for being part of our team during this challenging time. There's still so much work to be done.

Chrissy

P.S. For more about what happened in November in our part of Pennsylvania, I recommend [this recent article](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102515300/529427089/1539121101?utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tnr_weekly&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjZhYzljNi02OGYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zgO_dtyDSCxNHIe_BZDAcHLgc79unJzp1hQxRLW-ZBw=&emci=25ba705e-efee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=0f6ac9c6-68f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=21278485) from The New Republic. Or, are you curious about how to run for local office in Pennsylvania? I recommend [this](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102515304/529427091/-1631995139?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjZhYzljNi02OGYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zgO_dtyDSCxNHIe_BZDAcHLgc79unJzp1hQxRLW-ZBw=&emci=25ba705e-efee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=0f6ac9c6-68f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=21278485) recent article.
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333

If you'd like to pause emails for the next few weeks, you can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102515307/529427093/-1727112621?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjZhYzljNi02OGYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zgO_dtyDSCxNHIe_BZDAcHLgc79unJzp1hQxRLW-ZBw=&emci=25ba705e-efee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=0f6ac9c6-68f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=21278485). If you'd like to receive fewer emails like this one, or if you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/5A7dcVDqPECR0EWykGJMlQ2?unsubscribedata=FeA2eDuhRV%2B%2BKeiL4qYFETj5sdecdnDDaDwAUO4vyA3%2BN1lHjLr91APb3tZgDkEVYtpyZalZ01yW%2FjM3%2BzPK%2FSjLJotYDitD8LmEVnsYZe0lO3tV0PfptOhQOTyQMZe9S2m0Gc60qlenJVY0%2BTehboMSa%2F21FieBJTa3yhvd162EXkUfd61xB%2FUoEHYP%2FcgN97o0iBU4D9jaqEU1GI%2B5dZX7bLAw%2BdGF5e7T%2BvyobxFEiqf2opI1selfeJJuI96zPhipZ7TCbNaViHX7ep7uFKhHYS3ueoHFWGooWIEdn%2F70Qm97Nt68sRdzJxsPtnnGYFD%2BgBX%2FktzkiUdnOqGWu2X6AmMkTmqK%2BIDV9rQBklVAkMuaU5o42eo7PweF3lMcc2M6pFEFKqkmcERRzZgYfAs6ofyBnXzkHAV2zYKNRGriN0VeTD1YiR88MorNgmQx) Chrissy is a former Captain in the United States Air Force. name: Jason Rae (via Democrats.org)
subject: (Introduction:)
body:
---
Hi Derek, It’s Jason Rae, the Secretary of the DNC. I got my start as the youngest elected DNC member at 17 and I’ve now had the honor of being the secretary of the DNC since 2017. You may remember me from the roll call at the Democratic National Convention in August. As Secretary, my job is to support DNC members and ensure the smooth operation of our Party. And most importantly, together with the rest of the DNC officers, we’re going to do the important work in front of us to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. That’s why I'm writing to ask you to make a donation to the DNC. $3, that's the ask. $3 to help mobilize and organize against Trump and his allies’ disastrous policies. $3 to help elect Democrats at every level of government, in every community — leaders who will check Trump’s power in their cities, districts, and states and deliver for the American people. $3 to help Democrats take back the House and the Senate, and ultimately, the White House. No donation is too small, after eight years as Secretary I know that. Any amount helps us build the foundation we’ll need. The number of donations we'll receive from Democrats like you will take care of the rest. **[Can you please use this link to contribute $3 (or whatever you can afford) directly to the Democratic National Committee today to help us build the strongest possible Party?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?refcode=em_20250221_2828_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2837_22930333_gNPP3k&akid=2837%2E22930333%2EgNPP3k)** _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250221_2828_fr&refcode2=2837_22930333_gNPP3k&akid=2837%2E22930333%2EgNPP3k)**

Jason

clean_body: Hi Derek, It’s Jason Rae, the Secretary of the DNC. I got my start as the youngest elected DNC member at 17 and I’ve now had the honor of being the secretary of the DNC since 2017. You may remember me from the roll call at the Democratic National Convention in August. As Secretary, my job is to support DNC members and ensure the smooth operation of our Party. And most importantly, together with the rest of the DNC officers, we’re going to do the important work in front of us to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. That’s why I'm writing to ask you to make a donation to the DNC. $3, that's the ask. $3 to help mobilize and organize against Trump and his allies’ disastrous policies. $3 to help elect Democrats at every level of government, in every community — leaders who will check Trump’s power in their cities, districts, and states and deliver for the American people. $3 to help Democrats take back the House and the Senate, and ultimately, the White House. No donation is too small, after eight years as Secretary I know that. Any amount helps us build the foundation we’ll need.
