name: Christina Reynolds, EMILYs List
subject: Want to do something about Elon Musk? Read this →
body:
Women will lead the charge against this billionaire takeover. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102517970/529432094/-1491281772?refcode=WUEFE243_20250221_MuskStinks_PL_v1s3&sourceid=1055741&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmVhNDdhMy02Y2YwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=khmaclRJkdyaz0keBkC2anKNm3jZP70W4dKRUuo4ay0=) Peter,

Elon Musk was not elected by the American people. A recent _Pew Research_ survey shows he is unpopular with the majority of Americans across parties. He is not a member of any Cabinet. So how the hell is he able to destroy thousands of jobs, access our private information, and obliterate more than 50 years of progress in civil and human rights?

Here's how: Because not a single Republican will stand in his way.

I'm here to tell you, Peter: There are ways to stop this tech-bro takeover of our government. And electing more women is the key to doing it.

[**If you're ready to take a stand against Elon Musk, Donald Trump, and their Republican allies, make a donation to EMILYs List. Our work electing Democratic pro-choice women has never mattered more.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102517973/529432097/-1491281772?refcode=WUEFE243_20250221_MuskStinks_PL_v1s3&sourceid=1055741&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmVhNDdhMy02Y2YwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=khmaclRJkdyaz0keBkC2anKNm3jZP70W4dKRUuo4ay0=) | [TAKE A STAND](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102517976/529432100/-1491281772?refcode=WUEFE243_20250221_MuskStinks_PL_v1s3&sourceid=1055741&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmVhNDdhMy02Y2YwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=khmaclRJkdyaz0keBkC2anKNm3jZP70W4dKRUuo4ay0=)
---

There are three big ways the EMILYs List community can help stop Musk's madness in its tracks.
1. We can **support the attorneys general** filing suits against Trump and his unconstitutional cession of power to Musk, many of whom are EMILYs List women.

2. We can **elect more AGs and governors** to join their efforts and hold Republican extremists like Trump and Musk accountable. We've endorsed candidates for both offices already this year!

3. We can **flip the House** in 2026, breaking the GOP's trifecta and giving Congress crucial oversight abilities to curb the Trump/Musk agenda. And here's the best part: Right now, Republicans have the smallest House majority in almost 100 years. If we flip _just three seats_ in 2026, the House is ours.

clean_body: Women will lead the charge against this billionaire takeover. | = Peter, Elon Musk was not elected by the American people. A recent Pew Research survey shows he is unpopular with the majority of Americans across parties. He is not a member of any Cabinet. So how the hell is he able to destroy thousands of jobs, access our private information, and obliterate more than 50 years of progress in civil and human rights? Here's how: Because not a single Republican will stand in his way. I'm here to tell you, Peter: There are ways to stop this tech-bro takeover of our government. And electing more women is the key to doing it. = | = There are three big ways the EMILYs List community can help stop Musk's madness in its tracks. 1. We can support the attorneys general filing suits against Trump and his unconstitutional cession of power to Musk, many of whom are EMILYs List women. 2. We can elect more AGs and governors to join their efforts and hold Republican extremists like Trump and Musk accountable. We've endorsed candidates for both offices already this year! 3. We can flip the House in 2026, breaking the GOP's trifecta and giving Congress crucial oversight abilities to curb the Trump/Musk agenda. And here's the best part: Right now, Republicans have the smallest House majority in almost 100 years. If we flip just three seats in 2026, the House is ours. It's easy to feel discouraged when we see how much damage one person can do to the fabric of our democracy. But the fight is ON, and women are leading the charge to shut this anti-democratic billionaire and his cronies down. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for stepping up, Christina Reynolds (she/her/hers) Senior Vice President of Communications and Content, EMILYs List = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. With House Majority PAC already targeting races like mine, Minnesota was always going to play a HUGE role when it comes to the balance of power in Washington, D.C. in 2026.
But now that Senator Tina Smith has announced her retirement, Minnesota's political scene is turning into even more of a circus with the who’s who of radical liberals lining up to run.
The lineup couldn’t be much crazier...

* ** Ilhan Omar.** Extreme, divisive, and more focused on pushing her national agenda than serving Minnesotans
* **Tim Walz.** The failed VP candidate who locked down businesses, mismanaged taxpayers' dollars, and let crime skyrocket
* **Peggy Flanagan.** The radical Lieutenant Governor who has championed extreme leftist policies that have devastated Minnesota families

As Minnesota becomes more and more of the center of the political universe for 2026, I’m starting up my Minnesota Defense Fund to help fight against the lies and attacks that will be coming from the Left.
**[So with so much on the line, please make a contribution to my 2026 Minnesota Defense Fund so that we can defend our state from the radical Left and protect our majorities in the next election.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQk4ICGIy40AggkY8xUXOr-Q8oHOCazsDpKoWezs4Ceu2a3kt4Ip32fiVa3oE)****[](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQk4ICGIy40AggiI0x9X9CKoVuslzUrdOfgTIcX1hoWvtKcLEnfDEN1_AGjkk)**[********](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQk4ICGIy40AggiI0x9X9CKoVuslzUrdOfgTIcX1hoWvtKcLEnfDEN1_AGjkk)

Donald Trump's attacks on the free press have escalated into an all-out war on independent journalism. His administration has made public broadcasting its latest target, with the Federal Communications Commission now investigating PBS and NPR under the guise of "government efficiency."w Meanwhile, Rep Marjorie Taylor Greene's subcommittee has summoned the CEOs of PBS and NPR to testify before Congress in March, a clear attempt to pressure lawmakers into defunding these critical news orgs. How do we respond to this blatant government censorship?**Let 's Address This.**
**Before you dive in! Please take a moment to join 117,000+ like-minded activists and subscribe to Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..vWk27Ug0oZwGnkh20c5z4D8Qsj2dkmYkoVvS62TDlhI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=157525595)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/73934790-c094-49af-948b-c6aad3e7c2ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Credit: First Amendment Watch at New York University
## Let's Be Clear--This Is Government Censorship
In no world is this move to defund PBS and NPR about efficiency--it is about silencing dissent and eliminating media that refuses to serve as a propaganda machine. PBS and NPR have long played a vital role in American society, from educating children in low-income communities to providing fact-based journalism that holds the powerful accountable. Yet Trump has branded NPR a "liberal disinformation machine" and made dismantling public broadcasting a priority for Elon Musk's DOGE--a blatant attempt to consolidate control over the media landscape.
The irony, of course, is staggering. Musk, the cente-billionaire tasked with supposedly cutting government waste, has himself received over $20 billion in federal subsidies. Meanwhile, NPR, the organization under attack, receives on average less than 1% of its comparatively meagre $300M operating budget from federal grants. These attacks are not about government waste--they're about silencing journalism that dares to report criticism of the Trump regime.
Our failure to respond to this censorship will only further enable the Trump regime's fascist acts. It will embolden him to continue to tear down any outlet or institution, public or private, that dares question his authority or his actions. We cannot afford to sit idle, and fortunately, nor are we helpless in this situation.
## The Need for Clear, Independent Guidance
I founded _Let 's Address This_ to ensure that people have access to clear, fact-based journalism. What started as a human rights project that earned the trust and subscription of 1700 people in its first week, is now a proud community of 117,000 people who have subscribed. Our articles reach nearly 2.5 million people each month. This platform continues to grow because the need for community funded honest reporting on human rights and social justice has never been greater.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..vWk27Ug0oZwGnkh20c5z4D8Qsj2dkmYkoVvS62TDlhI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=157525595)
But I am just one person. I cannot cover every critical story alone, which is why I urge you to not only subscribe and support my work but to equip yourself with the tools necessary to discern fact from fiction. The ability to verify, cross-check, and critically analyze the information you consume is more important now than ever.
So, what do I rely on? How do I ensure that the facts I cite are backed by verifiable data rather than corporate or political bias?
## A Solution: Ground News
One of the most valuable tools I use in my research and reporting is [Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/c999ab85-a2f2-4b14-bc33-a0163e7915e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Here's how it works and why it works so well:
**Global Perspective:** Ground News gathers related articles from sources across the world, allowing you to compare coverage and see what details are emphasized, exaggerated, or omitted entirely.
**Bias Transparency:** It identifies the political bias of each source, whether left, right, or center, and evaluates the factuality of their reporting. This allows you to see who owns a media outlet and what their interests might be.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/65f2a869-6dac-4693-b65d-dceea62d297c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Cut Through Misinformation:** Instead of falling prey to editorial bias, Ground News provides you with the context needed to ensure you are informed, not manipulated.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3b91ee30-5543-4b3e-8478-7849e71cfc5e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
By using Ground News, you empower yourself to make informed decisions rather than being spoon-fed misleading narratives. Unlike billionaire-owned media companies that serve political agendas, Ground News is subscriber-supported, meaning its loyalty is to you--the reader. And right now, if you subscribe to Ground News through the below link, you'll receive 40% off their Vantage Plan, the same one I use to help research and write my articles before publishing.
[Subscribe to Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/c999ab85-a2f2-4b14-bc33-a0163e7915e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Conclusion
Undoubtedly the Trump regime will continue its assault on media and journalism, obfuscating what is truth, what is right, and what is legal. In such a world where media manipulation is a tool of authoritarian power, we must fight back by arming ourselves with knowledge. Indeed, we are not helpless, and we must take the initiative to act. [Subscribe to Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/c999ab85-a2f2-4b14-bc33-a0163e7915e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), support _Let 's Address This with Qasim Rashid_, and let's continue to work together to ensure that truth continues to matter.
**Thank you for your trust and support. I am doing everything in my power to counter injustice. I cannot do it alone. Subscribe below and join the movement.**

body:
Before your weekend starts, I hope you can take a look at this. | I know it's been a busy week, but I have a simple request before the day ends.

[_Peter, are you still committed to our Republican Senate majority?_](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=361162f7a70d4a2ca5092baa7d087083&_e=kK6CQHvyT1KwwLnEh3qhNEC5EuCCj0y9mey9JYbIl0CUGDT_Fnd8ZrYzV6qf1ijI14W3KsQ_1pgv2L0poKSoFD56eKf5bZPBI_0cC4YPY1cJam6_xyaoMH_DUWIjH3eDCCQlhTV378GPf4nLT7sA6jSKTSBSAn9S_lZDMb20iNUudtUm4zBqxRSrLNcWmNGnqghTzbQMk4qgD5rrvkC9c_aDhwqs3kH8VoICkJf2Qfh_5FsWLoFLSalhcD2qpXl-HvCCG4FLzHvDrIpUggwoATrJzdsbpGznhUBwUaKnrWVWIXkK-ViIjkOLnCTbhLU4liyrhgG80HjeintCQvcGS1S-qq-7dX7F3RSf3BzHpz74Ym6t8kQ9Vc3FOZgjf_I5IbQvteqL_YpuJZ2YR6bu7E0PR7TU1GpV-s0_jy8XE0CMqmMV8xYb_e2_Jp4LpYR_)

I ask, because I am getting reports from our political team that Democrat donors seem to have an upper hand when it comes to both enthusiasm and fundraising this year.

Chuck Schumer, Elizabeth Warren, Adam Schiff, and other Senate Democrats aren't going to let us off easy after winning back the Senate.

Peter, that's why we need **YOU**.

[**To show you are still committed to our America First Senate Majority, will you complete this “weekend area assessment?”**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=361162f7a70d4a2ca5092baa7d087083&_e=kK6CQHvyT1KwwLnEh3qhNEC5EuCCj0y9mey9JYbIl0CUGDT_Fnd8ZrYzV6qf1ijI14W3KsQ_1pgv2L0poKSoFD56eKf5bZPBI_0cC4YPY1cJam6_xyaoMH_DUWIjH3eDCCQlhTV378GPf4nLT7sA6jSKTSBSAn9S_lZDMb20iNUudtUm4zBqxRSrLNcWmNGnqghTzbQMk4qgD5rrvkC9c_aDhwqs3kH8VoICkJf2Qfh_5FsWLoFLSalhcD2qpXl-HvCCG4FLzHvDrIpUggwoATrJzdsbpGznhUBwUaKnrWUZik_m3055NOumf0XRNIYgiXeJSL900raQCzaI40U8kq_C_kjBvhdmX0jx53mUkzPziGmNfz5Faq7S_HI1MTSOEAMge7i8FFdhAs6ofb-MDKXHZS-kgL0kSJpQAKXI0sv-KSuJRcFLx-OIKsZ7iPar)

[**BEGIN NOW ->**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=361162f7a70d4a2ca5092baa7d087083&_e=kK6CQHvyT1KwwLnEh3qhNEC5EuCCj0y9mey9JYbIl0CUGDT_Fnd8ZrYzV6qf1ijI14W3KsQ_1pgv2L0poKSoFD56eKf5bZPBI_0cC4YPY1cJam6_xyaoMH_DUWIjH3eDCCQlhTV378GPf4nLT7sA6jSKTSBSAn9S_lZDMb20iNUudtUm4zBqxRSrLNcWmNGnqghTzbQMk4qgD5rrvkC9c_aDhwqs3kH8VoICkJf2Qfh_5FsWLoFLSalhcD2qpXl-HvCCG4FLzHvDrIpUggwoATrJzdsbpGznhUBwUaKnrWVD1UbckfUokdWaBAqW6MRREtCPEOgw5N6ex99EDhYVrA30aZE4699-0prudzgKtJfEEONbaQCLSSSx95RHCl58E1XC133WeWOHMVe4HsE7-TzPSUikr5NkHPrRJ0IR4MWqTvVERTT9ggH9V9n2qp6o)
Thanks - I know these reports have to be wrong.

Tim Scott
NRSC Chairman

[**_10,000 emergency signatures needed now: Please sign your name to stand with these federal judges and BLOCK Elon Musk’s attempts to take over our government >>**_](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59721?t=4&akid=22876%2E4449941%2Et_hw-4) | [SIGN THE PETITION NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59721?t=5&akid=22876%2E4449941%2Et_hw-4)

We desperately need your signature on our petition.

Elon Musk has free reign over our government right now.

_And Donald Trump will do ANYTHING to protect him — including by removing federal judges who get in their way!_

He illegally hacked into Social Security data. He awarded his companies over $400 million in government contracts. He shut down 11 federal agencies that were investigating his companies.

**So now, Judges Paul Engelmayer and John McConnell Jr. are laying down the law. And Trump is attempting to FIRE them.**

[**_We need 10,000 emergency signatures today on our petition to stand with these federal judges and hold Elon Musk accountable. Please sign your name now >>_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59721?t=6&akid=22876%2E4449941%2Et_hw-4)

Your support is critical to helping us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.
With your support we can harness the power of our grassroots supporters to influence decision makers and put control back in the hands of the people.

name: Dan Goldman
subject: Billionaires first, Americans last
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, We’re all familiar with Donald Trump’s campaign slogan, “Make America Great Again.”

**But the question remains: who is he making America great _for_? **

Because it’s certainly not the hard-working people of NY-10, who are watching as federal funding for vital programs like Medicaid, Head Start, SNAP, and much more gets cut.

Or the students and teachers who will suffer from Trump’s proposal to eliminate the Department of Education entirely.

Or the farmers who rely on USAID to purchase more than $2 billion worth of food from their farms, including surplus that would otherwise go to waste.

Or the small business owners seeing their companies suffer as costs continue to go up and customers focus on the necessities.

**Peter, Trump’s “America First” policies are really just _Billionaire First_ policies. He’s screwing over the middle class to pay for tax cuts for the wealthiest people in this country.**

The richest man alive and his unvetted teenagers are lawlessly firing federal workers and canceling promised government funds. Musk and his team of “DOGE” employees — none of whom were _elected, confirmed by the Senate, or even had a background check_ — are illegally accessing millions of Americans’ personal, sensitive information and shuttering programs that keep our country running.

Meanwhile, Trump is defending dictators over democracies, lecturing our allies, and pushing tariffs that ultimately hurt the American people and isolate us from the global economy.

All of these policies send one message loud and clear from the Trump administration: _**Billionaires First, Americans Last.**_

**Peter, while we watch Donald Trump dismantle our government, I’m fighting back. I’ve introduced legislation to protect our institutions, and I’m raising my voice to make sure voters know about Trump and Musk’s Billionaire First, Americans Last agenda.** **[Please chip in to amplify our work and make sure Americans are informed:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102519328/529436526/-585077023?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250221_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTlmZjNhNi02ZGYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sWiUwX_fT4QtoiMRVJtQIt1Dx77GjKn1E54E23rw3JA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102519329/529436527/-585077023?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250221_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTlmZjNhNi02ZGYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sWiUwX_fT4QtoiMRVJtQIt1Dx77GjKn1E54E23rw3JA=)

clean_body: | Peter, We’re all familiar with Donald Trump’s campaign slogan, “Make America Great Again.” But the question remains: who is he making America great for? Because it’s certainly not the hard-working people of NY-10, who are watching as federal funding for vital programs like Medicaid, Head Start, SNAP, and much more gets cut. Or the students and teachers who will suffer from Trump’s proposal to eliminate the Department of Education entirely. Or the farmers who rely on USAID to purchase more than $2 billion worth of food from their farms, including surplus that would otherwise go to waste. Or the small business owners seeing their companies suffer as costs continue to go up and customers focus on the necessities. Peter, Trump’s “America First” policies are really just Billionaire First policies. He’s screwing over the middle class to pay for tax cuts for the wealthiest people in this country. The richest man alive and his unvetted teenagers are lawlessly firing federal workers and canceling promised government funds. Musk and his team of “DOGE” employees — none of whom were elected, confirmed by the Senate, or even had a background check — are illegally accessing millions of Americans’ personal, sensitive information and shuttering programs that keep our country running. Meanwhile, Trump is defending dictators over democracies, lecturing our allies, and pushing tariffs that ultimately hurt the American people and isolate us from the global economy. All of these policies send one message loud and clear from the Trump administration: Billionaires First, Americans Last. Peter, while we watch Donald Trump dismantle our government, I’m fighting back. I’ve introduced legislation to protect our institutions, and I’m raising my voice to make sure voters know about Trump and Musk’s Billionaire First, Americans Last agenda. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

name: The New Pennsylvania Project
subject: Get ready to learn more about the courts
body:
| | |
---
| | Hi Friend , Welcome to the latest New Pennsylvania Project newsletter!

We often see **local, municipal ****and judicial elections** receive less turnout than general elections, but their impact can be felt within our everyday lives. Your local elections can affect issues like a pothole on your commute getting fixed, or how resources are delegated to local parks and schools.

Local, municipal and judicial elections are also the last line of defense against attacks on our rights from the White House. Since returning to the White House, President Donald Trump has faced numerous legal challenges over his executive orders, including ending birthright citizenship, freezing government funding, and reducing the federal workforce. When Pennsylvanians voice their vote in judicial elections, they help shape the courts that make decisions about these issues. These decisions impact our lives for years to come.When we empower our communities to vote in _all elections_ , we are helping shape a better future.The work we do matters!#CourtsMatter #WhenWeVoteWeWin
---
| | |
---
| |

| |

# Why Courts Matter: 301
---
Thursday February 27th
6:30-7:30PM
Online via Zoom

How do the courts affect our rights and freedoms? Why should we be involved in judicial elections?

We will be hosting our third virtual town hall alongside **_Why Courts Matter - Pennsylvania_** , focusing** __** on the importance of our federal courts and the role elected officials play in nominating and confirming judges.

No matter your immigration status, you have a constitutionally-protected right to free speech and lawful assembly.

If you are taken into custody by law enforcement while on the streets, however, the legal outcomes and threats may differ for non-citizens.

Read, learn, and help circulate these 10 tips to best prepare and understand your options, risks, and rights, should you decide to peacefully demonstrate for any cause or issue.

clean_body: | | | | | Hi Friend , Welcome to the latest New Pennsylvania Project newsletter! We often see local, municipal and judicial elections receive less turnout than general elections, but their impact can be felt within our everyday lives. Your local elections can affect issues like a pothole on your commute getting fixed, or how resources are delegated to local parks and schools. Local, municipal and judicial elections are also the last line of defense against attacks on our rights from the White House. Since returning to the White House, President Donald Trump has faced numerous legal challenges over his executive orders, including ending birthright citizenship, freezing government funding, and reducing the federal workforce. When Pennsylvanians voice their vote in judicial elections, they help shape the courts that make decisions about these issues. These decisions impact our lives for years to come.When we empower our communities to vote in all elections , we are helping shape a better future.The work we do matters!#CourtsMatter #WhenWeVoteWeWin | | | | | | | | Cookies, Cocoa & Courts Thursday February 27th 2-4PM 1632 N 29th St, Philadelphia, PA 19121 Join the affiliated organization, NPPEF, as they celebrate our communities with free cookies and hot cocoa! Learn more about how the courts affect your rights and why your vote matters in the upcoming election! | | | Why Courts Matter: 301 Thursday February 27th 6:30-7:30PM Online via Zoom How do the courts affect our rights and freedoms? Why should we be involved in judicial elections? We will be hosting our third virtual town hall alongside Why Courts Matter - Pennsylvania , focusing on the importance of our federal courts and the role elected officials play in nominating and confirming judges. | | | | | Calling your elected officials and reminding them that billionaires are not like us. | | | No matter your immigration status, you have a constitutionally-protected right to free speech and lawful assembly. If you are taken into custody by law enforcement while on the streets, however, the legal outcomes and threats may differ for non-citizens. "The Republican National Committee (RNC) the U.S. Supreme Court to hear its appeal of an October 2024 Pennsylvania Supreme Court allowing voters to cast provisional ballots on Election Day if their timely received mail-in ballots are disqualified due to a technical mistake." | | | "If enacted, it would devastate voter registration while disenfranchising tens of millions of eligible American citizens. More than American citizens don’t have these documents readily available, according to survey data. But the SAVE Act would likely adversely affect far more Americans than the data suggests. Many might not have noticed how broadly the bill could apply." "The SAVE Act does not include proof of name change or a marriage certificate as acceptable proof of identity. This could be vital for married women with a birth certificate that does not match their current legal name." "Huntington Beach City Attorney Michael Gates, who defended the city’s local voter ID law from a challenge by California Democratic officials, was appointed to be the deputy assistant attorney general of the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) Civil Rights Division." | | On February 11th, founding CEO Kadida Kenner was a special guest in conversation with PA Megaphone on the importance of PA’s upcoming judicial elections in 2025. Pennsylvania voters are powerful. Pennsylvania is one of only seven states in the entire country that elects all of its judges and justices in partisan elections. | | | Luzerne County Laundromat, Wilkes-Barre. | Staff members of the affiliated organization, New PA Project Education Fund (NPPEF), continue to provide voters with civic education across the Commonwealth. We know our communities are often pressed for time, so we're trying to make voter registration as easy as possible for them. By meeting people at locations where there is often downtime between errands—such as laundromats—we're making civic education more accessible. | | Philadelphia County | | | | | Union Experience Fair at Olney High School, Philadelphia. Dauphin County | | | | | | Tri-County OIC (Opportunities Industrialization Centers). Harrisburg. | "President Donald Trump’s administration asked the U.S. Supreme Court to weigh in on the recent of Hampton Dellinger, the head of the office of the special counsel (OSC) — the nation’s top independent federal investigative and prosecutorial agency." "As President Trump's executive order faces , some tribal members are concerned the U.S. Justice Department is using a Supreme Court case that denied Native Americans U.S. citizenship in the 1800s to justify the president's position." " has moved to dramatically shrink the size of the federal workforce and mass terminations at several U.S. government agencies. But a tangled web of laws and regulations around hiring and firing government employees could mire Trump's efforts in lawsuits and delays. Here is a look at Trump's actions so far and the legal obstacles he could face in downsizing the 2.3 million-strong civilian federal workforce." | We need to hear from you | | | Democracy works best when it works for everyone. That is why we want to hear about the issues you care about the most in 2025. If you haven't done so yet, please, take a couple minutes to let us know how we can continue to empower our communities to get out and vote in ALL elections! | | | Last day to register to vote for the Primary Election: Monday, May 5, 2025 Primary Election: Tuesday, May 20, 2025 Last day to register to vote for the General Election: Monday, October 20, 2025 Last day to request mail-in ballot: Tuesday, October 28, 2025 General Election: Tuesday, November 4, 2025 | Important Links: Voter Hotlines: Voter Protection Hotline: 1-866-OUR-VOTEDOS PA Voter Hotline: 1-877-VOTESPA Spanish/English Hotline: 1-866-VE-Y-VOTAAsian Languages Hotline: 1-888-API-VOTE Arabic/English Hotline: 1-844-YALLA-US | | Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania Project P.O. name: Team Kennedy
subject: “Enthusiasm for MAHA”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
The goal isn’t proving anyone right or wrong—the goal is finding real answers together.

Dear Peter,
When Robert F. Kennedy Jr. addressed the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) as its new Secretary, he saw something unexpected: **_an agency ready for change_.**
_"I was touched and inspired by the warm welcome from every corner of HHS, the professionalism, and the unrestrained groundswell of enthusiasm for MAHA."_
Inside HHS, people see the need for a new approach. For too long, leaders have silenced critical conversations—on environmental toxins, the explosion of chronic disease, and the actual long-term effects of pharmaceutical interventions.
**Now, they can break free from outdated policies and institutional constraints.** They want to put science over politics. They want the freedom to ask tough questions, follow the evidence, and rebuild trust in public health.
The goal isn’t proving anyone right or wrong—the goal is finding real answers together. It’s shifting the system to prioritize health over profit, prevention over treatment, and transparency over special interests.
The mission is clear for the first time in a long time: [help make the American people healthier.](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_day_2_20_25_nd1&n=5)
* * *
If you want to help Secretary Kennedy [retire his campaign debt](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_day_2_20_25_nd1&n=6) so he can continue leading this fight, please consider a contribution today.
[Chip in today](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_day_2_20_25_nd1&n=7)

name: Gay Valimont
subject: Mass Firings of Federal Workers—A Manufactured Crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/70756F655332783372636F454353396562687376694F485948735343712B763672586D4157707A676459726C636F6733786F6E2B526572766D6752546567474F/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-01-10%20at%208.23.20%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Greetings from Gay Valimont, I come to you with LIVE, URGENT NEWS:
The Trump administration is pushing forward with mass firings of federal workers, following a court ruling that lifted the block on their job-cutting spree.
Thousands of federal employees are now scrambling for legal protection, while experts warn this reckless downsizing could rack up a ‘monumental’ bill for taxpayers.
I’m counting on you to help me save our federal institutions.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/6576654D66776941434C3753747451646D466B556F6254527452357A302F5869794B70484B357571357858755A755236484C5564464E7938722B376D36696B4C/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-02-21%20at%2010.12.27%E2%80%AFAM.png]
This isn’t about efficiency—it’s about dismantling the institutions that serve the American people. From environmental protections to social services, these job cuts will gut essential programs, leaving communities without the support they rely on. We should be strengthening our government’s ability to serve, not sabotaging it.
On April 1st, special elections will take place, and we will stand up for workers, fight against politically motivated firings, and push for real accountability in Washington. This level of instability is unacceptable—not just for those losing their jobs, but for every American who depends on a functioning government.
Rush $8 to keep us on track today, for a better tomorrow!! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]

Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/6576654D66776941434C3753747451646D466B556F6254527452357A302F5869794B70484B357571357858755A755236484C5564464E7938722B376D36696B4C/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-02-02%20at%2010.05.52%E2%80%AFAM.png]
We need leaders who will protect public service, not tear it down. Let’s fight back.
Gay Valimont
FL-1 Candidate

name: Care in Action
subject: Public schools, healthcare, and transit are at risk—act now
body:
Congress is pushing a bill that would hurt families and gut cities of critical funding. Fight back now!
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102520706/529440142/664783965?ms=022125_sanctcities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDU2ZjdjMC02ZmYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aC7ug8SQT-t6i547cfz7l9WPdYRTTy7OLiezh5iTL-8=&emci=542a5200-b9ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=8456f7c0-6ff0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=864787)
Right now, Congress is considering the "No Bailout for Sanctuary Cities" Act (H.R. 32): a dangerous bill that would **strip federal funding from cities and states unless they participate in mass deportations.**
**This isn’t just an attack on immigrants—it’s an attack on all of us.**
This bill is political blackmail—forcing communities to choose between protecting their residents or losing critical resources.
We can’t let that happen. **[**_Contact your representative now to demand Congress reject this cruel bill._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102520707/529440143/-292984194?ms=022125_sanctcities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDU2ZjdjMC02ZmYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aC7ug8SQT-t6i547cfz7l9WPdYRTTy7OLiezh5iTL-8=&emci=542a5200-b9ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=8456f7c0-6ff0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=864787)**
**_******__[TAKE ACTION](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102520708/529440144/-292984194?ms=022125_sanctcities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDU2ZjdjMC02ZmYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aC7ug8SQT-t6i547cfz7l9WPdYRTTy7OLiezh5iTL-8=&emci=542a5200-b9ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=8456f7c0-6ff0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=864787)__******_**
What does this mean for families? It means **domestic workers with children and other parents will be too terrified to send their kids to school for fear of deportation.** It means families losing access to healthcare because their local hospital no longer has the funding to stay open. It means children going hungry because their schools can no longer provide meals.
If the "No Bailout for Sanctuary Cities" Act passes, nearly 700 communities across 28 states could lose federal funding for:
* Public schools and free school lunch programs
* Public transit systems that families rely on to get to work
* Disaster relief funds for communities recovering from floods, wildfires, and storms
* Medicaid funding for hospitals and clinics that serve working families
* Domestic violence shelters and life-saving crisis services

We’ve seen this playbook before—**using federal funding as a weapon to force communities into compliance.**
**This isn’t about safety—it’s about power and control.**
We must fight back before it’s too late. **The "No Bailout for Sanctuary Cities" Act is cruel, reckless, and puts entire communities at risk. **_**[**_Send a message to your representative to tell Congress: Hands off our communities—vote NO on H.R. 32._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102520709/529440145/-292984194?ms=022125_sanctcities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDU2ZjdjMC02ZmYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aC7ug8SQT-t6i547cfz7l9WPdYRTTy7OLiezh5iTL-8=&emci=542a5200-b9ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=8456f7c0-6ff0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=864787)**_

clean_body: Congress is pushing a bill that would hurt families and gut cities of critical funding. Fight back now! Right now, Congress is considering the "No Bailout for Sanctuary Cities" Act (H.R. 32): a dangerous bill that would strip federal funding from cities and states unless they participate in mass deportations. This isn’t just an attack on immigrants—it’s an attack on all of us. This bill is political blackmail—forcing communities to choose between protecting their residents or losing critical resources. We can’t let that happen. **** What does this mean for families? It means domestic workers with children and other parents will be too terrified to send their kids to school for fear of deportation. It means families losing access to healthcare because their local hospital no longer has the funding to stay open. It means children going hungry because their schools can no longer provide meals. If the "No Bailout for Sanctuary Cities" Act passes, nearly 700 communities across 28 states could lose federal funding for: Public schools and free school lunch programs Public transit systems that families rely on to get to work Disaster relief funds for communities recovering from floods, wildfires, and storms Medicaid funding for hospitals and clinics that serve working families Domestic violence shelters and life-saving crisis services We’ve seen this playbook before—using federal funding as a weapon to force communities into compliance. This isn’t about safety—it’s about power and control. We must fight back before it’s too late. The "No Bailout for Sanctuary Cities" Act is cruel, reckless, and puts entire communities at risk. ************ Every family deserves to feel safe in their own community. Every child deserves to go to school without fear. Every worker deserves access to public transit, healthcare, and emergency services. But if H.R. 32 passes, millions of families will be thrown into crisis. ** Thanks for all that you do, The Care in Action Team

–President Donald J. Trump
---
We’re barely one month into Trump’s presidency, and he’s already saying the quiet part out loud: he wishes he were king.
**This isn’t just bluster – it’s a warning. **
Trump has never hidden his admiration for dictators. Now, with the full power of the presidency in his hands, he’s making it clear he sees himself as a king, not an elected official accountable to the people.
If this is what he’s saying now, imagine what’s next. _Will he try to undermine the courts? Ignore Congress?_
[**We need to be ready for whatever comes next, and that’s why we’re hoping you’ll chip in $20 to the DASS Legal Fund today. Your support – right now – will help us defend democracy and the rule of law.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102522442/529443962/-729519538?refcode=em-2.21.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjMxNjUyNC03MWYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tpfe92mBNYDYmUZ_icwyoEskrbUnemqmPmRQPGVlMC0=)

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Meeting with President Zelenskyy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102522273/529443785/623074613?refcode=jtk1392-ot-nd1&code=jtk1392-ot-nd1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDMzMTY1MjQtNzFmMC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=njD6oakEeOH1j_dJF2CAckTp_zwByyVQKJtwyqey1Bw=&emci=317e6c4c-edef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=d3316524-71f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=9329426)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102522278/529443789/1598344514?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1392-ot-nd1&code=jtk1392-ot-nd1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDMzMTY1MjQtNzFmMC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=njD6oakEeOH1j_dJF2CAckTp_zwByyVQKJtwyqey1Bw=)
_Meeting with President Zelenskyy at the Munich Security Conference after he spoke movingly to our bipartisan delegation._
In 1935, a young Jewish man – still 18 years old and with little more than the shirt on his back – sailed to the United States. He spoke almost no English. He knew virtually no one. But Adolf Hitler had risen to power in his home country of Germany, and he fled to escape persecution.

That man was my father, Martin Blumenthal.
A year before my father fled Germany, Hitler centralized power and made his own word the highest law. In 1938, European leaders signed the Munich Agreement in a failed act of appeasement that ultimately laid the groundwork for Hitler's full-scale invasion of Czechoslovakia and, later, Poland and France – plunging Europe into the Second World War.
**Having just returned from the 61st Munich Security Conference, this history is on my mind – as is my father – as we witness President Donald Trump betray our European allies in favor of Russian dictator Vladimir Putin, all while likening himself to Napoleon and a "King."**
While at the Munich Conference, I watched in disgust as our nation's Vice President, JD Vance, scolded allies who are standing up against far-right extremism and cozied up to Germany's far-right political party that has been likened to neo-Nazis. Following Vance's despicable speech, Donald Trump proceeded to blame Ukraine and its President, Volodymyr Zelenskyy, for the cruel and bloody assault that Vladimir Putin has waged on Ukraine.

These words from the sitting President and Vice President of the United States give moral cover to not just Putin as he pushes forward to swallow Ukraine (and the rest of Eastern Europe) but all totalitarian thugs who seek to steamroll over freedom and democracy as they push their extremist agendas.
Donald Trump's denigration of Ukraine – and embrace of Putin – puts all of Europe, and democracy itself, in danger. I can't help but wonder what my father would think, a man who left the only home he'd ever known as democracy collapsed around him. How worried he would be by U.S. leaders giving comfort, even encouragement, to extremist, racist, right-wing parties that embrace hatred.
**History doesn’t repeat, but it rhymes. Now, Republicans face their own personal Munich: Do they stay silent to appease Donald Trump or stop the malign march to catastrophic tragedy? **
After personally traveling to Ukraine six times since February 2022, my commitment is unwavering. I'll continue to stand with Ukraine, seeking strongly to rally Americans to see that Ukraine's fight is our fight.

Sincerely,

Dick

clean_body: | | | = Meeting with President Zelenskyy at the Munich Security Conference after he spoke movingly to our bipartisan delegation. In 1935, a young Jewish man – still 18 years old and with little more than the shirt on his back – sailed to the United States. He spoke almost no English. He knew virtually no one. But Adolf Hitler had risen to power in his home country of Germany, and he fled to escape persecution. That man was my father, Martin Blumenthal. A year before my father fled Germany, Hitler centralized power and made his own word the highest law. In 1938, European leaders signed the Munich Agreement in a failed act of appeasement that ultimately laid the groundwork for Hitler's full-scale invasion of Czechoslovakia and, later, Poland and France – plunging Europe into the Second World War. Having just returned from the 61st Munich Security Conference, this history is on my mind – as is my father – as we witness President Donald Trump betray our European allies in favor of Russian dictator Vladimir Putin, all while likening himself to Napoleon and a "King." While at the Munich Conference, I watched in disgust as our nation's Vice President, JD Vance, scolded allies who are standing up against far-right extremism and cozied up to Germany's far-right political party that has been likened to neo-Nazis. Following Vance's despicable speech, Donald Trump proceeded to blame Ukraine and its President, Volodymyr Zelenskyy, for the cruel and bloody assault that Vladimir Putin has waged on Ukraine. These words from the sitting President and Vice President of the United States give moral cover to not just Putin as he pushes forward to swallow Ukraine (and the rest of Eastern Europe) but all totalitarian thugs who seek to steamroll over freedom and democracy as they push their extremist agendas. Donald Trump's denigration of Ukraine – and embrace of Putin – puts all of Europe, and democracy itself, in danger. I can't help but wonder what my father would think, a man who left the only home he'd ever known as democracy collapsed around him. How worried he would be by U.S. leaders giving comfort, even encouragement, to extremist, racist, right-wing parties that embrace hatred. History doesn’t repeat, but it rhymes. Now, Republicans face their own personal Munich: Do they stay silent to appease Donald Trump or stop the malign march to catastrophic tragedy? After personally traveling to Ukraine six times since February 2022, my commitment is unwavering. I'll continue to stand with Ukraine, seeking strongly to rally Americans to see that Ukraine's fight is our fight. Sincerely, Dick | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut Blumenthal for Connecticut 1111 Summer Street Suite 301 Stamford, CT 06905 United States

# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Reader, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism -- mostly the latter -- and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today 's media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.
---
[ **Join the Sun for 1 ¢ ->**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f057e6eb047947d4a3e89a0127f6f1c7&_e=ZgpbC96ehfSol69Ovgq1VLmHxpGG6Afu802kb0ZFC_bBlJ7UiIckn1W5MHpqvI0RvC56K3l334rCWG6ei9Gp9I-mtQZIB3F8aX4JvGyOeHc3NHNN0QELyxDLBtBWKH0i-qPvk2-RfYn8ypUvcWuiV7ejVbVxpPM-hfmuv7A81hTShcMMbSaJYk5NUlggCbI1GFa6sGmoON6sWY6hs8GfQrhELQldDo52WMRiDMaF8jUH7sHAdsODrQcoYIm3ZpfJWrwGHRvXvU9SWLOGhOv1_9udVXOazAWjZzslvOK9o9pacMbuZClSYAemkxuLV1QAbkWQouHMooHeevGUJt-yQ7Cmp4eXtWJMN_KFYmuL1eRAbwTovnsiovcw-zkBW5fkf9xq3O90CFJ_VGTcueARPcQACNKLG3222MRUWdIj23Yz_d7Tb_5BsfI0z2izuTxq)
---
Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun's deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I've been impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun 's success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don't wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

clean_body: Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point. For a limited time, join for just 1¢ | | | | FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ | | Dear Reader, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism -- mostly the latter -- and just how important and rare it is to get things right. In today 's media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. The New York Sun is different. It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party. Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point. When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments. The Sun's deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate. It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism. I've been impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join. The Sun 's success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today. Every person matters in this effort. Don't wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now. | | | | | | | Alan Dershowitz Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | The New York Sun Company, LLC, 300 Park Ave, 2nd Floor, New York, NY 10022, United States ****. ${Gears.unsubscribe\(\})

body:
Elon Musk shouldn't have unfettered access.

| |

Team, From USAID to the Treasury, Elon Musk and a cadre of kids are accessing the most sensitive data without any sunlight under the faux banner of government efficiency. It doesn't matter that it's February, we need to sound the alarm. A single, unelected person cannot and should not have the power to close departments and agencies that have money appropriated to them by Congress. We do not live in a monarchy for this reason. You can count on Nellie to stand up against their lawlessness, bullying, and disregard for our Constitution every day. The best way to stop it is by calling attention to it and then fighting back in the courts and at the ballot box to defeat MAGA. But, team, Nellie is at risk of losing to MAGA. **Donald Trump won in her district and she won her election with less than 51% of the vote. Her re-election campaign is already underway and we're already being attacked. ** **[Please, chip in $25 or more right now to help give our re-election campaign a boost so we can afford to fight back against Mike Johnson and the deluge of dark money flowing into NJ-09 to smear Nellie's record.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102525148/529449257/-3691057?refcode=250221_tp_orders_l1&ms=250221_tp_orders&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzU0YTNjNWItNzRmMC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iKbMJ3xiB2MhaT6_pS9lWjJknBVBhnls4Y1vj4yPsC4=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102525155/529449264/-3691057?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=250221_tp_orders&ms=250221_tp_orders&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzU0YTNjNWItNzRmMC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iKbMJ3xiB2MhaT6_pS9lWjJknBVBhnls4Y1vj4yPsC4=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102525156/529449265/-3691057?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=250221_tp_orders&ms=250221_tp_orders&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzU0YTNjNWItNzRmMC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iKbMJ3xiB2MhaT6_pS9lWjJknBVBhnls4Y1vj4yPsC4=)

name: PoliticsPA
subject: PA's Gen Z voters will surprise you
body:
Tune into the latest installment of the Voices of Reason podcast. | | | |
---
| | | Welcome to the latest edition of _Voices of Reason_ where we’ll recap exclusive news and data featured in our most recent podcast.

This new segment dives into what you need to know about Gen Z voters, trades vs. college, Philly's big Super Bowl win, and more.

PA State Senator **Joe Picozzi **and** ** Commonwealth Foundation Senior Fellow **Guy Ciarrocchi **share insights you don’t want to miss.
---
| **Big Names Make News**
---
| **PA State Senator Joe Picozzi **explained why he thinks partisanship is getting less intense. "I think amongst young people, there is a sense of 'I don't really care about the party, who's the person? What are they all about? What's their deal, what's their motivation for doing this? What's their vibe?'" [[Watch](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1a11baa0f9&e=b7b3eddce2)]

**Commonwealth Foundation Senior Fellow Guy Ciarrocchi** breaks down how the proposed Governor's budget has "more want to, than wallet" highlighting how the State's independent fiscal office has said, "if we keep spending all the money we have saved it is going to run out." [[Watch](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=974063c353&e=b7b3eddce2)]
---
|
* * *
---
| **Numbers You Need to Know**
---
| _Youth Population_
* Young voters (18-34) made up over **80% of new registrations** after Biden's July resignation from the 2024 election. [[NewPAProject](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9eef732f6e&e=b7b3eddce2)]
* Voters 18-24 shifted **21 points toward Republicans in 2024** , reflecting a broader rightward trend among those under 40. [[City&StatePA](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e60bced2e9&e=b7b3eddce2)]

_Voter Interests_
* Approximately **12.6% of PA adults lack basic literacy** ; 18% of residents aged 16–74 are at or below PIAAC literacy level 1. [[PAACE](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e338c0c028&e=b7b3eddce2)]
* Shapiro's 2025-26 budget invests in vocational and technical education, with 75,000+ youth participating. [[Commonwealth](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7acf88ffa2&e=b7b3eddce2)]

_Elections_
* Only **42%** of young PA voters aged 18-29 went to the polls in 2024—the lowest youth vote since 2000**. **[[TuffsCircle](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e3562db6cd&e=b7b3eddce2)]
* The number of young registered voters in PA **declined by 6%** between 2020 and 2024. [[Statista](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c8ccdfc2fa&e=b7b3eddce2)]

---
|
* * *
---
| **State Sen. Joe Picozzi gets candid about starting out in Harrisburg, PA's youth vote, and Philly's big win **🦅🏆
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=85bf3632bd&e=b7b3eddce2 "What you need to know about PA’s Gen Z voters | Voices of Reason Ep. 12 – PA Sen. Joe Picozzi")
---
|
* * *
---
| **In Case You Missed It...**
---
| The _Voices of Reason_ podcast has covered the most important issues in Pennsylvania politics – from [education funding](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=de683ff576&e=b7b3eddce2) to [trust in elections](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=dcb40b76a0&e=b7b3eddce2). Secretary of the Commonwealth [Al Schmidt](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=db12491f9f&e=b7b3eddce2), PA Treasurer [Stacy Garrity](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b8089791fb&e=b7b3eddce2), and House Appropriations Chairman [Jordan Harris](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c662ee7bb0&e=b7b3eddce2) are just a few of many influential guests who have joined us for exclusive interviews and roundtable discussions.
Visit the _Voice of Reason_ [YouTube page](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1813323954&e=b7b3eddce2) to experience all the great moments you missed.
---
|
* * *
---
| **Get in Touch**
---
| We like smart ideas and want to hear from you.

Send feedback and inquire about appearing on _Voices of Reason_ , at [press@politicspa.com](mailto:press@politicspa.com?subject=Voices%20of%20Reason%20Podcast%20Inquiry).

name: Juanita, United We Dream Action
subject: 10,000 refugees in limbo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United We Dream Action; UnitedWeDreamAction
body:
People fleeing persecution deserve safety, not rejection. | | | Peter, People fleeing persecution deserve safety, not rejection. Just days into his presidency, Trump banned asylum and halted ALL refugee processing in an unprecedented attack on human rights. His administration canceled flights for over **10,000 refugees** , abandoning families and individuals fleeing violence and persecution. This cruel ban betrays America's foundational promise as a refuge for those seeking safety and freedom: Refugees and asylum seekers come here to escape violence, which is oftentimes perpetrated by the United States in the first place. **Now, the U.S. government is turning its back on the people it has harmed.** Seeking asylum is a human right. Yet Trump is slamming the door on vulnerable people, leaving them stranded in dangerous situations. This cycle of violence is only going to get worse as the Trump administration continues to inflict pain on vulnerable groups to cause chaos and division. **We need to do everything we can to fight back — like sharing Know Your Rights Resources, advocating loudly for our communities, and showing politicians that we are here to stay.** **[The real victory isn’t just surviving, Peter. It’s changing conditions so we never have to fight like this again. Our immigrant youth-led movement is leading that charge, can you chip in any amount right now to fuel it?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplrPQtKgNRxJ4NxE8B81MzWIuSnA8P6J65-0mULYyLDWDVD7HOSGC0LybJHJL-KnwarGf2TWBgNxO9MDgS3Xr2J_CcRndpaNh9r-bKvxZ_8z6HjuYEA2sLUu-WLUszga_FZ6nwQ3tvY9U5RG1SKeAwtncuiZggv2gT4zxylNk8E7c2ugyAg_uqtHTE7vTJGtLW083muPlANOdJsBkwmrp_UNxFuXER9ZlaD4cQxepxOIZurV2XPfVFEpeK8aZZs9WMGIdk6HNgRsA7GveIIwQD3G5mRpb0V2FdLb8IOZwwUVde05cCkREvL9zzYoGT7GdmSdJ6ZEqRGIwsUhUxJ_vl968i6V2p262lkZrTwTHw0OkiymiOxzhVza8zHWze9hy18/4e7/6aKJz_FPRba0r2I4sUHxfw/h0/h001.tIUa74fit6CR_V5c3fr6lD-JTvL25YLu1kTSLiQZJpA)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplrPQtKgNRxJ4NxE8B81MzWIuSnA8P6J65-0mULYyLDWDVD7HOSGC0LybJHJL-KnwarUMidRAVG-Ov20UZRUqi30lweP1KWLbaw0uTbU8FlPZhKLT8xdFTWOwHX45cClHcfrkPuEiCtVQhFyx_t7qtslUlRD6RUMcPIOTJDJF88p3-51RQR3_LC0cpdEWsrbNN9dRd1LZwh9AfUN6zeQh6ozeU5CXI8n-vVu_AJsqzogYJXE9YxKjZSscFIm_BbdQJt-GJ0nzh7mp0F6Xp05yopu4QFnOa5XhKOIM7uUAshRagsbsaEsrdEyY1a7obXtESZW_wTv6rpsDRV2QaCbgeayeDKAIWBTXCaGEqMLaC0q9JRp7UKpWBWkifyBQMht_dZbUrbD5xSPeA2Wr-hDB1GHda3moAJfFcLy0mK6IawlYc/4e7/6aKJz_FPRba0r2I4sUHxfw/h1/h001.byyQVUi31HC8UEuuPgo-s00fHzv2o77qThjwyHZUumo)

clean_body: People fleeing persecution deserve safety, not rejection. | | | Peter, People fleeing persecution deserve safety, not rejection. Just days into his presidency, Trump banned asylum and halted ALL refugee processing in an unprecedented attack on human rights. His administration canceled flights for over 10,000 refugees , abandoning families and individuals fleeing violence and persecution. This cruel ban betrays America's foundational promise as a refuge for those seeking safety and freedom: Refugees and asylum seekers come here to escape violence, which is oftentimes perpetrated by the United States in the first place. Now, the U.S. government is turning its back on the people it has harmed. Seeking asylum is a human right. Yet Trump is slamming the door on vulnerable people, leaving them stranded in dangerous situations. This cycle of violence is only going to get worse as the Trump administration continues to inflict pain on vulnerable groups to cause chaos and division. We need to do everything we can to fight back — like sharing Know Your Rights Resources, advocating loudly for our communities, and showing politicians that we are here to stay. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Contributions to United We Dream Action are not tax deductible. The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Action are ActBlue Civics Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. We must stand together through every attack on our community to continue fighting for justice and dignity for immigrants. Thank you, Juanita, United We Dream Action Follow us on: | | | | | Paid for by United We Dream Action; UnitedWeDreamAction.org; Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

body:
| Did you see Bonnie’s important note? This February, we honor Black History Month, a time for us to reflect on the historic triumphs and struggles throughout our nation’s history. At the same time, we’re witnessing Trump and his cronies actively work to undo the hard won progress toward equality we’re meant to celebrate this month.

**[Read more from Bonnie below and add your name now committing to fight back against Trump’s racist actions.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102527270/529455655/587080677?source=EM_NBI_BWC_202502_PT_BHM_0_3MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_BHM2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTAzNDM5Ny03NmYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mxKUUcNxFaVX5-tCZNcx_7luJha5r4HpGluZIofhGZk=&emci=53d938a2-75f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=d5034397-76f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=30096098)**
* * *
**_Begin forwarded message:_**

February marks Black History Month, a historic month to reflect on the history and present of Black people in the United States, celebrating and honoring our triumphs and struggles.

**But as we honor this history, Trump and his administration are actively tearing back decades of hard earned rights that we should be celebrating today.**

**[That’s why I need you to use your voice and commit to the fight against Trump’s blatantly racist actions.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102527273/529455660/587080677?source=EM_NBI_BWC_202502_PT_BHM_0_3MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_BHM2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTAzNDM5Ny03NmYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mxKUUcNxFaVX5-tCZNcx_7luJha5r4HpGluZIofhGZk=&emci=53d938a2-75f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=d5034397-76f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=30096098)** | | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102527277/529455665/587080677?source=EM_NBI_BWC_202502_PT_BHM_0_3MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_BHM2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTAzNDM5Ny03NmYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mxKUUcNxFaVX5-tCZNcx_7luJha5r4HpGluZIofhGZk=&emci=53d938a2-75f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=d5034397-76f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=30096098)
---
Last month, Trump reversed the 1965 executive order signed by President Lyndon B. Johnson, revoking critical practices of diversity and affirmative action as well as protections for workers from discrimination based on skin color and gender.

These actions cannot go ignored, and as the first African American woman to represent New Jersey in Congress, co-founder and co-chair of the Congressional Caucus on Black Women and Girls, and a member of the Congressional Black Caucus, I will never stop fighting back.

We must stand together to combat these extremist (or vicious) actions. Actions our country once vowed never to repeat.

**[This Black History Month, help us fight to protect our civil rights. Click here to show your commitment now>>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102527282/529455669/587080677?source=EM_NBI_BWC_202502_PT_BHM_0_3MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_BHM2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTAzNDM5Ny03NmYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mxKUUcNxFaVX5-tCZNcx_7luJha5r4HpGluZIofhGZk=&emci=53d938a2-75f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=d5034397-76f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=30096098)**

Bonnie

| | Fellow Conservative, What an incredible week it's been at CPAC 2025!

**The energy at this year 's gathering of conservative patriots has been OFF THE CHARTS**, and on Thursday afternoon we recorded **[a very special episode of _Verdict with Ted Cruz_](http://trk.tedcruz.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4NzQ5MDg0NSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MDUyLWY1NDEyNTAwN2Q4ZjQ5N2ZiNTc0YTkyNzhjMGNkNGUzIiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vb21ueS5mbS9zaG93cy92ZXJkaWN0LXdpdGgtdGVkLWNydXotMS8yLTIxLTI1In0/M4A7-MnEqUl9V3El94Sa8w)**. It's a must-listen for all those who stand with President Trump.

U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi, who was officially sworn in two weeks ago following a masterful performance before the Senate Judiciary Committee, shared a clear message:

"**WE 'RE WINNING**" in the fight against state Democratic attorneys general, woke activist groups, and liberal judges who are engaging in desperate lawfare to obstruct the Trump-Republican agenda to **Make America Great Again**!
---
[](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
I'd encourage you to check out this must-listen episode with AG Pam Bondi today.
---
[ **LISTEN NOW >>>**](http://trk.tedcruz.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4NzQ5MDg0NSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MDUyLWY1NDEyNTAwN2Q4ZjQ5N2ZiNTc0YTkyNzhjMGNkNGUzIiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMyIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vb21ueS5mbS9zaG93cy92ZXJkaWN0LXdpdGgtdGVkLWNydXotMS8yLTIxLTI1In0/D9Z2G78oIEA65YaoC6Xhsw)
---
**And please[rush a sustaining contribution](http://trk.tedcruz.) to fuel our fight at Team Cruz! **
---
[ **PITCH IN HERE >>>**](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
Ted's exclusive one-on-one interview with AG Bondi covered a wide range of topics, from restoring integrity at the Department of Justice to refocusing our law enforcement agencies on combating violent crime to the lawsuits she's filed against sanctuary cities that refuse to comply with federal immigration law, and so much more.

**[Listen now for a deep dive into AG Bondi's efforts and perspective](http://trk.tedcruz.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4NzQ5MDg0NSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MDUyLWY1NDEyNTAwN2Q4ZjQ5N2ZiNTc0YTkyNzhjMGNkNGUzIiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vb21ueS5mbS9zaG93cy92ZXJkaWN0LXdpdGgtdGVkLWNydXotMS8yLTIxLTI1In0/LLPrnDPJsACMd9wit0OhJQ)** and THANK YOU so much, as always, for being part of Team Cruz!

For Liberty,

Ted Cruz

| **About the Republican Party of Florida**
* * *
The Republican Party of Florida will promote the principles upon which our nation and our state were founded: freedom, liberty, personal responsibility, and accountability.

We will advocate fiscally-sound, common-sense solutions that will promote job and economic growth, provide the best education to our children, and create a path to prosperity for Florida and America.

Members of the Republican Party of Florida will be united by these principles and will work to elect Floridians with integrity who will work to enact such solutions. We will seek to be the most effective state party in the nation and serve as a model for other party organizations.

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I wrote this with a heavy heart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But every word is God's honest truth.

But every word is God's honest truth.
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/c/iN5snxOb0j4TNJNczuPxtCwNP1hjhVbYFVh1bru7DCzGXU9xwdZJqqiW4mfqZdEin5rCpyRi6e1G3n-70yVp-Gekx_3X85dmkA3Ijros9g49kqoeAz6Ca0CasxIrNthG0Nl0hImwqc2YVQYpDbY3wHjRugk-l4jxI03Hz4XsBGqZMTWREi1n1g5y7gxZ2fnv4ovd0aQTku14EBQkFZ8zozoG7NPxKKDDJz8WvD4LwoQpY9b4J1r0oyKrQs6pnKnpdgXGiBfOGc2OJSbqFejCOJXKrrPHR30L4p1WJCnQi8mKPBiFaNOElllPD7fnXz4ETh3d6hmObjHLM60q9jrMv1_auiDjLWBpfezHm7F1VbVRgdXOa4xFbvutiAaf0a0c8YIV75WnsGb_V0VkvC7GXShNxMwyoF8_dqisbp9Ox-X42nPYq3lKoD-IYRCmkY337rYKEg/SbVZfOYSdsohhJWRwjh8rkS5K0LBNG5e/6)
---
Friend,
---
At President Trump’s inauguration, he expressed that _“our nation has suffered greatly,”_ but _“after all we have been through together, we stand on the verge of the four greatest years in American history.”_
---
Those inspiring words – and President Trump’s historic leadership – have already begun to right the ship for our country in just a few weeks’ time.
---
_But today, sadly, I have to write to you for a far more somber reason._
---
I say this with a heavy heart, but every word is God's honest truth...
---

But every word is God's honest truth. | Friend, At President Trump’s inauguration, he expressed that “our nation has suffered greatly,” but “after all we have been through together, we stand on the verge of the four greatest years in American history.” Those inspiring words – and President Trump’s historic leadership – have already begun to right the ship for our country in just a few weeks’ time. But today, sadly, I have to write to you for a far more somber reason. I say this with a heavy heart, but every word is God's honest truth... While our beautiful country may have emerged from four long years of darkness, tyranny, and the Left’s weaponized justice system, my journey out of that darkness is not yet finished. If the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona gets her way, I’ll be in a jail cell until I’m 100 years old! And worst of all, these Deep State goons truly believe I’m finished, just like the media says, all because this case that’s already set to go to trial was brought on bogus state-level charges that PREVENT President Trump from saving me with a federal pardon. But, you see, even though the Democrats labeled me a “ DEAD MAN WALKING ,” RAIDED my home, ARRESTED me, took a MUGSHOT of me, and forced me into BANKRUPTCY , the TRUTH remains... ...No one can ever tell me I’m not a fighter. Which is why, at 80 years old, I’m still FIGHTING BACK. When these leftist crooks first had me booked, they filed my mugshot under booking # 2313757 ... And today, to show them that good and honest Americans like YOU are also fighters who refuse to stand by as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man all for defending our 45th and 47th President, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise $231,375.70 for my Legal Defense Trust to WIN the trial of my life and the fight for my freedom and justice.
