clean_body: | Patriot, this is terrible. I have some tough news to share, and I know you won 't be happy. We missed our last fundraising goal ... by a lot! After an incredible 2024, we ended the first month of 2025 on a rough note. We are significantly behind where we need to be to CAPITALIZE on our big wins from last year... This is not a good start if we want a clear path for the America First Agenda! This could be the end of the America First Movement... Any advantage the Democrats have pushes them closer to stopping our movement, in other words, total conservative annihilation. I need your urgent help to make up for our missed fundraising goal. We need to amp up our fundraising efforts to Save America! Our future is counting on how well we band together and get the America First Movement back on track! | Thankfully, we have one more chance to get ahead. President Trump will need our support during his first 100 days, and we must replenish our funds to take on the Left. Thank you for your support, Pat Harrigan Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee PO Box 97275, Raleigh, NC 27624 Copyright (C) 2024 Pat Harrigan for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Fight Trump via Our Revolution
subject: Petition: Tell Congress to Resist Trump’s Authoritarianism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Trump and Musk’s shock and awe attacks on our Constitution just won’t
stop. They’re operating as if the laws simply don’t apply to them –
illegally dismantling government agencies, freezing federal spending,
firing thousands of protected workers, and seizing our sensitive data.

Bernie has put it simply: we’re in a constitutional crisis. And it’s going
to take all of us to get out of it.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21758?t=1011&akid=7737%2E5885482%2Eaq1xyo ][IMG]

Sitting back and letting Trump anoint himself King is NOT an option. But
the only way we’re going to stop Trump’s authoritarian takeover is to
launch a massive, UNITED resistance.

Protests are heating up around the country — from outside the Capitol in
DC to Austin and Salt Lake City. But now we need ALL Democrats in Congress
to bring this same energy and fight back with everything they have.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21758?source=email-022125&t=1012&akid=7737%2E5885482%2Eaq1xyo ]Public outcry has already put collaborators in Congress on notice. But
as Trump doubles down we URGENTLY need to raise the pressure even more –
will you add your name to overwhelm the Capitol with calls to stand united
against Trump’s lawlessness?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21758?source=email-022125&t=1013&akid=7737%2E5885482%2Eaq1xyo ]ADD YOUR NAME

A legal battle is underway, with one lawsuit after the next being filed to
try to FORCE Trump to comply with our laws, but Trump is clearly counting
on his buddies at the Supreme Court to allow him to do what he pleases.
And even if SCOTUS refuses and stands up for the rule of law, the next big
question is whether Trump will simply ignore the courts and carry on with
his takedown of our government.

Terrifyingly, it’s already happening: this week a federal judge said that
Trump DEFIED an order to release billions of dollars in federal grants.
And now JD Vance is laying the groundwork for Trump to ignore the courts
and operate with ZERO guardrails:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21758?t=1014&akid=7737%2E5885482%2Eaq1xyo ][IMG]

It’s a chilling threat daring judges to counter Trump. And that’s why it’s
more important than ever for We the People to mount a massive opposition
on the ground, in the streets, and outside political offices — showing
Congress and Trump that we will not accept the destruction of our
democracy.

This means targeting Republicans in purple districts — we only need a few
to defect under pressure from their own constituents to get in the way of
Trump’s lawlessness. It also means no more collaboration from any
Democrats. House and Senate Dems ALL need to hold the line, REFUSE to
cooperate with the Trump regime, and GRIND Congress to a halt. This is no
time for business as usual, we are in a constitutional crisis, a time for
courage and conviction.

Massive pressure from all of us is what will make the difference in this
moment. The people are speaking out, protesting, and rising to the moment
— it’s time our elected leaders follow our lead.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21758?source=email-022125&t=1015&akid=7737%2E5885482%2Eaq1xyo ]Will you add your voice to demand Democrats and every Republican of
conscience stand NOW in unified opposition against Trump’s authoritarian
takeover?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=7737%2E5885482%2Eaq1xyo ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=7737%2E5885482%2Eaq1xyo ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=7737%2E5885482%2Eaq1xyo ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=7737%2E5885482%2Eaq1xyo ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=7737%2E5885482%2Eaq1xyo ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=7737%2E5885482%2Eaq1xyo ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13119?c0=email-022125.dsB_9t&t=1007&akid=7737%2E5885482%2Eaq1xyo ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=email-022125.O-b_yu&t=1008&akid=7737%2E5885482%2Eaq1xyo ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13121?c0=email-022125.1q2Gd7&t=1009&akid=7737%2E5885482%2Eaq1xyo ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13122?c0=email-022125.ZRDmO-&t=1010&akid=7737%2E5885482%2Eaq1xyo ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=7737%2E5885482%2Eaq1xyo

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as

name: Giffords.org
subject: 🙏To everyone who cares about the gun violence prevention movement, don’t skip this important message🙏
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

❗Friends -
To everyone who cares about the gun violence prevention movement, please don’t click away from this important message.

We’ll get right to it: [**We're asking you to make your first online contribution to GIFFORDS PAC.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb25.m4Qwdn&refcode=em240221-1-b&t=1&akid=10020%2E3935704%2Ep-8Tme)

Here’s why:
Our gun safety movement is at a crossroads now that Donald Trump is in office.
He recently announced an executive order that puts all of the progress we made during President Biden’s term in jeopardy.
He has chosen extremely unqualified and dangerous individuals to serve as his top-level cabinet members—including Kash Patel, who was just confirmed as FBI Director yesterday.

These are challenging times. There's no doubt about that.
But this isn’t the first time our gun safety movement has faced threats to our progress. If we work together, we can and _will_ overcome these obstacles.

The majority of folks who open this email won’t give today; they'll simply click away.
But if everyone getting this email donated even $1, we'd have the resources we need to show that our movement is stronger than ever.

[**If you’re ready to make an impact during this pivotal time, please contribute $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today, or select an amount below. Our average online donation is around $27. Some give more, others give less. All that matters is that you are helping Gabby in the fight to save lives from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb25.m4Qwdn&refcode=em240221-1-b&t=2&akid=10020%2E3935704%2Ep-8Tme)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: JD Vance hints at a national abortion ban. What you need to know:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
That didn’t take long.
Yesterday at the annual Conservative Political Action Conference, JD Vance hinted pretty hard that the GOP’s next priority is a national abortion ban. As he put it, they’ve got the power .
https://secure.ngpvan.com/8dIeF_6KykiDxHnEe5750A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/8dIeF_6KykiDxHnEe5750A2]
Despite plenty of empty promises and misleading redirections from the Trump-Vance ticket on the campaign trail, this call to action from the Vice President comes as no surprise.
We have always known that our reproductive freedom was going to be on the chopping block under this Administration.
The overturning of Roe was always the beginning – it was never the end goal. And now they’ve turned their sights to a national abortion ban. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/8dIeF_6KykiDxHnEe5750A2]
Case in point: Republicans in the House introduced legislation just a few weeks ago to implement a national abortion ban – HR 722 would give embryos the same legal rights as people from the moment of conception.
This is obviously extreme, and some say a bill like this would be impossible to pass. I really hope they’re right, but people said the same thing about overturning Roe, and here we are.
Our reality in the 119th Congress is pretty grim. Congressional Republicans have given zero indicators that they intend on standing up to the White House or any of Trump’s demands, no matter how extreme, or even illegal.
If the GOP succeeds in getting HR 722 or any other national abortion legislation enacted, it will override any state abortion protections, including state constitutional protections.
So let’s be clear: Here in California, our rights are on the line, too.
This has been a dark email so far, so let’s pivot to what we can actually do about this.
I will never stop fighting for legal, safe, accessible, and stigma-free abortion care – no matter who’s in the majority. But I’ll need you by my side.
A strong public showing on these issues does matter, so I’m asking you to raise your voice.
The data is undeniable: 61% of Americans believe abortion should be legal in all or most cases – and we need to make that clear to congressional Republicans. Add your name to my public petition to show the immense support reproductive freedom has in this country. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/8dIeF_6KykiDxHnEe5750A2]
I won’t stand by and watch Republicans rip away our rights, and I hope you’ll join me in speaking out about this – as loudly and as frequently as is required to get the message across.
Thanks for being in this fight.
-Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]

Sara Jacobs for Congress

San Diego, CA 92112

name: HEARTBREAK
subject: Can we rekindle the flame? It’s not over yet…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I'm not sure where to begin, but I know I have to be honest with you.
Last chance to renew your membership:
|
---
| | | Friend,

As I sit down to write this email, my heart is heavy with a mix of emotions. Sadness and a hint of desperation. _I'm not sure where to begin, but I know I have to be honest with you._

**I've been waiting for what feels like an eternity for you to renew your membership. But the silence is deafening.** It's like you've vanished into thin air, with your presence haunting me like a ghost.

---

name: Rep. Robin Kelly
subject: The key to building our party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102529116/529460531/860564428?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_210225_EVT_Robin-Kelly&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWQ2YWNkODgtNzlmMC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mj0dEWK0BEzg6990CN-U-xo8QbqWo1fMgjDjftboSpU=)
Team,

It’s Rep. Robin Kelly, and I’m proud to have served Illinois’ 2nd District in Congress since 2013. I’m also proud to be one of this year’s IDCCA Party Builder Award Honorees.

I understand the power of local government, and the power of building a strong party – because I’ve spent my career doing it. I’ve had the honor of serving Illinois in the State House, as the Chief of Staff to the State Treasurer, and in the office of the Cook County President. I also previously served as Chair of the Democratic Party of Illinois – becoming the first woman and African American elected to that position.

Here’s how I see it: **the key to building our party is to focus on solutions that would uplift all communities, whether they’re urban, suburban, or rural.**

I believe that focusing on issues that matter most to folks, is the key to bringing them back to the Democratic party – issues like investing in infrastructure, creating jobs, gun violence prevention, and access to affordable, quality healthcare.

[**I’d be honored if you would join me and the three other Party Builder Award Honorees on February 24th so we could discuss these issues, and make a plan for moving our party forward. RSVP right now to join us →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102529120/529460533/-1602568013?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_210225_EVT_Robin-Kelly&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWQ2YWNkODgtNzlmMC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mj0dEWK0BEzg6990CN-U-xo8QbqWo1fMgjDjftboSpU=)
[JOIN US](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102529125/529460538/860564428?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_210225_EVT_Robin-Kelly&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWQ2YWNkODgtNzlmMC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mj0dEWK0BEzg6990CN-U-xo8QbqWo1fMgjDjftboSpU=)Thank you for helping us do this important work,

clean_body: = Team, It’s Rep. Robin Kelly, and I’m proud to have served Illinois’ 2nd District in Congress since 2013. I’m also proud to be one of this year’s IDCCA Party Builder Award Honorees. I understand the power of local government, and the power of building a strong party – because I’ve spent my career doing it. I’ve had the honor of serving Illinois in the State House, as the Chief of Staff to the State Treasurer, and in the office of the Cook County President. I also previously served as Chair of the Democratic Party of Illinois – becoming the first woman and African American elected to that position. Here’s how I see it: the key to building our party is to focus on solutions that would uplift all communities, whether they’re urban, suburban, or rural. I believe that focusing on issues that matter most to folks, is the key to bringing them back to the Democratic party – issues like investing in infrastructure, creating jobs, gun violence prevention, and access to affordable, quality healthcare. = you for helping us do this important work, Rep. ## ****ACTION ALERT: **VOTE YES ON SJR 34******
******
****** SJR 34 by Senator Bryan Hughes would amend the Texas Constitution to recognize the fundamental right of parents to raise their children - including, but not limited to, being the sole decision maker for their medical care - without state intervention or interference and is being heard in the Senate State Affairs Committee on February 24.

TAKE ACTION NOW BY URGING MEMBERS OF THE SENATE COMMITTEE ON STATE AFFAIRS TO SUPPORT SJR 34!
**MAKE YOUR VOICE HEARD BY CONTACTING THE COMMITTEE MEMBERS! (Sample message is below)****
****1 - Email the Committee Members**
Bryan.Hughes@senate.texas.gov, Angela.Paxton@senate.texas.gov, Paul.Bettencourt@senate.texas.gov, Brian.Birdwell@senate.texas.gov, Bob.Hall@senate.texas.gov, Adam.Hinojosa@sentate.texas.gov, Mayes.Middleton@senate.texas.gov, Tan.parker@senate.texas.gov, Charles.Perry@senate.texas.gov, charles.schwertner@senate.texas.gov, Judith.Zaffrini@senate.texas.gov _*You are welcome to copy and paste all of the emails above in the TO: field of your draft to send just one email to all committee members at once. __
_**SAMPLE EMAIL MESSAGE:**
Dear Senator,

I am writing to you today to ask you to please support SJR 34 which is being heard in State Affairs on Monday, February 24.

This resolution would propose a constitutional amendment to protect the rights of parents when it comes to the medical decisions they make for their child(ren).

Thank you,
_[YOUR NAME]_

_Or use your own personal experience in your email to the committee regarding why parental rights should be constitutionally protected.
___**2 - Call the Committee Members **who are not authors and urge them to vote YES on SJR 34:**** Vice Chair Angela Paxton - 512-463-0108
Sen. Paul Bettencourt - 512-463-0107
Sen. Brian Birdwell - 512-463-0122
Sen. Bob Hall - 512-463-0102
Sen. Adam Hinojosa - 512-463-0127
Sen. Mayes Middleton - 512-463-0111
Sen. Tan Parker - 512-463-0112
Sen. Charles Perry - 512-463-0128
Sen. Charles Schwertner - 512-463-0105
Sen. Judith Zaffirini - 512-463-0121

**SAMPLE MESSAGE:** Please support SJR 34 to protect parental rights!__

name: Emily Randall
subject: Emily's Notes: Flooded with calls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
My office has been flooded with calls in the last few weeks in the wake of President Trump and Elon Musk’s cruel, damaging, and unconstitutional actions.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102529439/529461339/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.02.21_FebNewsletter_Exp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTJlNTUwNC03YWYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KyOJkoYBL5-f7rDa_rml1dzWCWYIiOkBVCyZP4rPcUU=&emci=ee002333-70f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=7e2e5504-7af0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=23483442) | Peter, Welcome to the latest edition of Emily’s Notes — updates from Washington’s 6th and Washington, D.C. Here’s what I’ve been up to: • **Answering your calls —** My office has been flooded with calls in the last few weeks in the wake of President Trump and Elon Musk’s cruel, damaging, and unconstitutional actions. It’s a frustrating and scary time, and my team is using every avenue to keep folks informed. In addition to [_**answering your calls**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102529440/529461340/117043979?hl=en&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.02.21_FebNewsletter_Exp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTJlNTUwNC03YWYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KyOJkoYBL5-f7rDa_rml1dzWCWYIiOkBVCyZP4rPcUU=&emci=ee002333-70f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=7e2e5504-7af0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=23483442), I joined [_**Senator Patty Murray on Instagram Live**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102529443/529461343/-2084297700?hl=en&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.02.21_FebNewsletter_Exp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTJlNTUwNC03YWYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KyOJkoYBL5-f7rDa_rml1dzWCWYIiOkBVCyZP4rPcUU=&emci=ee002333-70f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=7e2e5504-7af0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=23483442) to talk about the funding freeze and gave updates on the Oversight Committee _**[while prepping salad for the week.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102529446/529461346/-700182152?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.02.21_FebNewsletter_Exp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTJlNTUwNC03YWYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KyOJkoYBL5-f7rDa_rml1dzWCWYIiOkBVCyZP4rPcUU=&emci=ee002333-70f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=7e2e5504-7af0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=23483442)**_ _**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102529449/529461349/2101067860?hl=en&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.02.21_FebNewsletter_Exp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTJlNTUwNC03YWYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KyOJkoYBL5-f7rDa_rml1dzWCWYIiOkBVCyZP4rPcUU=&emci=ee002333-70f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=7e2e5504-7af0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=23483442)**_ • **Sharing your stories** — I represent more than 27,000 federal workers, many of them veterans. Shuttering USAID, freezing all grants, including Medicaid payments, slashing staff at PSNS and Veterans Affairs, and accessing our private data from the U.S. Treasury directly threaten my constituent’s lives and livelihoods. body:
Right now, right-wing special interests are pouring millions into Wisconsin to try to buy a seat on our Supreme Court.

| Peter,

I’m no stranger to how close statewide races in Wisconsin can be. Last fall, my race was the most expensive Senate race our state has ever seen — and it all came down to just a few votes. **This year, the stakes are just as high.**

**Right now, right-wing special interests are pouring millions into Wisconsin to try to buy a seat on our Supreme Court. And now, Elon Musk has weighed in—making it clear that the far right is all-in on flipping control of the court.**

clean_body: Right now, right-wing special interests are pouring millions into Wisconsin to try to buy a seat on our Supreme Court. | Peter, I’m no stranger to how close statewide races in Wisconsin can be. Last fall, my race was the most expensive Senate race our state has ever seen — and it all came down to just a few votes. This year, the stakes are just as high. Right now, right-wing special interests are pouring millions into Wisconsin to try to buy a seat on our Supreme Court. And now, Elon Musk has weighed in—making it clear that the far right is all-in on flipping control of the court. We can't let them win. We have a chance to elect Judge Susan Crawford, a dedicated public servant who will protect our rights and uphold the law. But with the GOP’s megadonors opening their checkbooks, we have to fight back with everything we’ve got. = | = | = | = | = | = Reproductive rights, funding for public education, voting rights, and so much more is on the line in this race. It’s already clear that this will not only be one of the closest races in the country, but it will also be the biggest race of 2025—and we know that every dollar makes a difference. If we all step up now, we can counter right-wing spending and keep Wisconsin’s Supreme Court fair and independent. = Thank you, Tammy * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. name: Team Lateefah
subject: They want you to think it’s over.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
https://www.lateefahsimon.com [https://www.lateefahsimon.com]
Hi Friend,
Lateefah didn’t come to Washington expecting business as usual — but nothing could have prepared us for this.
In just a few weeks, Trump and his billionaire cronies have turned our government into a feeding frenzy for the ultra-rich. Executive orders are flying, civil servants are being unjustly purged, and Musk is sitting at the head of the table with unchecked access to classified intelligence. Meanwhile, Republicans controlling the House, Senate, and White House are hell-bent on keeping it that way.
They want you to think it’s over. That they’ve won. That their unchecked power can’t be stopped. But they’re wrong.
We are not powerless.
✅ In the courts: Over two dozen lawsuits have already put a pause on Trump’s most extreme policies. More are on the way.
✅ In Congress: Lateefah and her colleagues are using their oversight power to investigate Musk’s illegal access to taxpayer information and Trump’s war on civil servants.
✅ Online: Public pressure works. With enough public outrage over a sudden freeze on essential federal grants and loans, a federal judge halted Trump’s funding freeze just minutes before it was meant to go into effect. The more we push this administration, the harder it is for them to get away with this chaos.
The fight isn’t in some distant future, it’s happening right NOW. And it’s just the beginning. With just ONE WEEK until our end-of-month fundraising deadline, will you chip in to help Lateefah keep up the fight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_022125_eom_a]
If you have saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately:

We won’t stop.
In Solidarity,
Team Lateefah

name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: I won’t mince words
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
Peter, I’ll be blunt: Donald Trump is preparing to act on his most extremist plans:

He said he has “every right” [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14] to imprison any government official he disagrees with.

He said he wouldn’t rule out “military force” [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14] to conquer Greenland and Panama.

He’s demanded Elon Musk cut “hundreds of billions” [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14] from critical social programs.

I won’t mince words: We have to prove to Donald Trump that our Democrats are ready to stop his extreme agenda at every turn. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

That’s why I need another 586 Democrats to step up and renew their 2025 Democratic Membership to build a grassroots movement strong enough to halt his agenda and completely humiliate him. Peter, can I count on you to chip in $14 before midnight to prove Democrats are fighting with everything we’ve got to stop Trump and hold him accountable for his extreme agenda? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

name: GOP Alerts
subject: We need you to DEFEND Elon & DOGE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
We need 1,000 patriots to defend Elon

| | | **[**Before you read this email, could you please sign your name in support of Elon Musk and D.O.G.E? We need 1,000 signatures before midnight tonight >>**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-n13L7kOLZVrlqLaIWA)
---
Peter,

The Democrats and their media lapdogs have found their next target: Elon Musk.

Just weeks into his leadership at DOGE, they’re already smearing him – calling him a _“Nazi,”_ accusing him of a _“coup,”_ and claiming he’s _“taking over the government.”_

Why? **Because he’s exposing their decades of wasteful spending and saving American taxpayers BILLIONS.**

And here’s the real reason they’re panicking: Elon is uncovering fraud that threatens the bureaucratic politicians’ secret slush funds! The loudest voices attacking him are the ones with the most to lose – and they’ll do anything to protect their corrupt schemes.

Instead of fixing the mess they created, they’re doing what they do best – attacking, distracting, and lying. But we’re not going to let them get away with it.

**[We’re collecting 1,000 signatures from American patriots to show the radical left that we STAND with Elon Musk and DOGE. Peter, will you be one of them?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-NWg5mxI98g)**
---
[ SIGN NOW](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-zpe5u-Bd7Ez3GA)
---
The attacks will only get worse. We need to show the left that the American people see through their lies and stand with the truth. [**Time is running out – add your name now!**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-qVkA)

America First,
GOP Alerts

name: Peggy Flanagan
subject: The big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdda4a328-0331-4e82-a841-0c27201ff64c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7fbb5764-72b2-42aa-9412-653626d190bb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, I want you to be the first to hear this: I’m officially launching my campaign to represent Minnesota in the U.S. Senate. I’d like to take a moment and tell you why I’ve decided to run for the Senate — but first, I need to ask: [will you split a $10 donation between Blue Amp Action and me today to become a Founding Donor to my campaign?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td1e9f4a1-ff49-480d-906d-2fca6c937a7f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tac93d0ce-c030-4af0-95a8-e83de18e9c12/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Throughout my life and career in state and local government, I’ve seen and lived the impact the federal government can have on people’s everyday lives. I was raised by a single mom in St. Louis Park. We had a home because of a Section 8 housing voucher, and public programs that helped my mom afford lunch at school, health insurance coverage, and child care. My lived experience has informed my belief that we should wrap our arms around our neighbors in need. I believe Minnesota is a potluck state. People can come from all walks of life, have different experiences, and yet share the same values. If it snows, we’ll shovel your driveway. If you move into the neighborhood, we’ll bring you a hotdish or bars. Now, I get to pay back the investments my neighbors made in my family through my career in public service. I’ve served on the Minneapolis School Board, in the Minnesota House, and now as Lieutenant Governor. It has been the honor of my lifetime to serve people from every walk of life and every corner of the state. Throughout my career, I’ve championed the kitchen-table issues that impact our children and families every day, including raising the minimum wage, paid family and medical leave, and free school meals. Peter, I’m a Minnesotan — not a D.C. insider. I’ve lived here my whole life, and my Ojibwe relatives have called this land home since time immemorial. If we win this race, I’ll become the first Native American woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate. [Peter, my Anishinaabe name, Gizhiiwewidamookwe, means ‘speaks in a loud and clear voice woman’. I’m asking for your help to speak in a loud and clear voice for all of Minnesota in the U.S. Senate. Can I count on you to split $10 between Blue Amp Action and me before midnight to become a Founding Donor to my campaign?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T58565601-6556-475c-b42d-1ff4aa0dc7b5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T299bc8ec-07ba-416a-94eb-f91d38e5948f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| With gratitude! 💚 Peggy Flanagan
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|

---|---
| **Blue Amp Action PAC**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20250221_campaignlaunch_b3_f1_s1_c1_90op_n-t1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T60f4bfd5-3c27-4efe-86ec-a48986992a0d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC

name: Lila Rose
subject: Is your pharmacy killing preborn children?
body:
Walgreens and CVS will begin selling the lethal abortion pill with a prescription this month.

| [ ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1mg40laqcpl0pmdl1ojqla7c4l7pl4sa73m7iu0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0chjm9pr2clh2bs)
---
#
Friend of Life, it's Lila Rose - Founder and President of Live Action. I have an urgent request.

Walgreens and CVS will begin selling the lethal abortion pill with a prescription this month.

This means that in pro-abortion states like California, Illinois, and Connecticut, a teen with a doctor's note can receive the deadly abortion pill in her local pharmacy, all without her parent's knowledge. Expansion of the abortion pill into local pharmacies has already killed tens of thousands of preborn children.

The U.S. Supreme Court will soon hear the most important pro-life case since overturning Roe v. Wade. The Court will decide whether dangerous telemedicine abortions and the distribution of abortion pills by mail and pharmacies can continue nationwide.

We need to raise our voices now while there is still time. I'm looking for 100 people to give before midnight. Can you be one of them?

You will mobilize parents, grandparents, and pro-life people with the truth by donating right now. No other pro-life organization has the online reach we do. That's why your gift of $50 before midnight will alert more than 1700 people about this agenda of death. Give now using this secure link:
[****https://give.liveaction.org/expansion-abortion-pill/****](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zgij4182javmnvfj84uhiujgad4embeqdtta47h8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0chjm9pr2clh2bs)

If you don't speak out right now against the abortion pill in your local pharmacy, you may never get the chance to again.

Thank you for standing with us against this agenda of death before it comes to your local pharmacy!

For Life,

Lila Rose
**President and Founder**

[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zg5u21mdr88h250a9oj2q5ln6umk53hor3mdo2m0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0chjm9pr2clh2bs)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201

name: Jimmy Patronis [FL-01 Special Election GOP Nominee]
subject: As of 8:07 PM Tuesday, Jan 28th…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
House Republicans are BARELY clinging to their Majority and control of the House.
I’m officially the GOP nominee for the FL-01 Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz in Congress.
| |
---
| | | Hi - my name is Jimmy Patronis.

**As of 8:07 PM Tuesday, January 28th, I 'm officially the GOP nominee for the FL-01 Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz in Congress.** I'm honored to have the trust of voters AND of President Trump whose endorsement helped put me over the top.

While I'm over the moon to be here today, I'm also reminded of the stakes of this Special Election...

House Republicans are BARELY clinging to their Majority and control of the House. I'll say this in a different way: If Democrats manage to win this Special Election and the two others for Mike Waltz and Elise Stefanik, they'll sweep back into power THIS YEAR.

That's why I'm working with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to sweep all three Special Elections - and save our Majority - so we can deliver on President Trump's agenda.

**_[If you want to support these critical efforts, I humbly ask every Conservative in America to kick in a few bucks before my Special Election.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=3c2ea368aa6746188ad0822b59c01fec&_e=pujgn8PeWdp4wGfYwNMZc0BLGet_iiokc9t_HgzDgaJtWY0LibBD6j7Gl402dK6yDGnBcv6OkaEfAquux12s8NHuVAtNmIgLe-yb7R0efHjgBg39-TQWcdaXxtnCS-YNFKy-Qcq0QmF2-z1UD907xH6gfvZfu1ebjgNYdKDFhO0mlBW9tC4BXKG6e-f6hZSW4iodDjc95WMenefqZmX62dpDXsLllb9CY99pCjrdZWBw1670KV1WCLgb9NNecrMB40FWCW71EuI_l29_TRPhy2WX4IoRlMEkKmyD51Ude5BFTYJYLGB-F49cx42R1VR2mIEjTP4PCVulNjYpvEAKkBNZKzE0lWfGIwhAN4cE-F2fsDhfqR6BZOIc5_9HYxLdvRJv-tCbBrQlke3gj2RA2-xSPBhIChnFF5jlINOQfzg%3D "If you want to support these critical efforts, I humbly ask every Conservative in America to kick in a few bucks before my Special Election. ")_**

_Would you be willing to step up when we need you most? _
---

Serving the State of Florida has been an honor of a lifetime. I went from refilling ketchup bottles at my family's seafood restaurant to being the CFO and Fire Marshal for the Sunshine State, and now being the Trump-endorsed GOP nominee to replace MAGA Warrior Matt Gaetz.

But I can only take this experience to Congress if I defeat the Democrats in this race.

Special Elections are notoriously expensive and Democrats are desperate to win back the House. **_[That's why I'm teaming up with Leader Scalise to help raise $50,000 from this email alone in the next 24 hours.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=3c2ea368aa6746188ad0822b59c01fec&_e=pujgn8PeWdp4wGfYwNMZc0BLGet_iiokc9t_HgzDgaJtWY0LibBD6j7Gl402dK6yDGnBcv6OkaEfAquux12s8NHuVAtNmIgLe-yb7R0efHjgBg39-TQWcdaXxtnCS-YNFKy-Qcq0QmF2-z1UD907xH6gfvZfu1ebjgNYdKDFhO0mlBW9tC4BXKG6e-f6hZSW4iodDjc95WMenefqZmX62dpDXsLllb9CY99pCjrdZWBw1670KV1WCLgb9NNecrMB63pfurOhG645LsbvbdY-hP6JQaOI4966xqSHK-bRANKrvY4cRHVYNOvhEd4ybqFBWyhP7FvpZYhoXwwMHxmAlrg6FTqMle4RZ30ksFytaQOSnfznfDQukcZhcJfceigWfF3G6YUWG70m3m0h8y87g6liXAIRI6zGBdIEh0ELhV4%3D "That’s why I’m teaming up with Leader Scalise to help raise $50,000 from this email alone in the next 24 hours.")_**

I JUST won my primary so hitting this goal so quickly would be a major show of force in this race.

**I know we can get there as long as everyone reading this agrees to send in just ten or twenty bucks. Can you do that for me?** ****[**YES >>**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=3c2ea368aa6746188ad0822b59c01fec&_e=pujgn8PeWdp4wGfYwNMZc0BLGet_iiokc9t_HgzDgaJtWY0LibBD6j7Gl402dK6yDGnBcv6OkaEfAquux12s8NHuVAtNmIgLe-yb7R0efHjgBg39-TQWcdaXxtnCS-YNFKy-Qcq0QmF2-z1UD907xH6gfvZfu1ebjgNYdKDFhO0mlBW9tC4BXKG6e-f6hZSW4iodDjc95WMenefqZmX62dpDXsLllb9CY99pCjrdZWBw1670KV1WCLgb9NNecrMBP8agiJO5ekMNAAUbPoP1j6dpM7gmVZW5WVhIkWF0A_Ec1gOZGFA2jpCDgGPilHN-zPHKtWRx22-_VqogDdQD4txd56wGp2pPSoE2t4HiXS-D55d3ni7M7AlsKKCOGkto166EVUPtjVtzIhuwapC-2WpwwB-Rh5kwMLVUd5uOy5I%3D)_[**NO >>**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=3c2ea368aa6746188ad0822b59c01fec&_e=pujgn8PeWdp4wGfYwNMZc0BLGet_iiokc9t_HgzDgaJtWY0LibBD6j7Gl402dK6yDGnBcv6OkaEfAquux12s8NHuVAtNmIgLe-yb7R0efHjgBg39-TQWcdaXxtnCS-YNFKy-Qcq0QmF2-z1UD907xH6gfvZfu1ebjgNYdKDFhO0mlBW9tC4BXKG6e-f6hZSW4iodDjc95WMenefqZmX62dpDXsLllb9CY99pCjrdZWBw1670KV1WCLgb9NNecrMBBfYc932bKf0YkTaFxz0sIqZ6refEhEe6-64ZSM_JWgrSnFrO3KvNAh6wxYVBq-GX2f6FDevIj2CT2CYAhap-QCqEy1Uwi6Q1Yy03E_RW_qc7PduJV1cYY0x_Pqd9n6TqE8Mf68YHU5WOmlfrI1RfsYL_F-n_kCu9VYzEIQpxHX4%3D)****Thank you for hearing me out.

I look forward to fighting for the America First values that you, me, President Trump, Leader Scalise, and Matt Gaetz believe in.

God bless you,
_- Jimmy_

**JIMMY PATRONIS**
GOP Nominee for the FL-01 Special Election

Our democracy doesn’t work if the executive branch decides that the separation of powers doesn’t exist.
Trump, Vance, and Musk have spent the last few weeks flagrantly violating the law. We need to take the threat of them going further seriously.
**I’m not going to sit around and wait for this to get even worse. I’m on the ground right now, organizing our state to push back against this coup. But in a battleground state like Pennsylvania, that makes me a target for the GOP.**
[Republicans are going to spend big money here next cycle in order to beat me. Can I count on you to help me fight back by chipping in right now? Your support makes a major difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102533655/529473554/-1030828174?amount=10&source=AD_021925_EM_FR_1_2_Courts&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2VhYjZlYy04MGYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a5bX1kMq4kT_TiQ3LpJy1W2c1fU5QsdI82hz5FA7ghc=)

Austin Davis
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

subject: Here are 5 ways Trump is weaker than he looks

body:
Voters are not buying what they are selling. | | | Peter, It’s only been a month since Trump took office again. And despite what you might have heard, voters are _not_ buying what he’s selling. Here are five ways Trump is weaker than he looks: 1\. He has the second-lowest approval rating of any president in modern polling history at this point in their term... _second only to himself_.1 [ ](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9xrzuu3x_xcxjaf9I4_7KIKh2h-fGW9f8tuwAKUFUP2-GpgqHSrfFqYMbbxpuinQuGi8c2Ej9GuS1-Qz4F-cke0aA-IlanGrz2srxkFKM4TJ4nCk8ATlK3HwGfS2D9_Ec6v3geClPjxD0T36CvdR-6aL_VEhQweAWLAAUROcVpg2EGcx-u-HeUTRCh-8V0ON1a13IflPaFrREAjjatqa-NSmWXFhjddXdjLrW7vbPe9zqUy33CXgKNiwOlGAEFfpxh-9t0BvLlTjNg3jz5pOKncVBNGELyZlydUVzeHWE8ays5-b-mgkgUFZ7hMlCv_ozEkZrx1bu4h7L_gAKIKJgUeJ6zsOJIvpizphO2xTpiwJHCt576S54RaAWyk3DU05M/4e7/ihXefiWiQJy3QjBJ0YKVwQ/h0/h001.k2yqcxnkosQ4nQnT2UIvvuGyo2oYec4MZ7rc-vElBYI) 2\. He’s the weakest he has _ever_ been on the issue of the economy, going back to 2017.2 [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9xrzuu3x_xcxjaf9I4_7KIKh2h-fGW9f8tuwAKUFUP2-GpgqHSrfFqYMbbxpuinQu5ELpX1ZsQrLbDSNSLwa726R9mpB-NWiH-Sa8z9N6FYxscYb823HSv776KTl4r1QlXvpGTXfppFVOfsHW2wqvZH3A5lI0hBRrGI-tt1OnOvhzfLVzTtMT6QYcQjbhY6DibCgMTZezgnkI55BWy9U94xXYYs_NmuNJSzl-T4xY1XTpWfdx6s-Exub2Vwq0Fb2FhNuPuOp8OaYOwAII9XHxCBDSalVmo50iX_2JO08KKHhj3AJMIFjiGoahdLev6qWSqX3pFMP5EdmPqSEloSsat1OpO_6CnLoiFX3Hhr3NQAoKbQFjQ9wBbMI6puO3o9IQ/4e7/ihXefiWiQJy3QjBJ0YKVwQ/h1/h001.CqEApppvTiMNE4TbvQQ2yfyzrSySXqZ_31R60o-kcrk)[](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9xrzuu3x_xcxjaf9I4_7KIKh2h-fGW9f8tuwAKUFUP2-GpgqHSrfFqYMbbxpuinQum0gu8-OzbSsuE2Ol6VmBzDMKQOOoqpZK_lz9sUNxK9QqjfhuPuQ-kAAaTTFAZS4i6PLlEqtiP3xuYzQkW9xO5HH89qJFxwTtgRfqEXaT7E7k8lVThzLbs5-ver_VP5Qlyhvmi7dl1lZfUTeZ00-4dmekaiCYhCffFANJVMTtFW-u81Th2Q_QXZxKT-dCPe1Px7ipin7z2_0jc3MzCC_dfzWK8V5TBFLFia3hhOr3rlf87h8E2zCL8YIPE67L8t5F5676imB49Zi469mApf72hjlp9NPYp8mVGa4kPvO3gnLo75uMuJgOFS9BFi4URudw/4e7/ihXefiWiQJy3QjBJ0YKVwQ/h2/h001.ejg7axH51tegGcQD28hbLxaGum__JrFG__lEAaKJSkY) 3\. His other policies and actions? _Also unpopular_.3 [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9xrzuu3x_xcxjaf9I4_7KIKh2h-fGW9f8tuwAKUFUP2-GpgqHSrfFqYMbbxpuinQuUrlARgW5eemYB9bEaMkSa0KdOayMPkpgsUZmjFVJ74WEmT7obPDLf_xon6eC43lTlxfS7wbAa_JXGyoA3ytz1rw1MXZVWpvCXKvOTvGUrCD-IkmrLhzRHLxjjgMkLy2RUpTW54q0BcxBqBzwOV56Zc6rV1tavvjxiCrpFe3ODXxKoKgR93RYiDOO1pTo7orvkIeh_hWzGmWigh4mE8Jw1i9kf8-VsWFzasl0-lvoQVrxA_i8_l2atfHwyi8REvK1IUxTYb7RdDn7AGpyeKpC1Wy4CK7LdHUkkv7gzw4lITBRNpbzRYxoQlbezNPqLfdS/4e7/ihXefiWiQJy3QjBJ0YKVwQ/h3/h001.eD52AwcXdIJZs5bQA1FxvGqb-fwfsALXxpOqGPTf0-A) 4\. He’s losing support among younger voters.4 [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9xrzuu3x_xcxjaf9I4_7KIKh2h-fGW9f8tuwAKUFUP2-GpgqHSrfFqYMbbxpuinQuKO8qdqsYNXDoOaFsW6HSHI7GbRzrjXN5AxBES4_BOISNiyf6iv4V13q_qZLKtnvYVykwRUsKLZn53vlHiLfztmvmxeOwOAcMJEPL_9Y7MLj2ga6eKeuVG-t73gkpwI-InyYj6xRpEsDhygXtagaB9rfRAtGRmAJvb88Vmy7hwO7Ayh2jU_fIRJNdyDYqSf3k890c5DS7Iti2sInWCBB8CbqJic3Qwc07-AJ6DXv3fQE0zOL9pZsSk6c9fCxtkrne_FiFjTDKbYME7KpZ-dCe9inAnYngkPSYUXyZkw37sMXPo0cYwl_YcHDd9fQQPM0f/4e7/ihXefiWiQJy3QjBJ0YKVwQ/h4/h001.EjOK-XjmuvIkFdhrsilTfsKna55mw0OofyC1-LGxsDo) 5\. And the billionaires he's letting loose to destroy the government and steal billions from working people? _Even more unpopular_ :5 [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9xrzuu3x_xcxjaf9I4_7KIKh2h-fGW9f8tuwAKUFUP2-GpgqHSrfFqYMbbxpuinQu2GAb_4kO2bN7szZ03TgsZIPyfyRbHdP9q_as5FXUjwaMqWMnZAdbAowKwGIVPBqK1sV9KUi8eSgZQKD-VAdWE709jn3oRf-yz_yO-GgpL2KyOSaxjM8wgM_bE-NH0cKr2MlKuIjafpz7y4Rj2asi4dNCkeMyfRQpJWnMMDlHUCFjKlfbbxQS3q_dTc2ddFHwPfvX0rAyPftZcHtnrpHWmtxE4y-X1yhxXVfoihvNqBVlMW8_4uL9MXGCtmzooflQIww0wSRNtCPAMaUtlSwQNIB1KiA65PVwqopoy1hN9glNJjZTkfySjzrih41kpFh2/4e7/ihXefiWiQJy3QjBJ0YKVwQ/h5/h001.rsIT7LFREktEuJQDG_Zsg3S3hveWCpYPlwfwJoigJCw) There has been a lot of noise from pundits about how _everything_ Trump is doing these last few weeks must be what voters wanted to see. And we all know polls like these are just snapshots. **But this doesn’t look anything like a "mandate" to us.** All the executive orders, illegal cuts, brazen corruption and intimidation we’ve seen from Trump and Musk and Republicans so far? **They’re only doing it because they _know_ how unpopular their ideas actually are.** Next week, House Republicans are voting on a budget resolution that would pave the way for massive cuts to crucial programs like Medicaid, SNAP, and more. The task in front of us is clear: We’re going to stay rooted in our values while organizing the majority of working people in this country who want to stop them in their tracks. We’re going to keep building political power at every level for the multiracial working class. We're going to hold Republicans accountable and push them to vote "no" on this budget that would be devastating for working families — **[including on our next virtual phonebank Tuesday 2/22 at 12pm ET](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdJxZAP5xLg1YZaKIinIFmIxfYrd-GXiaikPtbheHz3zoDMZSfmGlhG5Hha9IzabNNFTIvCkbEMJ24PpM2Ey6WTYtZPiigXNL8clR0fhThWFC1q4y8ZLQWezzXDnlu-BQo4ZJFVF5oBfvrMbzxKM_-aaNULsNQ0zuhG1bgMo8Ah6Yi6se43binTp4aa6Mm6vQof3iQqd5SeRedI2k68GbzFbTBgOITC7Op91gl1oFhiOrEbj4BfdS5RQkeAf8CmUutzgkNDT5yLsLEk8M9tskE2X/4e7/ihXefiWiQJy3QjBJ0YKVwQ/h6/h001.iZuVhJZZ6JohlgNyM5zuCxGXZKqkNiWFB4lZgtxk28M)** — and keep pushing Democrats to do everything they can. **And we’re going to do it all knowing we can’t wait on anyone to save us but ourselves.** [**Can you let us know you’re with us? Every contribution you are able to make matters in this fight, whether it’s your time, your ideas, or your financial support.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9xrzuu3x_xcxjaf9I4_7KIKh2h-fGW9f8tuwAKUFUP2-GpgqHSrfFqYMbbxpuinQuNPpcjb54YuTuI4eadrIP5-FJldn8z3nv0FR4Ek6Md3BAyjxVjtzQK3gSfrqgCJwBIZag1OsXKslxLh9MuV8vWe2JW7q5YVjSloBJdtm1Xj389EFDuJNeEl8K_XTLfQC3K_goYYdcBeL0T5ict4FVV8LkPNQUNZK7jf5H9vjABNWkMvo3_EBZx1FgdFBJlXmjAecoHwjnSetlk0SIopLwpySOsMZm4rGIwM_yrJP2cvroWvM1eKCXTx1pKWVE3xX0kYgv-Pb9Db6aEGE9JI3h0wFv68mP9f9CGES0B-qp-aFAJAXhb5BkHnrjM6a_ahuN/4e7/ihXefiWiQJy3QjBJ0YKVwQ/h7/h001.yIwv_kL-XNMtAUVydfxsmwzWh1ypyfXphTBjMe8Pquw) clean_body: Voters are not buying what they are selling. | | | Peter, It’s only been a month since Trump took office again. And despite what you might have heard, voters are not buying what he’s selling. Here are five ways Trump is weaker than he looks: 1\. He has the second-lowest approval rating of any president in modern polling history at this point in their term... second only to himself.1 2\. He’s the weakest he has ever been on the issue of the economy, going back to 2017.2 3\. His other policies and actions? Also unpopular.3 4\. He’s losing support among younger voters.4 5\. And the billionaires he's letting loose to destroy the government and steal billions from working people? Even more unpopular :5 There has been a lot of noise from pundits about how everything Trump is doing these last few weeks must be what voters wanted to see. And we all know polls like these are just snapshots. But this doesn’t look anything like a "mandate" to us. All the executive orders, illegal cuts, brazen corruption and intimidation we’ve seen from Trump and Musk and Republicans so far? They’re only doing it because they know how unpopular their ideas actually are. Next week, House Republicans are voting on a budget resolution that would pave the way for massive cuts to crucial programs like Medicaid, SNAP, and more. The task in front of us is clear: We’re going to stay rooted in our values while organizing the majority of working people in this country who want to stop them in their tracks. We’re going to keep building political power at every level for the multiracial working class. We're going to hold Republicans accountable and push them to vote "no" on this budget that would be devastating for working families — — and keep pushing Democrats to do everything they can. And we’re going to do it all knowing we can’t wait on anyone to save us but ourselves. The truth is they are weaker than they look, Peter. And every new Working Families Party member, every volunteer shift, and every donation of any amount helps bring us closer to blocking them and building the kind of movement we need to win for working people. In solidarity, Working Families Party Sources: 1\. , Washington Post, February 17, 2025 2\. , Reuters, February 19, 2025 3\. , Quinnipiac Poll, February 19, 2025 4\. , Independent UK, February 13, 2025 5\. , Data for Progress, February 11, 2025 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Here's our plan to take back the House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Peter,

Here’s our plan to win back the House:

1) Stand up for the working and middle class. Trump won the 2024 election based on promises that he can’t keep. He already broke his promise to bring down the cost of food on day 1 and now he is firing some of his own voters from their jobs. We must call Trump out on this hypocrisy with a daily press conference at the Capitol.

2) Flip 3 House seats to reclaim the Majority. We can do it. There are at least 8 toss-up seats held by Republicans – AZ-01, AZ-06, CO-08, IA-01, MI-07, NE-02, PA-07, and PA-10. We have to invest early and fight to win. We should start running ads now in these districts, laying out what Republicans are cutting.

3) Use our bully pulpit. We must be on every podcast, every media program, and in people's living rooms to show what we will deliver when we win –

✅ Create a $15 minimum wage
✅ Invest in affordable housing
✅ Increase social security
✅ Stop price-gouging
✅ Root out political corruption

This is not a lost cause. We can win. We can take back the House and deliver for the American people. Can you rush a $17 donation to my campaign right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2026-house-fundraiser?refcode=20250221-lift&amount=17]

DONATE $17 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2026-house-fundraiser?refcode=20250221-lift&amount=17]

We can do this.

Thank you for your support, your activism, and everything you do.

Onward,
Ro

Yesterday marked one month since Donald Trump returned to the White House — and what we’ve witnessed since has been nothing short of a chaotic constitutional crisis. There’s a silver lining, though: Our courts are holding down the line against Trump and Musk’s illegal overreaches, and we’re building up our resources to flip the House blue in 2026 and issue a critical check on Trump’s power. * * *
_Forwarded Message from George Latimer:_
Peter, it’s George.
One month ago, today, we witnessed the second inauguration of Donald Trump before he returned to the White House as President of the United States.
Since then, Donald Trump and his Co-President Elon Musk have unleashed a wave of unconstitutional chaos over Washington and the entire country — the likes of which we’ve never seen before.
Not only has he attacked the incredible progress we’ve made these past four years, but he’s systematically undermined our federal government by dismantling critical agencies, firing thousands of federal workers without cause, attempted to erase birthright citizenship, and completely ignored the rule of law every step of the way.
We’ve got a message to this administration: **Following the Constitution isn’t a recommendation. It’s not optional. It’s the law of the land,_and they will be held accountable._**

Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, did you get George’s message to you? Yesterday marked one month since Donald Trump returned to the White House — and what we’ve witnessed since has been nothing short of a chaotic constitutional crisis. There’s a silver lining, though: Our courts are holding down the line against Trump and Musk’s illegal overreaches, and we’re building up our resources to flip the House blue in 2026 and issue a critical check on Trump’s power. = | | = Forwarded Message from George Latimer: Peter, it’s George. One month ago, today, we witnessed the second inauguration of Donald Trump before he returned to the White House as President of the United States. Since then, Donald Trump and his Co-President Elon Musk have unleashed a wave of unconstitutional chaos over Washington and the entire country — the likes of which we’ve never seen before. Not only has he attacked the incredible progress we’ve made these past four years, but he’s systematically undermined our federal government by dismantling critical agencies, firing thousands of federal workers without cause, attempted to erase birthright citizenship, and completely ignored the rule of law every step of the way. We’ve got a message to this administration: Following the Constitution isn’t a recommendation. It’s not optional. It’s the law of the land,and they will be held accountable. name: Mandela Barnes
subject: This is bad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
“A group with ties to Elon Musk is pouring more than $1 million into Wisconsin’s upcoming Supreme Court race”
#
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-wi-sc-25.Q_KG1S&refcode=em250221-1-210&t=1&akid=5488%2E196590%2ErPokMY)
Friend, I want you to read the first sentence from this Politico article:
_“A group with ties to Elon Musk is pouring more than $1 million into Wisconsin’s upcoming Supreme Court race — a sign that even as Musk races to overhaul Washington, his influence extends beyond it.”_
This is bad.
Just this week we told you that Elon Musk was spending hundreds of thousands of dollars in Wisconsin. Now that number is up to as much as **_$1.5 million in advertising spending._**
Look, Elon is already unleashing chaos in Washington, illegally slashing the federal budget and infiltrating agencies and data systems. He’s acting like an unelected dictator so he can take benefits away from working class Americans and make himself richer.
Now he wants to bring his vast fortune, far-right views, and massive misinformation operation to Wisconsin so he can install a majority on the state Supreme Court that will do his bidding.
So here’s the deal. **We are supporting Judge Susan Crawford in this race because she believes in democracy.** She believes that things like accessible voting, reproductive care, and collective bargaining are hard-earned rights that can’t be taken away.
We are hoping you can join us as we get out the vote for Judge Crawford.
[**Please, make a contribution of $5 or whatever you can afford today, split between The Long Run and Susan Crawford, and help us fight back against the massive Elon-backed advertising blitz in Wisconsin. This race is a must-win if we are to protect our democracy and the progress we’ve made in Wisconsin.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-wi-sc-25.Q_KG1S&refcode=em250221-1-210&t=2&akid=5488%2E196590%2ErPokMY)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

Mandela

# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Peter, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism -- mostly the latter -- and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today 's media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.
---
[ **Join the Sun for 1 ¢ ->**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=053f610d8404477dbc5411c27e0691ed&_e=5G936c1ctulu6MDK2vF84611Y3tshyGwaUN4eS2Fy6H0-DurGitrZHe06F647od6z5WFgM6G8YhOQxKa_v2Fs1SjOS7LGxj3KISD2erW-l-mj5T1c1Loke9FNP_o5HAGnlPog0ZNaQ3_xmIUKaMeeGNnN4dxtO5ir8UFImgbhl2_KlLVnfDnfkj4oVBkiJoqDU1Rzaw_uJkQK6fCimkJ6AX2UJJcYHrHGCACrmldmbbmuqUExByKUFM7lZ5a8fnrS7HA1ELgXesszJAsNW3uArT6vN0Q80fgiWLHEiMnZBRDJuvThDPWTjiS5ERl9ZqgFhuUGTxiY-zu2I9zFlFag1S9MTZLeKrrwXmV3SN_UKx5N6yB2qt6ttWamDSUlQbge-OF5uCYKUSjnaYREWc7loOoqVikMO_0S20dd73qIFr8VcMghuvaYnAhVNnh0zLt)
---
Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun's deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I've been impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun 's success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don't wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

name: JanePAC
subject: NYT: Trump plans to cut disaster relief staff by 84%
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Communities devastated by climate disasters would be left scrambling for help.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102534957/529477064/1328794144?refcode=ea.d4ba7016-83f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.d4ba7016-83f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ0YmE3MDE2LTgzZjAtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Bfru1d-_GW-EmfI2MxJ_h2JBSGEZHHIVkqghCAwUpgI=&emci=c9ba7016-83f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=d4ba7016-83f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4823105)
---
Another day, another blatant assault on disaster relief. **Donald Trump is now planning massive cuts to staff in the office that helps communities rebuild after the worst climate catastrophes.** The Office of Community Planning and Development, part of the U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD), steps in when FEMA funding isn’t enough. This is the office that helps families rebuild their homes and get back on their feet after large-scale disasters. It’s the same office that helped recovery efforts after Hurricane Helene in North Carolina and Hurricane Milton in Florida. Trump plans to cut its staff from _936 to 150_. And when the next disaster strikes, communities would be left scrambling, waiting for help that may never come. **[If we’re going to stop Trump’s dangerous agenda and protect our communities, we need to elect more climate champions at every level — chip in now to help make it happen.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102534959/529477065/2105508926?refcode=ea.d4ba7016-83f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.d4ba7016-83f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ0YmE3MDE2LTgzZjAtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Bfru1d-_GW-EmfI2MxJ_h2JBSGEZHHIVkqghCAwUpgI=)** **Make no mistake — this is a direct assault on communities hit hardest by the climate crisis.** Congress created HUD to rebuild homes, fix roads, restore water systems, and ensure that working-class communities aren’t left behind in the wake of our country’s worst disasters. Who would benefit from these DOGE-ordered cuts? Not you. Not families trying to recover from climate disasters. Billionaires and fossil fuel executives, on the other hand, are getting everything they want. Trump is slashing climate disaster funding so he can hand out more tax breaks to Big Oil. He’s taking money away from communities trying to survive and giving it to the industries fueling these disasters in the first place. That’s why our fight is urgent. **The climate crisis is here. It’s fueling deadlier storms and bigger disasters every year. clean_body: Communities devastated by climate disasters would be left scrambling for help. | Another day, another blatant assault on disaster relief. Donald Trump is now planning massive cuts to staff in the office that helps communities rebuild after the worst climate catastrophes. The Office of Community Planning and Development, part of the U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD), steps in when FEMA funding isn’t enough. This is the office that helps families rebuild their homes and get back on their feet after large-scale disasters. It’s the same office that helped recovery efforts after Hurricane Helene in North Carolina and Hurricane Milton in Florida. Trump plans to cut its staff from 936 to 150. And when the next disaster strikes, communities would be left scrambling, waiting for help that may never come. = Make no mistake — this is a direct assault on communities hit hardest by the climate crisis. Congress created HUD to rebuild homes, fix roads, restore water systems, and ensure that working-class communities aren’t left behind in the wake of our country’s worst disasters. Who would benefit from these DOGE-ordered cuts? Not you. Not families trying to recover from climate disasters. Billionaires and fossil fuel executives, on the other hand, are getting everything they want. Trump is slashing climate disaster funding so he can hand out more tax breaks to Big Oil. He’s taking money away from communities trying to survive and giving it to the industries fueling these disasters in the first place. That’s why our fight is urgent. The climate crisis is here. It’s fueling deadlier storms and bigger disasters every year. We need real leaders in office who will protect our communities — not cast them aside. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let’s go. ## No accountability, no price to pay
Earlier this week I wrote about the on-going feud between the White House and the Associated Press. I tried to explain how there was way more to the story than the left wing legacy media shared.
Today, though my concern about the media is much greater. For all of their talk about the spread of "misinformation" the lack of accountability within their own ranks continues to grow.
On Sunday, CBS' Face the Nation moderator Margaret Brennan used a premeditated attack line on Secretary of State Marco Rubio to claim the Holocaust was a result of a free speech issues in Germany. Seriously. Not a joke folks.
I say premeditated because that's exactly what it was. Every week she clearly plots a line of attack against her Republican guest. Paddy cake with the Democrat guest "how are you, why is Donald Trump so bad and evil, thanks for coming on?" and full on spider money attack to the Republican guest.
While Rubio put on a masterclass of a response, Brennan's false claims on the Holocaust hung out there with no clean up -- no apology. No nothing. In fact she ended by saying we are out time, see you next week. No follow up tweet or statement to clean up her "misinformation."
As someone who has made some VERY public mistakes and misstaments two things stood out.
First, my mistakes were just that, screws up -- this, however, was a preplanned attack. She did not make this up on the fly.
Second, all of the folks that called me out for a mistake - Democrats, the media, and faux outrage leftist groups like the Anti Defamation League and Southern Poverty Law Center were SILENT. They said nothing, nada, zero. In my case, the rebuke was swift and loud - from many sides. I could not escape the follow up - she has faced practically nothing.
Not one of her colleagues, no one at CBS had a thing to say.
But it got worse as the week went on.
It was almost like CBS was intentionally trying to tank itself.
Let me explain...

Peter — Now that Elon Musk has endorsed right-wing candidate Brad Schimel for the Wisconsin Supreme Court, a PAC not-so-secretly funded by the billionaire is spending big to try to elect Schimel and flip control of the court to the conservatives:
## _**Politico**_ : “A group with ties to Elon Musk is pouring more than $1 million into Wisconsin’s upcoming Supreme Court race — a sign that even as Musk races to overhaul Washington, his influence extends beyond it.”
**We’ve endorsed Schimel’s opponent, Judge Susan Crawford, as one of our Democracy Defenders. And we need every member of this grassroots team to step up now, while there’s still time to make an impact on this bellwether race and elections across the country.** [**Rush a $30 donation today to help elect Democracy Defenders like Judge Crawford and power the NDRC’s democracy-saving work nationwide.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102535196/529477688/-1665762292?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_ElonFRWisconsinLiftnote_email_20250221-NDRC-Tier1-ElonFRWisconsinLiftnote_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250221-NDRC-Tier1-ElonFRWisconsinLiftnote_&utm_campaign=ElonFRWisconsinLiftnote&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNmYTIzYWE1LTgyZjAtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IrEYyoEm-dBalpX6srf5jQA_L4YVnZZ3bGRplTgjavE=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

— NDRC Team
* * *
Peter, Elon Musk recently weighed in on the race that will decide control of the Wisconsin Supreme Court.
Musk took time away from his furious attempts to dismantle the federal government to throw his support behind conservative candidate Brad Schimel while spouting outlandish claims of voter fraud.
The NDRC is proud to have endorsed Judge Susan Crawford in this race — Musk’s endorsement of her opponent, and his reliance on anti-democratic claims of voter fraud, only reinforce that decision.
Here’s why this development is concerning: **There’s already so much money pouring into this race — now, the richest man in the world is getting involved to try to secure a majority for conservatives on Wisconsin’s highest court. **
The work we do together over the next 46 days just got so much more important.
[**Your donation today will help power all of the NDRC’s work, including these critical efforts to help elect our endorsed Democracy Defenders like Judge Crawford.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102535205/529477697/-1665762292?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_ElonFRWisconsinLiftnote_email_20250221-NDRC-Tier1-ElonFRWisconsinLiftnote_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250221-NDRC-Tier1-ElonFRWisconsinLiftnote_&utm_campaign=ElonFRWisconsinLiftnote&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNmYTIzYWE1LTgyZjAtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IrEYyoEm-dBalpX6srf5jQA_L4YVnZZ3bGRplTgjavE=)

The stakes of this race are sky-high, but we know how to win in the Badger State. In 2023, our grassroots movement helped deliver a resounding win for democracy in Wisconsin’s state supreme court race. Voters elected now-Justice Janet Protasiewicz by a double-digit margin, making it clear that they’ve had enough of conservatives’ anti-democratic power grabs.
_The New York Times_ is predicting this year’s race will be “a pitched political battle” — one that “is likely to be even more partisan, negative and expensive than the 2023 election, whose $56 million price tag shattered national spending records for a judicial contest.”
**With a billionaire like Musk wading into races like this one, we can’t risk getting blown out of the water in spending. We’re counting on every member of this grassroots team to step up if you can. **
