name: Eric Teetsel
subject: We’re shaping policy at the highest levels.
body:
Friends, Change is actually happening in Washington. The Trump Administration has been taking an axe to waste, fraud, and abuse at USAID, the CF... | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/americarenewing.com/were-on-the-offensive-10707762?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | | Friends,

Change is _actually_ happening in Washington.

The Trump Administration has been taking an axe to waste, fraud, and abuse at USAID, the CFPB, and a litany of other federal agencies. President Trump is reestablishing Constitutional control over the executive branch, dangerous illegal alien criminals are being deported, and we finally have a President putting American First on the world stage.

**I’m proud to say the policy proposals we are putting forward at the Center** are shaping these policies at the highest levels, and the left-wing press is taking notice. This week _Politico_ published a feature piece spotlighting the Center as one of several select think tanks having an outsized influence on policy prescriptions coming out of the Administration.

As I told _Politico_ , “ _We believe in timeless truths and principles, but we are also not wedded to the same policy prescriptions of a bygone era because we’re new. So we’re able to apply those timeless truths and principles to the questions of today and be nimble._ ”
---
| [ ](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=a5955f18cc&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| The piece went on to directly link to our policy work as evidence of our influence, and cited one anonymous former administration official who described our work as a “sniper shot” and “really targeted.”

>From the [piece](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=6a421f7c0d&e=17913c7d6d):

“ _In the last week or so, CRA issued white papers making an intellectual case for[ending birthright citizenship](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=0c500fe36f&e=17913c7d6d), [curbing non-governmental organizations](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=59bbe69d33&e=17913c7d6d) and [remaking NATO](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=de3d244acb&e=17913c7d6d) — as well as [shutting down](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=0600b9aa80&e=17913c7d6d) the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, something its founder is in the process of doing as the agency’s acting director._”

The Center’s founder and former president Russ Vought, who is currently Director of the Office of Management and Budget, was also mentioned in the piece. _Politico_ noted his role in restoring Constitutional powers to the president, and his influence on Trump’s recent executive order claiming power over independent agencies. The Center has published several papers related to this topic, including one on the [power of impoundment](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=be27bb8dad&e=17913c7d6d) and another explaining why [federal agencies are not independent](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=13489d413d&e=17913c7d6d) of the president.

Friends, we’re proud of the work we’ve done so far and we’re just getting started. Below are several more high profile policy areas we’re working on that we hope helps the Administration with their policy objectives.
---
| **Reforming an Out of Shape, Out of Control, “Woke” NATO******
---
| [ ](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=7ec7295256&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| NATO has shifted from its original purpose and is in need of desperate reform. In 2023, Visiting Senior Fellow Dr. Sumantra Maitra tackled this topic in a [policy brief](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=78ae646a09&e=17913c7d6d) outlining a “Dormant NATO” policy. This new strategy called for NATO to streamline its focus to preparing its military apparatuses for war, and to take ownership of security within Europe.

But how did NATO lose focus on international security and transform into a politically correct bureaucracy? Dr. Maitra helps answer this question in his [new issue paper](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=5cc6c1092a&e=17913c7d6d) titled _Out of Shape and Out of Control: Understanding and Reforming a “Woke” NATO_.

This paper breaks down how American unipolarity resulted in NATO becoming fixated on the global promotion of left-wing ideological causes such as LGBT rights, women’s rights, and DEI. This has come at the expense of international security and even resulted in our own allies criticizing America’s domestic affairs when our government errs from their woke agenda.

NATO works best as a defensive alliance dedicated to security, not an ideological vehicle for promoting a woke agenda around the world. You can read the full paper [here](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=cca59f6aa6&e=17913c7d6d).
---
| **Dismantling the Censorship Industrial Complex**
---
| [ ](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=04cb39202a&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| President Trump has been given a mandate by the American people to defund and dismantle woke and weaponized government. To truly make an impact, the new administration must focus on destroying the censorship industrial complex so deeply intertwined in our government.

Our new [policy brief](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=e1f8096dec&e=17913c7d6d) from Senior Advisor Wade Miller analyzes the complex network of government, non-profit, and private sector entities that coordinate to censor speech. This is an Orwellian infrastructure that uses the pretense of fighting “disinformation” to monitor and stifle the speech of those deemed ideological enemies.

The brief lays out ten examples of some of the worst public and private entities that are part of this complex censorship network, along with the immediate actions that can be taken against them. Read the [full brief here](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=a185f8cb81&e=17913c7d6d).
---
| **Why We Should Shut Down the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau**
---
| [ ](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=e541b34589&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| The abundance of unaccountable, independent, government-funded agencies are one of the key problems with our woke and weaponized government. Our latest [policy primer](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=c5762bd980&e=17913c7d6d) takes a look at the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, which is emblematic of this issue. Founded in the aftermath of the 2008 global financial crisis, it’s funded by the Federal Reserve and isn’t accountable to either the President or Congressional oversight.

The worst part? The CFPB has become weaponized against the American people, going after crypto currency, pushing banking discrimination against firearms dealers, and even pressuring financial institutions to provide loans to illegal aliens. The CFPB must go. Read our [full primer here](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=cd9dc805b6&e=17913c7d6d).

We are thrilled to see the Administration take action against this weaponized agency and our former colleague Russ Vought leading the charge.
---
| **A Look Ahead**
---
| Friends, there is so much more of our work I could tell you about, but we have a “show, don’t tell” motto at the Center, so I'll leave you with this.

We’re in the early days of the new Trump administration, but transformative change is already happening. And with [your support](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=bd2922284c&e=17913c7d6d), the Center for Renewing America is having an outsized influence on America’s renewal.

Thank you for standing beside us.

Sincerely,

Eric Teetsel
_CEO_
**Center for Renewing America**
---
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=efc9d7e44f&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=5d0b956cac&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=4f6ba9a726&e=17913c7d6d)
---
|
---
| _Copyright ©2025 Center for Renewing America, All Rights Reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
300 Independence Ave. SE
Washington, DC 20003

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=340a9f3c7d&e=17913c7d6d&c=4435888f00) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=340a9f3c7d&t=b&e=17913c7d6d&c=4435888f00).
---

Toward Hard Working Americans

Thursday at the Conservative Political Action Conference (CPAC) that

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: I want our kids to see Michigan as the best place to build their future
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
I’m committed to building a state where every family can thrive, every voice is valued, and every community has what it needs to succeed.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=117%2E181023%2Ega0xZ_)
Here’s something you may not know about me, team.
I am a mom to an incredible 8-year-old boy. My son drives my passion for ensuring Michigan is the best place to be a kid, raise a kid, and call home.
In a few years, he will decide where he wants to put down his roots. **I want him to see Michigan as the best place to build his future — and I want the same for every family in this state.**
I love Michigan. I moved here over 20 years ago to truly make a difference in people’s lives, and I remain just as committed today to building a state where every family can thrive, every voice is valued, and every community has what it needs to succeed.
But as I listen to people around our state, it’s clear that too many feel that their voices are being drowned out by more powerful ones.
I’ve spent my entire career standing up to powerful interests — and rest assured, I’ll continue to stand up to anyone who tries to deny _any of our children_ from getting a fair shot in life.
[**I’m running for Governor to ensure that our kids have the opportunity to create a better future for themselves right here in Michigan. Can you please help me by pitching in a donation to my campaign today?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q12025.B7hgkZ&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250221_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=117%2E181023%2Ega0xZ_)

body:
| | | The Virginia General Assembly just passed a constitutional amendment to protect reproductive freedom - but it has to pass for a second time next year before it can go to voters.
Republican Delegate Ian Lovejoy voted no.
**If MAGA Republicans end the 51-49 Democratic majority in this November’s elections, reproductive freedom will be under attack.**
Democrat Elizabeth Guzman is a mom, social worker, and union leader who will always vote to protect reproductive freedom - and she’s running in against Lovejoy in one of America’s top state legislative red-to-blue races.
**To protect reproductive freedom and resist Donald Trump and Elon Musk, we MUST win our state legislatures.**
**[Pitch in now to help Elizabeth Guzman flip a red seat blue, pass a Constitutional amendment to protect reproductive freedoms, and WIN this year.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqeoZfkhx0rJYxvzeQyPAOXxPzaHpN7uxnA66Ao0W-7EqZyFw6iLW1nc6uNsMh9U_6P1cJnDgPmfO65JC_bOpDPs-hyXjgUgdw39MVNlwE3ywp03T0iwiu4ExcO4QohlSThlFplIMJSNmpI9zKdOywVwl1Vbww70zjo7-gwE8sNMGI5oteX8Vye5MdTkm-UBxmfuyZiLBx2pNvdNgSi49ybt2-_Bx55q1j27pdFAgiq_Zuw_nnkMUo-lrb36GCX1QgPDGcui63OS9TSV4-A9v7IQZBDyawZv4D4XPaPASWjBn/4e7/9A3nbkU_SAuVNxzn6AU_Fg/h0/h001.pbbYM13YQ-Z_90jzAfj9PpetGq4CGYTOeYrPcwDMJV0)**

Democrat Elizabeth Guzman is running to defeat Lovejoy and flip a seat Donald Trump lost.

clean_body: | | | The Virginia General Assembly just passed a constitutional amendment to protect reproductive freedom - but it has to pass for a second time next year before it can go to voters. Republican Delegate Ian Lovejoy voted no. If MAGA Republicans end the 51-49 Democratic majority in this November’s elections, reproductive freedom will be under attack. Democrat Elizabeth Guzman is a mom, social worker, and union leader who will always vote to protect reproductive freedom - and she’s running in against Lovejoy in one of America’s top state legislative red-to-blue races. To protect reproductive freedom and resist Donald Trump and Elon Musk, we MUST win our state legislatures. Virginia is the only state in the South that hasn’t passed restrictions on abortion since the end of Roe v. Wade \- and MAGA Republicans have promised to spend millions to take control. Lovejoy called a 15-week abortion ban “commonsense.” Democrat Elizabeth Guzman is running to defeat Lovejoy and flip a seat Donald Trump lost. Help us pass a Constitutional amendment to protect reproductive freedom and expand a pro-choice Democratic majority in Virginia. **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. We can’t do it without you. Thanks, Team Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . On his first day in office, Donald Trump rolled back President Biden's efforts to lower the cost of prescription drugs for people on Medicare and Medicaid. Now, he's going after Social Security — a program that almost 68 million people rely on.
MAGA Republicans have threatened Social Security time and time again, promising to slash benefits and put the lives of millions of Americans at risk.
**Friend: We can’t let Project 2025 extremists strip away our benefits. Now more than ever, we NEED to make our voices heard.**

Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand is fighting tirelessly in the Senate to defend Social Security and ensure that Americans can count on these benefits for generations to come. [Fight back](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTpaYvm2PZbURem8tAKKW3IX2Ft8Bt3aPrqeH8b_hUKXuXhDO0mpXFnYGW7NKKVsQhelXSz3OF67st2nI03JRmzlynm4U4t3Z_J9bkg-p2z5YTFRsrVs1-E0GWAWP5jXhlGIt_hoO3lOWui3bOm46nPfGOf7UmsBdUhTNtB83cGQ8UvrsUXG2aXeujQyxOLGyNyc0OBnbgMJIUinqJYGkQwa2OUrG541rd6F1vgEjL_ddtPqKueH3c6xDmz3fDz3a_TPzuHEujsmrqFcbqLd1Z7btkJQJkhlV4NBOqUIENfTFlmAtJhagJ54qno2OpsSe6P_b8AnbLH6Cht3bLCcDYOAeKLBQvZW8tnHvxrPms1So/4e7/DlfZAdIRQ9-6gBAL6klpwQ/h0/h001.UIkzE88JDTXaVQk6zz6zccSUHISs9MLzuNRaxUAkTaY)

Elon Musk is bankrolling Brad Schimel’s Supreme Court campaign because they know Wisconsin’s highest court can stop their lawless coup. Brad Schimel would be a rubber-stamp for Musk and Trump’s assault on constitutional checks and balances, giving themselves sole power to enrich the ultra-wealthy at the expense of the rest of us.
**This is a watershed moment in this election.** A MAGA Supreme Court in Wisconsin could reverse our progress on fair state legislative maps and lock in power for far-right legislators, and give them the power to overturn elections when they don’t like the results.
**Brad Schimel has cut shady deals for campaign cash his entire career, but now he’s cut the biggest and shadiest deal of his political life.** With only 43 days until Election Day, WisDems needs your support right now to make sure voters learn about the stakes, reject Elon Musk’s hostile takeover of Wisconsin’s Supreme Court, and elect Judge Susan Crawford.

clean_body: Musk-backed PAC just made a significant statewide ad buy in Wisconsin to influence the Supreme Court election | | | | 🚨BREAKING: Elon Musk-backed political group just made a significant ad buy for Brad Schimel in Wisconsin’s Supreme Court election. Elon Musk is bankrolling Brad Schimel’s Supreme Court campaign because they know Wisconsin’s highest court can stop their lawless coup. Brad Schimel would be a rubber-stamp for Musk and Trump’s assault on constitutional checks and balances, giving themselves sole power to enrich the ultra-wealthy at the expense of the rest of us. This is a watershed moment in this election. A MAGA Supreme Court in Wisconsin could reverse our progress on fair state legislative maps and lock in power for far-right legislators, and give them the power to overturn elections when they don’t like the results. Brad Schimel has cut shady deals for campaign cash his entire career, but now he’s cut the biggest and shadiest deal of his political life. With only 43 days until Election Day, WisDems needs your support right now to make sure voters learn about the stakes, reject Elon Musk’s hostile takeover of Wisconsin’s Supreme Court, and elect Judge Susan Crawford. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Thanks for stepping up to fight for democracy. \- Ben The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. name: Adam Schiff
subject: A new part of this email program
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| With so much going on, I want to dedicate part of this email program to answering your questions about my work in the Senate.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8315%2E5257348%2EeRjL56)
Hi Derek —
My team and I are kicking off a new part of our email program today — a series called **Ask Adam**.
The news is moving at a breakneck pace, with the Trump administration taking new, damaging, and often illegal actions daily. Strike that — multiple times a day.
My office is working diligently to hold Trump accountable — and we’re also working hard to deliver for families across California.
**With so much going on, I want to dedicate part of this email program to answering your questions about my work in the Senate.**
If you want to know how I’m addressing the climate crisis, what Trump’s latest executive order means for your kids’ schools, or how we can defend our democracy, **[submit your questions in our Ask Adam form, and I’ll do my best to answer what’s on your mind.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202502-ask-adam.ZTgwMk&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250221_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8315%2E5257348%2EeRjL56)**
[ASK ADAM](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202502-ask-adam.ZTgwMk&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250221_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=8315%2E5257348%2EeRjL56)
---
I strongly believe that we need more honesty and transparency in our government — and it’s unfortunately not going to come from the Oval Office.
My priority is hearing from you and making sure my team and I are addressing your top concerns.
**[Take a few moments to submit any questions you might have — and I’ll be sending the answers to some of these questions in future emails.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202502-ask-adam.ZTgwMk&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250221_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=8315%2E5257348%2EeRjL56)**
[ASK ADAM](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202502-ask-adam.ZTgwMk&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250221_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=8315%2E5257348%2EeRjL56)
---
Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts with me!
Best,
Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5115?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250221_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=8&akid=8315%2E5257348%2EeRjL56)

# [Mask Mandates on Death's Door](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=157640298&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU3NjQwMjk4LCJpYXQiOjE3NDAxNjY4NTUsImV4cCI6MTc0Mjc1ODg1NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIxMTQ4MjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.iPUcyvlkR5KQWwMJ1AXA1AkLM5KervDQoGyIdMKi7Xw)
### Idaho Senate slams the door on tyranny and isn't looking back.
| | [Brian Lenney - Nampa's Senator](https://substack.com/@brianlenney)
---
| Feb 21
---
| [](https://substack.com/@brianlenney)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=157640298&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU3NjQwMjk4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0MDE2Njg1NSwiZXhwIjoxNzQyNzU4ODU1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjExNDgyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ZZXkER1ozQC05bAKorvpoXIKnUEGZU3Cc7a8W9XmG5k&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

For the first time since the "Scandemic," the Idaho Senate overwhelmingly passed my anti-mask mandate bill, [House Bill 32](https://substack.com/redirect/75474d7e-a469-4af0-83e5-3f711636bc8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4f676774-18b3-46aa-a375-a72bce95dbf0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
With a decisive 27-6 vote, we sent a strong message to the Governor and the rest of the state that we're **never** going back.
**Please contact the Governor and urge him to sign this landmark legislation:

» [Contact the Governor](https://substack.com/redirect/feaefa5c-7806-4791-9286-511404073f01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) «**

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: DOGE Tracking Poll
body:
You won’t believe the waste...
| | | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JMN07ETTSJP7XXTAZC1VV4QH_0)
---
| | | | Peter The Left are absolutely losing their minds over the great work Elon Musk and the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) are doing. **Just look at the ridiculousness of some of the wasteful programs that have been cut so far!** _**Your**_ hard-earned tax dollars have been funding: ❌“Intercultural communication diversity dialogue circle communicating across differences”
❌"Mozambique voluntary medical male circumcision"
❌"Gender equality and women empowerment hub"
❌“Engage in ongoing learning and self-reflection to confront their own biases and racism, develop asset-based anti-racist mindsets"
❌“Empowering LGBTQIA+ Refugees in Greece”
❌“Help students understand/interrogate the complex histories involved in oppression, and help students recognize areas of privilege and power on an individual and collective basis. There is no good reason that your tax dollars should be spent on these absurd programs. That is why I hope you will take our poll and ensure that your voice is heard as we look for more wasteful programs to cut. [**Please take my DOGE Tracking Poll and let my Republican House colleagues and I know what you think about the work DOGE is doing to cut waste, fraud, and abuse out of the federal government.**](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JMN07ETTSJP7XXTAZC1VV4QH_1)
---
| | [ >> OFFICIAL DOGE TRACKING POLL >> ](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JMN07ETTSJP7XXTAZC1VV4QH_2)
---
| We’ve always known that there was wasteful spending in the federal government, but this is the first time the curtain has really been pulled back to expose the radical programs that the Left and bureaucrats were pushing across the globe. And now that the secret is getting out, liberal politicians are doing all they can to try to save their pet programs. Senator Bernie Sanders along with the new DNC chair are going on separate tours attacking Elon Musk and DOGE. And thousands of radical protestors are expected to take to the streets trying to pressure Congress to step in and stop this progress. But I don’t think that real Americans like you want your tax dollars to go towards “empowering LGBTQIA+ Refugees in Greece” or training teachers to “develop asset-based anti-racist mindsets.” So don’t let the extremists in America drown your voice out when it comes to something this important. [**Please take my DOGE Tracking Poll and let my Republican House colleagues and I know what you think about the work DOGE is doing to cut waste, fraud, and abuse out of the federal government.**](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JMN07ETTSJP7XXTAZC1VV4QH_3) In service,
---
| | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JMN07ETTSJP7XXTAZC1VV4QH_4)
---
| Dan Crenshaw
---
|
---
| |

Friends and Neighbors,
I’ll get straight to the point: we have a major fundraising deadline coming up, and we need your support to stay on track.
Our campaign is about building a brighter future for Prince George’s County—one where opportunity is accessible to all, where our schools are fully funded, and where our communities are safe and thriving. But to make that vision a reality, we have to run a strong, well-funded campaign.
Right now, we’re short of our goal, and we need a big push to close the gap before midnight. If you’ve been waiting for the right moment to give, this is it.

National Security Advisor Mike Waltz declared Thursday on Fox News
that the U.S. is committed to the total dismantlement of Hamas. Hamas

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: First, we countered drag queens in libraries. Now our next battle needs you!
body:
Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=508690f0a7b14b1ab433e9024a855875&_e=loUKhQ1fm854RyKiVKqXaNYe66bKAC3urYAqVeoGT8ZV0Ne2989RZeiNCkDaBUrbkokdg4wvQls_ixzw4DZXeRFer7gyku0MDpLp3-l7VCBYpZurykZ9Q5PlG_WobUmpVru4s7L5PxjW_pFKs0Lz3BMFjbanBA0A5LL1NYhGCeQLx0ofUAuHS7yGFidsYY1uRBP1d-g6aQNVNNK6UPP3m2v3_9zsdFumoYaBeX7vuTOLbJ4jZ6BVJ7XgUb9v1WMA-lVXJj3H2t_182SPW-0fFHyYSuqA649woWrStmpeSsY5ibSQGDx7qrsA4BSFi3oJIGdQ4pVmDC8f6ixisDMH5swVu7Mhagg40oOF8QpoQSepiBp7Mf8LkZooa7OATyZtGkCGaf4eC347bW7rr7T_7A%3D%3D)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. name: Rebecca Weber
subject: It’s not rocket-science
body:
| |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=87bd868feca6428e86a692917dc34d9f&_e=xW0rhvnpjxOIOtKwopY-UwlLcP1LjAFz0NftcIlYXhV3v3JrycZh3BFSd9Ql-paMbFZplcqNkYqak09RBwstaSvlK1Is3Gyrvfnl3cDEPeMjxcBFoK7A_V-I5NsteTanwWvDnaTPu9OORcsezasmL1ME_kA-acI2JDg4owvruBppLhhnnJVu3Wts9HrSLDMnEDshQW0Bc1Dzs6C4YnxmZdHI66zDyMRYpAly-4u2A6RWLFwsgMRJE8HW3N1iX7Zg9k_jDcWcY5vyMPumadOMElKqIc4d7WJnxtmIhff4M4syDcqOARvplTtKg76dQfXwTfP6Fectiv0P8CjUA5wXbAYZp2lVWed4HNw5oEHUK2bfK3_IqsgzFQnxK-UZ4kwv)

| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=87bd868feca6428e86a692917dc34d9f&_e=xW0rhvnpjxOIOtKwopY-UwlLcP1LjAFz0NftcIlYXhV3v3JrycZh3BFSd9Ql-paMbFZplcqNkYqak09RBwstaSvlK1Is3Gyrvfnl3cDEPeMjxcBFoK7A_V-I5NsteTanwWvDnaTPu9OORcsezasmL1ME_kA-acI2JDg4owvruBppLhhnnJVu3Wts9HrSLDMnEDshQW0Bc1Dzs6C4YnxmZdKAt3no_oX2o5puYwB91JtKws_lAT3Pz_kDcIZtNXEiIN8RJ_SYcgGXjlGRRN2q4QJS_F9yfenp05j-AD0fdZopz7WLcTOo0Y05lGyDvxdHXoO8SQ7i5ZGPARkzHKOScPVd42IRGK5nrLkXPZ_147bGiAz_8e9JuM2OOlslfp59)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=87bd868feca6428e86a692917dc34d9f&_e=xW0rhvnpjxOIOtKwopY-UwlLcP1LjAFz0NftcIlYXhV3v3JrycZh3BFSd9Ql-paMbFZplcqNkYqak09RBwstaSvlK1Is3Gyrvfnl3cDEPeMjxcBFoK7A_V-I5NsteTanwWvDnaTPu9OORcsezasmL1ME_kA-acI2JDg4owvruBppLhhnnJVu3Wts9HrSLDMnEDshQW0Bc1Dzs6C4YnxmZeBUt9Lg9q70HW8B7e9LZKzcV4VCc6JwYxb_ZA-caYVbvcUoZIQ6uPAtxZqpP2HTyxIlgaISxKRgT9DvKCc541hl3KxHU7Uc3EJhswhYXFJlQA5UwlF8eo54vR-iZCqEFjhmZsMYdx9YXblwYS8fNLx2iKMDHIxZwe2-2NW9dyIs)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. name: Mark Warner
subject: The DOGE smokescreen = government efficiency
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102542297/529498834/-1691829729?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_DOGE_250221_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTE0ZTU0Yy05MWYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cKfWr7smLAfgLJWpuYw5fSP_EsMCi_PbWfPHARv6D4Y=) I’ll be honest with you, Derek.

I’m all in for maximizing government efficiency. I even passed a law that got more transparency into how much we’re spending (it’s the reason Elon Musk can keep tweeting out screenshots and spreadsheets from USAspending!)

**But I’m dog-tired of the DOGE bros using “government efficiency” as a smokescreen. Let’s call it what it is: a lawless attempt by the billionaire co-president to illegally gut the federal government services Americans rely on.

[_If you’re with me, rush a $5 donation to help me fight back against DOGE >>>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102542298/529498835/-1691829729?amount=5&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_DOGE_250221_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTE0ZTU0Yy05MWYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cKfWr7smLAfgLJWpuYw5fSP_EsMCi_PbWfPHARv6D4Y=)**

I mean, blanket layoffs at the Federal Aviation Administration mere weeks after the deadly midair collision over Washington, D.C?! What a reckless development. Let’s not forget that the folks that _literally_ safeguard our nuclear arsenal were also let go. Or that the Trump administration laid off the IRS employees making sure YOU get your tax refund.

Right now, DOGE bros are sifting through your personal data and tampering with Treasury Payments. They have no understanding of how money flows. These are college-aged software engineers who don’t know what they’re doing, yet we don’t have transparency on who they are or how much control they have over our information.

Oh, did you know about all the federal agencies with investigations into or regulatory battles with Elon Musk? Well, Trump’s firings line up suspiciously nicely with the agencies with oversight of Musk’s companies.

**Look, Derek, count me in for slashing government waste. I’m all for it. But taking a hatchet to all federal funding, to agencies that save Americans money, to critical medical grants... that just creates chaos and disorder. There’s nothing efficient about it.**

I am doing everything in my power to stop Trump and his unelected co-president from overhauling the federal government so they can enrich themselves while leaving the American people in the dust. But that makes me one of their top targets.

[_**So I’m asking: will you pitch in to support my re-election campaign so I can keep leading the fight to hold Trump and Musk accountable?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102542299/529498836/-1691829729?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_DOGE_250221_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTE0ZTU0Yy05MWYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cKfWr7smLAfgLJWpuYw5fSP_EsMCi_PbWfPHARv6D4Y=)

The fight continues,

Mark Warner
****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102542300/529498837/-1691829729?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_DOGE_250221_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTE0ZTU0Yy05MWYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cKfWr7smLAfgLJWpuYw5fSP_EsMCi_PbWfPHARv6D4Y=)****

body:
A Magellanic penguin with an unusual love for showers is at the heart of _My Penguin Friend_ , now streaming on Hulu. [Watch the trailer here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kDFvwyAQRn8N3ojgDCYZGLqwpWtHi3CHfRU2kUMc5d9Xbvdun_RJ70nv6zpeIxdep8-4kM9THluuIyiwUoEEPWLk8h5Nhz4TAfUdee2M0sPlDLqb_Q2Nu2VnNdkhuYgqIyZn8jkOydpedewPmgLQoMBpc3I2A6BONzIXZXsnjCLkVrfTd-W1zZTLu-60nVJduuLn1u4P0X8ICAICUmL8-wSEgywgKBAQ9LGWt7zTOj15lXljWlEudWeS87M85UY700tA6DaP9xeXwo_h0E9L5PKra_8l2D38BAAA___Zul3z).

# Friday, February 21, 2025
---|---
**Good Afternoon!** If _Feel Good Flyover_ was a real place, we'd be sliding a handwritten invitation to the nicest party ever under your door--just like 87-year-old Doug Turner, whose winter gathering ([lasting "until the cops arrive"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80LFupDAQxvGngW6QGQzsFi6uodtrr0RePDZzMR5kHNC-fbRJn-rrPv30__eYH5Yjp_DXbmR88HPxMqPCHhQCtrOzHF-zrp3xREhdTaYdtWqH-w3bejXW9cPiydFIt76zw9P5flyGOw766RelazbvN4XYosKx1c3Ye0TXLk_Sd9V3Y6UVOS6Sm__Cqazk40tOys0iWx3NWsp-VN2fCqcKp-u6miDiEl1HonJJ_mgkhwqnzSa4jRCEDjg52wheMjiKfFLmFGC3ubyA08nFFpZ0gBPJUORnNewbfKbCEcpKsMh-gM2ZT6pwqrNx-8Ux8jG8wWGzHL-B5bdop8GvAAAA___1XXQB)) turned him into a neighborhood legend and a viral star. But since it's just a weekly email filled with stories guaranteed to make you feel good, consider this your formal invitation to enjoy this week's edition. Today's edition is brought to you by Empower Health Labs. Top Doctors: Use THIS "ear switch miracle" to [fix tinnitus overnight](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kM1qhDAURp8m2Y3c3PyoiyxaSgYKM9BVSzei3mQmbUZFU2Xevjh03f3hfIfv_dSc2pjicDm3N2_DJTQ5jA0C6gPgAUVDbUz3RnGywXv0knsrSgXC1BUKfrU1QRXAkJSKsBNUV1KAIdA9UGe059HuNkAUCFgKVZQ6IJLoO69q0LJkCjzFPM7F1xiHfPUh3cfVz0U_3niy15ynhcknho6h27atmNaqJ53n751g6PDj_PZZG4buiOXz63knpVt-OsXkS97-dO7o-uTbOcdheNRoPluatphSXMxecbm1MT1W839PrBZ_AwAA__-h0l7J).
|
---
## 87-Year-Old's Party Invite Goes Viral
In Bucks County, Pennsylvania, 87-year-old Doug Turner has become a local sensation after personally [delivering handwritten invitations](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80LFupDAQxvGngW6QGQzsFi6uodtrr0RePDZzMR5kHNC-fbRJn-rrPv30__eYH5Yjp_DXbmR88HPxMqPCHhQCtrOzHF-zrp3xREhdTaYdtWqH-w3bejXW9cPiydFIt76zw9P5flyGOw766RelazbvN4XYosKx1c3Ye0TXLk_Sd9V3Y6UVOS6Sm__Cqazk40tOys0iWx3NWsp-VN2fCqcKp-u6miDiEl1HonJJ_mgkhwqnzSa4jRCEDjg52wheMjiKfFLmFGC3ubyA08nFFpZ0gBPJUORnNewbfKbCEcpKsMh-gM2ZT6pwqrNx-8Ux8jG8wWGzHL-B5bdop8GvAAAA___1XXQB) to his neighbors for a _Celebration of Winter_ party. The invitations, adorned with his own artwork, humorously noted the event would last "4 p.m. until the cops arrive." This tradition began four years ago with his late wife, and despite her passing in 2022, Turner continues to foster community spirit. This year, he invited 24 guests, supplying all the food and drinks himself, asking only that attendees "bring a smile." His neighbor shared a video on social media of Turner's gesture, which quickly went viral, amassing over 2 million views and prompting supportive messages from around the world. [Watch a video report here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8z8FuhCAYBOCngduanx8Q98ChSeOp21vTo0H5URpcNspq7NM39gH2OpN8k_m-dTcXU7yPn24mG8bQlZA7BNQXwAuKzruYjk5xbwMRkuRkhVEg6muDgk8WwACKRqIO6KXwzmjR17r3odFODZpHe2qAKBDQCFUZHRC9GHpSV9DSMAXkY8lL9ZPjvUwU0pE3WqohzzzZqZTHyuQbw5Zhu-97deRnefZ09mfiyjAx2W5MvjfB9wp-1w_3xRfrH3tMKa71OTHOLqZ_sry6uVn8CwAA__-kOVSS).
## Miracle Backpack Saves Father and Son
Lost in the rugged wilderness of southern Utah, Julian Hernandez and his teenage son [faced a dire situation](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80DGO6yAYBODTQIcFv8E4BcVr6PLaLS0CPzEbApYhsXL7lfcAW89oPmm-rsvVpZzK_b97oon3uPRYF-CgGAcGYgku5c8iaTAREXCkaISWXEyXGQRdjQoXOakZ-DxrLibtUSotZz5K7QCnQJM51ziAAA5ayEGrCBCEv6G8cDVqIjmG1Os-fNdU-ooxf-ob98HXJ81m7X1rZPxHwBKwx3EM7ublGRKwBY9GwLb66ivuhb26WwnYm_OPzfkHa313JWBg0Z0F1mohYOluwnaknFObTv7-dCn_cv2vC94GfgIAAP__VJBehQ): freezing night with no supplies and temperatures plummeting--until they stumbled upon what they now call a "miracle backpack." Left behind weeks earlier by 15-year-old Levi Dittman after his own rescue, the green pack was filled with food, water, and emergency supplies, helping the father and son endure until help arrived. Weeks earlier, Dittman had been stranded in the same spot, forced to abandon that very backpack. Never expecting to see it again, he was stunned to learn it had saved another family. [Watch rescue footage](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8z8FqhDAYBOCnSW4ryR-j6yGHQvG2LV0oC72EaP5f08bN4kbFty_2AXqdgW-Y28VeXIjhPry5CQ0NZDMlCwL0ScAJpPUuxN2W3BtCBFQcjaxLIavmDJKPptEClCJ3rr2vNPmKhCah0ckG9bkiHsyhCQAJAmpZFrUmAC_7DstGaFWzUqAPOc3Fdwr3PCLFPa04F32aeDRjzo8nUy8MWgbttm3Fnpa8dHj0R-JyPzLVrky9Lu9f14_PW99df_hs_GMLMYZndUwMkwvxj8z_3VwN_AYAAP__G2hVTA). Levi's mother called it a "God fingerprint," a reminder that small actions can have life-changing impacts. Levi simply said, _" I'm glad it could help someone."_
## Penguin Who Loves Showers Returns Home
A Magellanic penguin with an unusual love for showers is at the heart of _My Penguin Friend_ , now streaming on Hulu. [Watch the trailer here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kDFvwyAQRn8N3ojgDCYZGLqwpWtHi3CHfRU2kUMc5d9Xbvdun_RJ70nv6zpeIxdep8-4kM9THluuIyiwUoEEPWLk8h5Nhz4TAfUdee2M0sPlDLqb_Q2Nu2VnNdkhuYgqIyZn8jkOydpedewPmgLQoMBpc3I2A6BONzIXZXsnjCLkVrfTd-W1zZTLu-60nVJduuLn1u4P0X8ICAICUmL8-wSEgywgKBAQ9LGWt7zTOj15lXljWlEudWeS87M85UY700tA6DaP9xeXwo_h0E9L5PKra_8l2D38BAAA___Zul3z). The film tells the true story of Joao Pereira de Souza, a retired bricklayer who was fishing when he found the oil-covered bird, rescued him from a certain death, and later named it Dindim. After nursing him back to health, Joao often found Dindim waddling into his bathroom, waiting patiently for a gentle rinse under the shower--a ritual that became a symbol of their unlikely bond. Though Dindim eventually returned to the wild, he swam thousands of miles back each year, proving that some friendships, even between man and penguin, are worth the journey. Read a detailed [account of their friendship here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80DuOpDAQgOHTQFbILh5eAgebkPWmGyI3LuOa8QOBacTtR90HmAv8-vT_f8wPw4HT-s9E0m51c3F5RoE9CASUszUc7rmrrXZESG1NWqpOyGH8g7L2uqdRtE_sreucEmqRigbRKTKLHVrlnjXrd00gShSoZNeo3iFauTypG0XfqqoTZLnkvfnKnIonF-78or1ZcqyD9qVsR9X-rXCqcLquq-FkaaNkKZVmyc35XeG0BI6mECzepJUqnBJdR4VTJCpgOVmOUDzBRmk9OcHlM-xUzj0dUDJ4PsCf0SQ48hk-JXrRfsNNZgczjFINKBtfYqh3bbeLQ-BjeNvXaDh8rOW3fy-NPwEAAP__6gt2Uw).

clean_body: A Magellanic penguin with an unusual love for showers is at the heart of My Penguin Friend , now streaming on Hulu. . | | | | | | Friday, February 21, 2025 ---|--- Good Afternoon! If Feel Good Flyover was a real place, we'd be sliding a handwritten invitation to the nicest party ever under your door--just like 87-year-old Doug Turner, whose winter gathering () turned him into a neighborhood legend and a viral star. But since it's just a weekly email filled with stories guaranteed to make you feel good, consider this your formal invitation to enjoy this week's edition. Today's edition is brought to you by Empower Health Labs. Top Doctors: Use THIS "ear switch miracle" to . | 87-Year-Old's Party Invite Goes Viral In Bucks County, Pennsylvania, 87-year-old Doug Turner has become a local sensation after personally to his neighbors for a Celebration of Winter party. The invitations, adorned with his own artwork, humorously noted the event would last "4 p.m. until the cops arrive." This tradition began four years ago with his late wife, and despite her passing in 2022, Turner continues to foster community spirit. This year, he invited 24 guests, supplying all the food and drinks himself, asking only that attendees "bring a smile." His neighbor shared a video on social media of Turner's gesture, which quickly went viral, amassing over 2 million views and prompting supportive messages from around the world. . Miracle Backpack Saves Father and Son Lost in the rugged wilderness of southern Utah, Julian Hernandez and his teenage son : freezing night with no supplies and temperatures plummeting--until they stumbled upon what they now call a "miracle backpack." Left behind weeks earlier by 15-year-old Levi Dittman after his own rescue, the green pack was filled with food, water, and emergency supplies, helping the father and son endure until help arrived. Weeks earlier, Dittman had been stranded in the same spot, forced to abandon that very backpack. Never expecting to see it again, he was stunned to learn it had saved another family. . Levi's mother called it a "God fingerprint," a reminder that small actions can have life-changing impacts. Levi simply said, " I'm glad it could help someone." Penguin Who Loves Showers Returns Home A Magellanic penguin with an unusual love for showers is at the heart of My Penguin Friend , now streaming on Hulu. . The film tells the true story of Joao Pereira de Souza, a retired bricklayer who was fishing when he found the oil-covered bird, rescued him from a certain death, and later named it Dindim. After nursing him back to health, Joao often found Dindim waddling into his bathroom, waiting patiently for a gentle rinse under the shower--a ritual that became a symbol of their unlikely bond. Though Dindim eventually returned to the wild, he swam thousands of miles back each year, proving that some friendships, even between man and penguin, are worth the journey. Peter — Kash Patel is a walking **red flag**. During his recent nomination hearing for FBI director, Patel deflected nearly _every_ question Mazie asked him. And his non-answers are **deeply concerning.** He couldn’t give a straightforward answer about who won the 2020 election. He skirted questioning on his threats toward the free press. And he gave little explanation as to why he’s voiced support for January 6th rioters who assaulted Capitol Police officers. Mazie’s questioning has shown that Patel’s **gross inadequacy** and **100% loyalty to Donald Trump** make him completely unfit to protect the American people and our country. But that’s not stopping Senate Republicans from pushing his confirmation. **As a member of the Senate Judiciary Committee, Mazie is fighting back, and she will continue to push for answers and raise red flags against unqualified cabinet picks.** **[We need voices like Mazie’s speaking out louder than ever before. name: Jazz Lewis
subject: February 2025 Newsletter
body:
https://www.jazzlewis.com/ [https://www.jazzlewis.com/]
February 2025 Newsletter
Protect Our Federal Workers Act
This session, we are responding to anything President Trump throws our way. With new orders and regulations being issued daily, many of Maryland’s federal workers fear for their job security and ability to make ends meet.
Maryland’s HB1424, the Protect Our Federal Workers Act , is designed to improve support for federal workers facing financial difficulties during government shutdowns, relocations, or large-scale layoffs. The bill aims to update the existing Federal Government Shutdown Employee Assistance Loan Fund to help these essential workers impacted by Trump and Musk’s reckless agenda.
I am proud to back this bill and know my colleagues will join me in this effort to protect all Marylanders.
Protect Our Federal Employees Act Story Form
Here in Annapolis, we are working hard to defend Maryland's federal workforce against the Trump Administration’s dangerous assault on employees and the necessary programs that serve millions of Americans.
If you have been affected by the new Administration's actions , including the funding freezes or other threats that may impact you, please share your story with our office as we work to find real solutions for our civil servants. We want to hear from you and learn how these actions are impacting Marylanders every day.
Use THIS LINK [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdJrb7SmDgfhGrBimlYN6hqH0P3WIOI2bnkV3THtlHV4iZCKA/viewform] to submit your own story about how these changes impact you.
FAQs on OPM’s Deferred Resignation Program
The Office of Personnel Management (OPM) introduced its Deferred Registration Program last month, but many questions remain about it. Below are some FAQs provided by the American Federation of Government Employees (AFGE).
What is the Deferred Resignation Program?
The Program allows federal employees to submit a resignation effective September 30, 2025 , with continued pay and benefits.
Is the Program a buyout?
No, it is not a buyout or a VISP; it offers deferred resignation without guaranteeing benefits or acceptance.
Can employees take another job during the deferred resignation period?
The Program does not prohibit outside work, but agency-specific policies may still apply.
Are all federal employees eligible for the Program?
No, employees in specific roles, including immigration and national security, and USPS/military personnel are excluded.
Will employees be protected from termination before their resignation date?
There is no guarantee that employees will be shielded from termination or layoffs before September 30, 2025.
How can employees ensure the administration follows through on the Program?
There is no guarantee the government will honor the Program due to inconsistencies and potential legal challenges.
Is there assurance that continued salary will be funded?
No, there is no guarantee of funding beyond the expiration of current appropriations on March 14, 2025.
To read AFGE’s detailed and full list of FAQs, visit HERE [https://www.afge.org/globalassets/documents/generalreports/2025/facts-opm-deferred-program-flyer_feb5.pdf] .
https://www.jazzlewis.com/ [https://www.jazzlewis.com/]

clean_body: [] February 2025 Newsletter Protect Our Federal Workers Act This session, we are responding to anything President Trump throws our way. With new orders and regulations being issued daily, many of Maryland’s federal workers fear for their job security and ability to make ends meet. Maryland’s HB1424, the Protect Our Federal Workers Act , is designed to improve support for federal workers facing financial difficulties during government shutdowns, relocations, or large-scale layoffs. The bill aims to update the existing Federal Government Shutdown Employee Assistance Loan Fund to help these essential workers impacted by Trump and Musk’s reckless agenda. I am proud to back this bill and know my colleagues will join me in this effort to protect all Marylanders. Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. _[If you were forwarded this newsletter, you can sign up to receive the Kernel every week by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102543480/529502596/1416943042?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWI3ZDdjMi05NWYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XF6SW4CpXSn36r4S4PqJVqI7OMqBqErsvDE2OfzUdM0=&emci=877b4190-89f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=deb7d7c2-95f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4925535)_ [_**If you'd like to donate to the INDems' Reorganization Fund, you can do so by clicking here.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102543481/529502597/1764064610?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWI3ZDdjMi05NWYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XF6SW4CpXSn36r4S4PqJVqI7OMqBqErsvDE2OfzUdM0=) ****
_Statehouse Democrats Propose Budget For The People While GOP Proposes Cuts_ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102543482/529502598/494471658?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWI3ZDdjMi05NWYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XF6SW4CpXSn36r4S4PqJVqI7OMqBqErsvDE2OfzUdM0=&emci=877b4190-89f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=deb7d7c2-95f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102543483/529502599/494471658?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWI3ZDdjMi05NWYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XF6SW4CpXSn36r4S4PqJVqI7OMqBqErsvDE2OfzUdM0=&emci=877b4190-89f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=deb7d7c2-95f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4925535) Indiana House Democrats released their budget proposal this week to fully fund Indiana’s public schools, end all Medicaid waitlists, protect healthcare from federal cuts, and provide tax relief to renters, workers, and the Hoosiers who need it most. Republicans voted down these proposals on a straight party-line vote. Instead, they passed a budget which does not end the Medicaid waitlists and provides millions in tax breaks to the richest households. Hoosiers deserve a budget that puts them first. Instead, the Republican budget they are getting is one of missed opportunities. We shouldn’t be missing out on providing opportunity for every family and Hoosier. ****_Marion County Judge Blocks Rokita From Releasing Abortion Records_ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102543484/529502600/-1896535224?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWI3ZDdjMi05NWYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XF6SW4CpXSn36r4S4PqJVqI7OMqBqErsvDE2OfzUdM0=&emci=877b4190-89f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=deb7d7c2-95f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102543485/529502601/-1896535224?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWI3ZDdjMi05NWYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XF6SW4CpXSn36r4S4PqJVqI7OMqBqErsvDE2OfzUdM0=&emci=877b4190-89f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=deb7d7c2-95f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4925535) A Marion County judge blocked Attorney General Todd Rokita’s order to release the individual Terminated Pregnancy Reports of Hoosier women who have sought live-saving abortion care. Only a few dozen abortions take place in Indiana each year since the abortion ban was passed by state Republicans. Despite this, Todd Rokita wants to make these reports public records, despite them containing information that could identify the patient, including their ZIP code and county of residence. Democrats will not stop fighting for your right to keep your medical records private. Victims should not have their records given out as public information. ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102543486/529502603/1877104159?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWI3ZDdjMi05NWYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XF6SW4CpXSn36r4S4PqJVqI7OMqBqErsvDE2OfzUdM0=&emci=877b4190-89f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=deb7d7c2-95f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4925535)**
[Share Rep. Earl Harris, Jr.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102543487/529502605/1877104159?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWI3ZDdjMi05NWYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XF6SW4CpXSn36r4S4PqJVqI7OMqBqErsvDE2OfzUdM0=&emci=877b4190-89f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=deb7d7c2-95f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4925535) Rep. Earl Harris, Jr. passed his bill out of the Indiana House to attract more professional sports development to Northwest Indiana. The proposal comes as the Chicago Bears of the NFL are looking for a new stadium to call home. This bill will allow Hoosier communities in Lake County the opportunity to try to bring the Bears to Northwest Indiana. The bill could bring billions of dollars worth of investments to The Region, and now goes to the State Senate for more consideration. **** **_Get Involved! Opportunities After the Election_** As we move past the 2024 Election, it is imperative that we unite together to create a better future for our state. One of the best ways to do that is to help us rebuild our party and grow in the coming months and years. [Click here to see opportunities and party events near you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102543494/529502612/626575025?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWI3ZDdjMi05NWYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XF6SW4CpXSn36r4S4PqJVqI7OMqBqErsvDE2OfzUdM0=&emci=877b4190-89f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=deb7d7c2-95f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4925535) _**Make Your Voice Heard! Upcoming Public Input Requests**_ Indiana FSSA – FSSA’s parent body, the Bureau of Disability Services, is seeking public comment on its intent to submit renewals to the Family Support, the Community Integration and Habitation Waivers, and the 1915(b)(4) Waiver Fee for Service Selective Contracting Program to the Centers for Medicare and Medicare Services. In addition, FSSA is hosting three webinars to provide more information on amending a waiver and other key policy changes. [Find out more information here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102543495/529502613/-1088877900?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWI3ZDdjMi05NWYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XF6SW4CpXSn36r4S4PqJVqI7OMqBqErsvDE2OfzUdM0=&emci=877b4190-89f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=deb7d7c2-95f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4925535) [Click here to submit a comment.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102543496/529502614/1842147519?j=49114&sfmc_sub=31555984&l=1201_HTML&u=877866&mid=546006736&jb=1003&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWI3ZDdjMi05NWYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XF6SW4CpXSn36r4S4PqJVqI7OMqBqErsvDE2OfzUdM0=&emci=877b4190-89f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=deb7d7c2-95f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4925535) SAMHSA – The Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration is taking public comment on its implementation guide for Mobile Crisis Team Services. clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. = ** Statehouse Democrats Propose Budget For The People While GOP Proposes Cuts Indiana House Democrats released their budget proposal this week to fully fund Indiana’s public schools, end all Medicaid waitlists, protect healthcare from federal cuts, and provide tax relief to renters, workers, and the Hoosiers who need it most. Republicans voted down these proposals on a straight party-line vote. Instead, they passed a budget which does not end the Medicaid waitlists and provides millions in tax breaks to the richest households. Hoosiers deserve a budget that puts them first. Instead, the Republican budget they are getting is one of missed opportunities. We shouldn’t be missing out on providing opportunity for every family and Hoosier. Marion County Judge Blocks Rokita From Releasing Abortion Records A Marion County judge blocked Attorney General Todd Rokita’s order to release the individual Terminated Pregnancy Reports of Hoosier women who have sought live-saving abortion care. Only a few dozen abortions take place in Indiana each year since the abortion ban was passed by state Republicans. Despite this, Todd Rokita wants to make these reports public records, despite them containing information that could identify the patient, including their ZIP code and county of residence. Democrats will not stop fighting for your right to keep your medical records private. Victims should not have their records given out as public information. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. Rep. Earl Harris, Jr. passed his bill out of the Indiana House to attract more professional sports development to Northwest Indiana. The proposal comes as the Chicago Bears of the NFL are looking for a new stadium to call home. This bill will allow Hoosier communities in Lake County the opportunity to try to bring the Bears to Northwest Indiana. The bill could bring billions of dollars worth of investments to The Region, and now goes to the State Senate for more consideration. Get Involved! Opportunities After the Election As we move past the 2024 Election, it is imperative that we unite together to create a better future for our state. One of the best ways to do that is to help us rebuild our party and grow in the coming months and years. Make Your Voice Heard! Upcoming Public Input Requests Indiana FSSA – FSSA’s parent body, the Bureau of Disability Services, is seeking public comment on its intent to submit renewals to the Family Support, the Community Integration and Habitation Waivers, and the 1915(b)(4) Waiver Fee for Service Selective Contracting Program to the Centers for Medicare and Medicare Services. In addition, FSSA is hosting three webinars to provide more information on amending a waiver and other key policy changes. SAMHSA – The Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration is taking public comment on its implementation guide for Mobile Crisis Team Services. INDOT – The Indiana Department of Transportation (INDOT) will hold a public hearing on Wednesday, Feb. 19 to inform residents and solicit feedback about two proposed roundabouts on State Road 13 near the Hamilton, Madison, and Tipton county lines: SR 13 at Strawtown Avenue/West 8th Street near Perkinsville (DES. 2003082) SR 13 at SR 128/East 296th Street near Elwood (DES. 2003081) The hearing will take place at the Lapel High School Auditorium, 1800 S. County Road 900 West, Lapel. Doors will open at 5 p.m., with a project presentation to begin at 5:30 p.m., followed by an in-person comment session. Comments may also be submitted by email to mailto:vflynn@kaskaskiaeng.com, or to INDOT’s customer service center at or by calling 1-855-INDOT4U (1-855-463-6848). Comments are due by March 5. INDOT — The Indiana Department of Transportation will host a public hearing at 6 p.m. Feb. 26 at North Vermillion High School to inform residents and solicit feedback about two proposed bridge removals on Indiana 63 near Cayuga, located about a quarter-mile south of Indiana 234. Comments may also be submitted by email to mailto:Katie.Finney@egis-group.com, or to INDOT's customer service center at or by calling 1-855-INDOT4U (1-855-463-6848). INDOT requests comments be submitted and/or postmarked by March 13. IURC — The IURC will be taking public comment on Center Point South’s response to Winter Storm Blair. The meeting will take place at 10 a.m. EST Feb. 28, 2025, in Room 222 of the PNC Center, 101 W. Washington St. in Indianapolis. The meeting is open to the public to watch, and will be livestreamed at . Customers can contact the Division at 1-800-851-4268 or submit a complaint through our Online Services Portal at . VALPARAISO – The City of Valparaiso will hold a public meeting at 6:00 PM on Tuesday, February 25, 2025, in Valparaiso City Hall (166 Lincolnway) presenting the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) Transition Plan draft. With public input, the City has prepared the drafts of their ADA Transition Plans for infrastructure within the rights-of-way and for public facilities. If unable to attend, you may submit comments to Bob Thompson, ADA Director, at mailto:. To read the drafts, visit and Upcoming Candidate Trainings Join the National Democratic Training Committee on Thursday, February 27th from 1-2 pm ET for a free virtual live training on Setting Up Your Local Democratic Party's Structure. INDems IN the News WRTV: WISHTV: Indiana Capital Chronicle: IndyStar: Indiana Capital Chronicle: Indiana Capital Chronicle: Indiana Capital Chronicle: [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., #1110E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team Foushee
Date: Thurs, February 20, 2025
Subject: What you may not know about me
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Peter, it’s Team Foushee –

It’s only been one month since Donald Trump’s second term began, but the damage inflicted on our country will be felt for generations to come.

name: Alan Cohn
subject: Want to hear Democrat's Plan?
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102543689/529503990/1096283482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjNjOWY5ZGYtOTZmMC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c46izChS2FgWVu9XtJk73gyCBPMfWCuQpKP2U5j98_0=&emci=bfc787f5-92f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=f3c9f9df-96f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=16746905)

Hi Friend,
Democrats want to see the plan.
Here’s ours!
If Trump’s handpicked MAGA majority on the Supreme Court digs into rubber-stamping his illegal assault on the government and on us, we have to dig in and make sure their days on the court are numbered.
Sounds good?
Here’s how.
Seventy-five members of the House and Senate are joining forces to end lifetime appointments to SCOTUS.
This is Alan Cohn from Term Limit the Court, the national campaign working with Adam Schiff, Hakeem Jeffries, and others to enact 18-year term limits.
Clarence Thomas, Samuel Alito, and the rest feel empowered to disregard the Constitution and bend to every whim of Trump because there are no consequences. No oversight. No guardrails. No binding ethics code.
They created immunity from prosecution for him out of thin air!
The TERM Act would cycle Thomas and others off the court, taking a lot of the politics out of the nomination process.
But we need majorities in both houses. We’re back at work raising what’s needed to back candidates who pledge to support the TERM Act.
Will you help?
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/term-limits-yes-inc-1**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102543690/529503992/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjNjOWY5ZGYtOTZmMC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c46izChS2FgWVu9XtJk73gyCBPMfWCuQpKP2U5j98_0=)

**[>>>Anger over the election needs to result in action. We have a plan to pass this important step to reigning Trump. All we need is you!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102543691/529503993/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjNjOWY5ZGYtOTZmMC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c46izChS2FgWVu9XtJk73gyCBPMfWCuQpKP2U5j98_0=)**
Alan Cohn
Term Limit the Court

* * *
The American people have lost confidence in the Supreme Court after a series of rulings that strike at the core of our freedoms. _There are term limits for a President. Term limits for many governors and state legislators. And the time has come for term limits for members of the Supreme Court._

**Now, we're counting on your help to provide the resources we need to work directly with members of Congress and their staff to support the introduction of term-limit legislation and raise awareness about this legislative solution to the growing distrust in the Supreme Court.**

**[Please pitch in what you can today to support the national campaign to create term limits for the Supreme Court.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102543693/529503996/1643639367?refcode=-footer-&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjNjOWY5ZGYtOTZmMC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c46izChS2FgWVu9XtJk73gyCBPMfWCuQpKP2U5j98_0=)**
[CONTRIBUTE NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102543695/529503999/1643639367?refcode=-footer-&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjNjOWY5ZGYtOTZmMC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c46izChS2FgWVu9XtJk73gyCBPMfWCuQpKP2U5j98_0=)

name: The Squad
subject: “King Trump”
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250221-1238-foote&t=1001&akid=1238%2E342411%2E2v5F51 ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Republicans are saying the quiet part out loud – again. Trump, in his
never-ending, money-burning, victory lap, has actually declared himself
“king.”

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250221-movement.XPq-IZ&refcode=em20250221-1238&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1238%2E342411%2E2v5F51 ][IMG]

This is not just absurd — it’s dangerous, and our Squad won’t stand by as
he drags this country further down this undemocratic path.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250221-movement.XPq-IZ&refcode=em20250221-1238&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1238%2E342411%2E2v5F51 ]If you stand with our Squad, chip in today to fight back against Trump
and the far-right’s destruction.

A monarchy is the exact opposite of everything America was built on,
Peter, yet
here we are. Trump, with the full support of MAGA and his billionaire
backers, is inching closer to turning this country into an oligarchy. By
justifying his executive orders and letting Elon Musk run rampant, the
far-right is stripping away the very foundations of our democracy and
selling it off piece by piece.

Peter, our
Squad won’t be intimidated by the chaos and absurdity of the far-right.

Instead, we’re doubling down on holding elected officials accountable to
show up for the people, not to cater to destructive billionaires who only
care about lining their own pockets. We’re standing up to a system that’s
rigged against us.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250221-movement.XPq-IZ&refcode=em20250221-1238&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=1238%2E342411%2E2v5F51 ]If you believe in fighting for a government that works for people, not

clean_body: [ ]Squad Victory Fund Peter, Republicans are saying the quiet part out loud – again. Trump, in his never-ending, money-burning, victory lap, has actually declared himself “king.” [ ][IMG] This is not just absurd — it’s dangerous, and our Squad won’t stand by as he drags this country further down this undemocratic path. [ ]If you stand with our Squad, chip in today to fight back against Trump and the far-right’s destruction. A monarchy is the exact opposite of everything America was built on, Peter, yet here we are. Trump, with the full support of MAGA and his billionaire backers, is inching closer to turning this country into an oligarchy. By justifying his executive orders and letting Elon Musk run rampant, the far-right is stripping away the very foundations of our democracy and selling it off piece by piece. Peter, our Squad won’t be intimidated by the chaos and absurdity of the far-right. Instead, we’re doubling down on holding elected officials accountable to show up for the people, not to cater to destructive billionaires who only care about lining their own pockets. We’re standing up to a system that’s rigged against us. [ ]If you believe in fighting for a government that works for people, not billionaires, please chip in to help strengthen our movement. [ ]Contribute ›› The future of our democracy is on the line and we need you in this fight. Together, The Squad

name: VoteVets
subject: $5 for VoteVets. Yes, just $5.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
#
Peter:
We’re asking you for $5 today. Yes, just $5.
$5 because Elon Musk and Donald Trump have already fired staff doing mission critical work at the VA.
$5 because they’ve cut thousands more essential jobs across the federal government, including the jobs of Veterans and currently serving members of the Armed Forces.
$5 because more is coming, and VoteVets is the organization best positioned to fight back.
We’re working with our allies — elected leaders, organized labor, advocacy groups, watchdogs, and other Veterans organizations. We’re suing DOGE and Elon Musk. We’re gathering stories from Veterans and Military Families that have been adversely affected by Elon and Trump on our tipline.
**We’re building our arsenal — and we’re going to give ‘em hell.**
[**So, please. $5 or anything you can afford helps VoteVets lead the charge against the Trump administration. Every dollar helps.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-feb25.EILYhu&refcode=em250221-1-f&t=1&akid=34192%2E3013755%2ES--Zq0)

name: Team Jayapal
subject: A message to the rest of the Democratic Party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We need to be fighting on behalf of the people EVERY SINGLE DAY — even if it means drawing the ire of Elon Musk.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250221-4785-footer&t=1&akid=4785%2E420207%2E8p1Es3)
Peter,
While Elon Musk works to enrich himself at the expense of critical services the public relies on, Pramila is calling him out for what he is at every turn: an unvetted and unhinged Shadow President.
**_And_ she’s working to safeguard our government and YOUR BENEFITS from his greedy hands:**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250221?refcode=em20250221-4785&amount=3&refcode2=4785_420207_8p1Es3&akid=4785%2E420207%2E8p1Es3)
[**But Peter, she needs your support. Will you pitch in $3 to power our progressive movement and help Pramila keep fighting for us in Congress?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250221?refcode=em20250221-4785&amount=3&refcode2=4785_420207_8p1Es3&akid=4785%2E420207%2E8p1Es3)
Pramila doesn’t take a cent from corporations or their PACs, and she doesn’t seek out billionaires to use as ATMs. She’s relying on grassroots supporters like you to sustain this campaign.
And at a time when some want to be less confrontational, **your donations also send a message to the rest of the Democratic Party that we need to be fighting on behalf of the people EVERY SINGLE DAY** — even if it means drawing the ire of Elon Musk.
**This moment is too important to sit on the sidelines, Peter.[If you can, please pitch in $3 or any amount that works for you to help Pramila keep fighting for our shared progressive values in Congress.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250221?refcode=em20250221-4785&amount=3&refcode2=4785_420207_8p1Es3&akid=4785%2E420207%2E8p1Es3)**

In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

Not only has Trump given Musk free rein over federal spending, Musk could have oversight over his own companies’ contracts with the government. As Jacky Rosen likes to say, that’s like “letting a bank robber decide when to call the cops.”
If that weren't enough, Musk also gained access to Americans' medical records and private information – including our veterans. Now, he is cruelly firing staff at the VA, including those who work the Veterans Crisis Line.
Every day, it’s becoming more and more clear that the health, security, and well-being of our nation and its people will continue to be at risk as long as Musk has access to the reins of power.
**That’s why we’ve launched an urgent poll to see what Democrats think of Musk, and you were one of just 38 Democrats in 37087 selected to respond before our midnight deadline. Please tell us now:**
