clean_body: We need top Democrats like you to weigh in before midnight. | | | Missing response from dpwillis67@gmail.com. Deadline: 11:59 p.m. Friend: After Elon Musk spent hundreds of millions of dollars to get Donald Trump elected, Trump gave him the power to dismantle our government for personal gain – all while everyday Americans pay the price. It's clear Trump is beholden to Musk and will do nothing to stop him from doing irreparable harm to our country – so it’s up to us to speak out. Please, tell us now: Do you approve of Elon Musk? | | | | | Not only has Trump given Musk free rein over federal spending, Musk could have oversight over his own companies’ contracts with the government. As Jacky Rosen likes to say, that’s like “letting a bank robber decide when to call the cops.” If that weren't enough, Musk also gained access to Americans' medical records and private information – including our veterans. Now, he is cruelly firing staff at the VA, including those who work the Veterans Crisis Line. Every day, it’s becoming more and more clear that the health, security, and well-being of our nation and its people will continue to be at risk as long as Musk has access to the reins of power. That’s why we’ve launched an urgent poll to see what Democrats think of Musk, and you were one of just 38 Democrats in 37087 selected to respond before our midnight deadline. Please tell us now: Do you approve of Elon Musk? | | | | | | = A note from Sen. Jacky Rosen: Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. But with Donald Trump in the White House and Republicans in control of both houses of Congress, I need your grassroots support to keep up the fights that matter most. Senate Democrats like me are the only thing standing in the way of Trump's extreme agenda that will hurt everyday Americans. That's why I need people like you on my side to help defend our progress and take back power from the GOP. = You can also =** to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive updates from my campaign. Thank you, Jacky By entering your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic text messages from Rosen for Nevada. Message and data rates may apply. Text STOP to quit or HELP for help._

Before your weekend starts, I hope you can take a look at this. | I know it's been a busy week, but I have a simple request before the day ends.

[_Fellow American, are you still committed to our Republican Senate majority?_](http://links.teamnrsc.co/u/click?_t=aff6d619248e4524b6f468bb9c83f15c&_m=74571ea265d9478fb9064199da4e2e6a&_e=SImzMvshAlH4OJM3Z_Dwv0Yp6WpaI6pKwYTs5B3C1BR_SLHEuTtsOP_p8T_byauV3D2HNHzUvxrWTSpSClBn74d7pybSd8Oy_t_PoQlrmULrnRezyDs21lHh88PWSIIJTp-_-c2AFosHU8MO5rjToJo54nLtJIT0ua_ewLYPAhiEy6BTm7GBxfrbQ3dE0wj3N3rxP6eGLs4kO1Jn6m0FiSngjeVxl2DhWHEWZTlNNna0TeaZiGrQ3RqFO3PqtY81ovnZwU2y_1QjkuEgrWGoTu-Nlct_D8tNyUED5HBR0kJnNgkTfu5kQxlwKXrTxfLeweNnLzZjU555qieyfrA57R7cPyPar3TRvs3i9tD_mdNTDes_wmdft-FprZAEJdLTpNI99ej1B4SpMLqoKslt6M1S3b4LKCXIhOlp8xnj3gj0-LJwNCY2VkZ2uf4h7vKc)

name: Jena Griswold
subject: Unacceptable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://jenaforcolorado.com/ [https://jenaforcolorado.com/]
Team –
My heart goes out to everyone impacted by the California wildfires earlier this year.
In a time of crisis, where the devastation that the residents of Los Angeles are facing is unimaginable, Donald Trump is putting his far-right political priorities over helping the American people.
Yes - that's right. Trump has threatened to withhold federal aid from California unless the state institutes a restrictive voter law.
On January 6, 2021, we saw how far Trump would go to silence the will of the people. Now that he is back in the White House, he is clearly continuing on this dangerous path, even when the American people are in a crisis.
Jena Griswold
Follow Jena Online:
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold]
Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent.
Jena for Colorado
P.O. Box 270218
Louisville, CO 80027
United States

name: David Hogg
subject: Donald Trump is not a king
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Trump is learning the hard way...
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250221-1&t=1&akid=1767%2E587540%2EV6w4ff)
Peter, they’re not even trying to hide it anymore. **Trump wants to be a king.**
But our government was _designed_ to prevent any treasonous president from becoming a tyrant or a king. Freedom from monarchy is _the reason we exist as a country._
Trump is learning the hard way no matter how much he wants to, he can’t turn the presidency into a monarchy.
He rules this way because he is not an effective politician – he needs Congress to create true change, but he’s too inexperienced and impatient to actually whip the votes.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250221-1?refcode=em20250221-1767&amount=5&refcode2=1767_587540_V6w4ff&akid=1767%2E587540%2EV6w4ff)
Until Trump figures out how to work with Congress OR the courts grant him significantly more power under the unitary executive theory, his presidency will remain little more than a paper-thin marketing campaign, with its impact limited to powers solely within the executive branch with the rest of it stuck in the courts.
Once we flip the House in two years, he will be even less able to accomplish the massive changes he seeks. As a result, Trump is going to fail to address any of the major issues he campaigned on – whether it’s the border or lowering prices.
All we will see are BS attempts at addressing those issues because he can’t do that successfully without help from Congress. Until then, we need to hammer home the real harm he is doing and how he is completely failing to address anything he campaigned on. He is inept and ineffective, unable to deliver any real results for the country.
**Here’s the bottom line: Donald Trump is not a king.**
Now more than ever, we need to be building our bench of bold, young progressives in state legislatures and Congress who will take our country back from this man and his rabid supporters.
We’re doing everything we can to support the next generation of leaders, but we can’t do it alone. And we’re up against the billionaires and the corporate class who are funding the MAGA movement. So we can’t afford to fall behind on our goals.
**[Peter, will you pitch in $5 to help us fight back?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250221-1?refcode=em20250221-1767&amount=5&refcode2=1767_587540_V6w4ff&akid=1767%2E587540%2EV6w4ff)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250221-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250221-1767&refcode2=1767_587540_V6w4ff&akid=1767%2E587540%2EV6w4ff)**
Thank you for your support,
David Hogg
* * *

clean_body: Trump is learning the hard way... Peter, they’re not even trying to hide it anymore. Trump wants to be a king. But our government was designed to prevent any treasonous president from becoming a tyrant or a king. Freedom from monarchy is the reason we exist as a country. Trump is learning the hard way no matter how much he wants to, he can’t turn the presidency into a monarchy. He rules this way because he is not an effective politician – he needs Congress to create true change, but he’s too inexperienced and impatient to actually whip the votes. Until Trump figures out how to work with Congress OR the courts grant him significantly more power under the unitary executive theory, his presidency will remain little more than a paper-thin marketing campaign, with its impact limited to powers solely within the executive branch with the rest of it stuck in the courts. Once we flip the House in two years, he will be even less able to accomplish the massive changes he seeks. As a result, Trump is going to fail to address any of the major issues he campaigned on – whether it’s the border or lowering prices. All we will see are BS attempts at addressing those issues because he can’t do that successfully without help from Congress. Until then, we need to hammer home the real harm he is doing and how he is completely failing to address anything he campaigned on. He is inept and ineffective, unable to deliver any real results for the country. Here’s the bottom line: Donald Trump is not a king. Now more than ever, we need to be building our bench of bold, young progressives in state legislatures and Congress who will take our country back from this man and his rabid supporters. We’re doing everything we can to support the next generation of leaders, but we can’t do it alone. And we’re up against the billionaires and the corporate class who are funding the MAGA movement. So we can’t afford to fall behind on our goals. Thank you for your support, David Hogg

Peter, right now our nation is facing an unprecedented attack on our federal government – and Americans are furious.
With Elon Musk now running the White House and dozens of unqualified yes-men being confirmed, critical agencies like USAID, the Department of Justice, the Department of Education, and more are being gutted, while hundreds of thousands of federal employees face layoffs.
**Democrats may be in the minority, but that doesn't mean we should sit idly by and do nothing as our government is taken apart piece by piece.**

There are critical steps that our elected officials in the Senate and the House can take to stop our government from falling apart before our very eyes.
**Attorney General Letitia James is ready to fight back any way she can. But she needs to know you're with her.[Will you be one of the 15,000 Democrats we're counting on to tell us before midnight:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102545088/529507962/114094424?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&code=jtk1815-su-nd&refcode=jtk1815-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTcyNzg1OS05YWYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5JB1tW0Mt8-p0u4N8sgeEOTheiozHwUd-OoyPapfVpo=&emci=9e844025-c3ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=1e727859-9af0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=25369504)**

clean_body: Tell us before midnight: | | | | | Anger, chaos and confusion take hold as federal workers face mass layoffs Democrats need to do more to fight back to protect our federal workforce. Do you agree? | | | | Peter, right now our nation is facing an unprecedented attack on our federal government – and Americans are furious. With Elon Musk now running the White House and dozens of unqualified yes-men being confirmed, critical agencies like USAID, the Department of Justice, the Department of Education, and more are being gutted, while hundreds of thousands of federal employees face layoffs. Democrats may be in the minority, but that doesn't mean we should sit idly by and do nothing as our government is taken apart piece by piece. There are critical steps that our elected officials in the Senate and the House can take to stop our government from falling apart before our very eyes. Attorney General Letitia James is ready to fight back any way she can. But she needs to know you're with her. | | | | | | Thank you for your input. – Team James | With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Hi there! 👋

My name is Sonali and I’m Derek Tran’s new Finance Director. It’s so great to be connected. Before things get even more hectic, I wanted to take a minute to personally introduce myself.

I’ve worked on campaigns all across the country, but I was raised here in Southern California. (It feels good to be back!)

And though I’ve worked on countless races, this will be, without a doubt, one of the most competitive elections I’ve ever worked on.

This seat is about as “swingy” as swing seats come. Derek flipped it by only 653 votes in November, and Republicans have already made it clear that they’re gunning to take it back.

**So, as a battle-tested Finance Director, you can take it from me: The only way we’re going to send Derek back to Congress is if we start preparing now.** Donations of any size this early on make a world of difference down the line. Trust me.

[**Team, I’m more determined than ever to ensure we have the resources we need to send Derek back to Congress, but we can’t get there without grassroots supporters like you. Will you pitch in $3 today to set Derek up for a successful road to re-election?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102545108/529508067/1943818218?amount=3&refcode=em_fr_2025.02.21_b1_sa_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDVhMGRjODEtOWFmMC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0LqWwCwCzEPHyoYfr4wVn--irgJ1nwtxLY4-9V4nU4Y=) Thanks so much. I’m excited to be on this team, together.

Best, Sonali

_Sonali A.
Finance Director
Derek Tran for Congress (CA-45)_

name: Diane Sare
subject: Friday Symposium: Asteroid Impact? The Defense of Earth
body:
| | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HPeLIFflw7WCajMEVGvmb9S&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250221_symposium&n=1)
---
| Friend –
While geopoliticians scramble to maintain control of a collapsing imperial order, humanity as a whole must unite against a common external adversary. All nations- both West and East, both North and South, would be destroyed, were a large asteroid to make contact with the surface of the Earth. Humanity is dangerously unprepared for threats from outer space—asteroids! Sky-scanning projects have found only a portion of the asteroids that might impact our planet. Even if [YR4 2024](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=ilbfLN3in73c5z09N6-iUukw3YnXRxaP9at5Rf5zE-VcrLBZyF2TOL5fuPzv5KT3K9z2BCpORvqojEioBPdyTg&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250221_symposium&n=2) is not a threat, we might wake up to discover one that is on a collision course with the Earth. This week, I will be joined by LaRouche science team leader Jason Ross to talk about how to find these rocky threats and what we can do to protect ourselves.
* * *
### [ Friday Symposium, February 22, 2025, 8:00 PM](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=2fVGP-PhvXIwVfYRj2FCFrO8GhLMvrovrpYlAfhPNY37oh7AopmuR6HcEsqNC8-_&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250221_symposium&n=3)

clean_body: | | | Trump and Musk just slashed the National Institutes of Health, including cancer research. Help us POST this billboard this month in North Carolina and go on offense EARLY in a TOSS-UP Senate race. A sane government would never do this \- Trump has dismantled the National Institute of Health’s (NIH) critical efforts to find cures for cancer and other deadly disorders, effective immediately! This abrupt change is an outrage, threatening to devastate medical science! Countless jobs will vanish, crucial clinical trials will grind to a halt, and our vital progress toward cancer cures and illness prevention will be perilously slowed. Thanks to the NIH, we have cancer immunotherapy, cholesterol-lowing statins, and insulin for diabetes! This is not just negligence; it's a betrayal of public trust and a direct threat to millions of lives! We need YOUR help to launch “Republicans SLASHED Cancer Research - Fire Tillis” billboards in North Carolina, a major center of medical research and a toss-up Senate race in 2026. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. The Republicans have turned a blind eye to Trump's reckless actions, and their failure to govern has reached new heights. Every $1 invested in NIH returns $2.50! Trump’s $4 billion in savings will be a $10 billion loss for the nation! Investing in the NIH is investing in life-saving discoveries. We’re placing billboards in key locations, making it impossible for the public to ignore the Republicans' reckless abandonment of science and health. Let's hold them accountable! ****** Thank you for your support. -Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. | | It’s clear what we’re up against. The shameless voter suppression plans being proposed in legislatures across the country will push us in the direction of Jim Crow laws, when the freedom to vote was not a freedom for all Americans. **The question is: What are we going to do about it? ** [**Simple: We will fight for our rights.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102545448/529509308/-229657542?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250221_f_SYAEmail_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDc2YWQwOS05Y2YwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VtgF2eUOgHyrvmmEjKtIhcjkCSZjc8FX_bRN2rGoxIc=) This is not a nightmare scenario. This is happening: Here in Georgia, Republican legislators have been doing everything they can to disenfranchise Black and brown voters, seniors, and Georgia’s unhoused population. Now, Georgia Republican Party leadership have expressed their desire to end early voting and the current vote-by-mail system. They want to make it more difficult to register to vote. They are encouraging mass voter purges. These attacks are spreading quickly across the country. We’ve fought against attacks like these before, and we’ve won. **But if we don’t respond with the full force of our grassroots power, if we don’t stop them NOW, far too many voices will be silenced. ** [**A donation from you today will power Fair Fight Action’s efforts to boldly confront these attacks and more. clean_body: Will you help us confront these attacks? | | | It’s clear what we’re up against. The shameless voter suppression plans being proposed in legislatures across the country will push us in the direction of Jim Crow laws, when the freedom to vote was not a freedom for all Americans. The question is: What are we going to do about it? = This is not a nightmare scenario. This is happening: Here in Georgia, Republican legislators have been doing everything they can to disenfranchise Black and brown voters, seniors, and Georgia’s unhoused population. Now, Georgia Republican Party leadership have expressed their desire to end early voting and the current vote-by-mail system. They want to make it more difficult to register to vote. They are encouraging mass voter purges. These attacks are spreading quickly across the country. We’ve fought against attacks like these before, and we’ve won. President Donald Trump **[snapped at Maine Governor Janet Mills](https://substack.com/redirect/0fe9afd5-c581-451a-b525-eda4b9b5e16e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a heated press conference, warning her that she better comply with his executive order banning transgender athletes from competing in women's sports or "I'll see you in court!"
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/0fe9afd5-c581-451a-b525-eda4b9b5e16e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0fe9afd5-c581-451a-b525-eda4b9b5e16e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
During his Friday speech, Trump noted that Maine is one of several states defying his executive order. He called out Mills directly, "Is the Governor of Maine here?"
"Are you not going to comply with that?" Trump asked Mills.
"I'm complying with state and federal laws," she answered, before Trump said "Well, we are the federal law, you better do it, you better do it because you're not going to get any federal funding at all if you don't."
"And by the way, your population, even though it's somewhat liberal, although I did very well there, your population doesn't want men playing in women's sports, so you better comply because otherwise you're not getting any federal funding," Trump addd.
Watch the fiery moment right here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/0fe9afd5-c581-451a-b525-eda4b9b5e16e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Trump Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt **[HUMILIATED NBC reporter Peter Alexander in front of the entire country](https://substack.com/redirect/86421ee0-bf6e-4e30-a05e-fcb9bf34393c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for complaining about Trump gutting wasteful spending programs.

"Republicans have praised the president for cutting wasteful spending. But fraud, of course, is a crime. So have you turned over evidence of fraud to the Justice Department?" Alexander stated.

Leavitt responded, "It's a clever question. First of all, I think all Americans would agree that funding mastectomies in Mozambique is not something that the American people should be funding. In fact, according to an IG report from the Social Security Administration, there was $71 billion worth of fraud in one single fiscal year that we know about."

Smart aleck Alexander interrupted, "To be clear, that $71 billion was from 2015 to 2022, so it wasn't in just one year --"

Leavitt fired back, "So are you defending $71 billion in fraud, Peter? That's a lot of money. We will not be deterred from people like you and the press who are clearly adamantly opposed to cutting waste, fraud and abuse, but we know that American taxpayers at home, who have been struggling with an inflationary crisis, don't want their tax dollars going towards crazy DEI programs in countries overseas!"

name: Josh (personal)
subject: I’m one of the most vulnerable Democrats
body:
I need your help.
Hey Peter,
Yesterday we broke the news that the Cook Political Report listed me as one of the most vulnerable Democrats in the country. To be honest, it feels terrible to hear it.
We are working so hard right now to push back on the chaos in D.C. and this ranking reminds me of how hard we’re going to have to work just to keep this seat blue.
We have to be clear-eyed about the position we’re in right now though. I’m expecting Donald Trump and Elon Musk to pour millions of dollars into my district with attack ads calling me all sorts of names and lying about my record.
The only thing I can do is control the controllables and that means raising as much as we can to fight back. We cannot allow Republicans to control the narrative.
That’s why I’m asking for your help. Can you please chip in as much as you can to give my campaign the resources we need to keep this seat blue?
Here’s my link: [_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-09-Email-Feb2025-FR-February**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102546104/529510949/-1062586212?&refcode=E12280-20250221-PersonalAsk-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmIzODg0NDAtOWVmMC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5hb-I7FVqhNAHLIvQQxHq-1ZrlnqbOjxaSeFppFfJJ4=)

Josh

clean_body: I need your help. Hey Peter, Yesterday we broke the news that the Cook Political Report listed me as one of the most vulnerable Democrats in the country. To be honest, it feels terrible to hear it. We are working so hard right now to push back on the chaos in D.C. and this ranking reminds me of how hard we’re going to have to work just to keep this seat blue. We have to be clear-eyed about the position we’re in right now though. I’m expecting Donald Trump and Elon Musk to pour millions of dollars into my district with attack ads calling me all sorts of names and lying about my record. The only thing I can do is control the controllables and that means raising as much as we can to fight back. We cannot allow Republicans to control the narrative. That’s why I’m asking for your help. Can you please chip in as much as you can to give my campaign the resources we need to keep this seat blue? name: Indiana GOP
subject: Continuing to Deliver for Hoosiers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | _**Continuing to Deliver for Hoosiers**_
---
Friends, I’ve been your Chairwoman for a week now, and it’s been an absolute whirlwind! Governor Braun and his team are working at full speed, and our legislators are in session. Meanwhile, conservative leaders from all over the state are stepping up to help Hoosiers. Just in the past few days, Governor Braun signed an executive order to fix the rising costs of Medicaid for ABA treatment, a huge deal for thousands of families. He also visited the brave soldiers of the Indiana National Guard who are about to deploy to protect our southern border. On top of all of that, he’s been working hard to give Hoosiers tax relief too! Our federal representatives are also busy, confirming President Trump’s cabinet nominees and pushing through important legislation to make America great again. Here at the Indiana GOP HQ, we’re excited about all the progress being made to advance our Freedom and Opportunity and America First Agendas. But remember, if you’re not moving forward, you’re falling behind! Our party is stronger and more energetic than ever, and it’s up to us to keep that momentum going! As always, thank you for being a part of our Indiana GOP team and please do not hesitate to reach out if I can ever be of assistance.
---
| |
---
| | Lana Keesling, Indiana GOP Chairwoman
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
| | _**Governor Braun Signs Executive Order to reduce Medicaid Costs for Applied Behavior Analysis Autism Therapy**_
---
---
**Governor Mike Braun** on Thursday, signed an executive order to find solutions to the souring Medicaid costs of ABA treatment, after an independent audit found over $56.5 million of improper payments. **What he said** : "We’re taking decisive action to contain these massive cost increases while maintaining quality of care for the Hoosiers that rely on these treatments.” \- **Governor****Braun** , via a [press release](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/eLWvud52iohU6tog6Yf6-cuc_zncfm5ICcXXoe2-tIK_eBcOiL0sCU6F8RmK1XxFA4TW-7vk9xbXvTuPtW7be2byB5nXFmYrBXxCHZ1TiJIqVDBN1hDFNhfr7a-J0aXnO-LsZuMYxLSsl9_qiC2YqXBoNJS1HsWrtTjaaLMRrRwMC6RXhIii_2Am_Wy3rM-nWkhbeJHY3qkjMeHC13lrv4I_mJO_hM2LtoZxeKvcyzulDx6CZRYa-lAaN4aF45SGIUyC_4hVMahUaJGf7qXcfgs6WFzcPZ80Glp6XOyyU50zi7c3BGOHSD8r_Rs1eXmZxMoSRbGpmniwWopYSPEiajQGg2Pi0dyCPPCmYAWrxfb-HYqbSrKmeNPoeekLcudzUGwHmNL0HA2aRMX41HlHtOOCLZgiHSHYuDWPgbtWzCZwgtnAn1ztDaL7Wo9K4vf8ssRt9XxSvhOKuG_g2Ug/LX43GFnVlqjLM_Ku3iJqsxEd7o2JZIqb/6).
---
**_Governor Braun Spoke With Indiana National Guard Soldiers Deploying to the Southern Border_**
---
---
**Governor Mike Braun** on Wednesday, spoke to soldiers in the Indiana National Guard preparing to deploy to secure the southern border and end the flow of fentanyl. **What he's saying** : "Their service to our state and country will save lives, and we are proud of them and grateful for their service!" \- **Governor****Braun,** via [X](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/wLaYHXyduHZ1jbCHbdSx31jQelKl_Fr5kNUf8ehxMiGwvqUxlEjvTGk6dC9raNSFQeC0BwJcDFNUwhVxv1F63Xsu0qiGKmWVdv2_yelrpysBRx3LP_oiYur_g_4aCoFTS9Cazi5cjXEZVDZa9sn1BeOok8428h9IYTnmie-FW7iNBHPD2_fiCAoL_yWK-KAZR1yBo2dLRlJLXtj7UZyH9iD9LEfa4v58CCcJ3RFK1xVxBcFasBUGpKvZyeusfDhrtjo-Tigr73fmGUhsRO1LIiN2LxEeoJoAcwD5XQ/i_k-LeS3mWjHSB_SoCPzQCNVKMDg0QNX/6).

_**Indiana GOP is Hiring Interns for the Spring Semester**_
---
---
Looking to jumpstart your career in politics, public relations, or grassroots organizing? The Indiana Republican Party is now accepting applications for our Spring Internship Program!

✅ Gain hands-on experience in campaign strategy, communications, and event planning
✅ Work alongside state leaders and build valuable connections
✅ Make a real impact on Republican efforts in Indiana

Apply Today! Spots are limited!

🔗 [https://www.indiana.gop/internships](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/5e8v3wuk5Bwgb7efaLRBwvUn2Zy1FyOYH9feTNTsHGzoiq1SA_Dx6De61_Isb9TjVhMDC6rOdiLsok-iSynpb1JDkUFEk-e0xc-JxuxblPFUaoyrxsqXx0HAYBtxhbiTIFWlCwZ_vgSYTmJ2dafJamylwt4kH3SW3BDEnbs7ATYxAz3lbIK_Dcdpp0DMPGo2wzQkFj41fzgyQPSbO4v6w89M7IynvKkzcy2cDK5n_0eP2p6lBQwL8D1eIy_yFz_HREACVhQRxYjt39JXE6M/suGwDtWTuS6kId0WxTklw9mz6AgvYxdd/6)

**📱 _News You Can Use_ **

clean_body: | | | | | | | Continuing to Deliver for Hoosiers Friends, I’ve been your Chairwoman for a week now, and it’s been an absolute whirlwind! Governor Braun and his team are working at full speed, and our legislators are in session. Meanwhile, conservative leaders from all over the state are stepping up to help Hoosiers. Just in the past few days, Governor Braun signed an executive order to fix the rising costs of Medicaid for ABA treatment, a huge deal for thousands of families. He also visited the brave soldiers of the Indiana National Guard who are about to deploy to protect our southern border. On top of all of that, he’s been working hard to give Hoosiers tax relief too! Our federal representatives are also busy, confirming President Trump’s cabinet nominees and pushing through important legislation to make America great again. Here at the Indiana GOP HQ, we’re excited about all the progress being made to advance our Freedom and Opportunity and America First Agendas. But remember, if you’re not moving forward, you’re falling behind! Our party is stronger and more energetic than ever, and it’s up to us to keep that momentum going! As always, thank you for being a part of our Indiana GOP team and please do not hesitate to reach out if I can ever be of assistance. | | | | Lana Keesling, Indiana GOP Chairwoman | | | | | | Governor Braun Signs Executive Order to reduce Medicaid Costs for Applied Behavior Analysis Autism Therapy Governor Mike Braun on Thursday, signed an executive order to find solutions to the souring Medicaid costs of ABA treatment, after an independent audit found over $56.5 million of improper payments. What he said : "We’re taking decisive action to contain these massive cost increases while maintaining quality of care for the Hoosiers that rely on these treatments.” \- GovernorBraun , via a . Governor Braun Spoke With Indiana National Guard Soldiers Deploying to the Southern Border Governor Mike Braun on Wednesday, spoke to soldiers in the Indiana National Guard preparing to deploy to secure the southern border and end the flow of fentanyl. What he's saying : "Their service to our state and country will save lives, and we are proud of them and grateful for their service!" \- GovernorBraun, via . | | Indiana GOP is Hiring Interns for the Spring Semester Looking to jumpstart your career in politics, public relations, or grassroots organizing? name: Kim Schrier
subject: Steady support means steady progress – together.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
I know it's a lot to ask, but we’re in this fight together. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102546371/529511905/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjNlNDkzZC05ZmYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8iinCBqpxNql_LbXnanlaixx2HRFc7ls0m9789exTJQ=&emci=abd162ac-a7ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=ff3e493d-9ff0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

As we gear up for the challenges ahead, one thing has become clear: **We need a steady, reliable base of support.** That’s why I’m asking you to consider becoming a monthly donor to our campaign.

But before I ask you to [**chip in and become a monthly donor to help me continue fighting for you in the House,**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102546372/529511908/120040556?refcode=em25_250220_mthdnr_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250220_mthdnr_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=ff3e493d-9ff0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjNlNDkzZC05ZmYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8iinCBqpxNql_LbXnanlaixx2HRFc7ls0m9789exTJQ=) _let me explain why your support is so crucial:_

Monthly donations allow us to plan effectively, respond quickly to new challenges, and continue fighting for what matters most to YOU.

Right now, here’s what is top of mind for my constituents: \- Trump and Musk’s slashing of government programs is leaving our forests more at risk for catastrophic wildfires, and medical research at a standstill.

\- Trump’s tariffs will raise prices at home and limit our ability to sell Washington ag products abroad.

\- Eggs, milk, and bread have gotten even MORE expensive.

\- Elon Musk and his helpers are digging into our personal data and finances.

\- Housing remains unaffordable and Trump’s doing nothing to help. In this polarized climate, we can’t afford to just be reactive. There’s no time to lose. Funding we can count on every month gives us the flexibility to stay focused and take action immediately on the issues that matter most – _without worrying about last-minute fundraising pushes._ Monthly donors play a critical role in the long-term success of our mission.

clean_body: I know it's a lot to ask, but we’re in this fight together. Peter, As we gear up for the challenges ahead, one thing has become clear: We need a steady, reliable base of support. That’s why I’m asking you to consider becoming a monthly donor to our campaign. But before I ask you to = let me explain why your support is so crucial: Monthly donations allow us to plan effectively, respond quickly to new challenges, and continue fighting for what matters most to YOU. Right now, here’s what is top of mind for my constituents: \- Trump and Musk’s slashing of government programs is leaving our forests more at risk for catastrophic wildfires, and medical research at a standstill. \- Trump’s tariffs will raise prices at home and limit our ability to sell Washington ag products abroad. \- Eggs, milk, and bread have gotten even MORE expensive. \- Elon Musk and his helpers are digging into our personal data and finances. \- Housing remains unaffordable and Trump’s doing nothing to help. In this polarized climate, we can’t afford to just be reactive. There’s no time to lose. Funding we can count on every month gives us the flexibility to stay focused and take action immediately on the issues that matter most – without worrying about last-minute fundraising pushes. Monthly donors play a critical role in the long-term success of our mission. Your consistent support is what fuels this grassroots movement and helps me and my team power our fight against tyranny and for better policy, better leadership, and a better future for all of us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Onward, Kim Rep. name: All On The Line
subject: Why are they so obsessed with overturning this NC election result?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Chip in now — they are trying to steal a state supreme court seat.
|
---

Peter,
It’s still hard to believe this is happening. Right now, North Carolina is in a legal battle that could overturn the results of a state supreme court election.
State supreme court candidate Jefferson Griffin has continued to contest his 2024 election loss to incumbent Justice Allison Riggs — challenging more than 60,000 legally cast ballots — even after having his arguments rejected in a state court.
Justice Riggs’ victory has been confirmed by two separate recounts. Why are some partisan forces in North Carolina willing to disenfranchise its own citizens to win this seat on the state supreme court?
This outcome of this ruling — and this race — could have major implications for future elections. **Griffin explicitly named protecting future partisan gerrymanders as a reason he ran for the seat in the first place.** If there’s a conservative majority on the court for the upcoming redistricting cycle, it could mean another decade of manipulated maps.
**And if this playbook works in North Carolina, extremists could repeat it across the country — silencing the will of the people in the name of gaining power.**
One thing is clear: far-right extremists want to drag us down a dangerous path. Now’s the time to scale up our efforts advocating for fair districts and fair representation for voters in North Carolina and across the nation.
[**Peter, we can’t afford to downplay the gravity of this moment. Please rush a donation to ensure we can keep blocking extremists from threatening our democracy. clean_body: Chip in now — they are trying to steal a state supreme court seat. | Peter, It’s still hard to believe this is happening. Right now, North Carolina is in a legal battle that could overturn the results of a state supreme court election. State supreme court candidate Jefferson Griffin has continued to contest his 2024 election loss to incumbent Justice Allison Riggs — challenging more than 60,000 legally cast ballots — even after having his arguments rejected in a state court. Justice Riggs’ victory has been confirmed by two separate recounts. Why are some partisan forces in North Carolina willing to disenfranchise its own citizens to win this seat on the state supreme court? This outcome of this ruling — and this race — could have major implications for future elections. Griffin explicitly named protecting future partisan gerrymanders as a reason he ran for the seat in the first place. If there’s a conservative majority on the court for the upcoming redistricting cycle, it could mean another decade of manipulated maps. And if this playbook works in North Carolina, extremists could repeat it across the country — silencing the will of the people in the name of gaining power. One thing is clear: far-right extremists want to drag us down a dangerous path. Now’s the time to scale up our efforts advocating for fair districts and fair representation for voters in North Carolina and across the nation. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you, The All On The Line Team is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. subject: Which issues matter most to you right now?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
As the “attorney for the people,” Rob wants to stay updated on what issues matter most to you at this moment.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250221&t=1&akid=1655%2E1088799%2EZdqbJa)
Rob wants to stay updated on what issues matter most to you. That's why **[we’re asking you to complete this brief survey to let Rob know what’s on your mind.](https://act.robbonta.com/survey/20250221-feb-survey/?source=em20250221-1655&akid=1655%2E1088799%2EZdqbJa)**
**[Take the Survey »](https://act.robbonta.com/survey/20250221-feb-survey/?source=em20250221-1655&akid=1655%2E1088799%2EZdqbJa)**
Unsurprisingly, the last time we asked you to share your thoughts in January, the most important issue on respondents’ minds was voting rights and our democracy.
**January 2025 Top Issues:**
1\. Voting rights and our democracy
2\. Climate change and the environment
3\. Affordable and accessible healthcare
4\. Reproductive freedom
5\. Gun violence prevention
The AG has been hard at work holding the Trump administration accountable and standing up for the basic rights of all Californians by filing lawsuits whenever the White House breaks the law.
He’s also holding those attempting to rip off wildfire victims to account, protecting our communities from gun violence, standing up to fossil fuel companies and other big polluters, and a whole lot more.
With things constantly shifting and new developments happening every day, the “attorney for the people” wants to hear what your top priorities are right now.
**[Can you take a moment to complete our brief February survey to share your thoughts with Rob? With so much happening across California and the country, he wants to make sure _everyone_ has their voice heard.](https://act.robbonta.com/survey/20250221-feb-survey/?source=em20250221-1655&akid=1655%2E1088799%2EZdqbJa)**
**[Take the Survey »](https://act.robbonta.com/survey/20250221-feb-survey/?source=em20250221-1655&akid=1655%2E1088799%2EZdqbJa)**
— Team Bonta

Peter,

Maggie is already hard at work working with anyone who will work with her to support the brave men and women who served our country.

Earlier this month, she introduced bipartisan legislation to ensure veterans can travel safely and comfortably. By giving the VA more flexibility, the ASSIST Act aims to improve the quality of life for veterans who need these essential adaptations to travel.

This is an important step, but Maggie isn’t stopping here. She’s going to keep fighting to ensure that everyone across New Hampshire — and across the country — always gets a fair deal.

Thank you for being a part of this.

\- Team Goodlander

clean_body: Maggie is already hard at work working with anyone who will work with her to support the brave men and women who served our country. | = | = Peter, Maggie is already hard at work working with anyone who will work with her to support the brave men and women who served our country. Earlier this month, she introduced bipartisan legislation to ensure veterans can travel safely and comfortably. By giving the VA more flexibility, the ASSIST Act aims to improve the quality of life for veterans who need these essential adaptations to travel. This is an important step, but Maggie isn’t stopping here. She’s going to keep fighting to ensure that everyone across New Hampshire — and across the country — always gets a fair deal. Thank you for being a part of this. \- Team Goodlander | = * | | = Paid for by Maggie for Congress Maggie for Congress 131 Daniel Webster Hwy #949 Nashua, NH 03060 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

body:
| | | **BREAKING via _The Hill_ : "Elon Musk is coming for your Social Security"**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/21094?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250221-ElonMuskAlertViaDSCC-ElonMuskSocSecSignOn-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250221-ElonMuskAlertViaDSCC-ElonMuskSocSecSignOn-ETG-sl1&akid=19655%2E9716520%2EtYTZ95)
**We MUST fight back:****[Tell Elon Musk: Hands off our Social Security!>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21094?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250221-ElonMuskAlertViaDSCC-ElonMuskSocSecSignOn-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250221-ElonMuskAlertViaDSCC-ElonMuskSocSecSignOn-ETG-sl1&akid=19655%2E9716520%2EtYTZ95)**
| | [ADD MY NAME](https://go.dscc.org/go/21094?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250221-ElonMuskAlertViaDSCC-ElonMuskSocSecSignOn-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250221-ElonMuskAlertViaDSCC-ElonMuskSocSecSignOn-ETG-sl1&akid=19655%2E9716520%2EtYTZ95)
---

Team, millions of Americans have paid into Social Security for _decades_. They've worked _hard_ for the benefits they've earned.

**But now, an unelected, unhinged billionaire could get unfettered access to Americans' PRIVATE DATA and start _laying off_ the workers who make sure Social Security checks are delivered on time!**

Enough is enough: Elon Musk has NO PLACE in our government, and NO RIGHT to take away our Social Security benefits. **We need your signature _urgently_ to prove that Democrats are standing up to him -- so sign on now:**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/21094?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250221-ElonMuskAlertViaDSCC-ElonMuskSocSecSignOn-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250221-ElonMuskAlertViaDSCC-ElonMuskSocSecSignOn-ETG-sl1&akid=19655%2E9716520%2EtYTZ95)
**[Add your name IMMEDIATELY and demand that Elon Musk keep his corrupt hands off our Social Security!>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21094?ask=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250221-ElonMuskAlertViaDSCC-ElonMuskSocSecSignOn-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250221-ElonMuskAlertViaDSCC-ElonMuskSocSecSignOn-ETG-sl1&akid=19655%2E9716520%2EtYTZ95)**

name: Hillsdale College via Victory Mailings
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity” on DVD
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1l9xm6ebc3i7ajxwj2jwr92q3p0i8bph9a4mda8xlgffz1rz8e3oavgwl5gb9y9lm8zo7yahp26q7o9hrjc&__stmp=ss216y&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss216y&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6de3xel652pezqu187j1vueait25q11aa9v6pdi1psix91zp2hllf5s2fp0m3rbo69l6ozwfpy3vfcbcgl3lyxl55kg2b5ow937c05ekak1wplebms8oujxnv4uy0kp9qdi46c75zf9spibo9mipp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss216y&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss216y&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss216y&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss216y&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6de3xel652pezqu187j1vueaicb7g8fyv1spft2r0z973hk30y7ylnlvnvvpeimd85i8aa498adq52fsbe93u8xqizcha2mh8lkwh0mlnmtximcqtu5s5wwjefrhkr6el45fvuzezan63qqrw8wfh&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss216y&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss216y&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: Please see a special message from our sponsor:

name: AOC
subject: I refuse to give up.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
If we do not assert ourselves and enshrine our rights — and demand healthcare, and education, and dignity — the alternative is barbarism, which is what we are contending with now.
The fact that people are choosing between medicine and rent is barbarism.
The fact that people are worried about whether they will be on the streets every 4 weeks is barbarism.
The fact that every time a person has an ache or a pain, and they’re scared that it could either be a sore joint or cancer, but they can’t find out because they can’t afford the doctor? **This is barbarism.**
If we do not demand — and not only demand, but win — unions, healthcare, wages, and ending endless war, then we will condemn ourselves to barbarism.
I refuse to give up. I refuse to submit myself to that future. That’s not a life.
**And so to live, we have to fight for each other. We have to stand with each other. We have to fight for this vision and this world.**
[If you can, will you make a $5 contribution – or any amount that is meaningful to you – to help power our fight for transformative change? Every donation will make a difference.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250221.waAjkB&refcode=em20250221-8193-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8193%2E2526796%2Eb_Q-xS)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250221.waAjkB&refcode=em20250221-8193-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8193%2E2526796%2Eb_Q-xS)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250221?refcode=em20250221-8193-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=21&refcode2=8193_2526796_b_Q-xS&akid=8193%2E2526796%2Eb_Q-xS)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250221-8193-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=22&akid=8193%2E2526796%2Eb_Q-xS)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=8193%2E2526796%2Eb_Q-xS) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=8193%2E2526796%2Eb_Q-xS) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=8193%2E2526796%2Eb_Q-xS)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=8193%2E2526796%2Eb_Q-xS)

The fact that every time a person has an ache or a pain, and they’re scared that it could either be a sore joint or cancer, but they can’t find out because they can’t afford the doctor? This is barbarism. If we do not demand — and not only demand, but win — unions, healthcare, wages, and ending endless war, then we will condemn ourselves to barbarism. I refuse to give up. body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

While most Democrats in Congress are posting and talking a big game
against Elon Musk’s government takeover and access to millions of
Americans’ sensitive, private data, many have taken money from his
company.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250221?refcode=em20250221-36450&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36450_1203867_e61bPu&akid=36450%2E1203867%2Ee61bPu ]The Intercept_: DEMOCRATS SWEAR THEY'LL FIGHT ELON MUSK. BUT WHAT ABOUT
THE CASH THEY TOOK FROM SPACEX? Musk has emerged as Trump's far-right hand
man, creating some awkwardness for the president's Democratic foes.

At least 77 Democratic congressional campaign committees took more than
half a million dollars from SpaceX’s PAC last election cycle. That
includes a $30,000 donation to the Democratic Congressional Campaign
Committee (DCCC) and $15,000 to the Democratic Senatorial Campaign
Committee (DSCC), the two main fundraising arms of the Party.

Many of the Democrats who took SpaceX PAC money sit on committees that
oversee government contracts with SpaceX. How can they hold this unelected
billionaire accountable for his corporate coup when they receive financial
support from his company?

As our communications director Usamah Andrabi told The Intercept, either
Democrats can continue to enable it alongside Republicans, or they can
tackle it head-on, reject all corporate PACs as a party policy, and
restore the trust and credibility that they have spent decades losing with
working-class voters.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250221?refcode=em20250221-36450&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36450_1203867_e61bPu&akid=36450%2E1203867%2Ee61bPu ]At Justice Democrats, we’re only recruiting progressive, working-class
candidates who pledge to reject corporate PAC money to run for Congress
next year and challenge the out-of-touch, corporate Democrats failing to
hold Musk and Trump accountable. Directly fuel our work by pitching in
$5 or more!

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250221?refcode=em20250221-36450&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36450_1203867_e61bPu&akid=36450%2E1203867%2Ee61bPu ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

body:
| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/KbVhlWuag5Hp7AN3F9MysWywwLf_zo24lh74uR7b-Tdow29zaEWoq8JuFe4HraZpyMSDJQyQj1kbQtuntjNCBTrU1Q4zBJx2OBAfCWBmTHIXsXK1Jf-uL8fCFz0sYiY4DyMyNR-lTFu4vQm3vkttff0xWRheCQQ7sn6wxNNaf8yEBIyxAg3boFmS5ib1D0-O44aqONh8Fsx8vgnV4wBbifJ9uMUCgOUgIFVvsoXKgqiywoYfelLXCAWYry0N1J0PjUdSIGI1fNCSO03X7P8QfvgmqL_X83cr12Ph6BlbgHN_Kb3WtGNlh5Pm5N35tnDoQFryDzv0dgRqllLZX6gdz99B6fexzMqi-qVD0_mbePVqfiVxTyG5mh_pnQ8vM09u8lZ3R2z1LktwO8Aj4gHvpC68jElx2JaJEhriqPRxTnlO8A58cC2y-VAtPKQ9RdtsZQ/4fsIbot3sGSJ3i12ljAatzoc_tFNMt3w/6)
---
Peter, I often talk about the crazy spending that takes place in Washington, and when I think things couldn't get any worse, the Swamp surprises me. Just over the last few days, we've learned **_[taxpayer funds were being funneled to USAID](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/TEy-845f9i55a2tZd5X-WBDok1nOHZL3gVyZ58vafOWDZwNbhfgdDT5It5NyO7vZDO3WYZhWLMxaINY2nTD-nHCxwK5RpyllPzEGxPj1SjM_MZh6qQ_gY7d00y_aTQKq8L76lCavHnL96073EKvAm5iWdsGe71tmoY-GGJmH4CHxoKyLnjTqkmNiujBk46EIlFtvvwuKn2upUZOF-zmMLfloBCkTU66E2_paUIvy3S16CN9AYjegZaNE7t5WN5o5tvQfRJHZ-2yWTZ-wh9Bc_8SewoUA-fIYIj5mvANiqiLw5lrHgQ-n9Y5aWK9w-Lq5VW_JFM9vgtAQ5eLa_W7y7orCqIOIQUBIHt7dngf7LRZO47hYZkEsv4h1mm90mI9EUeFElI2o1XjOGXknOVTP_LA_Xf1xR79Ts96IkqZALt09ZrNKa4hEaA85a8vpXizg3g/8DHeJHB3n38LAhuPPCBDA-IPaqZLbB6j/6)_** to spend:
* $249 million bolstering "disadvantaged female farmers" in Ukraine that produce grain and oil seeds
* $268 million on 6,200 journalists across 707 media outlets and 279 "media" NGOs, including 9 out of 10 media outlets in Ukraine
* $8 million to study the effect of flavored cigarettes on bisexuals and lesbians

This is the kind of insanity that hard-working Americans are tired of.
Every single day, I'm fighting to rein in wasteful spending and tackle our national debt. Show your support for fiscal responsibility. **_[Chip in now to stand with me.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/HP3aMSbm1I5AU20ALXEfwlM59BopWRNw-9VwoS99_ALT82WXn63yuyVlT6zmVoCNmzeQ4ayPS02NiC7nT8H-mGdtnjI7pj9aDEX-7hNdLlsjszh9oQ6z7pcUyGvgobgq2aVH8V_B-Lmki1FTmKfmeNjXN55r0zNG46fphTJ8TKDl-k2-X8BK0RWo542mfN9omh1KGmjHQdTG9XdsAAr7gZmREv80scCG2VbcUgWYgyi-_4bvgseYT4LdWbCmuAxucLZ0ZxiTEbVZx5zFjZ8FRSF6CBWLRrCAZRV4N7uAtgGqC4OS9kWdbKtuIIqRttBZkSkMy-fdjUmdjHxMSKbcwVzqCYYOmpyBrI0LVumK70lbtIIxeT7q0YHejTyMRkczTiEKdiXmvTJzX2oU2NDGERpVtaDX0Il-HmjBvThN0K1UV5xOItGAkwmfTNobBnltog/mNwCIMpDfa_0WG6HjvfCI23kLExdbuH0/6)_**

clean_body: | | | Peter, I often talk about the crazy spending that takes place in Washington, and when I think things couldn't get any worse, the Swamp surprises me. Just over the last few days, we've learned to spend: $249 million bolstering "disadvantaged female farmers" in Ukraine that produce grain and oil seeds $268 million on 6,200 journalists across 707 media outlets and 279 "media" NGOs, including 9 out of 10 media outlets in Ukraine $8 million to study the effect of flavored cigarettes on bisexuals and lesbians This is the kind of insanity that hard-working Americans are tired of. Every single day, I'm fighting to rein in wasteful spending and tackle our national debt. Show your support for fiscal responsibility. name: Lila Rose
subject: Will you sign our DOGE petition to defund Planned Parenthood?
body:
Did you know that Planned Parenthood received $699 million dollars from taxpayers in the last reported year?

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/u/1n3UkbrB4EG4WaVmCXHLrYxnAnZHaKUDmc9_Iz8eKdPCYRgRoMUG1zAwr0j8Q0s625ElZOEhZ7lmSaCIDRiRW-FIHHqu_sUYEatjgby0YJZ6KEruu_o2q6uag4eBS6Z1fYzSbyCEchweFDaMas0qIoghfUKP_m0rGIQXgdAKZ_gT1998P0tPMg8g/Iz2poLWaF73td0lLplxyNnzDtk-pr1rn/6)_
---
[ ](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/Sci3VDuk9_9zkWp2jVwFxJvwvhqU6iu0gdqGWU8hXBhpmpdI6jiM3XFN2IHnIRPHj-ylekqfU4sErPlzJSqma1Brjsdev4CW68Lq1JVNlw2olhgKP4Sg0EGEcy5osTDftZEOEFVAk5eRQHuXFMVuf58gnOAnlYICORhCNzvZ6Cozz5GWFO_Kah_rynWul7Ik6WXC6pip_9VeMl-kkHW3hw7f7ZQcGY-E40K2quhc6sKLc65vO15ZEraFHGdKs6Cp8H66GiQDvMICR1l124okMse7JRLouxQaIetnXjDDXvlpYuLs8imHjhXEoF8Wf97HsCLyE1Yis9ex7a8SFnxz0IaZxfsw25Aoxr9dKFbmGe6jI8NSdlsLE1JvnwVc9Gb0lzTeCqCilskAYwUNjhuoTbpqB95d22mtNTjqoBoSCPrKaq9SfbH1bhPKNIo/qI32XOP1y4BWAYaqjNvwn8QogNvP0PBa/6)
#
Friend of Life,

Did you know that Planned Parenthood received **$699 million dollars** from taxpayers in the last reported year? In fact, the abortion corporation has received billions of dollars from the government over the past few decades!

Based on reporting from its 2022-2023 annual report, Planned Parenthood killed approximately 1,076 preborn babies every day, 45 every hour, and one every 80 seconds. Its annual killing rate has increased by 20,000 since the previous reported year.

Thankfully, national leaders are beginning to take notice.

President Trump has chosen Elon Musk to head the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), a new government agency that aims to reduce waste and spending, including potentially pulling federal funding from Planned Parenthood.

Last fall, Elon Musk co-authored an op-ed, published by the Wall Street Journal (WSJ), which said:

_" ...DOGE will help end federal overspending by taking aim at the $500 billion plus in annual federal expenditures that are unauthorized by Congress or being used in ways that Congress never intended, from $535 million a year to the Corporation for Public Broadcasting and $1.5 billion for grants to international organizations to nearly $300 million to progressive groups like Planned Parenthood."_

This is incredibly hopeful news, Friend of Life, but it's not final. [ ](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/kfnqkjcoma-Og3U5TLpA_CxgeVT3b_e2fPQuEVeACQAsoJ_IUrg0RQuFgCY4YXZYWXta-Grnq9NAZKtdu-t2ph3VWL3EdqxES7_seBFjynYiQOnHpNDqm3EkxeZudqVYF3R6ZwVQhOIcd8fHwGjRWsNdXQSi_RXHjkEQ_C-KUHzw1oQV8Bnb2EE4h3SNnSMQ3wtjSZCNNoYSPN-91l38NDnj6dnudf9GHmFebvQn4NIsiRc2GOKwoKqPcWbJEFbEPUwffbOgaYaaYBEmnNmaheRJyxr1xtYap0codriHPzPloon7IdHPKwXVH0NE1uyoMAqRJcWUKMmNFGcYEBFidrJWm0RnyFVvPXh6CJMTjX1z7QMI323vKAfrKTHEcWYezGgmBcET8dKFSrqzU2N3SZJYK6znSrUgcGVbJUB0qdFvQwGZ6IVKGtazBJc/sv5WeFirL12gh0offv0JEyugZKwSr34c/6)
The fact that more people are recognizing our tax dollars should not go to such an evil corporation is surely due to the persistent activism of pro-life work to expose the horrific truth about Planned Parenthood.

To keep pressure on the Trump administration, Live Action is spearheading a petition that will go to these national leaders, demanding the idea of defunding Planned Parenthood become a reality. **Sign your name here, and share it with your friends and family:[https://www.liveaction.org/end-taxpayer-dollars-to-planned-parenthood](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/ZH4cW42S44nhimuIsor5DBDIeNUnQgmFl-vao2fTRMHFSkFHWyfzClfoy5mcT7b9lmLDveFVs2oaYMmLIjsYajoXAa4KHkWEAIFJ6BEfmaBVj5pigQrAA_fIWKrlPEEEV-H-tRRbBATVZwWWU_I4cY7ifeFEsFzLZfXuUAGJ5zNRFfwhUIz9SgY2x5eA6V1cxGMB57PX6zKGk-6UjGq6ez0K7u2LG9-gvQ5Lpw4n6OF_3Fbw0jtI0a18NG0cweB6ut_MtenINsQl7xQSnnND0pUIJm0oj_lQjGUlPhzKXpTNn-JnAok0gmJltDXtqKCzjOBiPpGUQgOL9d_-7u5cHbf48pG3qTQMJb3hDSqOwX6e__jhVxiJkD_EWwykbLyWFrJQzJJD-4QyKGB3i3gu7nUEzX_ShTo0UMiwj1wnncnXfbyMhjg9JXRnKUY/kc3jsEhCYPUUAfcb-gpFKpgk4pbrChH9/6)**

Defunding Planned Parenthood will require more than DOGE's involvement. We need the HHS leadership (recently confirmed Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.) to get on board, as well as obvious leadership from President Trump.

Musk, Kennedy, and Trump need to hear affirmation from the American people. They need to know we wholeheartedly support the defunding of Planned Parenthood!

Everyone needs to know: Over 1,000 abortions take place via Planned Parenthood every day in America. 1,000 children gone, forever, under the sickening guise of "care, no matter what."

We must put an end to this atrocity, beginning with the removal of federal funding. **Sign your name to declare to these national leaders that you see the value in every human life, you will speak for the most vulnerable among us who cannot speak for themselves, and you do not want any of your hard-earned dollars to go to Planned Parenthood:[https://www.liveaction.org/end-taxpayer-dollars-to-planned-parenthood](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/6_KMzl478u7l1_JxBaQAmUy8dL4QiPBoL1JkfesDM7Xpa7szpJLy1kw5WLl5aeY-kx-ckQcjLijOR9EiacnyFaOGhpogwukW0JczmXGD0dFtiW_TCRGN7_zvoCXVg727ngUmJ8afuYPHBOprjiT9EcDoMx3tPTvxgFTTlVQ69GdGwbh394WwYIkiKG1K58QwEmsOqtTm_hlFaMlKEDnnvQjd3uITbTJIKy_jxYTFnzHbDrjxoZlXug1mzeUNnEL0FmQBy9O0jap6Po1EZkLUMvQoEzzzyeeA7ihzU2SrSZifFdADTPJw-FTqmsHi9p2GFl7iHHce2ZOkBiBAhcNBax4C0Gt2IU2eOnw1K3msHb3zc4J_Z_yXWVY0yEcs7tcqLB28DEZpoCPE2FZxJohzU-duvax2SljRwoJBCf2IYTPmOILC-Wbv_F6B8RE/U2ZswrE7jMkReanfS3TI4bR_Z8CzgKMD/6)**

Thank you for standing with us in this concrete way to show America's leaders that we do NOT want to fund the killing of America's most vulnerable.

For Life,

Lila Rose
**Founder and President**

[](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/0GxpbgtR6zkuXJibWrZNEeHGEvhtZ5U9Rpg0gc5MVN7ZoRM4vnH10T5r7A5iAFrSYMSllR3-XYp7mLmOEPxXGuqOIPBOLXbbhuEtUwPaLvrWinDiqMsMjbYNYf1GvWpj9Mpqgwgt8BL4DkUCVwp9VCey5OCymm9mkMYZG5fPsxbe8K675L_8zYqOicHw7aI0HYiAhRxj57Gt90ElgN99-UqHt0WPN2UCyr7C9TEY4Zr28rjBhMJcYCDAJFOz91GteE7zS4nqAMsAjJ3RrWqMSG83oWsuT_J5M8Pa-wWU4ik-bkUWYmdFAg4eVB4OgvcdrWTcJLVGl_k1UOC6qHtOuiX7v_dJJ7APmAHG1-11F8h5SuIAMxcEpyboxgKAl3N7SuQWF3XcEGyES39q0kmw76OK4b0Kn-4lptsWK6A6PPY0f23GPxCjfDPDdrY/_bRd5Vve6k1o60nXuDZ9xxjkDrUppYLt/6)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201

name: PA Dems
subject: we have an election next month!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Peter,

Here in Pennsylvania, we have a crucial task at hand-to safeguard our democracy in the upcoming local elections across the Commonwealth. And the clock is ticking. We have a special election next month that needs your immediate attention.

**On March 25, James Malone, a seasoned politician with a strong track record of fighting for the working people, is running a competitive race for Pennsylvania Senate in the 36th district.** He is devoted to advancing effective and inclusive legislation that uplifts and addresses the needs of all community members.

[**This special election is our chance to show extremists that Democrats in PA are here and ready to fight back. name: Marie for Congress
subject: Support rural schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marie for Congress
body:
| | | **_The Columbian:
“Skamania County schools funding in jeopardy”_**
---

Peter,

Since day one, Marie has made it a top priority to advocate for rural communities in Southwest Washington, and she’s not letting up now.

Rural school districts have already been forced to endure painful budget shortfalls in recent decades, and right now they’re facing the possibility of further drastic cuts that will jeopardize schools’ ability to provide basic services.

**Marie is calling on Congress to invest in the equality of our children’s opportunities, making sure rural schools aren’t left behind.** [If you agree that where your kids live shouldn’t determine the quality of education they receive, add your name here:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102549770/529519731/1957701250?refcode=MGP_EM_PT_90DO_250221_1_1&refcode2=0f8b43f1-a6f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjhiNDNmMS1hNmYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TlK4LVcnGlbgCKIGeN1x3lhB49Go4VTtD7IelresVss=&emci=dee07b3c-a5f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=0f8b43f1-a6f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=31138575)
**[SUPPORT RURAL SCHOOLS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102549772/529519733/1957701250?refcode=MGP_EM_PT_90DO_250221_1_1&refcode2=0f8b43f1-a6f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjhiNDNmMS1hNmYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TlK4LVcnGlbgCKIGeN1x3lhB49Go4VTtD7IelresVss=&emci=dee07b3c-a5f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=0f8b43f1-a6f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=31138575)**
---

A decline in federal funding has already forced school districts in rural Southwest Washington to combine schools and lay off staff – and if they lose funding entirely, it would mean further layoffs, inability to repair aging facilities, and even cutting down to a four-day school week.

**Time is running out to reauthorize the federal funding program upon which these schools rely, and Marie is working hard to bring those dollars home.**

[Our children deserve access to an education that provides opportunities and helps prepare for their futures, regardless of zip code. If you agree, add your name here:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102549774/529519735/1957701250?refcode=MGP_EM_PT_90DO_250221_1_1&refcode2=0f8b43f1-a6f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjhiNDNmMS1hNmYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TlK4LVcnGlbgCKIGeN1x3lhB49Go4VTtD7IelresVss=&emci=dee07b3c-a5f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=0f8b43f1-a6f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=31138575)
**[SUPPORT RURAL SCHOOLS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102549776/529519737/1957701250?refcode=MGP_EM_PT_90DO_250221_1_1&refcode2=0f8b43f1-a6f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjhiNDNmMS1hNmYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TlK4LVcnGlbgCKIGeN1x3lhB49Go4VTtD7IelresVss=&emci=dee07b3c-a5f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=0f8b43f1-a6f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=31138575)**

clean_body: | | | The Columbian: “Skamania County schools funding in jeopardy” Peter, Since day one, Marie has made it a top priority to advocate for rural communities in Southwest Washington, and she’s not letting up now. Rural school districts have already been forced to endure painful budget shortfalls in recent decades, and right now they’re facing the possibility of further drastic cuts that will jeopardize schools’ ability to provide basic services. Marie is calling on Congress to invest in the equality of our children’s opportunities, making sure rural schools aren’t left behind. A decline in federal funding has already forced school districts in rural Southwest Washington to combine schools and lay off staff – and if they lose funding entirely, it would mean further layoffs, inability to repair aging facilities, and even cutting down to a four-day school week. Time is running out to reauthorize the federal funding program upon which these schools rely, and Marie is working hard to bring those dollars home. Thanks for taking a stand. – Team MGP | | | = | Marie Gluesenkamp Perez is a fifth-generation Washingtonian, a small business owner and a pro-choice mother. As the representative for Washington’s third Congressional District, she's working to bring the voices of working people back to DC. Marie works for Washington! = Email is an important way to stay in contact but if you feel like you’re receiving too much, to only receive the most important messages. ** Paid for by Marie for Congress Marie for Congress PO Box 1164 Washougal, WA 98671 United States

| **We wanted to make sure you didn’t miss Laura’s message, Peter!**

Last week, _The Cook Political Report_ released its initial ratings, and one thing that’s clear is that NY-04 will once again be one of the most competitive races in the entire country as we head into the 2026 midterm elections.

After flipping this district last year, all eyes will be on our campaign to see if we have what it takes to protect and expand our gains so we can deliver for Long Islanders.

Your support today will help us show everyone the incredible strength of our grassroots team and build up the support we need to re-elect Democrat Laura Gillen. We need to start building the critical campaign infrastructure to keep NY-04 blue and ensure Anthony D’Esposito has no path back to run for office again. But we can’t do this without your support.

name: Katie Porter
subject: Join Robert Garcia and me to chat oversight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39452%2E3422442%2EmVnqdW)
Derek,
When I got to Congress during the first Trump administration, I got to work conducting oversight. I demanded answers on behalf of the American people, and I called out Trump’s cronies who failed to deliver what families need.
Now, while I’m not in Congress anymore, I’m grateful to have representatives like my friend Robert Garcia who have picked up the torch. He sits on the Oversight Committee and has spoken truth to power about how MAGA extremists are destroying our government.
**Robert and I are hosting a Zoom discussion next week to talk with patriotic Americans like you about how we wield oversight as a tool to hold the Trump administration accountable.[ If you split a donation of any amount to my organization Truth to Power and Robert’s campaign using this link, you’ll receive the link to join.*](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-202502-zoom?refcode=em20250221-39452&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39452_3422442_mVnqdW&akid=39452%2E3422442%2EmVnqdW)**
**[Doubling Down on Oversight w/ Katie Porter and Robert Garcia](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-202502-zoom?refcode=em20250221-39452&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39452_3422442_mVnqdW&akid=39452%2E3422442%2EmVnqdW)**
Thursday, February 27, 6pm PT / 9pm ET
Zoom link provided upon donation of any amount
We can’t wait to see you next Thursday! If you have questions you’d like us to talk about, please share them on the ActBlue form when you make your donation.
—Katie Porter
*After you donate, the Zoom link will be sent in your ActBlue receipt. Look for an email from ActBlue with the subject line: “Thank you for your contribution!”

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people.
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=39452%2E3422442%2EmVnqdW).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
clean_body: Derek, When I got to Congress during the first Trump administration, I got to work conducting oversight. I demanded answers on behalf of the American people, and I called out Trump’s cronies who failed to deliver what families need. Now, while I’m not in Congress anymore, I’m grateful to have representatives like my friend Robert Garcia who have picked up the torch. He sits on the Oversight Committee and has spoken truth to power about how MAGA extremists are destroying our government. Robert and I are hosting a Zoom discussion next week to talk with patriotic Americans like you about how we wield oversight as a tool to hold the Trump administration accountable. Thursday, February 27, 6pm PT / 9pm ET Zoom link provided upon donation of any amount We can’t wait to see you next Thursday! If you have questions you’d like us to talk about, please share them on the ActBlue form when you make your donation. —Katie Porter After you donate, the Zoom link will be sent in your ActBlue receipt. Look for an email from ActBlue with the subject line: “Thank you for your contribution!” Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. Paid for by Truth to Power PAC

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I’m not afraid of Elon
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I’ve launched into orbit 4 times. I flew 39 combat missions in Desert Storm. I held my wife’s hand in the hospital after she was shot. I don’t scare easily, and I don’t really care what he thinks of me.
#

Elon Musk has accomplished a lot.
As an astronaut, I’ve genuinely enjoyed watching SpaceX progress over the last 20 years, and I actually own a Tesla.
But for some reason, he just attacked me on Twitter — calling me a “shill”.
Why this man — the richest person on earth, the CEO of a few big companies, the President’s best buddy — is spending his time attacking people on the internet is beyond me.
Now, he can go to war behind his keyboard all he wants. It’s a free country. But I’ve launched into orbit 4 times, I flew 39 combat missions in Desert Storm, and I held my wife’s hand in the hospital after she was shot in the head. I don’t scare easily, and I don’t really care what he thinks of me.
What I do care about is that he is gutting our government, illegally firing federal workers, illegally dismantling independent federal agencies, spreading conspiracies, and empowering extremists.
He’s trying to degrade government services that millions of people depend on — Medicaid, Medicare, Social Security, the VA, NOAA, the FAA, consumer watchdogs, and more, all to save a quick buck. People are scared. Many are already suffering because of what he’s done, and it’s only going to get worse if he’s allowed to continue.
And for what — a tax cut for billionaires? Give me a break.
I’m going to defend working families and the middle class against President Trump and Elon Musk with everything I’ve got. But I can’t do it alone.
[**Help me keep up the fight by making a donation to my campaign today.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-feb25/.w4QhX4&refcode=em250221-1-f&t=1&akid=5976%2E6688874%2ElvDrJ8)
