clean_body: I’ve launched into orbit 4 times. I flew 39 combat missions in Desert Storm. I held my wife’s hand in the hospital after she was shot. I don’t scare easily, and I don’t really care what he thinks of me. Elon Musk has accomplished a lot. As an astronaut, I’ve genuinely enjoyed watching SpaceX progress over the last 20 years, and I actually own a Tesla. But for some reason, he just attacked me on Twitter — calling me a “shill”. Why this man — the richest person on earth, the CEO of a few big companies, the President’s best buddy — is spending his time attacking people on the internet is beyond me. Now, he can go to war behind his keyboard all he wants. It’s a free country. But I’ve launched into orbit 4 times, I flew 39 combat missions in Desert Storm, and I held my wife’s hand in the hospital after she was shot in the head. I don’t scare easily, and I don’t really care what he thinks of me. What I do care about is that he is gutting our government, illegally firing federal workers, illegally dismantling independent federal agencies, spreading conspiracies, and empowering extremists. He’s trying to degrade government services that millions of people depend on — Medicaid, Medicare, Social Security, the VA, NOAA, the FAA, consumer watchdogs, and more, all to save a quick buck. People are scared. Many are already suffering because of what he’s done, and it’s only going to get worse if he’s allowed to continue. And for what — a tax cut for billionaires? Give me a break. I’m going to defend working families and the middle class against President Trump and Elon Musk with everything I’ve got. But I can’t do it alone. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** And Elon: When you finally get the nerve to climb into a rocket ship yourself, give me a call. Mark Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

name: Sarah McBride
subject: One more step along the road to authoritarianism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
We are a constitutional republic that is governed by laws, not by royal decrees.
#
This week Donald Trump likened himself to a king after trying to shut down New York’s congestion pricing system, and the White House was all too happy to amplify his message:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250221-1?refcode=em20250221-1771&amount=5&refcode2=1771_21716_vnRi1Z&akid=1771%2E21716%2EvnRi1Z)
This after Trump quoted, and the White House amplified, a quote from an insecure dictator (sound familiar?) who said, “He who saves his Country does not violate any Law.”
**But let’s make one thing clear: Americans don’t take orders from a king, whether Donald Trump wants them to or not.**
This is one more step along the road to authoritarianism that MAGA Republicans have been walking for _years_ , and it’s up to all of us to call it out for what it is and fight to stop it.
I’m working in Congress to hold the Trump administration accountable on everything from their unconstitutional funding freeze to their corrupt billionaire-led effort to decimate the federal government. **Because we are a constitutional republic that is governed by laws, not by royal decrees.**
But I’m counting on your grassroots support to keep it up.
[**If you’re with me, will you pitch in $5 to my campaign today and help me keep fighting?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250221-1?refcode=em20250221-1771&amount=5&refcode2=1771_21716_vnRi1Z&akid=1771%2E21716%2EvnRi1Z)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250221-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250221-1771&refcode2=1771_21716_vnRi1Z&akid=1771%2E21716%2EvnRi1Z)**
Thank you,
Sarah McBride

| | **After counsel from Katie Britt, President Trump takes most pro-IVF action in federal history**
---
[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=5d65fac57e0f4284af87cd3cb763a298&_e=p4UK0CDoNAiAAutmuzNeICcJQX4KfjUIv-S-X83Q0hy1OpOoSlU8n7P09WcXmxA7vTuvEZf8Xd_xEdmwbO8edr1SD6MP1L_VtGHAXJ26IDN04L8mcx926kQlRCtbTjVBucnmjYiYbX4olNmx0yrzXXax6v8cN4gHUTdTBSqUPFq7n9aXxW5BIduNA3lXjG_M-_jib80Ujy8xb8EQp92znc2YAI0LsApkSP8N6Rm6DQHpAb1YiVYnYOXt7sTiYrVYn4U-oO5aMojbgpNmIL2vfPUba0SUpatvD12QUjHEGlv_ifcOI4YKvc-ABYP57Mug1ZoPjmAWOvejyTcU5QpdiQ%3D%3D)
---
On Tuesday afternoon, President Donald Trump made good on a campaign promise that began in Alabama.

He signed an executive order directing federal agencies to develop policies that protect IVF access and reduce both out-of-pocket expenses and health plan costs.

The goal will make fertility treatments more affordable for families hoping to conceive.

For Trump, the decision wasn’t all policy – it was personal, and shaped in large measure by U.S. Senator Katie Britt.
---

[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=5d65fac57e0f4284af87cd3cb763a298&_e=p4UK0CDoNAiAAutmuzNeICcJQX4KfjUIv-S-X83Q0hxMdecY55CE9in-dtILuvvIztYcdhK3rzrxBumoIqmfNcc4RY7McogzMqRmtqB51ZOErM56sHVwkPcbP_wlj7kXfhE5FG8rwg-XPWbT12MTAFHXcIKd4o24lMdqSBUuFp34-0HgMiIQ_sn-AHhVJAGtZKskIYrhx_-oIPEkQAJAnH9-bC8itE10_XAU2nj40nKbRJcomjgEIWYnCqAS5ifmqarsx9OpLpqwObttAzSvtmKVT8X16SPUniLDESM2E_GjwEvqmyWozLNvqWFI3yBT-eTmlQMnKVH12_xFNpGqv8x3nbRK21CfhQamxwYYk64%3D)

U.S. Senator Katie Britt is pushing for the implementation of “common sense solutions” to fight the youth mental health crisis that has been made worse by the widespread use of social media.

As part of her effort, the lawmaker from Alabama has reintroduced legislation that she believes will help protect the country’s youth from the damaging effects of unregulated social media usage.
---

| | **Britt, Tuberville urge Patel to fill slots at FBI’s campus on Redstone Arsenal**
---
[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=5d65fac57e0f4284af87cd3cb763a298&_e=p4UK0CDoNAiAAutmuzNeICcJQX4KfjUIv-S-X83Q0hwk37II5-6Sm6bdozOkD8JW6dT4T6rATJYu-RzsP_wmYamOZ_0YP2yvVsn-fx4EfTJsUXSdw5_QOij-BfTiTtTMvnrJVCiqhKyjIuYeLy-fPgtwxEbNlubD-kRVAmngSfaYgZjppi3L92qonHFa-VjIENA65e_6YLQgE7Nn01i7mm2KG3_UABGH8sMbpl6ff51OHxKMJscRNxZXTU-VSsFhtAnMaXSVGROFOo29asoD7e50reM8ZX7R8TXe7ABNkIIolXZDD2Kj6BGClt5R_JCx)
---
FBI Director Kash Patel told Sens. Katie Britt and Tommy Tuberville he will fill open positions at the FBI’s campus on Redstone Arsenal.

Patel’s comments came ahead of his confirmation hearing before the Senate Judiciary Committee last week. He was confirmed today by the full Senate.

Britt and Tuberville sent a letter to Patel today following his confirmation urging him to immediately fill 1,000 of the open slots at the agency’s campus in Huntsville.

clean_body: | | | | | Official Team Britt Newsletter | | After counsel from Katie Britt, President Trump takes most pro-IVF action in federal history On Tuesday afternoon, President Donald Trump made good on a campaign promise that began in Alabama. He signed an executive order directing federal agencies to develop policies that protect IVF access and reduce both out-of-pocket expenses and health plan costs. The goal will make fertility treatments more affordable for families hoping to conceive. For Trump, the decision wasn’t all policy – it was personal, and shaped in large measure by U.S. Senator Katie Britt. | | Katie Britt advocates for ‘Kids Off Social Media Act in Senate floor speech U.S. Senator Katie Britt is pushing for the implementation of “common sense solutions” to fight the youth mental health crisis that has been made worse by the widespread use of social media. As part of her effort, the lawmaker from Alabama has reintroduced legislation that she believes will help protect the country’s youth from the damaging effects of unregulated social media usage. | | Britt, Tuberville urge Patel to fill slots at FBI’s campus on Redstone Arsenal FBI Director Kash Patel told Sens. Katie Britt and Tommy Tuberville he will fill open positions at the FBI’s campus on Redstone Arsenal. Patel’s comments came ahead of his confirmation hearing before the Senate Judiciary Committee last week. He was confirmed today by the full Senate. Britt and Tuberville sent a letter to Patel today following his confirmation urging him to immediately fill 1,000 of the open slots at the agency’s campus in Huntsville. | | | | | | | | - | Gulf of America Hat Celebrate conservative leadership and show your patriotism with this unique, high quality, Made-in-America hat. | | Follow Katie On Social Media: | | | ---|---|--- SIGN UP FOR SMS ALERTS: TEXT "KATIE" TO 27488 By texting KATIE, you consent to join a recurring SMS/MMS text messaging program that will provide alerts, donation requests, updates, and other important information. name: Team Slotkin
subject: Thursday in the Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2246%2E135344%2Elo2lqX)

Friend --
Yesterday was a busy day in the Senate, and Elissa was working on a wide range of issues.
In the afternoon, Elissa joined Christiane Amanpour on CNN for a conversation about President Trump’s Ukraine policy. As she said – “if you’re Putin, you’re popping champagne in Moscow.” Check it out [**here:**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/3672?t=2&akid=2246%2E135344%2Elo2lqX)
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/3672?t=3&akid=2246%2E135344%2Elo2lqX)
Starting in the evening, Elissa pulled an all-nighter in the Senate, participating in what’s called a “vote-a-rama.”
When a budget bill is brought to the floor of the Senate, each Senator has the ability to introduce as many amendments as they’d like, leading to a long, sometimes all-night process of voting.
In this case, Republicans brought a budget resolution to the floor with all sorts of cuts – and Senate Democrats took the opportunity to try to block some of the things that would bring economic or physical harm to Americans.
Elissa’s amendment? A 1:00 am proposal to ensure no cuts to any staff or programs that are currently responding to avian flu – but it was blocked by the Republicans.
The final GOP budget that passed, in the 4:00 am hour, is going to make big cuts to programs that are important to Michiganders, and enact tax policy changes to benefit the ultra-wealthy.
Michiganders’ personal and economic security will always be Elissa’s guideposts, and will continue to drive her work in the Senate.
-Team Slotkin
* * *

👋🏻 **Wait, before you click away!** 🇺🇸
United States Senators often keep on fundraising after their election ends, but Elissa doesn't want to keep bombarding your inbox with fundraising requests.
What we will do is send you good, timely content - like this message. Stuff you might open without dread.
But she does hope you may consider making a small, monthly recurring contribution. Even just $5 or $10 - so we don't have to send those mass fundraising emails while Elissa is focused on her work as a Senator.
[**Make a recurring contribution to Elissa Slotkin's campaign here.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-feb25.hgaHPE&refcode=em250221-1&t=4&akid=2246%2E135344%2Elo2lqX)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your recurring contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $10 MONTHLY](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/3243?c0=ebs-em-feb25.ZmO5oB&refcode=em250221-1&t=5&akid=2246%2E135344%2Elo2lqX)**
---
****
| **[DONATE OTHER](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-feb25.hgaHPE&refcode=em250221-1&t=6&akid=2246%2E135344%2Elo2lqX)**
---
****

P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826

Emerge is working to secure representation for the New American Majority by recruiting and training women leaders across the country to run for office—from school boards to Congress!

| Peter,

Our country is the strongest when our leaders truly represent us. With Trump’s return to power, we need strong leaders who will protect our rights, stand up for our communities, and ensure every voice is heard.

**Decisions that shape our country are made at _every_ level of government. **Emerge is working to secure representation for the New American Majority by recruiting and training women leaders across the country to run for office— _from school boards to Congress!_

By electing _more_ Emerge women to office, we can build a stronger defense against the Trump Administration's dangerous executive orders and secure a lasting infrastructure for future generations.

Kennedy Jr. and Tulsi Gabbard are as corrupt as they come._**

They are the newest members of Donald Trump's corrupt Cabinet, confirmed by the Senate as Secretary of Health and Human Services and Director of National Intelligence.

_The unfortunate reality is: RFK Jr. and Tulsi Gabbard are completely unqualified and unhinged._

But that doesn't matter to Senator Susan Collins, who has played a key role in confirming RFK Jr. and Tulsi Gabbard's nominations.

[**_We 're sending a letter to Susan Collins by the end of the day - and we're asking for you to add your signature. Read the letter below and chip in $5 or more to sign:_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59747?amount=5&amounts=25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=3&akid=22880%2E4449941%2EGD2dMm) | | [CHIP IN TO SIGN ->](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59747?amount=5&amounts=25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=4&akid=22880%2E4449941%2EGD2dMm)
---
***** CHIP IN TO SIGN YOUR NAME *****
Dear Senator Susan Collins,

I could have sworn that you were better than this - that you had the interests of the American people at heart.

I thought RFK Jr.'s deranged conspiracy theories and dangerous attitudes towards vaccines, abortion, and public health would be enough for you to vote against him. _Boy, was I wrong._

I thought Tulsi Gabbard's sympathy towards Russian and Syrian dictators would be enough for you to vote against her. _Boy, was I wrong._

**I gave you chance after chance, I was wrong. I was duped. I 'm so deeply disappointed in you.**

I didn't realize that you'll do anything you can to protect Trump and his billionaire cronies -- even if you won't admit it.

And now, I'm going to do everything in my power to hold you accountable and RETIRE you from the Senate.

[**_That 's why I'm chipping in to Fight for Reform to fund their efforts to ban Dark Money from our politics, while exposing the GOP's corruption throughout the Trump presidency._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59747?amount=5&amounts=25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=5&akid=22880%2E4449941%2EGD2dMm)

[_X. dpwillis67@gmail.com_](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59747?amount=5&amounts=25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=7&akid=22880%2E4449941%2EGD2dMm)

_Fight for Reform_

Republicans put forward a budget plan that proposes massive cuts to family programs and significant tax giveaways to billionaires.

| | Last night, in an all-night vote-a-rama, we saw Republicans push a budget that is a masterclass in misplaced priorities that guts critical programs Americans rely on while serving up tax giveaways to the ultra-wealthy. **To put it plainly: families lose, billionaires win.** Their scheme would slash billions of dollars from essential programs, including cuts to Medicare, Medicaid, housing, climate programs, and education, while handing out tax giveaways to the wealthiest Americans. Despite claims of being “fiscal hawks,” this Republican budget plan will also drive our country deeper into debt by ballooning the deficit. It’s an attack on working families to make the rich richer while destroying programs that help everyday Americans thrive. My office is getting thousands and thousands of phone calls, voicemails, and emails opposing the Trump-Musk MAGA budget scam. You’re rightfully concerned about the impacts on housing, education, child care, and health care. **As the Ranking Member on the Senate Budget Committee, I’m going to fight this budget proposal with every tool we have.** **_I will not vote for any budget plan that harms working families._** Onward, _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1?refcode=x_250221_billionaires_EOM1_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1?refcode=x_250221_billionaires_EOM1_act]
Hi Peter,
In just ONE WEEK, we face a critical deadline. And the stakes couldn’t be higher. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1?refcode=x_250221_billionaires_EOM1_act]
Billionaires – two, in particular – have successfully infiltrated our government in an effort to preserve their status and power. And the ultra-wealthy who haven’t publicly aligned themselves with the Trump administration remain silent, afraid to challenge his extreme agenda. Why? Because they benefit from his policies, while the rest of us are left to fight for our dignity, equality, and democracy.
Their silence speaks volumes about the power of corporate influence in politics — and it's one that we refuse to accept. Because let’s face it: it’s not the billionaires who are threatened by Trump’s policies, it’s the rest of us. As we speak, his administration is targeting medicare cuts, pushing dangerous deregulation on climate action, undermining voting rights, and rolling back worker protections and diversity, equity, and inclusion initiatives — all while rewarding corporate giants.
But Peter, it's the grassroots like YOU who have the power to turn the tide.
That’s why Politivist Action PAC exists – to reject corporate influence, fight to eliminate big money in politics, and support candidates who truly fight for us .
We need your help to reach our goal this month, so we can continue supporting these champions of justice. With just ONE WEEK to go, will you join us in this fight and help us meet our February deadline? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1?refcode=x_250221_billionaires_EOM1_act]
